title: Combining Retrieval-Augmented Text Generation with LLMs for Reading Content Recommendations
summary: This work presents the design, implementation, and evaluation of a system for generating personalized reading content using Large Language Models (LLMs) combined with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). The proposed architecture consists of four modules: Input, RAG, Generation, and Judging and enables users to specify both a question and a target reading content complexity. RAG is employed to retrieve relevant information from the Internet, enriching and grounding the content produced by three modern LLMs: Meta LLaMA 4 Scout, LLaMA 3.1 8B Instant, and Google Gemma2 9B. Reading materials are generated using three prompting strategies (Chain-of-Thought, zero-shot, and few-shot), and the LLM-as-a-Judge module automatically evaluates answer quality and alignment with the desired readability level. Experimental results show that RAG consistently improves system performance across all models and prompting techniques, increasing relevance and particularly groundedness by up to 26-35 percentage points. Overall, the findings demonstrate that the RAG-augmented architecture effectively produces reading content tailored to user queries and desired textual complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合大语言模型（LLM）与检索增强生成（RAG）的个性化阅读内容生成系统，通过四模块架构支持用户指定问题和目标阅读难度，并利用LLM-as-a-Judge自动评估质量与可读性对齐度；实验表明RAG显著提升内容相关性与事实依据性（提升26–35个百分点）。
AI.motivation: 解决现有LLM生成阅读内容缺乏针对性、事实依据不足及难以按用户所需复杂度定制的问题。
AI.method: 构建包含Input、RAG、Generation和Judging四模块的系统；使用LLaMA 4 Scout、LLaMA 3.1 8B Instant和Gemma2 9B三种模型；采用Chain-of-Thought、zero-shot和few-shot三种提示策略；RAG从互联网检索信息以增强生成内容；LLM-as-a-Judge模块评估答案质量与可读性匹配度。
AI.result: RAG在所有模型和提示策略下均显著提升性能，尤其使内容‘groundedness’（事实依据性）提高26–35个百分点；系统能有效生成符合用户问题与指定复杂度的阅读材料。
AI.conclusion: RAG增强架构能有效提升个性化阅读内容生成的相关性、事实准确性和可读性可控性，为教育与自适应学习场景提供实用技术路径。

title: Co-Scraper: query-aware DOM Pruning and Reusable Scraper Synthesis for Lightweight Web Data Extraction
summary: The abundant and heterogeneous nature of web content necessitates automated information extraction, and generating scrapers that can be reused across similar web pages offers an effective solution for scalable data extraction. In this work, we propose Co-Scraper, a two-stage framework capable of handling the hierarchical complexity of long HTML documents. By integrating a query-aware DOM pruning mechanism with stable extraction strategy induction, Co-Scraper can effectively transforms web content into executable programmatic wrappers using a fine-tuned Qwen3-8B model. On the test set of SWDE, Co-Scraper achieves state-of-the-art performance with an F1 score of 94.78% and a reuse success rate of 90.39%. This framework significantly enhances the accuracy and resilience of data extraction, providing a highly efficient approach for web data acquisition tasks.

AI.tldr: Co-Scraper是一个两阶段框架，结合查询感知的DOM剪枝与稳定提取策略归纳，利用微调的Qwen3-8B模型生成可复用的网页抓取程序，在SWDE数据集上达到94.78% F1和90.39%复用成功率。
AI.motivation: 网页内容丰富且异构，需自动化信息抽取；为实现可跨相似页面复用的抓取器，提升数据提取的可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出Co-Scraper两阶段框架：第一阶段采用查询感知的DOM剪枝机制简化长HTML结构；第二阶段通过稳定提取策略归纳，结合微调的Qwen3-8B模型生成可执行的程序化包装器。
AI.result: 在SWDE测试集上F1达94.78%，复用成功率达90.39%，显著提升提取准确率与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Co-Scraper为网页数据采集提供了高效、准确且具备高复用性的新方法，有效应对长HTML文档的层次复杂性。

title: Retrieval-as-a-Service:A System-Oriented Analysis of Industrial Retrieval Pipelines in Web Systems
summary: Retrieval systems have become a foundational infrastructure component in modern Web services, supporting applications such as content recommendation, advertising targeting, and API discovery. In large-scale industrial environments, retrieval is increasingly deployed as an independent service layer, commonly referred to as Retrieval-as-a-Service (RaaS). This paper presents a system-oriented survey of industrial retrieval pipelines, focusing on architectural design and deployment trade-offs under real-world constraints. Unlike prior surveys that emphasize algorithmic developments, we analyze retrieval systems from an infrastructure perspective, highlighting how latency requirements, scalability constraints, and resource limitations shape system design in production environments. We introduce a unified RaaS pipeline abstraction that models retrieval as a multi-stage service, including high-efficiency candidate generation, embedding-based semantic matching, and resource-aware re-ranking. We further examine the integration of Large Language Model (LLM)-based retrieval mechanisms and analyze their impact on semantic performance, latency, and computational overhead. The results provide a system-level understanding of retrieval as a service-oriented infrastructure and offer practical guidelines for designing scalable, efficient, and QoS-aware retrieval architectures in large-scale Web systems.

AI.tldr: 本文对工业检索系统进行了系统层面的综述，提出了一种统一的Retrieval-as-a-Service（RaaS）流水线抽象模型，涵盖高效候选生成、嵌入式语义匹配和资源感知重排序，并分析了大语言模型（LLM）在检索中的应用及其对性能、延迟与计算开销的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有综述多聚焦算法进展，而工业检索系统在真实场景中受延迟、可扩展性与资源限制等基础设施约束显著，亟需从系统架构视角进行分析。
AI.method: 提出统一的RaaS流水线抽象模型，分阶段建模检索流程；系统分析工业部署中的架构设计与权衡；评估LLM增强检索机制在语义性能、延迟与计算开销方面的实际影响。
AI.result: 明确了工业检索系统的关键设计权衡；揭示了LLM引入带来的性能提升与资源代价；提供了面向大规模Web系统的可扩展、高效、QoS感知检索架构设计指南。
AI.conclusion: 检索正演变为服务化基础设施，其设计必须兼顾算法能力与系统约束；RaaS流水线抽象与LLM集成分析为构建现代检索系统提供了系统级方法论与实践依据。

title: Beyond Positive Signals: Unlocking Implicit Negative Behaviors for Enhanced Sequential User Modeling
summary: User behavior sequence modeling has become a central component in modern click-through rate (CTR) prediction. Over the past years, the community has invested substantial effort into improving how sequences are encoded, from target-aware attention and interest evolution networks to unified architectures that jointly process sequential and non-sequential features. However, a more fundamental question remains under-explored: what should constitute the behavior sequence? Current practice constructs sequences exclusively from positive interactions (clicks, purchases, completions), while the far more abundant implicit negative behaviors (skips, low engagement, scroll-past) are largely underutilized. As gains from longer positive sequences approach diminishing returns, we revisit this underutilized data source within the sequential modeling framework. In this paper, we demonstrate that mixed-polarity behavior sequences, which chronologically interleave positive and negative tokens within a fixed length budget, consistently outperform positive-only sequences across diverse model architectures with negligible additional computational overhead. We further identify a semantic indistinguishability problem inherent to naive polarity embeddings and propose Target-Aware Polarity Fusion (TAPF), a lightweight target-conditioned gating mechanism that provides additional gains by differentiating behavioral evidence. Notably, even the simpler polarity bias baseline captures the majority of improvement, underscoring that the primary contribution is the mixed-polarity data paradigm itself. Experiments on three public benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements of +1.9% to +9.6% relative AUC across five architectures, which validate the practical value of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出混合极性行为序列建模方法，将正向（点击、购买）与负向（跳过、低互动）用户行为统一编码，显著提升CTR预测性能；核心贡献在于数据范式创新而非复杂模型设计，并提出轻量级Target-Aware Polarity Fusion（TAPF）机制进一步优化。
AI.motivation: 现有CTR预测中行为序列仅使用正向交互（如点击），而大量隐式负向行为（如跳过、滑过）被忽略；随着正向序列长度增加收益递减，亟需挖掘负向行为的价值。
AI.method: 构建混合极性行为序列（正负行为按时间交错排列），在固定长度预算下联合建模；提出Target-Aware Polarity Fusion（TAPF）机制，通过目标条件门控区分不同极性行为语义；同时验证极性偏差基线已能捕获大部分增益。
AI.result: 在三个公开基准上，五种主流模型均取得+1.9%至+9.6%相对AUC提升，且计算开销几乎可忽略；TAPF带来额外增益，但主要收益来自混合极性序列本身。
AI.conclusion: 混合极性行为序列是一种简单、通用且高效的数据增强范式，为序列建模提供了新视角，其价值远超模型结构改进。

title: DC-Motion: Decoupling Semantics and Details via Discrete-Continuous Tokens for Human Motion Generation
summary: Text-to-motion generation requires synthesizing physically realistic dynamics that strictly follow complex and long-horizon textual instructions. Existing approaches rely on homogeneous representation spaces that may fail to capture the hierarchical nature of human motion, with diffusion models struggling at compositional semantic reasoning and AR models sacrificing fine-grained physical details due to quantization. To solve it, we introduce DC-Motion, a factorized generative framework designed to explicitly decouple semantics and details via discrete-continuous tokens. A Discrete-Continuous VAE (DC-VAE) first decomposes motion into discrete tokens for semantics and continuous residuals for fine-grained dynamics. Then, a masked AR model predicts the discrete structure from text, and a lightweight residual diffusion model recovers the continuous physical details. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DC-Motion effectively improves the capability to follow complex instructions. By effectively balancing semantic controllability and physical realism, our approach offers a highly adaptable modeling paradigm for human motion generation. On both HumanML3D and KIT-ML datasets, DC-Motion achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering the best FID for motion realism and R-precision for text alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DC-Motion框架，通过离散-连续联合建模解耦语义与物理细节，提升文本到动作生成中对复杂指令的遵循能力与运动真实性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到动作生成方法难以兼顾长时序复杂指令理解与高保真物理动态建模，扩散模型语义组合性弱，自回归模型因量化损失物理细节。
AI.method: 提出DC-Motion：1）DC-VAE将动作分解为离散语义token和连续残差；2）掩码自回归模型从文本生成离散结构；3）轻量级残差扩散模型重建连续物理细节。
AI.result: 在HumanML3D和KIT-ML数据集上达到SOTA，FID（运动真实性）和R-precision（文本对齐）指标最优。
AI.conclusion: DC-Motion通过显式解耦语义与细节，在可控性与真实性间取得更好平衡，为人体动作生成提供新范式。

title: MiroBench: Benchmarking Realism in Agentic Simulation of Real-world Discussions
summary: LLM agents are increasingly used to simulate real world interactions, but it remains unclear whether simulated behaviors preserve the content patterns and interaction dynamics of real human behaviors. Existing evaluations remain fragmented, which makes it difficult to compare systems or measure progress. In this paper, we focus on Reddit discussions as a concrete first step toward evaluating real-world social simulation. Reddit threads provide public, topic-grounded, multi-party interactions where people share experiences, debate, seek advice, express emotion, and collectively respond to products, events, and social issues. These discussions offer an observable window into broader social behavior, making them a useful setting for testing whether LLM agents can reproduce not only fluent text, but also the distributional patterns and interaction dynamics of real online communities. We introduce MiroBench, a benchmark for Reddit discussion simulation built from 4,292 real Reddit threads. MiroBench uses statistical tests to compare generated and real discussions across four major aspects: repetition and semantic uniformity, narrative content, toxicity and aggression, and structural complexity. Experiments across five domains and five models show that current simulators remain distributionally mismatched with real Reddit threads, while a lightweight prompt-based improvement procedure provides only limited gains. MiroBench offers a concrete benchmark for measuring, diagnosing, and improving realism in LLM-based social simulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MiroBench基准，用于评估LLM代理在Reddit讨论模拟中的真实性，涵盖重复性、叙事内容、毒性及结构复杂性四方面，实验表明当前模型仍与真实数据存在分布差异。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理行为模拟缺乏统一评估标准，难以衡量其是否真实再现人类社交互动模式；Reddit作为公开、多角色、话题驱动的社交平台，为检验模拟真实性提供了理想场景。
AI.method: 构建基于4292条真实Reddit线程的MiroBench基准，采用统计检验方法从重复与语义均匀性、叙事内容、毒性与攻击性、结构复杂性四个维度对比生成与真实讨论的分布差异。
AI.result: 五类领域与五种模型的实验显示，当前LLM模拟器在所有维度上均显著偏离真实Reddit讨论分布；轻量级提示优化仅带来有限提升。
AI.conclusion: MiroBench为LLM社会模拟的真实性评估提供了可量化、可诊断、可改进的基准框架，揭示了当前模型在分布拟合上的根本局限。

title: Bayesian Optimization for Learning Nonlinear MPC in Autonomous Agent Navigation
comment: Published at the IEEE ICRA 2026 Xplore Workshop (Oral), Cross-Disciplinary aspects of Exploration in Robotics, Reinforcement Learning, and Search
summary:
Real-time autonomous navigation in dynamic, unknown environments remains a fundamental challenge for mobile robotics. We propose a map-free framework that tightly integrates reactive rolling-horizon planning with nonlinear Model Predictive Control (MPC). At each control cycle, a LiDAR-based Gaussian occupancy representation is constructed and used to generate collision-free trajectories via A* search, which are then tracked by a CasADi/IPOPT MPC formulation incorporating a smooth sigmoid obstacle barrier. To improve robustness to parameter sensitivity, we adopt an offline Bayesian optimization scheme based on Tree-structured Parzen Estimators (TPE), which identifies near-optimal controller parameters with respect to a composite navigation objective. In addition, a Gaussian Process surrogate is used to analyze parameter sensitivity and provide insight into the optimization landscape.
  The proposed framework is robot-agnostic and is evaluated on the Unitree Go2 quadruped in simulation using Gazebo, followed by deployment on the physical robot. Experimental results show that parameters tuned in simulation transfer effectively to hardware, maintaining comparable performance without additional tuning. The full system achieves up to a 90.0\% navigation success rate when deployed, along with a 38.9\% average improvement in the evaluation metrics across simulated environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需建图的实时自主导航框架，融合滚动时域规划与非线性模型预测控制（MPC），结合LiDAR高斯占据栅格、A*路径搜索和带平滑Sigmoid障碍屏障的MPC跟踪，并采用基于TPE的贝叶斯优化离线调参，提升鲁棒性；该框架在Unitree Go2四足机器人仿真与实机上验证有效，参数可跨平台迁移，导航成功率高达90.0%，仿真指标平均提升38.9%。
AI.motivation: 解决移动机器人在动态未知环境中实时自主导航的根本性挑战，尤其针对建图依赖强、参数敏感、仿真到实物迁移困难等问题。
AI.method: 提出无地图框架，结合LiDAR构建高斯占据表示，用A*生成无碰撞轨迹，再由CasADi/IPOPT实现含Sigmoid障碍屏障的非线性MPC跟踪；引入基于TPE的离线贝叶斯优化调参，并用高斯过程分析参数敏感性。
AI.result: 在Gazebo仿真及Unitree Go2实机上验证，仿真调优参数可直接部署至硬件且性能相当；实机导航成功率达90.0%，仿真评估指标平均提升38.9%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具备机器人无关性、强鲁棒性与良好仿真-实物迁移能力，为动态未知环境下的实时自主导航提供了高效可行的解决方案。

title: RAMS: Resource-Adaptive and Detection-Conditioned Model Switching for Embedded Edge Perception
summary: Edge object detection on embedded hardware requires balancing inference latency and detection quality under changing resource pressure. We present RAMS, a lightweight runtime controller that monitors device pressure, calibrates switching thresholds from idle behavior, and dynamically selects among three resident YOLOv8 tiers (NANO/SMALL/MEDIUM at 320/416/640 px) without model-reload latency. RAMS defines five switching policies, including two detection-conditioned variants that prevent aggressive downgrades after recent vulnerable-road-user (VRU) detections. We further introduce the VRU-Weighted Accuracy Score (SWAS), a scalar metric for offline policy comparison without ground-truth annotations, together with an oracle-bounded variant that separates detector circularity from genuine tier-retention benefit. Across Raspberry Pi 5, x86 laptops, and Jetson Orin ONNX/TensorRT deployments, the same controller equations operate over a 37x latency range. On Jetson Orin TensorRT under heavy load, the safety2 policy achieves 3.41 ms mean latency, 5.6x faster than fixed-MEDIUM inference, while retaining 74% of its proxy accuracy through near-NANO operation with selective SMALL and MEDIUM locks during VRU-positive windows. Detection-conditioned switching improves SWAS by 25.4% under oracle scoring and 47.3% under detector-derived scoring relative to threshold-only policies under heavy load. Live KITTI evaluation reports per-tier VRU recall of 24.2%, 41.2%, and 59.0%, showing that reactive overrides are fundamentally limited by baseline detector recall.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAMS，一种轻量级运行时控制器，用于在嵌入式设备上动态切换YOLOv8多尺度模型（NANO/SMALL/MEDIUM），以在资源压力变化下兼顾低延迟与高检测质量；引入VRU加权准确率评分（SWAS）评估策略，并验证其在多种硬件平台上的有效性与安全性提升。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备上对象检测需在资源压力动态变化下平衡推理延迟与检测质量，现有方法缺乏实时自适应能力，尤其对脆弱道路使用者（VRU）检测的安全性保障不足。
AI.method: 提出RAMS控制器：实时监控设备压力、基于空闲行为校准切换阈值、无重载延迟地动态选择YOLOv8三档分辨率模型；设计五种切换策略（含两种检测条件触发策略，避免VRU检测后过度降级）；提出VRU-Weighted Accuracy Score（SWAS）及其oracle-bounded变体用于离线策略评估。
AI.result: 在Jetson Orin TensorRT重负载下，safety2策略实现3.41ms平均延迟（比固定MEDIUM快5.6倍），同时保持74%代理精度；检测条件切换使SWAS分别提升25.4%（oracle评分）和47.3%（检测器衍生评分）；KITTI实测各档VRU召回率分别为24.2%、41.2%、59.0%。
AI.conclusion: RAMS实现了跨平台、宽延迟范围（37×）的鲁棒动态调度；检测条件策略显著提升安全关键场景下的精度-延迟权衡；但性能上限受限于基础检测器本身的VRU召回能力。

title: PhoneHarness: Harnessing Phone-Use Agents through Mixed GUI, CLI, and Tool Actions
summary: Phone agents are increasingly expected to complete real mobile workflows rather than merely predict the next screen action. However, much of the current mobile-agent literature still evaluates agents primarily as GUI controllers that observe a screen, emit taps and swipes, and are scored by target app state. Real phone-use tasks are broader: they require deciding when to use app GUIs, device-side commands, or structured tools, while leaving evidence that the intended side effect actually occurred. We introduce PhoneHarness, a mixed-action benchmark and execution harness for studying phone-use agents on verifiable mobile workflows. PhoneHarness runs a device-side agent loop over GUI, CLI, and host-side tool actions, combining deterministic action routing with bounded GUI delegation and auditable execution traces. Its benchmark, PhoneHarness Bench, evaluates whether agents complete tasks with observable side effects, not only whether they produce plausible final answers. On the annotated evaluation split, PhoneHarness reaches a 75.0% pass rate, outperforming the strongest non-PhoneHarness settings by 12.9 percentage points. PhoneHarness and PhoneHarness Bench therefore play distinct but mutually dependent roles: the harness makes mixed phone workflows executable, while the benchmark measures whether agents can use that harness reliably and safely. Our findings suggest that reliable phone automation depends on action-surface routing and verifiable execution, not only visual GUI control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PhoneHarness，一个用于评估手机代理在可验证移动工作流中执行能力的混合动作基准和执行框架。它结合GUI、CLI和主机端工具操作，强调可观测的副作用而非仅目标应用状态，显著提升了任务完成率。
AI.motivation: 现有移动代理研究主要关注GUI控制，而真实手机任务需要综合使用GUI、设备命令和结构化工具，并验证实际效果，因此需要更全面的评估框架。
AI.method: 设计PhoneHarness执行框架，支持GUI、CLI和主机端工具的混合动作；构建PhoneHarness Bench基准，以可观测副作用为评价标准；采用确定性动作路由、受限GUI委托和可审计执行轨迹。
AI.result: 在标注评估集上达到75.0%通过率，比最强非PhoneHarness设置高出12.9个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的手机自动化依赖于动作面路由与可验证执行，而不仅是视觉GUI控制；PhoneHarness框架与基准相辅相成，推动手机代理向真实场景落地。

title: A Definition of Good Explanations and the Challenges Explaining LLM Outputs
summary: How to define a good explanation is a long-standing philosophical debate which has found recent renewed interest in the context of AI outputs. Explainability is crucial for AI adoption in many contexts, but in order to produce good explanations of AI systems, we must first have an understanding of what good explanations are. In this paper we propose a definition inspired by the notion of counterfactual explanations, however we argue that one must also take into account the interlocutor's prior beliefs in each fact that could be offered in an explanation. We explore the ramifications of this definition for AI explainability and, in particular, why LLM outputs are difficult to produce good explanations for.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种受反事实解释启发的“好解释”定义，强调需结合听者对解释中各事实的先验信念，并探讨该定义对AI可解释性（尤其是大语言模型输出）的影响。
AI.motivation: 当前AI可解释性研究缺乏对“什么是好解释”的清晰哲学基础，而这是构建可靠解释方法的前提。
AI.method: 基于反事实解释框架，引入听者先验信念作为解释质量的关键维度，进行概念分析与理论探讨。
AI.result: 指出忽视听者先验信念会导致解释失效；并解释为何大语言模型（LLM）的输出尤其难以生成符合该定义的优质解释。
AI.conclusion: ‘好解释’必须是反事实敏感且语境依赖的，尤其需适配听者的知识状态；这对AI解释系统的设计具有根本性指导意义。

title: QPILOTS: Efficient Test-Time Q-Steering for Flow Policies
summary: Flow-matching and diffusion policies are expressive action generators, but optimizing them with temporal-difference reinforcement learning (RL) remains difficult. Effective policy extraction requires exploiting the critic's action gradient, yet directly backpropagating this signal through a multi-step denoising process can be numerically unstable. Existing methods work around this either by discarding gradient information, distilling the policy into a simpler one-step actor, or repeatedly fine-tuning the denoising policy as the critic improves. We propose QPILOTS, a method that leaves the original policy unmodified and steers the denoising process at inference time. At each denoising step, instead of evaluating the critic on the noisy intermediate action where critic predictions are unreliable, we first project that intermediate state to an estimate of the final clean action and compute the critic gradient there. We introduce two variants: QPILOTS-U uses a fast single-point approximation, while QPILOTS-M draws differentiable posterior samples via a learned auxiliary network. On a standard offline-to-online RL benchmark, QPILOTS achieves the best aggregate performance, reaching an average success rate of 90% across 50 tasks. We also apply QPILOTS to steer a large, frozen, pretrained Vision-Language Action (VLA) foundation model, outperforming or matching prior inference-time approaches across six manipulation tasks in simulation.

AI.tldr: QPILOTS是一种在推理时引导去噪过程的新方法，通过在每个去噪步骤中将中间噪声动作投影到最终干净动作的估计上并计算 critic 梯度，从而稳定地利用 critic 的动作梯度优化 flow-matching 和扩散策略，无需修改原始策略。
AI.motivation: flow-matching和扩散策略虽具表达力，但与TD强化学习结合时难以稳定优化；直接反向传播critic梯度 through 多步去噪过程数值不稳定，现有方法存在信息丢失、蒸馏简化或反复微调等问题。
AI.method: 提出QPILOTS，在推理时引导去噪过程：每一步不直接在噪声中间动作上评估critic（因其预测不可靠），而是先将其投影至对最终干净动作的估计，再在此处计算critic梯度；包含两种变体——QPILOTS-U（单点快速近似）和QPILOTS-M（通过学习的辅助网络生成可微后验样本）。
AI.result: 在标准离线转在线RL基准上，QPILOTS以50个任务平均90%的成功率取得最佳综合性能；并成功应用于冻结的大规模视觉语言动作（VLA）基础模型，在六个仿真操作任务中优于或匹敌先前的推理时方法。
AI.conclusion: QPILOTS提供了一种稳定、高效且无需修改原始策略的critic梯度利用方式，显著提升了扩散类策略在强化学习中的实用性，尤其适用于冻结大模型的推理时优化场景。

title: Guiding Federated Graph Recommendation with LLM-encoded knowledge
summary: Graph-based recommender systems are highly effective at extracting collaborative signals from user--item interactions, and federated learning (FL) allows these models to be trained while preserving user privacy. However, aggregating graph representations across distributed, non-IID clients remains a challenge; structural embeddings learned locally often misalign, and naive averaging fails to capture meaningful cross-client relationships. Most existing federated graph methods rely exclusively on structural aggregation, neglecting the rich, global semantic context available in large language models (LLMs). In this paper, we propose a novel framework that uses LLM-encoded knowledge to guide federated graph recommendation. Specifically, clients learn structural representations from local graphs while simultaneously summarizing their typical interaction patterns into compact semantic vectors via a frozen LLM. The central server then uses these LLM-encoded semantic signals to discover related preference patterns across clients, guiding the selective aggregation of their structural representations. This enables semantically informed cross-client collaboration without exposing raw data. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks show that guiding structural alignment with LLM-encoded knowledge consistently improves recommendation accuracy over existing federated graph baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用大语言模型（LLM）编码的语义知识来指导联邦图推荐中结构表征对齐的新框架，显著提升非独立同分布客户端下的推荐精度。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦图推荐方法仅依赖结构聚合，忽视了大语言模型提供的全局语义信息；且本地结构嵌入易错位，简单平均无法建模跨客户端关系。
AI.method: 客户端在学习本地图结构表征的同时，用冻结的LLM生成交互模式的紧凑语义向量；服务器利用这些语义信号识别相似偏好，并指导结构表征的选择性聚合。
AI.result: 在标准基准上，该方法在推荐准确率上持续优于现有联邦图推荐基线。
AI.conclusion: LLM编码的语义知识可有效提升联邦图推荐中的跨客户端结构对齐与协作效果，兼顾隐私保护与性能提升。

title: Toward Richer Material Generation via Procedural Data Enhancement
summary:
Generative models for material creation are fundamentally limited by the quality and expressivity of available training data. Simple physically based rendering (PBR) materials, which combine a diffuse term with a single-lobe specular component, are commonly used for training but are insufficient to capture many important visual effects present in real materials.
  We present a method that enhances such simple PBR materials to more expressive ones, by augmenting the single GGX specular lobe into a layered model that captures a broader range of non-diffuse effects. Starting from a simple material, we procedurally construct a corresponding multi-lobe non-diffuse component guided by physical priors, enabling effects such as dust, clearcoat, and layered scattering. To provide a compact representation for downstream applications, we encode this non-diffuse component as a neural material with a shared 6D latent space, where each material instance is represented by two latent textures and decoded by a pretrained universal MLP. We further regularize the latent space to support material generation.
  The resulting neural material dataset enables training generative models for richer material creation. To demonstrate this application, we finetune a video diffusion model to produce neural latent textures that encode our multi-lobe material, and present generative results as proof of feasibility. Our procedural data enhancement approach is an important step toward improving expressivity in material generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过增强简单PBR材质（单GGX高光瓣）为多层、多瓣非漫反射模型的方法，结合物理先验生成如灰尘、清漆、分层散射等效果，并用共享6D潜在空间的神经材质编码表示，支持生成式模型训练。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式材质模型受限于训练数据质量与表达力；简单PBR材质无法表征真实材料中的复杂非漫反射效应（如清漆、灰尘、分层散射）。
AI.method: 将单GGX高光瓣扩展为基于物理先验的多层多瓣非漫反射模型；用两个潜在纹理+预训练通用MLP解码器，在共享6D潜空间中紧凑表示；引入正则化以支持材质生成。
AI.result: 构建了支持生成任务的神经材质数据集；微调视频扩散模型成功生成编码多瓣材质的潜在纹理，验证了方法可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该过程式数据增强方法显著提升了材质生成的表达能力，是迈向高保真、可生成材质建模的关键一步。

title: Selective Control under Noisy Perception: Governance Failures Hidden by Aggregate Metrics in Modular Networks
summary: A content-moderation system can score well on every standard accuracy metric and still cause real harm, if its mistakes fall on the few users who connect otherwise separate communities. We show this in an agent-based model where N=240 learning agents on a community-structured network each post harmless, productive, or dangerous content, and a regulator removes or penalizes whatever a noisy classifier flags. Overall usefulness barely moves as the noise changes (one-way ANOVA, p=0.96): by aggregate measures, nothing looks wrong. The damage instead concentrates on these bridge users, whose useful posts are wrongly suppressed and whose dangerous posts are wrongly spared. A governance loss (L_gov) that prices these two mistakes separately from the cost of enforcement more than doubles under false-positive-heavy noise. Aggregate accuracy hides who is harmed, and the cheap quantity to audit is how many connections a user has (degree), a near-perfect proxy for the betweenness that defines a bridge (r=0.96).

AI.tldr: 本文通过基于代理的模型揭示了内容审核系统在整体准确率看似良好的情况下，仍可能对连接不同社区的“桥梁用户”造成严重伤害：其有用内容被误删、危险内容被误放，导致治理损失显著增加；研究指出，用户连接数（度）可作为识别桥梁用户的高效审计指标。
AI.motivation: 现有内容审核系统虽在标准准确率指标上表现良好，但其错误可能集中于连接不同社区的少数“桥梁用户”，从而引发实际社会危害，而传统评估方法无法揭示此类不公平影响。
AI.method: 构建一个包含240个学习型智能体的基于代理的模型，智能体位于具有社区结构的网络中，发布无害、有益或危险内容；监管者依据含噪声的分类器结果进行内容移除或惩罚；通过统计分析（如单因素方差分析）和相关性分析（如度与介数中心性的相关性）评估系统影响。
AI.result: 整体效用几乎不受噪声变化影响（p=0.96），但损害高度集中于桥梁用户；治理损失L_gov在高假阳性噪声下增加一倍以上；用户度（degree）与介数中心性高度相关（r=0.96），可作为桥梁用户的近似完美代理指标。
AI.conclusion: 聚合准确率掩盖了对关键群体的不均衡伤害，应转向以用户网络位置（如度）为核心的审计机制，以识别并保护桥梁用户，提升内容审核系统的公平性与治理效能。

title: Synthetic-to-Real Pipeline for Safe Landing Zone Detection
comment: Proceedings of Conference on Robots and Vision (CRV) 2026, Vancouver, British Columbia , Canada
summary: As Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) transition toward higher levels of autonomy, the ability to perform unassisted recovery in non-cooperative, unstructured environments becomes critical. Achieving safe autonomous landing requires high-fidelity semantic resolution to distinguish navigable terrain from hazardous obstacles, yet development is often hindered by the scarcity of annotated aerial datasets. This work proposes a comprehensive perception and data generation pipeline designed to bridge the sim-to-real gap for autonomous landing tasks. We introduce a procedural synthetic data engine that generates photorealistic urban environments with automated semantic annotations through domain randomization. A Transformer-based OneFormer architecture is fine-tuned exclusively on this synthetic data, leveraging multi-head self-attention mechanisms for global context resolution. To ensure operational safety, a deterministic landing module utilizes a Euclidean Distance Transform (EDT) and dynamic inference logic to identify the largest inscribed safe landing zones while maintaining strict clearance buffers around obstacles. Quantitative benchmarking against the UAVid dataset demonstrates robust semantic segmentation performance, while qualitative validation on real-world UAV footage confirms the system's ability to identify collision-free landing sites in unseen environments. Our results highlight the potential of high-fidelity procedural simulation to eliminate the need for manual annotation while providing robust, edge-deployable situational awareness for autonomous UAV recovery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于合成数据与Transformer模型的自主无人机着陆感知系统，通过程序化生成带语义标注的逼真城市环境，训练OneFormer模型进行语义分割，并结合确定性EDT着陆模块实现安全着陆区域识别，显著缓解了真实数据标注稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 无人机向高阶自主演进过程中，需在非协作、无结构环境中实现无人工干预的安全自主着陆；但高质量空中语义数据稀缺严重制约感知模型开发。
AI.method: 构建端到端感知与数据生成流水线：1）基于域随机化的程序化合成数据引擎生成带自动语义标注的逼真城市航拍图像；2）仅用该合成数据微调Transformer架构的OneFormer模型以提升全局上下文理解能力；3）设计基于欧氏距离变换（EDT）与动态推理的确定性着陆模块，确保障碍物缓冲与最大内接安全着陆区识别。
AI.result: 在UAVid数据集上定量评估显示语义分割性能稳健；在真实无人机视频中定性验证表明系统可在未见环境中准确识别无碰撞着陆点；合成数据可完全替代人工标注，支持边缘部署。
AI.conclusion: 高保真程序化仿真能有效弥合仿真到现实鸿沟，在无需人工标注前提下，为自主无人机回收提供鲁棒、可部署的态势感知能力。

title: AI for Maritime Security: Comparative Evaluation of CNN and Vision Transformer Architectures for Maritime Object Detection
summary: This study aims to enhance maritime security by using advanced Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Computer Vision (CV) techniques. For this purpose, it was designed and assessed intelligent object detection systems that can detect the presence of ships on the sea surface under different real-time environments. To achieve this goal, a maritime image dataset with 6,468 images was used, covering different weather conditions like cloudy, foggy, rainy, and sunny environments. Six deep learning architectures were evaluated, including a base Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) model, four transfer learning models (Xception, VGG16, MobileNetV2, and EfficientNetV2L), and a Vision Transformer (ViT) model. The models were compared using multiple performance indicators, including accuracy, Type I and Type II errors, model size, and video processing time. The results show that model performance varies depending on computational constraints and deployment conditions. While lightweight architectures are suitable for resource-limited devices, the ViT achieved the best overall performance, reaching 100% accuracy with the lowest error rates and the fastest video processing time. The findings highlight the potential of AI-driven computer vision systems for maritime surveillance, border protection, and autonomous navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于AI和计算机视觉的智能船舶检测系统，使用包含6468张图像的海事图像数据集，在多种天气条件下评估了六种深度学习模型（包括CNN、四种迁移学习模型及ViT），结果表明ViT在准确率、错误率和处理速度上表现最优。
AI.motivation: 提升海上安全，通过AI和计算机视觉技术实现实时、鲁棒的海上船舶检测，以支持海上监视、边境防护与自主导航。
AI.method: 构建并评估六种深度学习模型（基础CNN、Xception、VGG16、MobileNetV2、EfficientNetV2L、ViT），在涵盖多种天气条件的6468张海事图像数据集上进行训练与测试，并采用准确率、I/II类错误、模型大小和视频处理时间等多维度指标对比分析。
AI.result: ViT模型达到100%准确率，具有最低错误率和最快视频处理速度；轻量级模型更适合资源受限设备；模型性能显著依赖计算约束与部署环境。
AI.conclusion: AI驱动的计算机视觉系统在 maritime surveillance、border protection 和 autonomous navigation 中具有重要应用潜力，ViT是当前任务下综合性能最优的选择。

title: Evaluating the Robustness of Proof Autoformalization in Lean 4
summary: Proof autoformalization aims to translate a mathematical informal proof written in natural language into a formal proof in a formal language such as Lean~4. Several works have developed LLM-based models for proof autoformalization. However, existing evaluations have typically focused on translating well-formed informal proofs from curated datasets. We argue that a robust proof autoformalizer must remain faithful even for informal proofs that diverge from these idealized ones, and we present the first study on the robustness of proof autoformalization models. We formulate two categories of perturbations and evaluate robustness under each: a global perturbation paraphrases the informal proof in a different style, under which the formalization should remain consistent; a local perturbation alters a value, symbol, or proof step, possibly in a counterfactual way, and a robust formalization should faithfully reflect the perturbation rather than reverting to the original one or inferring a different one on its own. We build a benchmark with both perturbations on miniF2F and MATH-500, and automatically measure how stable a proof autoformalization's correctness is under global perturbations and how faithfully its output reflects local perturbations. We evaluate seven recent models, all of which are sensitive to global perturbations and mostly fail to remain faithful under local perturbations. Code and data are available via https://github.com/ucr-rai/robust-proof-autoformalization.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了证明自动形式化模型在面对非理想化非正式证明时的鲁棒性，提出了全局和局部两类扰动，并构建了新基准进行评估，发现现有模型在这两类扰动下均表现不佳。
AI.motivation: 现有证明自动形式化评估多基于理想化、结构良好的非正式证明，而实际中常遇到风格多变或含错误/改动的非正式证明，因此需评估模型在扰动下的鲁棒性与忠实性。
AI.method: 提出全局扰动（风格改写，要求形式化结果一致）和局部扰动（修改值、符号或步骤，要求形式化忠实反映改动），在miniF2F和MATH-500上构建扰动基准，自动评估模型在稳定性（global）和忠实性（local）两方面的表现。
AI.result: 对7个最新模型的评估表明：所有模型均对全局扰动敏感；绝大多数在局部扰动下无法保持忠实性，常恢复原证或自行推断错误内容。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM-based证明自动形式化模型鲁棒性严重不足，亟需提升对非理想化输入的稳定性和忠实性，本文为该方向提供了首个系统性评估框架与基准。

title: Dr-DCI: Scaling Direct Corpus Interaction via Dynamic Workspace Expansion
summary: Agentic search over large corpora relies on retriever-mediated interfaces (e.g., BM25 or ColBERT) for scalable candidate discovery. While effective at ranking relevant documents, these interfaces expose evidence only as ranked results or bounded document views, limiting agents' ability to reorganize material and verify constraints across documents. Direct Corpus Interaction (DCI) addresses this limitation by exposing shell-executable corpus operations for flexible search, filtering, comparison, and verification. However, full-corpus terminal commands become slow and unstable as the corpus grows, degrading performance and efficiency. We introduce DR-DCI, a retriever-steered DCI framework that treats retrieval as an agent-callable action for expanding a local workspace. Rather than operating directly over the full corpus, the agent dynamically pulls relevant documents into an evolving workspace and conducts DCI operations within it. This design combines retriever-level recall with DCI-style precision: retrieval keeps exploration scalable, while DCI preserves the local operations needed for effective evidence resolution. Experiments show that DR-DCI is both effective and efficient across scales. On Browsecomp-Plus, DR-DCI reaches 71.2\% accuracy, improving over raw DCI and ablated variants by up to 8.3 points while reducing tool usage, wall time, and estimated cost. With workspace-preserving context reset, accuracy further improves to 73.3\%. In corpus-scaling experiments, DR-DCI remains effective from 100K to 10M documents, whereas raw DCI becomes unstable and BM25 performs substantially worse. DR-DCI also scales to a 20M-scale file-per-document Wiki-18 QA setting, achieving an average score of 63.0 across six benchmarks and outperforming retrieval-based and trained search-agent baselines. Ablation analysis further shows that ranked previews and inter-document DCI are key to performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DR-DCI框架，结合检索器的高召回与直接语料交互（DCI）的高精度，通过动态构建局部工作区实现高效、可扩展的代理式语料搜索。
AI.motivation: 现有基于检索器的代理搜索受限于固定排序结果或有限文档视图，难以跨文档验证约束；而直接语料交互（DCI）在大规模语料下效率低、不稳定。
AI.method: 提出检索引导的DCI（DR-DCI）：将检索建模为智能体可调用的动作，动态将相关文档拉入局部工作区，并在该工作区内执行DCI操作（如过滤、比较、验证）。
AI.result: 在Browsecomp-Plus上达71.2%准确率（较原始DCI提升8.3点），支持100K–20M规模语料；引入上下文重置后达73.3%；在Wiki-18六项基准上平均得分63.0，优于检索基线和训练型搜索代理。
AI.conclusion: DR-DCI在保持DCI操作灵活性的同时，通过检索引导的工作区机制显著提升了大规模语料中代理搜索的准确性、效率与可扩展性。

title: GRAPE: Guided Parameter-Space Evolution for Compact Adversarial Robustness
summary:
Adversarial Training (AT) improves neural network robustness, but most methods train a fixed parameter space from the start. This paper asks whether the order in which parameters become optimizable can affect the final robust solution, even when the final architecture or computation budget is controlled.
  We propose GRAPE, Guided Parameter-Space Evolution, a training framework for compact adversarial robustness. GRAPE combines parameter-space stabilization with progressive hidden expansion: it stabilizes robust optimization in the currently exposed space, gradually releases new optimizable dimensions, and uses an adversarial spectral utilization score to guide newly released capacity toward high-pressure modules. In contrast to fixed-structure AT, GRAPE treats robust model learning as a process of progressive parameter-space exposure and evolution.
  Under the standard $\ell_\infty$ threat model on CIFAR-10, with fixed-structure ResNet-18 AT as a controlled reference, GRAPE improves PGD-20 robust accuracy from 51.70% to 56.94% at a nearly matched computation budget with a FLOPs ratio of 1.009x, while reducing parameter count by about 21.4%. A sequential grow variant with the same final ResNet-18 architecture reaches 56.52% PGD-20 robust accuracy, indicating that the gain is not only due to final architecture differences but also to the parameter-space exposure path. These results suggest that guided parameter-space evolution can yield compact and robust parameter configurations under matched computation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRAPE框架，通过渐进式参数空间演化提升对抗鲁棒性，在计算量相近下实现更高鲁棒精度与更少参数。
AI.motivation: 探究参数何时被优化（即参数空间暴露顺序）是否影响最终鲁棒解，而非仅依赖固定结构训练。
AI.method: GRAPE结合参数空间稳定化与渐进式隐层扩展：逐步释放新可优化维度，并用对抗谱利用率分数引导新增容量分配至高压力模块。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上，相比固定结构ResNet-18对抗训练，GRAPE将PGD-20鲁棒精度从51.70%提升至56.94%，FLOPs仅增0.9%，参数减少21.4%；序列增长变体达56.52%，证实路径效应。
AI.conclusion: 引导式参数空间演化可在匹配计算预算下获得更紧凑、更鲁棒的模型配置。

title: OneBar: An End-to-End Content-Grounded Generative Query Recommendation Framework for E-Commerce Video Feeds
comment: Any questions feel free to contact: benchen4395@gmail.com
summary: Short-video platforms now expose clickable search entries beneath the video player, enabling users to easily express content-induced search intent. However, conventional query recommendation systems on short-video platforms suffer from latency constraints and objective misalignment, while recent generative approaches struggle with noisy content-side metadata and preference drift. To address these issues, we propose OneBar, an end-to-end generative framework for real-time query recommendation for E-Commerce video feeds. OneBar features three key innovations: (1) a collaborative-multimodal intent grounding module that fuses multimodal video understanding and behavior-derived collaborative anchors; (2) a Unified End-to-End architecture equipped with a prompt-compression mechanism for efficient online serving; and (3) a progressive preference learning strategy for efficient preference-internalization, which internalizes hierarchical behavior preferences into the generative policy, eliminating the need for a separately trained reward model. Compared with online base, OneBar increases Query Exposure by 16.91\% and Query Click by 18.68\%, while maintaining a slight Query CTR gain of 0.19\%. The additional search traffic further contributes to 20.36\% more guided orders and 21.67\% higher GMV.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OneBar框架，用于短视频平台电商视频流的实时查询推荐，通过多模态意图建模、统一端到端架构与渐进式偏好学习，显著提升搜索曝光、点击及后续订单与GMV。
AI.motivation: 现有短视频平台的查询推荐系统存在延迟高、目标不一致问题，而生成式方法易受噪声元数据和用户偏好漂移影响。
AI.method: OneBar包含三个核心模块：协同多模态意图锚定模块、带提示压缩机制的统一端到端架构、以及无需独立奖励模型的渐进式偏好学习策略。
AI.result: 相比线上基线，Query Exposure提升16.91%，Query Click提升18.68%，Query CTR微增0.19%；带动引导订单增长20.36%，GMV提升21.67%。
AI.conclusion: OneBar有效解决了短视频场景下实时、精准、可扩展的查询推荐难题，在工业级电商视频流中展现出显著业务价值。

title: HairLRM: Strand-based Hair Modeling via Large Reconstruction Models
summary: The fundamental limitation of traditional strand-based modeling is not simply data scarcity, but the ill-posedness of inferring complex 3D fields from 2D imagery without structural constraints. This unconstrained regression leads to catastrophic failures in resolving both global occlusion (e.g., in ponytails) and local directionality (e.g., in curls), resulting in over-smoothed, plausible-but-incorrect geometries. To resolve this, we integrate the strong geometric priors of Large Reconstruction Models (LRMs) into the strand generation pipeline. Using the LRM mesh as a structural anchor, we employ a novel Dual Orientation AutoEncoder to lift coarse geometry into high-fidelity strands. By resolving vector field singularities through latent-space optimization and surface-guided refinement, our method effectively disentangles complex topological structures, setting a new benchmark for robustness and accuracy in hair reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合大型重建模型（LRM）几何先验与双方向自编码器的新方法，以解决传统基于发丝建模在从2D图像重建3D头发时因缺乏结构约束而导致的全局遮挡和局部方向性建模失败问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于发丝的建模方法受限于从2D图像推断复杂3D场时缺乏结构约束，导致全局遮挡（如马尾）和局部方向性（如卷曲）建模失败，生成过度平滑但错误的几何结果。
AI.method: 将大型重建模型（LRM）的强几何先验融入发丝生成流程，以LRM网格为结构锚点，采用新型双方向自编码器将粗略几何提升为高保真发丝，并通过潜在空间优化和表面引导细化来解析向量场奇点。
AI.result: 该方法有效解耦复杂拓扑结构，在头发重建的鲁棒性和精度上树立了新基准。
AI.conclusion: 集成LRM几何先验与双方向自编码器显著提升了头发重建质量，克服了传统方法在遮挡与方向性建模上的根本缺陷。

title: Hierarchical Generative Agents for Simulating Sequential Human Behavior
summary: Complex cognitive, emotional, and social processes shape human evacuations during natural disasters. Accurate modeling and understanding of human behavior in disasters or emergencies can greatly impact the evacuation process by informing more effective planning and resource allocation. However, collecting human data in these situations is very difficult, and existing computational evacuation models assume rational, homogeneous behavior, leading to unrealistic, overly optimistic predictions. To address this gap, we present a simulation framework of sequential human decision-making during an evacuation scenario, introducing cognitively grounded, persona-driven agents. Our framework models evacuation behavior in a grid-based urban environment that evolves over time, capturing fire and other hazards. Human agents are modeled as personas that make sequential decisions in response to environmental stimuli with cognition structured in three levels: high-level evacuation goals, mid-level route reasoning, and low-level navigation. Decision-making is driven by large language models (LLMs) coupled with a cognitive module and calibrated with empirical human evacuation data. We propose a dynamic, stimulus-driven disaster simulation framework that models human evacuation decision-making using persona-conditioned LLM agents and a cognitive hierarchy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）与认知分层结构的 persona-driven 仿真框架，用于建模灾害疏散中人类的序贯决策行为，克服了传统模型理性同质化假设的局限。
AI.motivation: 现有疏散模型假设人类行为理性且同质，难以反映真实复杂的认知、情感与社会因素；同时实地人类数据难以获取，导致预测过于乐观且不现实。
AI.method: 构建基于网格的城市动态灾害环境（含火情等演化危害），设计三层认知结构（高层目标、中层路径推理、低层导航）的persona驱动智能体，并用LLM耦合认知模块，在实证疏散数据上进行校准。
AI.result: 实现了更贴近真实人类行为的疏散仿真框架，能动态响应环境刺激，支持更可靠的应急规划与资源分配。
AI.conclusion: 将LLM与认知建模结合、引入persona多样性，可显著提升灾害疏散行为建模的真实性与实用性，为计算社会科学与应急管理提供新范式。

title: Deep Learning-Based Lunar Crater Terrain Relative Navigation
summary: Accurate position estimation is crucial for the successful implementation of future lunar landings using autonomous vehicles, especially in dangerous environments with sparse terrain features. In this paper, we propose a terrain relative navigation (TRN) algorithm combining our deep-learning crater detector, which was designed specifically for the NASA Crater Detection Challenge problem, and an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF). Our detector analyzes crater features from the monocular images acquired from orbit, and their matches with craters from a global database are identified via a Hungarian assignment approach followed by the consensus-based outliers removal method. The estimated measurements are then used to refine an EKF, where spacecraft pose estimation in the Lunar-Centered Lunar-Fixed (LCLF) frame of reference, augmented with altitude aiding information, constrains radial drift. The simulation results indicate that even if the spacecraft is off from its actual location up to 5 km, TRN could recover from this situation, achieving navigation error reduction to a few hundred meters. It should be noted that in order to maintain crater feature correspondences, it is important to match the image resolution and the scales within the scene to the detector training set distribution.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合深度学习陨石坑检测器与扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF）的地形相对导航（TRN）算法，用于月球着陆器在特征稀疏危险环境下的高精度自主定位。
AI.motivation: 未来月球着陆任务需在地形特征稀疏的危险环境中实现高精度自主定位，传统方法难以满足需求。
AI.method: 提出一种TRN算法：使用专为NASA陨石坑检测挑战设计的深度学习陨石坑检测器从轨道单目图像中提取陨石坑特征；通过匈牙利算法匹配全球陨石坑数据库，并采用共识法剔除外点；将匹配结果作为观测输入至增强型EKF，结合LCLF坐标系下的航天器位姿估计与高度辅助信息抑制径向漂移。
AI.result: 仿真表明，即使初始位置误差达5 km，该TRN系统仍可收敛，导航误差降至数百米量级；但需保证图像分辨率与场景尺度与检测器训练集分布一致以维持特征匹配可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 所提TRN方法显著提升了月面自主导航鲁棒性与精度，为未来高风险月球软着陆任务提供了可行技术路径。

title: Disagreement-Based Cross-Model Routing for Implicit Video Question Answering
summary: We study multiple-choice video question answering on the ImplicitQA benchmark, where the correct answer is never explicitly shown but must be inferred from off-screen events, line-of-sight cues, causal structure, and cross-shot spatial layout. On this benchmark a single frontier video LLM already operates near its accuracy ceiling, and we observe that conventional self-consistency strategies -- majority voting across repeated samples of the same model -- can hurt rather than help, because the model's errors on hard questions are correlated. We propose disagreement-based cross-model routing, a pure inference-time procedure that requires no labels and no training. We triple-sample a native-video model (Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview) at temperature zero, exploit the genuine sample-to-sample variance of its video-processing pipeline to identify the roughly 20% subset of questions where the three samples disagree, and route only that subset to a second model from a different family (Claude Opus 4.8) that consumes uniformly sampled frames with adaptive thinking. On the 1001-question validation set with public ground truth -- our main evaluation -- the method improves AvgAcc by +1.43 over the best single sample of the primary model, with per-category gains concentrated on Motion & Trajectory (+5.49), Inferred Counting (+3.45), and Vertical Spatial Reasoning (+1.82) -- the categories most dependent on cross-shot reference resolution. The same pipeline applied to the held-out 172-question CVPR 2026 ImplicitQA challenge test set achieves 82.03 AvgAcc / 79.71 MacroAvgAcc (+1.81 over the best single sample of the primary model), confirming the validation result on an independent split.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练、无需标签的推理时方法——基于分歧的跨模型路由（disagreement-based cross-model routing），用于提升隐式视频问答（ImplicitQA）任务性能。该方法通过三采样主模型（Gemini 3.1 Pro）识别其不确定问题（约20%），再将这些样本交由另一架构模型（Claude Opus）处理，显著提升了在运动轨迹、推断计数和垂直空间推理等依赖跨镜头推理的子任务上的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有视频大模型在ImplicitQA这类需隐式推理（如离屏事件、视线线索、因果结构、跨镜头空间布局）的任务上已达性能瓶颈；而传统自一致性策略（如多数投票）因错误相关性反而损害性能，亟需更鲁棒的推理时不确定性建模与模型协同机制。
AI.method: 采用零温度三采样Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview，利用其视频处理管道的固有采样方差识别分歧样本（约20%问题），仅将这些分歧样本路由至架构异构的Claude Opus 4.8模型（输入为均匀采样帧+自适应思考），全程不依赖标注或训练。
AI.result: 在1001题验证集上AvgAcc提升+1.43；在CVPR 2026挑战赛172题测试集上达82.03 AvgAcc（+1.81）；子任务提升集中在Motion & Trajectory（+5.49）、Inferred Counting（+3.45）、Vertical Spatial Reasoning（+1.82）。
AI.conclusion: 基于分歧的跨模型路由是一种高效、即插即用的推理时增强策略，尤其适用于依赖复杂时空推理的隐式视频理解任务，验证了模型多样性与不确定性感知联合建模的有效性。

title: Context Compression Is Not One Thing: Readable Symbolic Re-expression vs. Coherent Summary at Matched Budget
summary: We study context compression for multi-hop question answering with small language models. We propose Telegraph English, a readable symbolic format that rewrites retrieved passages into structured entity-relation statements, preserving reasoning evidence at lower token cost. In controlled experiments on MuSiQue, TwoWiki, and HotpotQA, Telegraph English outperforms three matched-budget compression baselines (character-level deletion, truncation, and random sub-sampling) on every dataset, with gains of 13 to 20 F1 percentage point. It also outperforms a coherent prose summary produced by the same encoder on the hardest dataset. A pre-registered depth-interaction hypothesis is null: the advantage does not grow with reasoning depth within datasets. We interpret these results as evidence that readable symbolic re-expression preserves entity content more densely than either natural language or coherent summarization at matched token budget.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Telegraph English，一种可读的符号化格式，用于多跳问答中的上下文压缩，通过结构化实体-关系陈述在更低的token成本下保留推理证据，在多个数据集上显著优于多种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 研究小语言模型在多跳问答中的上下文压缩问题，旨在以更低的token成本有效保留关键推理证据。
AI.method: 提出Telegraph English——一种将检索到的段落重写为可读符号化实体-关系陈述的格式，并在MuSiQue、TwoWiki和HotpotQA上进行控制实验，对比多种压缩基线及相同编码器生成的连贯摘要。
AI.result: Telegraph English在所有测试数据集上均显著优于字符级删除、截断和随机子采样等匹配预算基线（提升13–20 F1点），且在最难数据集上优于同编码器生成的连贯摘要；预注册的‘深度交互’假设被证伪。
AI.conclusion: 可读符号化重表达比自然语言或连贯摘要在同等token预算下更密集地保留实体内容，是更优的上下文压缩方式。

title: Relational Structural Causal Models
comment: Proceedings of the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning
summary: An artificial intelligence must have a model of its environment that is causal, supporting reasoning about interventions and counterfactuals, and also combinatorial, supporting generalization to unseen combinations of objects. In this work, we formally study when and how such a model can be learned. We develop relational structural causal models, extending structural causal models (Pearl 2009) to settings where objects and their relations vary. First, we show how answers to not only causal but also observational queries about unseen combinations of objects can not be identified without further assumptions. To enable such identification--including in the presence of unobserved confounding--we define relational causal graphs and derive symbolic identification criteria. Finally, we propose relational neural causal models, a provably correct approach that outperforms non-relational baselines on simulated traffic scenes with varying cars, signals, and pedestrians.

AI.tldr: 本文提出关系结构因果模型（RSCM），扩展了传统结构因果模型以处理对象及其关系可变的场景，并定义了关系因果图与符号识别准则，从而支持对未见对象组合的因果与观测查询；进一步提出了关系神经因果模型（RNCM），在模拟交通场景中验证了其优于非关系基线方法。
AI.motivation: 人工智能需要具备因果性（支持干预和反事实推理）与组合性（支持对未见对象组合的泛化）的环境模型，但现有方法难以在对象和关系动态变化的场景下学习此类模型。
AI.method: 1）提出关系结构因果模型（RSCM），将Pearl的结构因果模型推广到对象与关系可变的设置；2）定义关系因果图并推导符号识别准则，以解决未见组合下的因果/观测查询识别问题（包括存在未观测混杂因素的情形）；3）构建关系神经因果模型（RNCM），提供理论保证并实现端到端学习。
AI.result: 理论层面：证明了无额外假设时未见组合的因果/观测查询不可识别，并给出了可识别的充分条件；实验层面：RNCM在模拟交通场景（含变化的车辆、信号灯和行人）中显著优于非关系基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 关系结构因果模型为学习兼具因果性与组合性的AI环境模型提供了形式化框架；所提出的识别准则与RNCM方法可在存在未观测混杂的情况下，可靠地支持对新对象组合的因果与观测推理。

title: α-Fair Insurance Pricing: A Fairness Continuum
summary: Fairness in insurance pricing remains a long-standing and deeply debated puzzle. On one hand, insurers, driven by profitability considerations, set premiums that differentiate across individual risks to achieve actuarial fairness. On the other hand, insurance serves a critical societal function by pooling risks across a population, motivating cross-subsidization among groups to promote solidarity fairness. The tension between these two competing notions of fairness makes insurance pricing inherently complex, particularly in modern settings where granular data allow for increasingly fine risk differentiation and regulators face growing pressure to protect vulnerable groups. To address this challenge, we propose an $α$-\textbf{F}air \textbf{I}ndividual \textbf{S}olvent \textbf{P}remium ($α$-FISP) framework for insurance pricing that explicitly captures the trade-off between actuarial and solidarity fairness while guaranteeing solvency, a fundamental requirement in insurance operations. We formulate the pricing problem as a constrained optimization task, where actuarially fair premiums are adjusted subject to budget constraints on cross-subsidization within each risk class. This formulation naturally yields a family of solutions parameterized by $α$, tracing a continuum between purely actuarial and purely solidarity-based pricing and enabling decision-makers to select an operating point along this fairness spectrum. We derive theoretical guarantees for the proposed framework. Numerical experiments show that $α$-FISP is computationally tractable and aligns well with the U.S. regulatory regimes featuring heterogeneous state-level fairness requirements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种α-FISP保险定价框架，平衡精算公平与团结公平，并保证偿付能力。
AI.motivation: 解决保险定价中精算公平（基于风险差异化定价）与团结公平（群体间交叉补贴）之间的固有张力，尤其在精细化数据和监管压力下。
AI.method: 构建一个带预算约束的受控优化模型，通过参数α调节两类公平间的权衡，形成连续解族；并提供理论保证。
AI.result: α-FISP框架计算可行，且在数值实验中能适配美国各州差异化的监管公平要求。
AI.conclusion: α-FISP为监管者和保险公司提供了可解释、可调控的公平定价工具，在保障偿付能力前提下实现公平性权衡。

title: HoloRec: Holistic Encoding and Interleaved Reasoning for Generative Recommendation
summary: Generative recommendation models that formulate the task as sequence generation overcome the objective fragmentation problem of traditional cascade architectures, yet existing approaches still suffer from flat semantic representations lacking hierarchical structure for multi-step reasoning and an externally constructed chain-of-thought (CoT) that requires expensive annotations and remains disconnected from the generation objective. We propose HoloRec, an endogenous chain-of-thought recommendation mechanism that unifies representation, reasoning, and generation by constructing a hierarchical semantic encoding matrix via multi-granularity nested residual quantization optimized by a holistic reconstruction loss. HoloRec supports two inference modes: a non-thinking mode that uses lightweight multi-granularity supervised alignment for fast prediction, and a thinking mode that employs an interleaved reasoning scheme to generate CoT steps on the fly, directly embedding reasoning into the generation process without external data. Experiments on multiple public recommendation datasets demonstrate that HoloRec consistently outperforms baselines, with especially significant gains in sparse scenarios, and the thinking mode achieves better accuracy than the non-thinking mode with only modest inference overhead.

AI.tldr: HoloRec提出一种内生的链式思维（CoT）推荐机制，通过多粒度嵌套残差量化构建分层语义编码矩阵，并统一表征、推理与生成；支持无需外部标注的‘思考模式’和轻量‘非思考模式’两种推理方式，在稀疏场景下性能显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式推荐模型存在语义表征扁平化、缺乏层次结构以支持多步推理，且依赖需昂贵标注、与生成目标脱节的外部链式思维（CoT）。
AI.method: 提出HoloRec模型，采用多粒度嵌套残差量化构建分层语义编码矩阵，以整体重建损失进行优化；支持两种推理模式：轻量级多粒度监督对齐的非思考模式，以及交织式在线生成CoT步骤的思考模式。
AI.result: 在多个公开推荐数据集上，HoloRec持续优于基线方法，尤其在稀疏场景中增益显著；思考模式在仅增加少量推理开销的前提下，准确率高于非思考模式。
AI.conclusion: HoloRec通过内生CoT机制实现了表征、推理与生成的统一，有效缓解了语义扁平化与外部CoT依赖问题，提升了推荐性能与推理效率。

title: Walking on Heat Stars for Parabolic Heat Equations with Neumann Boundary Conditions
summary:
Monte Carlo methods have proven highly effective for elliptic partial differential equations through algorithms such as Walk on Spheres and Walk on Stars, which evaluate solutions at individual points without volumetric meshing or global linear solves. Extending these methods to the transient regime has remained an open challenge: parabolic equations couple space and time through an anisotropic scaling, requiring joint sampling of spatial displacements and backward time steps whose distribution was not previously available in a unified, exact form.
  We present Walk on Heat Stars, a grid-free Monte Carlo solver that closes this gap by extending the boundary integral framework of Walk on Stars to the parabolic setting. Our method introduces a non-cylindrical boundary integral formulation that accommodates the time-varying domains induced by heat-ball sampling. The heat ball geometry is parameterized by a logarithmic time coordinate and a spatial direction, revealing that the double-layer kernel factorizes into independent Gamma and uniform components. This factorization enables exact directional importance sampling of the recursive next walk position, the Neumann flux contribution, and the volumetric source term.
  We further derive a decoupled gradient estimator that expresses spatial derivatives as weighted boundary integrals of the solution, requiring no recursion on the gradient, and adapt a heteroscedastic regression-based denoiser to the space-time domain for variance reduction. We validate our method on analytical solutions across a range of geometries and spatial frequencies, confirm convergence at the expected Monte Carlo rate, and demonstrate practical applicability on heat sink and cooling scenes with mixed or pure Neumann boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'Walk on Heat Stars'的无网格蒙特卡洛求解器，用于求解抛物型偏微分方程（如热方程），通过扩展'Walk on Stars'方法至抛物情形，实现了对时空耦合问题的精确、高效采样。
AI.motivation: 将已成功应用于椭圆型PDE的蒙特卡洛方法（如Walk on Spheres/Stars）推广到瞬态（抛物型）PDE面临挑战，主要在于缺乏能统一、精确描述空间位移与反向时间步联合分布的采样机制。
AI.method: 提出非柱状边界积分公式以适配热球采样导致的时变区域；引入对数时间坐标与空间方向参数化热球几何；发现双层核可分解为独立Gamma与均匀分布分量，从而支持精确重要性采样；设计解耦梯度估计器及适用于时空域的异方差回归去噪器。
AI.result: 在多种几何与空间频率下的解析解上验证了方法有效性；确认其达到预期的蒙特卡洛收敛速率；成功应用于含混合或纯Neumann边界条件的热沉与冷却场景。
AI.conclusion: Walk on Heat Stars首次实现了对抛物型PDE的精确、无网格、点态蒙特卡洛求解，填补了该领域长期空白，并具备实际工程应用潜力。

title: Resilient Consensus in Agentic AI
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed in multi-agent systems where they must coordinate and agree on shared decisions. We ask whether classical resilient consensus theory, developed for deterministic agents, transfers to LLM agents that may behave adversarially. Framing LLM agreement as a Byzantine consensus game, we run controlled experiments on complete and general communication graphs. We find that prompted LLM agents fail to reach agreement that is achievable in principle: consensus can fail even in settings where classical theory guarantees that a convergent algorithm exists, and this failure persists across temperatures and horizons. At the same time, wrapping the agents with classical resilient consensus filters improves agreement. The benefit of filtering depends on how much robustness the underlying topology already provides. Our results suggest that classical resilient consensus theory is a useful lens for the safety of agentic AI.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大语言模型（LLM）智能体在多智能体系统中达成共识的能力，发现其在经典拜占庭容错共识理论本应保证收敛的场景下仍会失败；引入经典鲁棒共识滤波器可提升其一致性，表明传统共识理论对保障具身AI安全性具有指导价值。
AI.motivation: 探究经典韧性共识理论（面向确定性智能体）是否适用于可能表现对抗行为的大语言模型（LLM）智能体，以评估其在多智能体协同决策中的安全性与可靠性。
AI.method: 将LLM智能体间的共识问题建模为拜占庭共识博弈，在完全图与一般通信图上开展受控实验；对比测试原始提示下的LLM共识表现，以及嵌入经典韧性共识滤波器后的改进效果。
AI.result: 原始提示的LLM智能体在理论上可达成共识的场景下仍频繁失败，且该现象不随采样温度或推理步长显著改善；加入经典共识滤波器后一致性明显提升，其增益程度依赖于底层通信拓扑固有的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 经典韧性共识理论可作为分析和提升具身AI系统安全性的有效理论框架，提示需将形式化分布式算法思想融入LLM智能体协同设计。

title: Computing Smooth Geodesics under Two-Sided Curvature Bounds with Applications to Robotics and Image Analysis
summary: Curvature of planar curves serves as a key regularization term for computing second-order minimal paths, due to its tight relevance to desirable geometric properties such as smoothness, rigidity, and elasticity. In this paper, we tackle a more challenging problem in computational physics and geometry problem: tracking minimal paths whose curvature is constrained by arbitrary upper and lower bounds. For that purpose, we propose a new curvature-bounded geodesic model, developed under the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) partial differential equation (PDE) framework. It provides strong geometric control over minimal paths by enforcing curvature range constraints, whose paths are smooth and of bounded curvature limitation. We also present a discretization scheme for the Hamiltonian and the HJB PDE incorporating curvature bounds, allowing efficient solver for estimating numerical solutions to the model. Finally, we illustrate the capability of the proposed curvature-bounded geodesic model in applications of robot path planning and curvilinear structures tracking from images. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed curvature-bounded geodesic model serves as a powerful and robust tool for finding satisfactory paths.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman（HJB）偏微分方程框架的曲率有界测地线模型，用于追踪满足任意上下曲率约束的最小路径，并设计了相应的离散化求解方案，在机器人路径规划和图像中曲线结构跟踪中验证了其有效性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于曲率正则化的二阶最小路径方法无法处理任意上下曲率约束的路径追踪问题，而该问题在计算物理与几何中具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 构建基于HJB PDE的曲率有界测地线模型，引入上下曲率约束，并设计适配该约束的Hamiltonian及相应PDE的离散化数值求解方案。
AI.result: 所提模型能生成平滑且严格满足给定曲率范围约束的最小路径；数值实验表明其在机器人路径规划和图像曲线结构跟踪任务中表现强大且鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 该曲率有界测地线模型为受几何约束的路径优化提供了新理论框架与实用工具，拓展了传统最小路径方法的应用边界。

title: VigilFormer: Deformable Attention for Video Anomaly Detection with Causal Risk Inference
summary: Video anomaly detection in surveillance settings must balance detection accuracy against real-time throughput, a tension that existing methods address either through stronger feature extractors or more efficient architectures, but rarely both. We present VigilFormer, a unified framework that combines deformable spatio-temporal attention with causal temporal modeling to detect anomalies in untrimmed surveillance video. The proposed Deformable Spatio-Temporal Encoder (DSTE) attends to a sparse set of informative locations across frames, avoiding the quadratic cost of dense attention while retaining the ability to capture irregular motion patterns. A Causal Anomaly Classifier (CAC) applies dilated causal convolutions over snippet-level features and optimizes a contrastive multiple-instance learning objective that separates anomalous and normal representations without frame-level labels. To meet deployment constraints, an Adaptive Confidence Scheduler (ACS) dynamically skips low-information frames at inference time, reducing redundant computation in static scenes. Evaluated on UCF-Crime, ShanghaiTech, and CUHK Avenue, VigilFormer achieves AUC scores of 87.83%, 97.21%, and 89.74% respectively, at 41.5 FPS on a single GPU, outperforming recent weakly-supervised methods in both accuracy and speed.

AI.tldr: VigilFormer 是一种面向监控视频的实时异常检测框架，结合可变形时空注意力与因果时序建模，在高精度与高吞吐间取得平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在检测精度与实时吞吐之间难以兼顾，多侧重于强特征提取或高效架构，缺乏统一优化二者的设计。
AI.method: 提出三模块：1）可变形时空编码器（DSTE），通过稀疏注意力降低计算复杂度并捕获不规则运动；2）因果异常分类器（CAC），采用空洞因果卷积与对比式多实例学习，无需帧级标注；3）自适应置信调度器（ACS），推理时动态跳过低信息帧以提升效率。
AI.result: 在 UCF-Crime、ShanghaiTech 和 CUHK Avenue 上分别达到 87.83%、97.21%、89.74% 的 AUC，单卡推理达 41.5 FPS，精度与速度均优于近期弱监督方法。
AI.conclusion: VigilFormer 证明了在弱监督设定下，通过协同设计注意力机制、因果建模与推理调度，可同时提升异常检测的准确性与实用性。

title: Simplifying the Modeling of Arbitrary Conditionals in Natural Language
summary: Causal Transformers model sequences through an autoregressive factorization of the joint distribution, which enables efficient left-to-right decoding and conditional likelihood computation. However, they cannot tractably sample from or evaluate arbitrary conditionals -- e.g., a block of text conditioned on past and future tokens. Recent work aims to solve this problem through novel architectures, but they often lead to sub-optimal modeling of such conditionals and degraded generations. We propose Arbitrary Conditionals GPT (AC-GPT) which introduces a simple modification to standard causal Transformers to enable evaluating and sampling from arbitrary conditionals -- including past, future, and mixed contexts -- within a single forward pass. Unlike prior approaches, our method preserves the standard left-to-right ordering and next-token prediction objective essential for both strong performance and efficient training on natural language. Crucially, this compatibility allows existing LLMs to be fine-tuned for arbitrary conditioning. Our empirical results indicate that our method outperforms baselines on modeling arbitrary conditionals, without degrading standard left-to-right performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AC-GPT，通过简单修改标准因果Transformer，使其支持在单次前向传播中高效评估和采样任意条件分布（如基于前后文的文本生成），同时保持原有左到右建模性能与训练兼容性。
AI.motivation: 标准因果Transformer无法高效处理任意条件（如给定前后文生成中间文本），现有改进方法常损害建模质量或生成效果。
AI.method: 提出AC-GPT，在标准因果Transformer中引入轻量修改，支持单次前向传播下对任意条件（过去、未来或混合上下文）进行评估与采样，且维持左到右顺序与next-token预测目标。
AI.result: AC-GPT在建模任意条件任务上优于基线，且不损害标准左到右语言建模性能；支持现有大语言模型直接微调适配。
AI.conclusion: AC-GPT为因果Transformer提供了兼顾任意条件建模能力与标准训练/推理效率的可行方案，具备良好兼容性与实用性。

title: Trust Between AI Agents: Measuring Formation, Breakage, and Recovery, with Implications for Governing Multi-Agent Systems
summary: As language-model agents increasingly work in teams, each agent must decide how much to trust its teammates. Yet we lack a standard way to measure trust between AI agents. We propose a behavioral measure based on costly verification. In a cooperative survival game, checking a teammate's work consumes resources, while trusting a wrong answer can be fatal. Relative to a memoryless version of the same model, reduced verification provides an observable measure of trust. Using this framework, we study trust formation, breakage, and recovery across six frontier model snapshots. When paired with a consistently reliable teammate, four snapshots (Claude Opus 4.6, Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.1, and Gemini 3.1 Pro) reduce verification by roughly 60-85%, whereas two smaller snapshots show little or no such adjustment. Failures reverse this discount, but models differ in how they respond. Some concentrate renewed scrutiny on the culprit, while others become more cautious toward the entire team. Recovery is slower than formation, and clustered failures sustain suspicion far longer than the same number of failures spread apart. These differences have practical consequences. Models that form trust verify less, decide more quickly, and achieve higher payoffs in our environment. By contrast, persistent over-verification is associated with indecision rather than safety. Our results show that trust dispositions can be measured before deployment and suggest that calibration, rather than maximal suspicion, should be the central concern in the governance of multi-agent AI systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于代价性验证的行为化AI代理间信任度量方法，并在合作生存游戏中评估了六种前沿大模型的信任形成、破裂与恢复机制，发现不同模型在信任行为上存在显著差异，表明信任倾向可被测量并应成为多智能体系统治理的核心考量。
AI.motivation: 随着语言模型代理越来越多地以团队形式协作，每个代理需决定对队友的信任程度，但目前尚缺乏衡量AI代理间信任的标准方法。
AI.method: 提出一种基于代价性验证（costly verification）的行为化信任度量方法：在合作生存游戏中，检查队友工作会消耗资源，而信任错误答案可能导致致命后果；相较于无记忆基线模型，验证行为减少的程度即为可观测的信任指标。
AI.result: 在与可靠队友配对时，四个较大模型快照（Claude Opus 4.6等）验证行为减少60–85%，两个较小模型则几乎不调整；信任破裂后，各模型响应方式不同（聚焦问责或泛化谨慎）；信任恢复慢于建立，且集中失败比分散失败引发更持久怀疑；高信任倾向带来更快决策与更高收益，而持续过度验证反而导致犹豫而非安全。
AI.conclusion: AI代理的信任倾向可在部署前被量化评估，多智能体系统的治理应聚焦于信任校准，而非默认最大怀疑。

title: GRASP: Gradient-Aligned Sequential Parameter Transfer for Memory-Efficient Multi-Source Learning
summary: Multi-source transfer learning faces a fundamental scalability bottleneck: existing approaches require either loading all K source models into memory simultaneously during parameter fusion, requiring O(K) memory, or deploying all models at inference time, making production deployment infeasible. We propose GRASP (Gradient-Aligned Sequential Parameter Transfer), which achieves superior knowledge integration while maintaining O(1) memory consumption through three key innovations: (1) sequential processing that merges one source at a time into an evolving target model, (2) parameter-wise gradient alignment that selectively transfers only parameters whose optimization directions align with the target domain, avoiding negative transfer, and (3) iterative fine-tuning that adapts transferred knowledge before integrating the next source. Extensive experiments across three continual learning benchmarks (Yearbook, CLEAR-10, CLEAR-100) spanning 10 to 108-year temporal distribution shifts and four architectures (1.3M to 25.6M parameters) demonstrate that GRASP achieves 93.5% mean accuracy over all datasets and architectures compared to ensemble method's 71.7% accuracy while requiring only constant memory versus K models for standard multi-source fusion. Critically, GRASP's sequential previously merged models and scales to arbitrarily many sources without memory growth, making it uniquely suitable for resource-constrained deployment and continually evolving source domains.

AI.tldr: GRASP是一种新型多源迁移学习方法，通过顺序参数融合、梯度对齐和迭代微调，在保持常数内存开销的同时显著提升知识整合效果。
AI.motivation: 现有多源迁移学习方法存在内存开销大（O(K)）和部署困难的问题，难以扩展到大量源模型或资源受限场景。
AI.method: 提出GRASP框架：1）逐个顺序融合源模型；2）参数级梯度对齐，只迁移优化方向一致的参数以避免负迁移；3）每次迁移后进行迭代微调。
AI.result: 在三个持续学习基准和四种网络架构上，GRASP平均准确率达93.5%，远超集成方法的71.7%，且内存消耗为O(1)。
AI.conclusion: GRASP实现了高性能与低内存占用的兼顾，支持任意数量源模型的可扩展融合，适用于资源受限和动态演化的实际部署场景。

title: Confidence-Based Stopping Methods for Systematic Reviews
summary: Technology Assisted Review stopping methods aim to ensure that no more documents are screened than necessary. Most existing approaches focus on achieving a target recall, which does not consider whether an information need has been met. This paper introduces two heuristic stopping methods that instead monitor whether screened documents contain enough information to make a decision. Evaluation on a standard dataset of Diagnostic Test Accuracy Systematic Reviews demonstrates that the proposed approaches substantially reduce the number of documents that need to be examined while, in the majority of cases, maintaining conclusions that are consistent with all evidence available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于信息充分性判断的TAR停止方法，替代传统以目标召回率为导向的策略，在保证结论一致性的同时显著减少需审阅文档数量。
AI.motivation: 现有技术辅助审查（TAR）停止方法主要关注达到目标召回率，忽视了信息需求是否已被满足这一关键问题。
AI.method: 提出两种启发式停止方法，通过监测已筛查文档中所含信息是否足以支持决策来动态终止审查过程。
AI.result: 在诊断试验准确性系统综述标准数据集上的评估表明，所提方法大幅减少了需人工审阅的文档数量，且多数情况下仍能得出与全部证据一致的结论。
AI.conclusion: 以信息充分性为依据的停止策略比单纯依赖召回率的方法更高效、更符合实际决策需求。

title: STAR-NT: Spatiotemporal Acceleration of Real-Time Neural Transparency Rendering
summary: Neural order-independent transparency delivers high-quality rendering of overlapping transparent surfaces, but its geometry passes and network input generation remain costly, particularly on mobile and legacy hardware. We present a spatiotemporal acceleration framework that exploits spatial and temporal coherence to reduce this overhead while preserving visual quality. Spatially, we use adaptive quadtree-based screen-space subdivision to scale geometry pass resolution according to local color variance. Temporally, selected frames reuse the previous transparency result through depth-based reprojection instead of full rendering. Together, these optimizations reduce rendering cost and integrate efficiently into existing real-time rendering pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种时空加速框架，通过自适应四叉树屏幕空间细分和基于深度的重投影，降低神经顺序无关透明渲染的计算开销，同时保持高质量视觉效果。
AI.motivation: 神经顺序无关透明（Neural order-independent transparency）虽能高质量渲染重叠透明表面，但其几何通道和网络输入生成开销大，尤其在移动及老旧硬件上受限。
AI.method: 提出时空协同优化框架：空间上采用自适应四叉树屏幕空间细分，依据局部颜色方差动态调整几何通道分辨率；时间上对选定帧基于深度进行重投影，复用前一帧透明度结果而非全量渲染。
AI.result: 显著降低渲染开销，且能高效集成到现有实时渲染管线中，视觉质量无明显损失。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在保证高视觉保真度前提下，有效提升了神经透明渲染在资源受限设备上的实时性与实用性。

title: DeepRoot: A KG-Coordinated Multi-Agent System for Therapeutic Reasoning over Historical Medical Texts
summary: Historical medical archives and traditional medicines hold immense potential for drug discovery and remain a primary source for current drug development. However, pre-ontological prose and idiosyncratic taxonomies prevent the standardization and medical modernization of the data for use in current biomedical pipelines. Furthermore, no existing LLM agent system, whether tool-calling, retrieval-augmented, or agentic deep-research, can convert such text into verifiable drug-discovery leads at scale. We close this gap with DeepRoot, a multi-agent LLM system that jointly builds and utilizes a verified knowledge graph, showing that grounding and reasoning -- often conflated -- are separable axes the system can compose for therapeutic reasoning. Applied to the Shen Nong Ben Cao Jing, DeepRoot recovers $10$ of $21$ held-out compound-disease treatment pairs at R@$20$ ($47.6\%$ vs $4.8\%$ for a raw corpus LLM and $\sim\!2.4\%$ random) and dominates an LLM-as-judge audit for reasoning quality over baseline LLMs and LLMs with direct tool-call access to the same APIs DeepRoot itself queries. Tool-using LLMs hallucinate evidence on $87\%$ of claims, versus 7-10% for DeepRoot. Graph-only inference hallucinates $0\%$ but ranks lowest on reasoning coherence; DeepRoot KG+LLM is the only condition to win on both axes, pointing toward a route for systematic mining and repurposing of historical medical knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepRoot多智能体大语言模型系统，通过构建和利用验证知识图谱，成功将古代医学文献（如《神农本草经》）转化为可验证的药物发现线索，在化合物-疾病对预测和推理质量上显著优于基线方法，并大幅降低幻觉率。
AI.motivation: 历史医学文献蕴含巨大药物发现潜力，但其前本体论文本和非标准化分类阻碍了现代化应用；现有大模型系统无法大规模、可靠地将其转化为可验证的药物发现线索。
AI.method: 提出DeepRoot多智能体LLM系统，联合构建并利用经过验证的知识图谱，分离并协同‘接地’（grounding）与‘推理’（reasoning）两个维度，实现治疗性推理。
AI.result: 在《神农本草经》数据上，DeepRoot在R@20指标下恢复10/21个预留化合物-疾病对（47.6%），远超原始语料LLM（4.8%）和随机基线（~2.4%）；在LLM评审审计中推理质量领先；工具调用LLM幻觉率达87%，而DeepRoot仅7–10%，纯图推理虽零幻觉但连贯性最差；DeepRoot是唯一在幻觉控制与推理连贯性两方面均最优的方法。
AI.conclusion: DeepRoot为系统化挖掘与再利用历史医学知识提供了可行路径，表明融合验证知识图谱与大语言模型的多智能体架构可有效弥合传统医学与现代药物发现之间的鸿沟。

title: TacStyle: Personalizing Tactile Robot Policies using Structured Behavior Representations
summary: Robotic systems that assist humans should be capable of adapting their behaviors to individual user preferences. For instance, users may want a robot arm to adjust the amount of force it applies while folding their laundry or cleaning furniture. Natural language provides an intuitive way for humans to communicate such preferences. Recent progress in language-conditioned robot policies has shown that robots can successfully use language prompts to determine what task to perform. However, extending the same approach to realize how the task should be performed requires detailed labels describing the preferences or styles of trajectories in the task data. Not only is collecting such annotations challenging, but conditioning directly on these labels may also fail to provide fine-grained control over a continuous range of behaviors. For example, it can be difficult to convey the exact force that a robot must apply through abstract instructions like "apply a bit more pressure than before". Therefore, in this work, we propose using language to reason over preferred behaviors instead of directly generating them. We first learn a structured latent representation that organizes user preferences according to differences in the corresponding trajectories. Then, given a preference prompt, we use a foundation model to interpret this latent space and choose a value that produces the desired behavior. Through both simulation and real-world experiments, we show that selecting robot behaviors from an intuitively structured latent space enables more precise adaptation to user preferences while requiring significantly fewer preference labels than language-conditioned policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用自然语言推理用户偏好、而非直接生成行为的新方法，通过学习结构化潜在表征并结合基础模型实现对机器人连续行为的精细控制，显著减少对偏好标注的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有语言条件化机器人策略难以实现对连续行为（如施力大小）的细粒度控制，且依赖大量带详细偏好标签的训练数据，标注成本高且抽象指令表达不精确。
AI.method: 首先学习一个结构化潜在空间来组织用户偏好与对应轨迹差异的关系；然后利用基础模型解读偏好语言提示，并在该潜在空间中选择合适的值以生成期望行为。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界实验中验证了该方法能更精准地适应用户偏好，且所需偏好标签数量远少于传统语言条件化策略。
AI.conclusion: 通过将语言用于推理而非直接生成行为，并构建可解释的结构化潜在空间，本文为实现个性化、细粒度的机器人行为自适应提供了新范式。

title: Interpolation between Convolution and Attention via K-Nearest Neighbors
comment: Undergraduate Thesis in Computer Science at Bowdoin College
summary:
The shift from Convolutional Neural Networks to Transformers has reshaped computer vision, yet these two architectural families are typically viewed as fundamentally distinct. Convolutional Neural Networks are defined by spatially local convolution operations, while Transformers rely on global self-attention. We argue that convolution and self-attention, despite their apparent differences, can be unified within a single k-nearest neighbor aggregation framework. The critical insight is that both operations are special cases of neighbor selection and weighted aggregation. Convolution selects neighbors by spatial proximity while self-attention selects by feature similarity, revealing that they lie on a continuous spectrum rather than representing categorically different computations.
  We introduce Convolutional Nearest Neighbors (ConvNN), a unified framework that formalizes this connection. ConvNN exactly recovers standard and depthwise convolution by restricting neighbor selection to normalized spatial coordinates, and exactly recovers self-attention and its sparse variants, including KVT-attention, by replacing spatial proximity with scaled dot-product similarity. Beyond these special cases, ConvNN serves as a drop-in replacement for both convolution and attention layers, enabling systematic exploration of the intermediate spectrum between local and global aggregation through configurable similarity functions, neighbor selection strategies, positional encodings, and aggregation kernels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Convolutional Nearest Neighbors（ConvNN）框架，统一卷积与自注意力机制，将其视为k近邻聚合的不同特例：卷积基于空间邻近性选择邻居，自注意力基于特征相似性选择邻居；ConvNN可精确还原标准/深度卷积及各类自注意力变体，并支持探索局部与全局聚合之间的连续谱。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络与Transformer架构长期被视为本质不同的范式，作者旨在揭示二者在计算本质上的统一性，打破'局部卷积 vs 全局注意力'的二元对立认知。
AI.method: 提出ConvNN统一框架，将卷积和自注意力建模为k近邻聚合的两种特例：通过空间坐标归一化实现卷积，通过缩放点积相似度实现自注意力；支持灵活配置相似度函数、邻居选择策略、位置编码和聚合核。
AI.result: ConvNN能精确还原标准卷积、深度卷积、自注意力及其稀疏变体（如KVT-attention）；作为即插即用模块，可在现有模型中替代卷积或注意力层，并支持系统探索局部到全局聚合的中间连续谱。
AI.conclusion: 卷积与自注意力并非本质不同，而是同一k近邻聚合范式下的连续特例；ConvNN提供了理论统一框架与实用工具，推动架构设计从离散选择走向连续优化。

title: CoRA: Confidence-Rationale Alignment for Reliable Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning can improve LLM performance, but high answer confidence may be misleading when the accompanying CoT rationale is plausible yet incomplete or poorly supported. We study confidence--rationale alignment: whether a model's confidence in its committed answer is justified by its generated rationale. We introduce a GRPO-based reinforcement learning framework that jointly rewards answer correctness, committed-answer probability, and rubric-based rationale support, where the rubric assesses grounding, coherence, task match, and connection to the selected answer without revealing the gold answer to the judge. Across MedQA, MathQA, and OpenBookQA using three open-weight LLMs, our method reduces the confidence--rationale alignment error by up to 26.51% compared with untuned checkpoints, SFT, and correctness-only GRPO, while maintaining competitive accuracy and often improving calibration. These results show that reliable CoT reasoning requires not only confident answers, but rationales that substantively support them.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GRPO的强化学习框架，用于提升大语言模型在链式推理（CoT）中答案置信度与推理依据之间的对齐性，显著降低了置信-理由错配误差，并保持或提升了准确率与校准性。
AI.motivation: 高置信度的答案可能具有看似合理但不完整或缺乏支撑的推理过程，导致置信度与实际推理质量不匹配，亟需评估并提升置信度与推理依据的一致性。
AI.method: 提出基于GRPO（Generalized Reinforcement Learning with Preference Optimization）的强化学习框架，联合奖励答案正确性、承诺答案概率及基于多维度（接地性、连贯性、任务匹配性、与答案关联性）评分的推理依据质量，且评分时不暴露标准答案。
AI.result: 在MedQA、MathQA和OpenBookQA数据集上，使用三个开源大模型验证，相比基线方法（未调优检查点、监督微调SFT、仅正确性GRPO），置信-理由对齐误差最高降低26.51%，同时维持竞争力的准确率并常改善校准性。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的链式推理不仅需要高置信度的答案，更要求推理依据能实质性支撑该答案；通过多目标强化学习可有效提升置信度与推理质量之间的对齐。

title: PrologMCP: A Standardized Prolog Tool Interface for LLM Agents
comment: Accepted at Joint Workshop on Statistics and Knowledge Integration for Logic, Learning, Ethical Decisions, and LLMs, 18 July 2026, Lisbon
summary: Frontier reasoning-tuned language models still fail on deductive tasks at depth, and the cost of improved performance through extended internal reasoning scales poorly. Symbolic delegation offers a complementary route: a language model translates the problem, while a solver performs the inference. However, current autoformalization pipelines for logic programming are typically bespoke integrations tied to particular tasks or agents. We introduce PrologMCP, a task-agnostic, open-source server that exposes Prolog as a stateful tool through the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Its compact tool interface, structured error reporting, and per-session isolation make the translate-run-inspect-repair loop a reusable primitive for MCP-capable agents. We evaluate a formalizer agent enhanced with PrologMCP against standard and reasoning LLMs (Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-4.1, and o4-mini) on two subsets of PARARULE-Plus: a general-purpose sample and a more challenging one targeting a specific failure mode of natural-language reasoning.
