While existing approaches have adequately studied continual learning and catastrophic forgetting in vision-language models (VLMs), the theoretical understanding of modality-specific contributions across a sequence of environments remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we present a new theoretical perspective to understand the cross-modal (vision-language) contributions to consecutive environments. We empirically evaluate our theoretical findings on large VLMs and demonstrate their effectiveness in capturing environment-level cross-modal contributions. Our analysis provides deeper insights into continual VLMs, highlighting their contribution robustness to varying task orders and inter-task similarities, and their improved generalization performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的理论视角，用于理解持续视觉-语言模型（VLMs）中跨模态（视觉-语言）在连续环境中的贡献，并通过大模型实证验证了该理论的有效性，揭示了其对任务顺序和任务相似性的鲁棒性及泛化性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法虽研究了VLM中的灾难性遗忘，但缺乏对多模态在连续环境中各自贡献的理论理解。
AI.method: 提出一种新的理论框架，分析视觉与语言模态在连续环境中的跨模态贡献，并在大型VLM上进行实证评估。
AI.result: 验证了该理论能有效捕捉环境级跨模态贡献，揭示了模型在不同任务顺序和任务相似性下的贡献鲁棒性，并提升了泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 该理论视角深化了对持续VLM的理解，为设计更稳定、鲁棒的多模态持续学习方法提供了新思路。

title: Beyond English: Uncovering the Multilingual Gap in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action models have recently demonstrated promising capabilities in learning generalist robot policies from large-scale multimodal data. However, most existing VLA systems are trained and evaluated primarily with English instructions, leaving their ability to understand and execute instructions in other languages largely unexplored. While the underlying large language models often possess multilingual capabilities, it remains unclear whether these multilingual capabilities transfer to VLAs during training. In this work, we present the first systematic study of multilingual instruction following in VLA models. We first construct multilingual instructions by extending existing benchmarks with translations of their instructions. Using these instructions, we evaluate several representative VLA models across a range of tasks in simulation settings. Our experiments reveal a significant multilingual gap: models trained primarily on English instructions exhibit substantial performance degradation when evaluated on other languages, even when the underlying language backbone is multilingual. We provide several findings and analyses to understand the multilingual gap. Cross-lingual transfer behavior analysis shows that performance drops correlate with both instruction understanding and action execution. Representation analyses suggest that multilingual instruction-caused representation shifts may contribute to the multilingual gap. Motivated by these findings, we further explore strategies to improve multilingual performance in VLAs. We propose a simple yet effective multilingual fine-tuning approach, Multilingual Principal Component Alignment, which leverages Principal Component Analysis to get the principal component subspace and align projected multilingual representations, effectively reducing the multilingual performance gap.

AI.tldr: 本文首次系统研究了视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的多语言指令跟随能力，发现现有主要基于英文训练的VLA模型在其他语言上性能显著下降；作者分析了该‘多语言差距’的成因，并提出一种基于主成分对齐的多语言微调方法以有效缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型大多仅在英文指令上训练和评估，其多语言能力未被系统探索；尽管底层大语言模型具备多语言能力，但该能力是否能迁移到VLA中尚不明确。
AI.method: 构建多语言指令基准（通过翻译现有基准指令），在仿真环境中评估多个代表性VLA模型；进行跨语言迁移行为分析和表征分析以探究性能下降原因；提出‘多语言主成分对齐’（Multilingual PCA Alignment）微调方法，利用PCA对齐不同语言的表征子空间。
AI.result: 实验揭示了显著的多语言差距：即使语言骨干支持多语言，VLA模型在非英语指令上性能大幅下降；分析表明该差距源于指令理解与动作执行两方面；所提PCA对齐方法能有效缩小多语言性能差距。
AI.conclusion: VLA模型的多语言能力不能简单继承自多语言语言模型，需专门设计训练策略；本文提出的多语言主成分对齐方法为提升VLA多语言鲁棒性提供了可行且有效的解决方案。

title: Multi-agent Framework for Time-Sensitive Complementary Collaboration in Minecraft
summary: We present TickingCollabBench, a Minecraft-based multi-agent benchmark for a novel class of time-sensitive complementary collaboration tasks. Our benchmark reflects four core characteristics of real-world collaboration: agent heterogeneity, mandatory collaboration, dynamic environments, and strict real-time constraints with failure risks. To enable this, we develop the TickingCollab framework, which supports the generation of diverse dynamic environments and abstracts Minecraft's primitive APIs to enable declarative YAML task specifications for composing these events. Building on this, we design a feasibility-aware automated benchmark generation pipeline, where an LLM drafts structurally diverse task configurations and feasibility verifier filters out invalid ones using approximate constraints. Evaluations demonstrate that lang latency and inherent difficulty of coordinating under partial observability and agent heterogeneity cause LLMs to frequently fail under dynamic environments and fall significantly short of a global-knowledge oracle.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了TickingCollabBench，一个基于Minecraft的多智能体基准测试平台，用于评估时间敏感型互补协作任务；其核心创新在于引入实时性、动态环境与异构智能体协同等现实协作要素，并通过TickingCollab框架和LLM驱动的可行性感知自动生成流程构建可扩展任务集；实验表明当前LLM在部分可观测与异构约束下协调能力远低于全局知识理想模型。
AI.motivation: 现有协作基准缺乏对真实世界协作关键特征（如时间敏感性、强制协作、动态环境和智能体异质性）的综合建模，难以有效评估多智能体系统在紧迫现实场景下的协同能力。
AI.method: 构建TickingCollabBench基准，包括：1）设计TickingCollab框架以支持动态环境生成与YAML声明式任务描述；2）开发LLM驱动的可行性感知自动任务生成流水线，结合LLM生成与约束验证筛选有效任务配置。
AI.result: 实验显示，语言模型在动态环境下因延迟和部分可观测性导致协作失败率高，在异构智能体协同任务中性能显著低于具备全局知识的最优解。
AI.conclusion: TickingCollabBench为评估时间敏感型多智能体协作提供了新范式，揭示了当前LLM在实时、动态与异构协作场景中的根本局限，强调需发展更鲁棒的协同推理与执行机制。

title: LLMs on Tabular Data with Limited Semantics: Evidence from Industrial Car Retrofit Prediction
summary: Industrial retrofit planning depends on structured operational data rather than free text: planners must estimate whether a newly registered prototype will require a retrofit, which retrofit package it will need, and how long the work will take. We study an industrial dataset linking a prototype-registration system (284,271 vehicles) with a retrofit-management system (48,716 cleaned visits), and compare strong tabular machine learning baselines with three LLM-based strategies on row-serialized inputs: embedding features (Amazon Titan), direct prompted classification (Claude Sonnet 4), and an ML+LLM stacking approach. Across binary occurrence prediction, 15-way retrofit-type classification, per-visit duration regression, and an aggregated monthly benchmark, classical tree ensembles remain the strongest standalone models. However, the LLM results reveal a consistent pattern: embeddings remain useful on tables (binary AUC = 0.982), direct prompting collapses once semantic signal is stripped by hashing (binary AUC = 0.500; multiclass weighted F1 = 0.018), and hybrid stacking yields the best manually built multiclass model (weighted F1 = 0.626). On the monthly benchmark, lag-based machine learning outperforms time-series foundation models, though Chronos-small remains competitive in zero-shot forecasting. The results suggest that on privacy-constrained industrial tables, LLMs are more effective as complementary components than as replacements for strong tabular baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在工业改造规划中，如何利用结构化操作数据（而非自由文本）进行预测。作者比较了传统表格机器学习模型与三种基于大语言模型（LLM）的方法（嵌入特征、直接提示分类、ML+LLM堆叠）在车辆原型注册与改造管理数据上的性能。结果表明：树集成模型仍是最佳独立模型；LLM嵌入在表格任务中仍有效，但直接提示在语义信息被哈希破坏后失效；混合堆叠方法在多类任务上表现最优；时间序列任务中，基于滞后特征的传统模型优于时序基础模型。结论是：在隐私受限的工业表格数据中，LLM更适合作为补充组件，而非替代传统表格模型。
AI.motivation: 工业改造规划依赖结构化操作数据而非自由文本，需准确预测新注册原型是否需改造、所需改造包及工期，但现有方法在隐私受限的工业表格数据上效果有限，亟需评估LLM在此类场景下的适用性。
AI.method: 基于284,271辆车辆的原型注册系统与48,716次清洗后的改造访问记录构成的工业数据集，对比经典树集成等强表格ML基线与三种LLM策略：Amazon Titan嵌入特征、Claude Sonnet 4直接提示分类、ML+LLM堆叠；评估任务包括二分类（是否改造）、15类改造类型分类、单次访问工期回归及月度聚合基准。
AI.result: 树集成模型在所有任务中均为最强独立模型；LLM嵌入在二分类中AUC达0.982，而直接提示在哈希消去语义后AUC降至0.500、多类F1仅0.018；ML+LLM堆叠实现最佳人工构建多类模型（加权F1=0.626）；月度基准中，滞后特征ML优于时序基础模型，但Chronos-small零样本预测具竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 在隐私受限的工业表格数据中，LLM不宜替代强表格基线模型，而更适合作为嵌入或堆叠中的互补组件；直接提示对语义完整性高度敏感，嵌入式方法更具鲁棒性。

title: GeoTLM: Geometry-aware Tactile-Language Models for Contact Motion Orientation Reasoning of Dynamic Objects
summary: Modern tactile-language models (TLMs) have shown potential for robot learning tasks, such as material and texture recognition. However, for contact-rich scenarios, these TLMs struggle to understand the physical properties of dynamic objects, such as rotation and sliding directions. For instance, our preliminary experiments reveal that popular TLMs, such as Sparsh and AnyTouch2, exhibit weak performance on basic rotation direction reasoning from GelSight Mini tactile data. This surprising gap inspires us to explore a novel research question: Can we inject physically grounded geometric priors into TLMs to enable reliable contact orientation reasoning of dynamic object properties? To this end, we propose GeoTLM, a novel geometric representation-guided TLM for the perception of dynamic contact events. Our key idea is to preserve and structure tactile shear-field geometry before language-level reasoning, rather than forcing low-resolution tactile tokens into fragile closed-form physics operators. To achieve this, we propose a lightweight (only 14k parameters) yet novel Differentiable Geometric Representation (DGR). Specifically, DGR learns a contact-mask-guided representation in the shear field and aggregates it through an antisymmetric seven-region pooling design, motivated by the physical intuition that rotational contact produces antisymmetric deformation patterns. We conduct experiments on two representative tasks: rotation direction and sliding direction reasoning. Extensive experiments show that GeoTLM improves novel-object rotation accuracy by +14.6% and real-sensor sliding accuracy by +16.2% over the same backbone without the geometric encoder. Overall, our work paves a new way for physically grounded tactile-language reasoning, with strong potential for dynamic object understanding and contact-rich robotic manipulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeoTLM，一种结合几何先验的触觉-语言模型，通过可微分几何表示（DGR）增强对动态接触事件（如旋转、滑动方向）的理解，在旋转和滑动方向推理任务上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉-语言模型（TLMs）在动态物体物理属性（如旋转、滑动方向）理解上表现薄弱，尤其在接触丰富的场景下，难以可靠进行接触朝向推理。
AI.method: 提出GeoTLM模型，核心是轻量级可微分几何表示（DGR）：利用接触掩码引导剪切场表征，并采用受物理启发的反对称七区域池化设计，以保留并结构化触觉剪切场的几何信息。
AI.result: 在旋转方向和滑动方向推理任务上，GeoTLM相较无几何编码器的基线模型，新物体旋转准确率提升+14.6%，真实传感器滑动准确率提升+16.2%。
AI.conclusion: GeoTLM为物理驱动的触觉-语言推理提供了新范式，显著提升了对动态物体和接触丰富场景的感知与理解能力，具有机器人操作应用潜力。

title: Improved Knowledge Distillation for Land-Use Image Classification
summary: In the present article, an improved Knowledge Distillation (KD) framework has been proposed for efficient compression of deep convolutional neural networks for land-use image classification task. Motivated by the need to achieve competitive classification accuracy while reducing computational complexity, a teacher-student learning paradigm is adopted in which a VGG16 network transfers knowledge to a lightweight MobileNetV2 model. The proposed framework integrates hard supervision from ground truth labels with a soft supervision strategy that combines Kullback-Leibler divergence and Cosine Similarity losses. Experiments conducted on three land-use datasets show that the proposed KD-based method yields improved performance, and achieves an accuracy of 99.04%, outperforming both baseline student training and single-loss distillation approaches, while retaining substantial model compression.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的知识蒸馏框架，用于土地利用图像分类任务中深度卷积神经网络的高效压缩，结合硬监督与融合KL散度和余弦相似度的软监督策略，在三个数据集上达到99.04%准确率。
AI.motivation: 在保证分类精度的同时降低计算复杂度，实现高效模型压缩。
AI.method: 采用VGG16为教师网络、MobileNetV2为学生网络的师生学习范式，并融合真实标签的硬监督与KL散度加余弦相似度的软监督损失。
AI.result: 在三个土地利用数据集上达到99.04%的分类准确率，优于基线学生训练和单一损失蒸馏方法，同时保持显著模型压缩效果。
AI.conclusion: 所提知识蒸馏框架在精度与效率间取得更好平衡，适用于资源受限场景下的遥感图像分类任务。

title: Vernier: Probing Representational Misalignment Behind Lexical Gaps in Causal Reasoning
summary: Instruction-tuned language models can answer the same causal-reasoning question differently after its English variable names are replaced by type-preserving placeholders, although the structural causal model and the gold answer are unchanged. We ask whether this lexical gap reflects information loss in the placeholder view or a misaligned read-out from a representation that still carries answer-relevant content. Vernier uses a paired-view weight update as an instrument and then inspects the mechanism left after the gap closes. In the working regimes, the evidence favours representational misalignment. A variable-name probe becomes more accurate on the placeholder view, and activation patching on Qwen-7B, Qwen-14B, and Llama-3.1-8B shows that the decision-token representation can transfer answer identity between views. The update that realigns the views is counterfactual augmentation over original and placeholder prompts, while the answer-subspace KL mainly sharpens intermediate answer-belief agreement. Success is bounded by model family, scale, and task. CRASS transfer is reliable across Qwen scales and Llama, e-CARE remains weak, and preliminary non-causal rename tasks show a similar qualitative pattern.

AI.tldr: 本文研究指令微调语言模型在因果推理任务中因变量名称替换导致答案不一致的问题，发现根本原因在于表征错位而非信息丢失，并提出Vernier方法通过配对视图权重更新和反事实增强来校准表征。
AI.motivation: 指令微调语言模型在变量名替换后回答同一因果推理问题出现不一致，而结构因果模型与正确答案未变，需探究这是因占位符视图信息丢失，还是模型内部表征仍含答案相关信息但读出机制错位。
AI.method: 提出Vernier方法：采用配对视图（原始名 vs 占位符）的权重更新作为工具变量；通过变量名探针、激活修补（activation patching）分析Qwen-7B/14B和Llama-3.1-8B；使用反事实增强进行视图对齐；用答案子空间KL散度衡量中间信念一致性提升。
AI.result: 实验证明表征错位是主因：变量名探针在占位符视图上更准；激活修补显示决策token表征可在两视图间迁移答案身份；反事实增强有效缩小视图差距；效果受限于模型家族、规模与任务类型（CRASS迁移稳健，e-CARE仍弱）。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型在因果推理中的命名敏感性主要源于表征与读出机制的错位，而非语义信息丢失；Vernier提供了一种可解释、可干预的校准路径，但其有效性具有模型与任务依赖性。

title: Recurrent Reasoning on Symbolic Puzzles with Sequence Models
summary: Large language models often appear strong on symbolic and algorithmic tasks, yet this apparent strength can hide brittle behaviour when problems become longer, harder, or slightly out of distribution. A major limitation of current reasoning benchmarks is that many primarily test whether a model can produce a valid answer, while paying less attention to whether the solution is minimal, robust, and stable under controlled difficulty scaling. We introduce RecurrReason, a difficulty-controlled benchmark of four recurrent logic puzzles (Tower of Hanoi, River Crossing, Block World, and Checkers Jumping) with BFS-optimal trajectories and a single interpretable difficulty parameter $N \in \{1,\dots,10\}$, totalling 10{,}817 unique puzzles and 285{,}933 moves. We benchmark two Transformer families, an encoder-decoder model (T5-style) and a decoder-only model (GPT-2-style), under consistent data splits and evaluation criteria, training on $N{=}1$ to $7$ and evaluating on both held-out in-distribution instances and harder out-of-distribution instances at $N{=}8$ to $10$. Fine-tuned pre-trained T5 achieves 97.27\% validation and 81.00\% OOD accuracy on Block World; all models score 0.00\% on River Crossing under all conditions. Failure mode analysis reveals that architecture is a stronger determinant of success than scale. Pre-training transfers only to puzzles with locally structured transition functions. Our code and dataset will be open-sourced upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RecurrReason基准，用于评估大语言模型在递归逻辑谜题上的推理能力，强调解的最小性、鲁棒性和难度可扩展性；实验表明模型性能高度依赖架构而非规模，且预训练仅对局部结构化转移函数有效。
AI.motivation: 现有推理基准多关注答案正确性，忽视解的最小性、鲁棒性及在可控难度增长下的稳定性；需更严谨评估模型真实推理能力。
AI.method: 构建RecurrReason基准，包含四个递归逻辑谜题（汉诺塔、过河、积木世界、跳棋跳跃），每个谜题具有BFS最优轨迹和统一难度参数N（1–10），共10,817个谜题、285,933步；在T5（encoder-decoder）与GPT-2（decoder-only）两类Transformer模型上进行训练（N=1–7）与测试（N=8–10）。
AI.result: 微调T5在积木世界验证集达97.27%准确率、OOD达81.00%；所有模型在过河谜题上准确率为0%；失败模式分析显示架构比模型规模影响更大；预训练知识仅迁移到具有局部结构化转移函数的谜题。
AI.conclusion: 当前大语言模型在符号推理任务中表现脆弱，其泛化能力严重受限于模型架构与任务结构特性；RecurrReason为评估和提升模型鲁棒推理提供了新基准与分析框架。

title: Semantic DLM+: Improving Diffusion Language Models through Bias-variance Trade-off in Transition Kernel Design
summary: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) have demonstrated strong scaling capacity as alternatives to autoregressive language models. However, their performance is highly sensitive to the choice of transition kernels, and poorly designed kernels can lead to issues like training instability, slow convergence, and biased sampling. In this paper, we study this sensitivity through a principled analysis of generalization error and identify three critical factors: asymptotic bias (difficulty in approximating the posterior distribution), exposure bias (error propagation during sampling), and optimization variance induced by kernel dispersion. We further compare different transition kernels: masking diffusion yields sparse and easier posterior-approximation targets, while uniform diffusion provides stronger sampling-side repair but induces harder approximation. Motivated by this trade-off, we revisit a previously overlooked variant, semantic DLM (SemDLM), where the transition kernel corrupts tokens to neighborhoods that are semantically similar. Our theory suggests that SemDLM can serve as a plausible middle ground by reducing the posterior approximation difficulty of uniform diffusion while retaining repair ability. However, we find that SemDLM suffers from a semantic basin problem, where sampling repeatedly stays within a semantic region and produces low-diversity text. To address this, we propose SemDLM+, which adds a global transition and a semantic-frequency penalty during sampling. Experiments on LM1B and OpenWebText show that SemDLM+ improves training dynamics and achieves competitive language modeling and generation quality with satisfactory diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了扩散语言模型（DLMs）中不同转移核对性能的影响，指出掩码扩散与均匀扩散各有利弊；进而提出语义DLM（SemDLM）作为折中方案，但发现其存在语义盆地问题；最终通过引入全局转移和语义频率惩罚，提出改进模型SemDLM+，实验证明其在训练稳定性、建模质量和生成多样性上均有提升。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型性能高度依赖于转移核设计，现有核存在训练不稳定、收敛慢或采样偏差等问题；需从理论层面理解其泛化误差来源，并寻找兼顾后验逼近难度与采样修复能力的平衡方案。
AI.method: 通过泛化误差分析识别三大关键因素（渐近偏差、暴露偏差、优化方差），比较掩码/均匀扩散核特性，重新审视语义DLM，并针对其语义盆地问题提出SemDLM+——引入全局转移机制和语义频率惩罚项。
AI.result: SemDLM+在LM1B和OpenWebText数据集上展现出更优的训练动力学，并在语言建模与文本生成质量上达到竞争水平，同时显著提升生成多样性。
AI.conclusion: 语义感知的转移核设计（如SemDLM+）可在降低后验逼近难度的同时保留采样修复能力，是提升扩散语言模型性能的有效路径；全局转移与频率惩罚可有效缓解语义局部陷落问题。

title: Identification of a Physics-Based Electrical Power Consumption Model for the Unitree G1 Humanoid Arm
summary: Accurate prediction of electrical power consumption is essential for energy-aware motion planning, battery management, and thermal monitoring in battery-powered humanoid robots. This letter presents a physics-based, linear-in-parameters model for the electrical power consumption of the seven-degree-of-freedom left arm of the Unitree~G1 humanoid robot. The proposed formulation combines actuator loss terms with a baseline-torque correction that captures changes in gravity-compensation load and enables accurate prediction of negative net power trajectories. Pairwise interaction terms are introduced to model power coupling during simultaneous multi-joint motion. Model parameters are identified from experimental data collected on a physical Unitree~G1 using onboard power measurements as the regression target. Across 897 trajectories covering single-joint and coordinated arm motions at multiple speed levels, the identified model achieves $R^2 = 0.933$ with an RMSE of 1.07 (W). Validation on 46 trajectories executed at previously unseen speeds yields $R^2 = 0.965$, demonstrating strong generalisation beyond the identification dataset. Analysis of the identified parameters reveals distinct power-consumption characteristics across the arm, with viscous friction dominating most joints (shoulder pitch and all three wrist joints), copper losses dominating shoulder yaw and the elbow, and shoulder roll uniquely dominated by Coulomb friction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物理的、线性参数化的模型，用于预测Unitree G1人形机器人左臂的电功率消耗，结合执行器损耗项与基线力矩校正，并引入成对交互项建模多关节协同运动时的功率耦合；在大量轨迹数据上验证了模型高精度（R²=0.933）和强泛化能力（R²=0.965），并揭示了各关节主导损耗类型的差异。
AI.motivation: 准确预测电池供电人形机器人的电功率消耗对节能运动规划、电池管理和热监控至关重要。
AI.method: 构建一个基于物理、线性于参数的功率模型，包含执行器损耗项、基线力矩校正项（补偿重力负载变化）及成对关节交互项；利用Unitree G1实机采集的板载功率数据进行参数辨识。
AI.result: 在897条轨迹上R²=0.933，RMSE=1.07 W；在46条未见速度轨迹上R²=0.965；参数分析表明不同关节主导损耗类型各异（如粘性摩擦、铜损、库仑摩擦）。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型能高精度、强泛化地预测人形机器人单/多关节运动下的电功率，且可揭示关节级功耗特性，为能量感知控制提供可靠依据。

title: Deep Learning in Seismic Interpretation: Federated Advances in Salt Dome Segmentation
summary: Salt-dome delineation is a critical, high-impact task in subsurface geological interpretation, driving decisions in hydrocarbon exploration, reservoir modeling, and drilling safety. While convolutional encoder-decoder architectures have delivered significant improvements in automated salt segmentation, their widespread application is severely limited by data sovereignty concerns, dataset bias, and the scarcity of labeled seismic volumes. This paper introduces FedSaltNet, a Federated Learning (FL) framework explicitly engineered for robust, generalizable, and privacy preserving salt-dome segmentation. We couple a lightweight Small U-Net backbone, chosen for its efficiency and regularization properties with a novel Foreground-Weighted (FG-WEIGHTED) aggregation strategy designed to tackle domain-specific class imbalance. Through an extensive comparative study emulating non-IID conditions across four diverse seismic datasets (TGS, SEAM, F3, GBS), we demonstrate two critical findings: The FG-WEIGHTED algorithm effectively mitigates data heterogeneity, yielding a 4.0% relative improvement in Intersection over Union (IoU) over the best conventional FL method. The simple U-Net architecture proved essential, outperforming the higher capacity ResNet-18 U-Net variant by 166% in average IoU, underscoring the necessity of architectural simplicity in data-constrained federated environments. FedSaltNet provides a validated, high-performance solution that establishes the viability of federated deep learning for collaborative, next-generation subsurface interpretation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedSaltNet，一种用于盐丘分割的联邦学习框架，通过轻量级Small U-Net和前景加权聚合策略，在非独立同分布地震数据上显著提升IoU并保障数据隐私。
AI.motivation: 解决盐丘分割中因数据主权、数据偏差和标注数据稀缺导致的自动化模型应用受限问题。
AI.method: 提出FedSaltNet联邦学习框架，采用轻量级Small U-Net作为主干网络，并设计前景加权（FG-WEIGHTED）聚合策略以应对类别不平衡和数据异质性。
AI.result: 在四个地震数据集（TGS、SEAM、F3、GBS）上验证，FG-WEIGHTED比最优传统FL方法IoU提升4.0%；Small U-Net比ResNet-18 U-Net平均IoU高166%。
AI.conclusion: FedSaltNet验证了联邦深度学习在协作式地下解释中的可行性，强调架构简洁性对数据受限联邦环境的重要性。

title: Do LLMs Reliably Identify Correct Information Units in Aphasic Discourse?
summary: Correct Information Units (CIUs) are central to discourse assessment in aphasia because they quantify communicative informativeness rather than linguistic form alone. However, CIU scoring is time intensive and requires trained raters. This study examined whether instruction-tuned large language models (LLMs) can reliably perform token-level CIU classification from aphasic discourse transcripts. Sixteen picture-description transcripts elicited with the Cat Rescue stimulus were annotated for CIU status according to Nicholas and Brookshire (1993). The sample spanned four severity strata: control, mild, moderate, and severe aphasia. Four publicly available instruction-tuned LLMs were benchmarked under zero-shot and two few-shot prompting conditions across five stratified random seeds. Performance was evaluated against consensus human labels using accuracy, precision, recall, F1, and Cohen's kappa. Zero-shot prompting was insufficient across models. In contrast, few-shot prompting yielded substantial gains and produced competitive performance for three viable models. Mean few-shot F1 scores ranged from 0.776 to 0.817 across Llama-3.1-8B, Qwen2.5-7B, and Mistral-7B, with no significant differences between fixed global and per-chunk local example selection. Phi-3-mini was unstable and did not yield reliable performance. Viable models showed high recall but lower precision, suggesting systematic over-classification of tokens as CIUs. Performance also varied by discourse severity, with the weakest results in more severe aphasia. Few-shot LLM prompting can support automated CIU identification without gradient-based task training, but agreement with human annotation remains insufficient for fully autonomous use. These findings support LLM-based CIU scoring as a promising human-in-the-loop component of discourse assessment systems.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了指令微调的大语言模型（LLMs）在失语症话语转录文本中进行词元级正确信息单元（CIU）分类的可行性，发现少样本提示可使部分模型（如Llama-3.1-8B、Qwen2.5-7B、Mistral-7B）达到有竞争力的性能（F1=0.776–0.817），但零样本效果差；模型高召回、低精度，且在重度失语症样本上表现下降，尚不足以完全替代人工标注，适合作为‘人在环路’评估系统的辅助工具。
AI.motivation: CIU评分对失语症话语评估至关重要，但耗时且依赖专业人员；亟需自动化方法提升效率与可及性。
AI.method: 基于16份Cat Rescue图片描述语料（覆盖正常对照及轻、中、重度失语症），按Nicholas & Brookshire (1993)标准人工标注CIU；在零样本和两种少样本提示设置下，评测四个开源指令微调LLM（Llama-3.1-8B、Qwen2.5-7B、Mistral-7B、Phi-3-mini）的词元级CIU分类性能，采用准确率、精确率、召回率、F1及Cohen's kappa评估。
AI.result: 零样本提示整体无效；少样本提示显著提升性能，其中Llama-3.1-8B、Qwen2.5-7B、Mistral-7B平均F1达0.776–0.817，无显著差异；Phi-3-mini不稳定；所有可行模型均呈现高召回、低精度（倾向过标注CIU）；重度失语症样本性能最差。
AI.conclusion: 少样本LLM提示可在无需梯度训练前提下支持自动化CIU识别，但与人工标注一致性尚未达完全自主应用标准，适合作为人类监督下的辅助评估组件。

title: Probabilistic Signature Inversion: Learning Conditional Distributions from Truncated Signatures
summary: The signature transform is a principled feature map for continuous-time paths, valued for its uniqueness and universality. Recovering a path from its truncated signature is, however, structurally ill-posed because the truncated signature map is not injective. We therefore reframe truncated signature inversion as a probabilistic problem -- learning the conditional distribution of a path given its truncated signature -- and adopt a signature-conditioned flow matching model as a practical estimator. This probabilistic formulation elucidates the fundamental difficulty of inversion: Bayes reconstruction error quantifies the irreducible uncertainty remaining after conditioning on a statistic. We derive the Bayes-optimal error under linear statistics, obtaining a closed form for log-GBM and numerically tractable formulas for log-fBM and OU, yielding a concrete theoretical baseline for model validation. This baseline upper-bounds the Bayes error under truncated-signature conditioning, since truncated signatures provide richer information than linear statistics. Experiments show that empirical reconstruction errors under linear-statistics conditioning faithfully align with the theory-derived baseline, while errors decrease when the statistic is replaced with truncated signatures. Moreover, generated paths faithfully recover the conditioning signature while preserving key distributional and temporal structures, indicating that the estimator is well-calibrated to the target conditional distribution. Together, these results establish a well-posed probabilistic framework for truncated-signature inversion, with applicability demonstrated on real financial data beyond the parametric process families covered by theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于概率建模的截断签名逆问题求解框架，通过signature-conditioned flow matching模型学习路径在截断签名下的条件分布，并推导了线性统计量下的Bayes最优重构误差作为理论基准，验证了方法的有效性和校准性。
AI.motivation: 截断签名映射非单射，导致路径重构问题结构上不适定；需从确定性重构转向概率建模以刻画内在不确定性。
AI.method: 将截断签名逆问题建模为学习路径在截断签名下的条件分布，采用signature-conditioned flow matching模型进行估计，并推导线性统计量下Bayes最优重构误差的解析/数值解作为理论基准。
AI.result: 获得了log-GBM的闭式Bayes误差及log-fBM、OU的数值可解公式；实验证明重构误差与理论基准一致，使用截断签名优于线性统计量，生成路径准确匹配条件签名并保持分布与时间结构。
AI.conclusion: 建立了截断签名逆问题的良置概率框架，理论有界、实验有效，且在真实金融数据上具备泛化能力。

title: Energy-Efficient Arm Reaching for a Humanoid Robot via Deep Reinforcement Learning with Identified Power Models
summary: Humanoid robots performing in-field manipulation tasks, such as robotic apple harvesting, face severe energy constraints that directly limit the number of reaching motions that can be executed per battery charge. This paper presents an end-to-end, energy-aware reinforcement learning framework for the 7-degree-of-freedom left arm of the Unitree~G1 humanoid robot, combining a physics-based, experimentally identified electrical power model with a Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) policy trained in a Pinocchio-based rigid-body dynamics simulator. The RL policy operates on an incremental joint-position action space and is trained with a Hybrid Constellation Reward that combines a four-point end-effector constellation distance with a torque-norm energy proxy; after % $5\times10^6$ training it reaches a $69.9\%$ success rate over $1\,000$ random targets in kinematic simulation, at a mean energy of \SI{98.16}{\joule} on successful episodes. Finally, on the physical Unitree~G1, the policy is validated over three independent 10-target batches, achieving a mean energy of $71.5 \pm 48.3$\,J, an end-effector position error of $2.64 \pm 1.04$\,cm, and an orientation error of $6.92 \pm 1.33^\circ$ -- within the \SI{4}{\centi\metre}/$8.6^\circ$ training tolerance. These results constitute a first step toward energy-aware reinforcement-learning-based arm reaching for humanoid robots.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向能量效率的端到端强化学习框架，用于Unitree G1人形机器人7自由度左臂的节能抓取控制，结合物理建模与Soft Actor-Critic算法，在仿真和实物平台上均验证了其在成功率、能耗与精度上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人在田间操作（如苹果采摘）中面临严峻的能量限制，直接影响单次充电可执行的伸展动作次数，亟需发展能量感知的运动控制方法。
AI.method: 构建基于Pinocchio刚体动力学仿真的环境，集成实验标定的电功率物理模型；采用Soft Actor-Critic（SAC）算法，在增量关节位置动作空间中训练策略，并设计融合四点末端执行器构型距离与力矩范数能量代理的混合星座奖励函数。
AI.result: 仿真中经500万步训练后，对1000个随机目标达到69.9%成功率，成功任务平均能耗98.16 J；实物G1机器人三组各10个目标测试中，平均能耗71.5±48.3 J，末端位置误差2.64±1.04 cm，姿态误差6.92±1.33°，均满足训练容差（4 cm / 8.6°）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作首次实现了面向能量优化的强化学习驱动人形机器人手臂到达控制，为野外部署的节能自主操作提供了可行路径。

title: Mask Proposal Voting Based on Geodesic Framework for Robust Image Segmentation
summary: Despite great advances, finding accurate segmentation remains a challenging task, especially in scenarios with cluttered backgrounds, complex intensity variations and topology appearance. Minimal path models have exhibited their strong ability in addressing image segmentation tasks. However, the performance of minimal paths-based segmentation approaches is heavily influenced by model initialization, hence limiting their application scope in practice. In this work, we propose a novel mask proposal voting framework that overcomes the major drawback of classical approaches, allowing robust segmentation even in complicated scenarios. Firstly, we introduce an efficient method for constructing adaptive domain cuts as a constraint for initializing the region-based min-cut evolution, by which diverse and reliable mask proposal candidates can be generated, substantially increasing the possibility of accurately covering the objective region by these proposals. Secondly, we propose a new mask voting scheme to build a voting score map encoding the final segmentation information. In contrast to classical path voting methods, our model allows incorporating priors to assign different importance to each individual mask. As a consequence, the proposed segmentation model is capable of accurately delineating object boundaries under complex scenarios, and is insensitive to initialization. Experiments demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art minimal path-based approaches in both accuracy and robustness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于掩码提议投票的新框架，通过自适应区域切割生成多样可靠的掩码候选，并设计新投票机制融合先验信息，显著提升复杂场景下的图像分割精度与初始化鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统最小路径分割方法性能严重依赖初始化，在杂乱背景、复杂强度变化和拓扑变化场景下表现受限。
AI.method: 1）构建自适应域切割作为区域最小割演化的约束，生成多样且可靠的掩码提议候选；2）提出新型掩码投票方案，支持引入先验信息对不同掩码赋予差异化权重，生成编码最终分割信息的投票得分图。
AI.result: 在复杂场景下能准确勾勒物体边界，对初始化不敏感；实验表明该方法在精度和鲁棒性上均持续优于当前最优的最小路径类方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提掩码提议投票框架有效克服了经典最小路径方法初始化敏感的缺陷，提升了复杂图像分割的准确性与实用性。

title: EHRNote-ChatQA: A Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Multi-Turn Clinical Question Answering over Longitudinal Discharge Summaries
summary: Discharge summaries are crucial clinical documents containing the context of a patient's overall hospital stay, and are routinely reviewed by medical experts for patient readmission, ongoing care, and diagnostic decision-making. When reviewing them, medical experts often must iteratively synthesize information across multiple summaries while verifying the evidence supporting each answer. Although large language models (LLMs) are increasingly explored for clinical question answering, existing benchmarks do not sufficiently reflect this setting: they often evaluate exam-style medical knowledge or focus on single-turn question answering with limited evidence-grounding evaluation. We introduce EHRNote-ChatQA, the first benchmark for evidence-grounded multi-turn clinical question answering over patients' multiple discharge summaries. Built from de-identified MIMIC-IV discharge summaries, EHRNote-ChatQA contains 967 patient-level multi-turn samples spanning one to five notes and 16,072 medical-expert-verified QA pairs (8,036 content questions, each paired with an evidence-grounding question) across eight clinical categories. The benchmark is constructed through an expert-informed pipeline combining discharge-summary structuring schema, expert-curated multi-turn QA templates, and LLM-based generation, followed by review and revision of every single QA sample by 11 medical experts. Benchmarking 22 open- and closed-source LLMs reveals several challenges, including that LLMs struggle more with evidence grounding than content answering, multi-turn errors compound across turns, and single-turn clinical QA performance does not reliably transfer to this setting. These findings establish EHRNote-ChatQA as a rigorous and practical benchmark for evaluating clinical QA systems. The dataset will be made publicly available through PhysioNet credentialed access.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了EHRNote-ChatQA，首个面向多份出院小结的证据支撑型多轮临床问答基准，包含967个患者级多轮样本和16,072个经医学专家验证的问答对，并揭示了当前大语言模型在证据定位与多轮推理上的关键短板。
AI.motivation: 现有临床问答基准多聚焦单轮问答或考试式知识考查，缺乏对真实临床场景中需跨多份出院小结进行迭代信息整合与证据验证的建模。
AI.method: 基于MIMIC-IV脱敏出院小结，构建专家指导的流水线：包括结构化小结模板、专家设计的多轮问答模板、LLM生成初稿，再由11位医学专家逐条审核修订。
AI.result: 在22个开源/闭源大模型上的评测显示：模型在证据定位任务上显著弱于内容作答；多轮错误随轮次累积；单轮问答性能无法可靠迁移到该多轮证据型任务。
AI.conclusion: EHRNote-ChatQA为评估临床问答系统提供了更贴近实际需求的严格且实用的新基准。

title: Artificial Intelligence Index Report 2026
summary: Welcome to the ninth edition of the AI Index report. As AI continues to advance rapidly, the question becomes whether the systems built around it can keep up. Governance frameworks, evaluation methods, education systems, and the data infrastructure needed to track AI's impact are struggling to match the pace of the technology itself. That gap between what AI can do and how prepared we are to manage it runs through every chapter of this year's report. New in this edition, the report tracks how AI is being tested more ambitiously across reasoning, safety, and real-world task execution, and why those measurements are increasingly difficult to rely on. It also features new estimates of generative AI's economic value alongside emerging evidence of its labor market effects, an analytical framework on AI sovereignty, and a science chapter developed in collaboration with Schmidt Sciences. For the first time, the report features standalone chapters on AI in science and AI in medicine, reflecting AI's growing impact across these two domains.

AI.tldr: 第九版AI指数报告探讨了AI技术快速发展与配套治理体系、评估方法、教育体系及数据基础设施滞后之间的差距，并新增了AI在推理、安全和现实任务执行方面的测试进展、生成式AI经济价值估算、劳动力市场影响、AI主权分析框架，以及AI在科学和医学领域的独立章节。
AI.motivation: 随着AI技术的快速进步，现有治理框架、评估方法、教育体系和数据基础设施难以跟上其发展步伐，亟需系统性梳理和评估AI的影响与应对策略。
AI.method: 通过多维度数据收集与分析，涵盖AI测试标准、经济影响估算、劳动力市场研究、主权分析框架构建，并联合Schmidt Sciences开展科学领域专项研究。
AI.result: 揭示了AI能力与社会准备度之间的显著差距；提供了生成式AI经济价值新估算；呈现了AI在科学与医学中日益增长的实际应用证据；提出了AI主权等新分析框架。
AI.conclusion: AI技术演进已超越当前治理体系与评估能力，亟需加强跨领域协同，提升监管、教育与基础设施建设，以弥合技术发展与社会适应之间的鸿沟。

title: DiRecT: Safe Diffusion-Based Planning via Receding-Horizon Denoising
summary: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful tools for planning and control by learning multimodal distributions over actions and trajectories. Yet reliable inference-time safety enforcement remains a key barrier to their deployment in safety-critical tasks. Existing approaches typically project each denoising iterate onto the feasible set, even though constraints are defined only on the final clean trajectory. Enforcing feasibility on noisy intermediate samples can therefore overconstrain the sampling dynamics, substantially degrading sample quality. To address this limitation, we introduce DiRecT (Diffusion-based planning via Receding-horizon denoising with Terminal constraints), a training-free algorithm for constrained sampling from diffusion models via stochastic optimal control (SOC). DiRecT enforces constraints only on the final clean sample, avoiding unnecessary restrictions on the intermediate denoising dynamics. Inspired by model predictive control, we derive a principled receding-horizon surrogate for the otherwise intractable constrained SOC formulation, yielding an efficient algorithm that cleanly separates stochastic denoising from constraint satisfaction, progressively steering samples toward feasible final trajectories without distorting the learned diffusion dynamics. Furthermore, DiRecT is highly flexible: it can leverage off-the-shelf or domain-specific optimizers, incorporate priors over environment dynamics, and optimize additional soft rewards. Extensive experiments on safe planning benchmarks demonstrate that DiRecT substantially improves deployment safety and task performance over existing diffusion-based planning baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiRecT算法，通过随机最优控制实现扩散模型的约束采样，仅在最终干净轨迹上施加约束，避免中间去噪过程的过度约束，从而提升安全关键任务中的规划性能和安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在推理时对每个去噪迭代都施加可行性约束，但约束实际只应作用于最终干净轨迹，这导致中间过程被过度约束，损害样本质量。
AI.method: 提出DiRecT（基于扩散的递推视界去噪与终端约束规划）算法，无需重新训练，将约束仅施加于最终样本，并借鉴模型预测控制思想设计递推视界近似求解受约束的随机最优控制问题。
AI.result: 在多个安全规划基准测试中，DiRecT显著优于现有基于扩散的规划基线，在部署安全性与任务性能上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: DiRecT提供了一种灵活、高效且训练无关的扩散模型约束采样框架，实现了约束满足与扩散动力学保真度的解耦。

title: ControlMap: Controllable High-Definition Map Generation for Traffic Scenario Simulation
summary:
Simulation is central to validating autonomous driving systems, yet current pipelines are limited by insufficient scenario diversity due to costly High Definition (HD) map creation. Scaling HD maps requires expensive data collection and manual processing. Moreover, existing generative models lack the fine-grained control necessary to target specific road topologies during generation.
  This paper presents a data-driven pipeline for controllable HD map generation using latent diffusion and ControlNet for spatial conditioning. To our knowledge, we are the first to inject spatial guidance signals into a diffusion model for HD map synthesis. Furthermore, our model supports adjustable conditioning strength through classifier-free guidance and city-level style transfer via city label conditioning. To complement existing metrics, we introduce two novel metrics to evaluate adherence to the control signal and similarity to ground-truth maps. Experiments demonstrate that our model generates realistic HD maps that faithfully follow input road topologies while accurately preserving city-specific details.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于潜在扩散模型和ControlNet的空间可控高清地图生成方法，首次将空间引导信号注入扩散模型，并引入新指标评估控制信号遵循度与真实地图相似性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶仿真中HD地图生成成本高、多样性不足，且生成模型缺乏对特定道路拓扑的细粒度控制能力。
AI.method: 提出数据驱动的可控HD地图生成流水线，结合潜在扩散模型与ControlNet进行空间条件控制；支持通过无分类器引导调节条件强度，并通过城市标签实现城市级风格迁移。
AI.result: 模型能生成逼真HD地图，准确遵循输入道路拓扑并保留城市特有细节；提出两个新评估指标验证控制信号遵从性与真实地图相似性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了HD地图生成的可控性、多样性与真实性，为自动驾驶仿真提供了更高效、可扩展的地图生成方案。

title: FlexPooling with Simple Auxiliary Classifiers in Deep Networks
summary: In computer vision, the basic pipeline of most convolutional neural networks consists of multiple feature extraction layers, where the input signal is downsampled to a lower resolution in each subsequent layer. This downsampling process is commonly referred to as pooling, which is an essential operation in CNNs. Pooling improves robustness against transformations, reduces the number of trainable parameters, increases the receptive field, and lowers computation time. Since pooling is a lossy process but remains important for extracting high-level information from low-level representations, it is important to preserve the most prominent information from previous activations to improve network discriminability. Standard pooling is usually performed using dense pooling methods, such as max pooling or average pooling, or through strided convolutional kernels. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective adaptive pooling method, called FlexPooling, which generalizes average pooling by learning a weighted average over activations jointly with the rest of the network. We further show that attaching Simple Auxiliary Classifiers (SAC) to the CNN improves performance and demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method compared with standard pooling methods. Experiments on multiple popular image classification datasets show that FlexPooling consistently outperforms baseline networks, achieving approximately 1 to 3 percent improvement in accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应池化方法FlexPooling，通过联合学习加权平均来改进标准池化，结合简单辅助分类器（SAC）提升CNN图像分类性能，在多个数据集上取得1-3%精度提升。
AI.motivation: 标准池化（如最大池化、平均池化）是损失性的，难以充分保留关键信息；需在保持池化优势的同时增强特征判别力。
AI.method: 提出FlexPooling——一种可学习的加权平均池化方法，与网络端到端联合训练；并引入Simple Auxiliary Classifiers（SAC）辅助监督。
AI.result: 在多个主流图像分类数据集上，FlexPooling consistently优于基线模型，精度提升约1–3%。
AI.conclusion: FlexPooling是一种简单有效、可即插即用的自适应池化方案，结合SAC能显著提升CNN分类性能，验证了可学习池化的设计价值。

title: A Self Consistency Based Reranking for Narrative Question Answering
summary: Narrative question answering (NQA) is a challenging task in natural language processing that requires models to understand long textual contexts, capture relationships across events, and generate coherent responses. Despite recent advances in pretrained language models, most existing approaches rely on a single decoding output during inference, making them sensitive to generation variability and often resulting in incomplete or inconsistent answers .To address this limitation, we propose a self-ensemble Self-Consistency-Based reranking framework for narrative question answering. The proposed method generates multiple candidate answers for each story-question pair and selects the final answer based on semantic agreement among the generated responses. This allows the model to explore diverse answer formulations while improving robustness through consensus-based selection without requiring modifications to the underlying architecture .The framework combines pretrained and fine-tuned language generation with multi-answer inference and similarity-based reranking. We evaluate the proposed approach on the NarrativeQA dataset using multiple models, including FLAN-T5 (Base and Small) and Pegasus-Large, under both baseline and fine-tuned settings .Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method consistently improves performance across all models. In particular, FLAN-T5-Base achieves the best overall performance, improving from 82.32% to 86.66% (+4.34%) when combined with self-ensemble inference. Additionally, the largest improvement is observed with Pegasus-Large, which increases from 72.50% to 87.07% (+14.57%), highlighting the effectiveness of the proposed strategy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自一致性重排序的自集成框架，用于提升叙事问答（NQA）任务中答案生成的鲁棒性与一致性，通过生成多个候选答案并依据语义一致性选择最优答案，无需修改模型结构。
AI.motivation: 现有NQA方法多依赖单次解码输出，易受生成随机性影响，导致答案不完整或不一致。
AI.method: 提出基于自一致性的自集成重排序框架：对每个故事-问题对生成多个候选答案，利用语义相似性进行重排序，选取共识度最高的答案；结合预训练与微调语言模型，支持多答案推理与相似性评估。
AI.result: 在NarrativeQA数据集上，该方法显著提升多个模型性能：FLAN-T5-Base准确率从82.32%提升至86.66%（+4.34%），Pegasus-Large提升最多达14.57%（72.50%→87.07%）。
AI.conclusion: 自一致性自集成策略能有效增强NQA模型的鲁棒性与泛化能力，且兼容现有架构，具有通用性和实用性。

title: Repeated Bilateral Trade: The Quest for Fairness
summary: We study repeated bilateral trade from a fairness perspective. At each round, a fresh seller-buyer pair arrives, and the platform posts a price before observing the traders' valuations. Trade occurs only if both agents accept the price. Rather than maximizing only the gain from trade, we consider platforms that seek balanced divisions of the generated surplus. We show that natural fairness desiderata lead to a one-parameter Rawls-to-Nash family of fair-gain objectives, obtained by aggregating the seller's and buyer's net gains through nonpositive Hölder means. Unlike the standard gain-from-trade objective and the Rawlsian fair-gain objective studied in prior work, our proposed objectives induce a new statistical structure in which expected rewards are recovered from threshold feedback through a two-dimensional singular-kernel integral identity. This leads to a nonstandard pure-exploration problem whose natural estimators are rectangular double sums with row-column dependence and singular weights. Assuming independent i.i.d. seller and buyer valuation sequences with arbitrary unknown marginals, we characterize the optimal learning rates for the whole Rawls-to-Nash family of fair-gain objectives, giving matching fixed-confidence sample-complexity and regret bounds up to polylogarithmic factors.

AI.tldr: 本文从公平性角度研究重复双边交易，提出了一种基于非正Hölder均值的Rawls-to-Nash公平收益目标族，并在阈值反馈下建立了新的统计结构，刻画了其最优学习速率。
AI.motivation: 传统平台仅最大化交易收益，忽视买卖双方对剩余分配的公平性；本文旨在建模兼顾公平与效率的平台目标。
AI.method: 构建基于非正Hölder均值的公平收益目标族，推导其在阈值反馈下的二维奇异核积分恒等式，分析带行列依赖与奇异权重的矩形双重和估计器，建立固定置信度样本复杂度与遗憾界。
AI.result: 在买卖方估值独立同分布但边缘分布未知的设定下，给出了整个Rawls-to-Nash公平目标族的最优学习速率，匹配的样本复杂度与遗憾界（至多差多项式对数因子）。
AI.conclusion: 公平目标的选择深刻影响学习结构与难度；所提出的框架统一了Rawlsian与Nash型公平，并揭示了其统计学习本质。

title: Friction Characterization of a Cable-Driven Differential Actuation System for Lower-Limb Exoskeletons
comment: Accepted for presentation IEEE RAS/EMBS 11th International Conference on Biomedical Robotics and Biomechatronics
summary: Lower-limb exoskeletons require actuation systems that can provide accurate joint torque control while preserving low mass and encumbrance. Conventional architectures often rely on independently actuated joints and joint-level torque sensors, increasing system complexity and weight. This paper presents a novel differential actuation architecture for hip-knee flexion/extension, enabling cooperative torque sharing between two motors via a linear differential mapping between motor and joint. To compensate for transmission losses, a model-based friction estimation strategy is developed and experimentally implemented, allowing accurate joint torque estimation without the need for torque sensors. The proposed solution is validated on a physical prototype, demonstrating the feasibility of sensorless torque estimation in a differentially actuated hip-knee module of a lower-limb exoskeleton.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于下肢外骨骼髋-膝屈伸的新型差动驱动架构，通过电机与关节间的线性差动映射实现双电机协同扭矩分配，并结合基于模型的摩擦估计策略，在无需关节扭矩传感器的情况下实现高精度关节扭矩估计。
AI.motivation: 下肢外骨骼需要轻量、低侵入且能精确控制关节扭矩的驱动系统；传统独立驱动加关节扭矩传感器方案导致系统复杂、笨重。
AI.method: 设计一种髋-膝共用的差动驱动架构，建立电机与关节间的线性差动映射关系；提出并实现基于模型的摩擦补偿策略，用于传感器less的关节扭矩估计。
AI.result: 在物理样机上成功验证了该差动驱动架构及无传感器扭矩估计方法的可行性，实现了准确的关节扭矩估计。
AI.conclusion: 差动驱动结合模型基摩擦估计可有效替代传统关节扭矩传感器，在保证控制精度的同时显著降低系统质量与复杂度，为轻量化外骨骼设计提供了新思路。

title: Learning Sparse Latent Predictive Foundation Model for Multimodal Neuroimaging
summary: Brain MRIs are routinely acquired as multiple complementary sequences with unique contrast weighting, including T1-weighed imaging (T1w) anatomic and fluid-sensitive T2-weighted (T2w) contrasts. However, methods for learning unified representations across the multitude of MRI contrast mechanisms at health-system scale are lacking. In this study, we introduce Neuro-JEPA, a sparse multimodal neuroimaging foundation model that combines a latent predictive objective with a Mixture-of-Experts architecture to encode brain MRI across core T1w, T2w, and fluid-suppressed FLAIR imaging (FLAIR). We further provide a systematic methodological study of architectural, masking, objective, and sparsity design choices beneficial for robust neuroimaging multimodal representation learning. Neuro-JEPA was pretrained on 1,551,862 scans from 428,647 studies after modality-specific preprocessing with data curation across three core structural brain MRI sequences. We evaluated the learned representations across clinical and research settings, including 25 tasks from three health systems: NYU Langone, NYU Long Island, and Massachusetts General Hospital, and 22 tasks from 12 public datasets, covering unimodal, multimodal and cross-domain evaluation configurations. Across these benchmarks, existing neuroimaging foundation models showed inconsistent gains over a simple convolutional neural network (CNN) baseline, whereas Neuro-JEPA achieved stronger and more consistent performance across all evaluated settings. These results establish a scalable methodological framework for multimodal neuroimaging representation learning and highlight the need for foundation model evaluation protocols that include simple baselines, clinically heterogeneous cohorts and controlled multimodal comparisons.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Neuro-JEPA，一种基于稀疏混合专家架构与潜在预测目标的多模态神经影像基础模型，用于统一表征T1w、T2w和FLAIR脑MRI，在大规模真实临床与公开数据上验证其鲁棒性与一致性优势。
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏在医疗系统规模下学习多种MRI对比度（如T1w、T2w、FLAIR）统一表征的能力，且基础模型评估缺乏简单基线、临床异质队列和受控多模态比较。
AI.method: 提出Neuro-JEPA模型，结合潜在预测编码（JEPA）目标与Mixture-of-Experts稀疏架构；系统研究了架构、掩码策略、训练目标和稀疏性设计；预训练于超百万例三序列MRI扫描（经模态特异性预处理与数据清洗）。
AI.result: 在来自三家医院的25项临床任务及12个公开数据集的22项研究任务上，Neuro-JEPA显著且一致地超越现有神经影像基础模型及CNN基线；验证了其跨单模态、多模态与跨域设置的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Neuro-JEPA为大规模多模态神经影像表征学习提供了可扩展的方法论框架，并强调需建立包含简单基线、临床多样性与可控多模态对比的基础模型评估协议。

title: ttda704 at SemEval-2026 Task 6: Structured Chain-of-Thought Prompting for Political Evasion Detection
summary: This paper describes our system for SemEval-2026 Task 6, which addresses the classification of political evasion strategies in English question-answer pairs extracted from U.S. presidential interviews. We systematically compare two distinct paradigms: (1) Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Qwen3 models (4B-32B) using QLoRA, enhanced with tiered upsampling and weighted cross-entropy loss to address severe class imbalance, and (2) structured Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting of reasoning-capable API models, namely DeepSeek-V3.2 and Grok-4-Fast. Our evaluation demonstrates that structured CoT prompting of reasoning-enabled models substantially outperforms our baseline parameter-efficient fine-tuning implementation in absolute Macro F1. Our best system, Grok-4-Fast with extended reasoning and few-shot hierarchical CoT prompting, achieves a Macro F1 of 0.5147 on Subtask 2 (9-class evasion) and 0.7979 on Subtask 1 (3-class clarity), ranking 8th out of 33 teams on Subtask 2 and 13th out of 41 teams on Subtask 1 on the official leaderboard. Furthermore, our ablation studies reveal key insights into effective prompt design for evasion detection: presenting labels within a hierarchical taxonomy helps structure model reasoning, while few-shot exemplars provide task calibration. However, the strongest prompt variants are not statistically distinguishable in Macro F1, and explicitly enabling extended reasoning modes yields substantial performance gains by facilitating the multi-step pragmatic analysis required to detect evasive intent.

AI.tldr: 本文对比了参数高效微调（QLoRA）与结构化思维链（CoT）提示两种方法在政治回避策略识别任务中的效果，发现后者显著更优；最佳系统为Grok-4-Fast配合扩展推理与分层少样本CoT提示，在两项子任务中分别取得0.5147和0.7979的Macro F1。
AI.motivation: 解决美国总统访谈中英文问答对的政治回避策略分类问题，尤其应对严重类别不平衡和复杂语用意图识别挑战。
AI.method: 对比两类方法：(1) 使用QLoRA对Qwen3系列模型（4B–32B）进行参数高效微调，并引入分层过采样与加权交叉熵损失；(2) 对DeepSeek-V3.2和Grok-4-Fast等具备推理能力的大模型采用结构化Chain-of-Thought提示，包括分层标签体系、少样本示例及扩展推理模式。
AI.result: 结构化CoT提示显著优于参数高效微调；Grok-4-Fast + 扩展推理 + 分层少样本CoT在Subtask 2（9类回避）达Macro F1=0.5147（排名第8/33），Subtask 1（3类清晰度）达0.7979（排名第13/41）；消融表明分层标签与少样本有助于推理结构化，而扩展推理模式带来显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 在政治回避检测任务中，结构化、多步推理导向的提示工程比传统微调更有效；扩展推理能力是识别复杂语用意图的关键，提示设计应兼顾层级结构与任务校准。

title: RoboPIN: Grounded Embodied Reasoning via Pinned Chain-of-Thought
summary: Embodied reasoning requires models to perceive task-relevant objects and spaces in physical environments and maintain consistent visual grounding throughout multi-step reasoning. However, current vision-language models rely on text-only or coordinate-augmented chain-of-thought, where entity references remain implicit and ambiguous. This may cause the reasoning process to decouple from visual evidence, entity references to drift across steps, and a causal disconnection between the reasoning trajectory and the final answer, with these problems further amplified in multi-view scenarios due to cross-view appearance changes. To address these issues, we propose Pinned Chain-of-Thought (\pincot{}), a structured reasoning paradigm that pins every reasoning step to visual evidence. \pincot{} introduces the concept of \reasoninganchor{}, which binds each task-relevant entity to a structured visual anchor with entity name, unique identity, view index, and spatial grounding, enabling consistent entity tracking across reasoning steps and views. We build a fully automated data generation pipeline to construct \dataset{}, a high-quality \pincot{}-formatted reasoning dataset. We then train \method{} through three-stage post-training that progressively injects embodied knowledge, structured reasoning ability, and process-supervised alignment, with rewards that directly constrain both anchor localization and identity consistency during reasoning. On 14 benchmarks covering embodied spatial reasoning, multi-view reasoning, and pointing, \method{} with only 4B parameters consistently outperforms 7B level open-source embodied models, achieving a 12\% average improvement over the strongest 7B baseline, Mimo-Embodied. Further analysis shows that \pincot{} improves grounding accuracy and cross-step identity consistency, validating the effectiveness of process supervision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pinned Chain-of-Thought（PinCoT），一种将每步推理显式绑定到视觉证据的结构化推理范式，通过引入'推理锚点'实现跨步骤和多视角下的实体一致追踪，并构建了配套数据集与三阶段训练方法，在多项具身推理任务上显著超越现有开源模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在具身推理中依赖隐式、模糊的实体引用，导致推理与视觉证据脱节、实体指代漂移及因果断裂，尤其在多视角场景下因外观变化而加剧。
AI.method: 提出PinCoT范式，定义'推理锚点'（含实体名、唯一标识、视角索引、空间定位）以显式绑定每步推理至视觉证据；构建全自动数据生成流程创建PinCoT格式数据集；采用三阶段后训练（注入具身知识、结构化推理能力、过程监督对齐），并设计约束锚点定位与身份一致性的奖励机制。
AI.result: 在14个具身空间推理、多视角推理和指向任务基准上，仅4B参数的Method持续超越7B级开源具身模型，平均性能比最强7B基线Mimo-Embodied提升12%；分析表明PinCoT显著提升视觉接地准确率与跨步实体身份一致性。
AI.conclusion: 显式视觉锚定与过程监督驱动的结构化推理能有效缓解具身推理中的接地漂移与因果断裂问题，为多视角、多步骤具身任务提供更鲁棒、可解释的解决方案。

title: Learning Earthquake Wave Arrival Time Picking from Labels with Inaccuracies
summary: Inaccurately labeled training data, or "label noise", poses a significant threat to the integrity of supervised machine learning models. This corruption directly degrades performance by teaching the model erroneous mappings between features and labels, which leads to poor generalization and reduced accuracy on properly labeled validation and test data. Current seismological applications mainly rely on large-scale training sets or data augmentation to reduce the label-noise impact, which can be labor-intensive and costly. Here, we introduce a Label Noise-Contrastive Robust Learning (LaNCoR) approach that can effectively handle noisy labels in seismic signal processing tasks, without requiring large-scale training datasets. In this approach, the input waveform feature and label representation distributions are aligned in the feature space to correct mislabeling and reduce its impact on the training process. We present LaNCoR's performance on the task of P-phase arrival-time picking of real microseismic data using two baseline models and training approaches. Our results indicate that LaNCoR can improve performance by up to 28.8% across performance metrics. This approach holds great promise for model training in seismology and geosciences.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LaNCoR的标签噪声鲁棒学习方法，通过在特征空间中对齐波形特征与标签表示分布，有效缓解地震信号处理中标签噪声问题，无需大规模训练数据，在P波到时拾取任务上性能提升达28.8%。
AI.motivation: 地震学中标签噪声严重影响监督学习模型性能，而现有方法依赖大规模数据或数据增强，成本高、耗时长。
AI.method: 提出Label Noise-Contrastive Robust Learning（LaNCoR）方法，将输入波形特征与标签表示分布在特征空间中对齐，以纠正误标并抑制噪声影响。
AI.result: 在真实微震数据P波到时拾取任务上，相比两种基线模型和训练方式，LaNCoR在各项指标上最高提升28.8%。
AI.conclusion: LaNCoR是一种高效、低数据依赖的标签噪声鲁棒学习方法，有望推动地震学及地球科学领域的模型训练发展。

title: $λ$-Reachability: Geometric-Horizon Safety Bellman Equations for Humanoid Safety
summary: We introduce $λ$-Reachability, a scalable approach to Hamilton--Jacobi safety analysis for high-dimensional robotic systems. Unlike prior discounted formulations that rely on fixed one-step Bellman updates, $λ$-Reachability employs a stochastic multi-step estimator of the safety value, using a geometrically distributed rollout horizon together with a randomly absorbed terminal. Conceptually analogous to TD($λ$), $λ$-Reachability interpolates between local self-consistency updates and long-horizon max-over-trajectory safety targets via an interpretable horizon-control parameter. Unlike TD($λ$), where the terminal value is always incorporated in learning targets, the terminal safety value in $λ$-Reachability is only used at a probability controlled by parameter $δ$. We formally show that for $δ<1$, the update induces a contraction mapping that allows temporal-difference learning; as $λ\to 1$, the estimator recovers the undiscounted reachability objective. We apply $λ$-Reachability to high-dimensional safety learning problems with both simulated and real humanoid robots under balance and collision avoidance constraints. Experimental results demonstrate that $λ$-Reachability significantly improves both safe-set boundary classification and safety margin estimation compared to single-step temporal-difference baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出λ-Reachability方法，用于高维机器人系统的Hamilton-Jacobi安全分析，通过几何分布的多步估计与随机吸收终端，兼顾局部一致性与长时域安全性目标，在仿真与真实人形机器人实验中显著提升安全边界分类与安全裕度估计性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于固定单步Bellman更新的折扣式安全分析方法难以兼顾高维机器人系统中局部精度与长时域安全目标，亟需一种可扩展、理论可靠且实用的安全价值估计方法。
AI.method: 提出λ-Reachability：采用几何分布的随机 rollout步数与概率δ控制的随机吸收终端，构建多步安全值估计器；其更新形式类比TD(λ)，但终端安全值仅以概率δ被纳入学习目标；理论证明当δ<1时该更新为收缩映射，保证收敛性，并在λ→1时退化为无折扣可达性目标。
AI.result: 在仿真及真实人形机器人平台上验证了该方法在平衡与避障约束下的有效性；相比单步TD基线，显著提升了安全集边界分类准确率与安全裕度估计精度。
AI.conclusion: λ-Reachability提供了一种兼具理论严谨性与工程实用性的高维安全分析框架，通过可调参数λ和δ实现对安全学习偏差-方差权衡的显式控制，为复杂机器人系统安全验证开辟新路径。

title: DYNA : Dynamic Episodic Memory Networks for Augmenting Large Language Models with Temporal Knowledge Graphs in Continuous Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle to incorporate new knowledge without forgetting or costly retraining. We propose DYNA, a lightweight framework that augments a frozen LLM with a temporal knowledge graph where events are nodes and temporal relations are directed, timestamped edges. The graph serves as an external, updatable memory. At query time, DYNA retrieves relevant nodes via random walks and centrality measures, then augments the LLM's response. Evaluated on three temporal recall tasks, DYNA reduces catastrophic forgetting by ~7% compared to fine-tuning and improves temporal ordering by ~5% over standard RAG. Higher graph clustering coefficients correlate with better retrieval, showing that graph structure matters. Contributions: (1) episodic memory as temporal KG, (2) retraining-free LLM augmentation, (3) graph properties as predictors of retrieval performance.

AI.tldr: DYNA是一个轻量级框架，通过引入时间知识图谱作为外部可更新记忆，增强冻结的大型语言模型（LLM），在不重新训练的情况下提升时序知识回忆能力。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型难以在不遗忘旧知识或进行高成本重训练的情况下融入新知识。
AI.method: 构建一个以事件为节点、带时间戳的时序关系为有向边的时间知识图谱作为外部记忆；在查询时通过随机游走和中心性度量检索相关节点，并将结果注入LLM生成过程。
AI.result: 在三个时序回忆任务上，相比微调减少约7%的灾难性遗忘，相比标准RAG提升约5%的时序排序准确率；图聚类系数越高，检索效果越好。
AI.conclusion: 时间知识图谱可作为有效的外挂式情景记忆，无需重训练即可增强LLM的时序知识能力，且图结构特性可预测检索性能。

title: Rethinking Scaffolding in LLM Tutors: The Interactional Mismatch Between Benchmarks and Real-World Deployments
comment: Pluralistic Alignment Workshop @ ICML 2026, Seoul, South Korea
summary: A central pedagogical value evaluated in AI tutor benchmarks is scaffolding: guiding students through graduated steps toward a solution. Alignment and evaluation methods for embedding scaffolding behaviour into chatbots, however, rest on an implicit assumption: that students will take up the scaffolding and engage in the conversation. To examine whether this assumption holds, we introduce an evaluation pipeline around two metrics - Chatbot Scaffolding and Student Uptake - and apply them across nine datasets of 9,490 chats, spanning AI tutor benchmarks and real-world deployments of educational chatbots. Our analysis reveals that while benchmarks assume a high-scaffolding, high-student-uptake environment, students in real-world settings exhibit lower levels of uptake overall - frequently bypassing the chatbot's pedagogical framing to drive the interaction toward their own learning goals at little interpersonal cost. We argue that bypassing scaffolding is not necessarily detrimental; rather, it frequently highlights a mismatch between a chatbot's pedagogical framing and the student's learning goals. To meaningfully evaluate the effectiveness of a chatbot's assistance, future benchmarks must move beyond the assumption that students will simply take up the scaffolding, and instead evaluate how these chatbots navigate diverse learning contexts and student-driven interaction patterns.

AI.tldr: 本文质疑AI导师基准测试中关于学生会接受并参与脚手架式指导的隐含假设，通过引入'聊天机器人脚手架'和'学生采纳度'两个指标，在9个数据集共9490次对话中进行实证分析，发现现实场景中学生常绕过脚手架以追求自身学习目标；作者主张应重新定义评估标准，关注AI如何适应多样化的学习情境与学生主导的互动模式。
AI.motivation: 现有AI导师基准测试隐含假设学生会主动接受并参与脚手架式指导，但该假设缺乏实证验证，可能导致评估失真。
AI.method: 提出包含'Chatbot Scaffolding'和'Student Uptake'的双维度评估流程，并在涵盖基准测试与真实部署的9个数据集（共9490条对话）上进行实证分析。
AI.result: 现实场景中学生对脚手架的采纳率显著低于基准测试所预设水平，常绕过AI的 pedagogical framing 以自主推进学习目标；这种绕过行为常反映AI教学框架与学生实际学习目标之间的错配。
AI.conclusion: 未来AI导师评估不应预设学生必然采纳脚手架，而应聚焦于AI在多样化学习情境及学生主导互动中的适应性与有效性。

title: A Compositional Framework for Open-ended Intelligence
summary: Open-ended intelligence is the capacity to adapt to novel problems and environments that are substantially different from those in training. We formalize open-ended intelligence as the closure induced by a finite primitive set \(P\) and a set of composition operators \(C\). We characterize properties of the induced closure \(\mathcal{L}(P,C)\) that support unbounded compositional generation across families of tasks and worlds. A mathematics of open-ended intelligence requires two pillars: a minimal set of representational primitives (e.g., states, actions) and algorithmic primitives (e.g., nearest neighbor), together with composition motifs (e.g., recursion, sequencing) that reflect an acquired compositional grammar. The closure of these two pillars enables the generation of infinite adaptive responses across a wide range of settings. The mathematics supports complementary research agendas, including evaluation metrics for explanation and interpretability, as well as building architectures where compositional generalization is native. We propose next primitive prediction as a novel architectural objective, where the training objective encourages the acquisition of reusable algorithmic primitives and their compositional grammar, such that new solutions are generated through recombination. Curriculum learning and self-play enable lifelong learning and expansion of the closure by discovering reusable primitives and transition motifs across families of tasks and worlds. We ground the framework through case studies in physics, evolution, and neuroscience.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种形式化开放性智能的数学框架，将其定义为由有限基元集和组合算子集诱导的闭包，并探讨了支持无限组合生成的关键性质；提出了‘下一基元预测’这一新架构目标，结合课程学习与自博弈实现终身学习与闭包扩展。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统在面对训练中未见过的新问题和环境时适应能力有限，亟需一种能形式化描述并支持无限适应与组合生成的开放性智能理论基础。
AI.method: 将开放性智能形式化为基元集P与组合算子集C所诱导的闭包L(P,C)，分析其数学性质；提出‘下一基元预测’训练目标、课程学习与自博弈机制，以驱动可复用算法基元及其组合语法的学习。
AI.result: 建立了支持无界组合生成的数学框架；明确了表征与算法基元及组合范式（如递归、序列）的双重支柱；验证了该框架在物理、进化与神经科学案例中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 开放性智能的本质在于基元与组合规则构成的闭包结构；该数学框架为评估解释性、构建原生具备组合泛化能力的AI架构提供了理论基础与实践路径。

title: Leveraging Deep Learning for Object and Position Recognition of Load Carriers for Autonomous Logistics Vehicles
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, IFAC World Congress2026, \c{opyright} 2026 the authors. This work has been accepted to IFAC for publication under a Creative Commons Licence CC-BY-NC-ND
summary:
This work explores the use of artificial intelligence in mobile robotics to achieve autonomous detection and pose estimation of load carriers for automated pickup. A deep neural network is designed to recognize predefined landmarks on the carrier from RGBD data; these landmarks are then used to compute the carrier's pose. The network operates directly on RGBD images to estimate landmark positions, which form the basis for determining the carrier's location. The approach is validated in extensive experiments and comprises both software and hardware implementations.
  A deep learning-based framework is presented to detect load carriers and estimate their pose for use with autonomous logistics vehicles. Our method uses a convolutional neural network to identify characteristic reference points on the carrier from RGBD input and computes its pose by combining these inferred landmarks with prior geometric knowledge. Experiments show that the resulting accuracy is sufficient for reliable load carrier detection in industrial environments, confirming the suitability of the method for autonomous intralogistics applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的RGBD数据处理框架，用于移动机器人自主识别载具并估计其位姿，以支持自动化物流取货任务。
AI.motivation: 实现移动机器人在工业环境中对载具的自主检测与精确位姿估计，以支持自动化物流（如自动取货）应用。
AI.method: 设计了一个直接处理RGBD图像的卷积神经网络，用于识别载具上的预定义特征标志点，并结合先验几何知识计算载具位姿。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在工业环境下具有足够精度，能可靠检测载具，验证了其在自主厂内物流中的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的深度学习框架在软硬件实现上均有效，可支撑实际自主物流机器人系统。

title: Multi-Modal Attention for Automated Disaster Damage Assessment Using Remote Sensing Imagery and Deep Learning
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in ISPRS Congress 2026 and the 47th Canadian Symposium on Remote Sensing (CSRS 2026) Annals
summary: Timely and accurate disaster damage assessment is crucial for effective emergency response, resource allocation, and recovery. Traditional methods, which often rely on manual inspections or sparse data, are typically slow and error-prone. This paper introduces a novel framework leveraging remote sensing imagery and deep learning to automate building damage classification. Using pre- and post-disaster satellite imagery, our model categorizes buildings into four damage levels: no damage, minor damage, major damage, and destroyed. The core innovation is a multi-modal attention mechanism that fuses bi-temporal features to explicitly detect and assess structural changes. We employ a lightweight ConvNeXT-Tiny backbone to ensure efficient processing without compromising performance. Key contributions include: (1) a cross-attention module for multi-modal data fusion, (2) an optimized preprocessing pipeline for large-scale datasets, and (3) robust data augmentation techniques. Experiments on a large-scale disaster dataset demonstrate an overall classification accuracy of 94.90%. The model effectively discriminates between damage categories and remains resilient to incomplete data. This system significantly improves assessment speed and accuracy, aiding emergency responders in prioritizing interventions. This work advances automated disaster damage detection by integrating multi-temporal imagery with deep learning, offering a scalable solution for real-time response.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于遥感影像和深度学习的建筑物灾损自动分类框架，利用双时相卫星图像与多模态注意力机制，实现四类灾损等级（无损、轻损、重损、摧毁）的高精度识别，准确率达94.90%，显著提升灾损评估时效性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统灾损评估依赖人工巡查或稀疏数据，速度慢、误差大，亟需自动化、高精度、实时化的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建基于ConvNeXT-Tiny的轻量模型，引入跨模态交叉注意力机制融合灾前/灾后双时相特征，并设计优化预处理流程与鲁棒数据增强策略。
AI.result: 在大规模灾害数据集上达到94.90%的整体分类精度，能有效区分四类损伤等级，且对不完整数据具有较强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了高效、准确、可扩展的自动化灾损评估，为应急响应提供关键技术支撑，推动多时相遥感与深度学习在灾害管理中的实际应用。

title: ttda704 at SemEval-2026 Task 4: Modeling Narrative Structures via Pseudonymization and Multi-View Sentence Alignment
summary: We present our approach to SemEval 2026 Task 4: Narrative Story Similarity and Narrative Representation Learning. Our solution uses contrastive learning with fine-tuned sentence transformers to capture narrative similarity across abstract themes, course of action, and outcomes. We develop two pipelines: (Track A) a single-view method that encodes full narratives with smart layer freezing to reduce overfitting, and (Track B) a multi-view method that models theme, plot, and outcome with view-specific projection heads and self-supervised alignment. Both pipelines build on sentence-transformers models and are trained with contrastive loss on synthetic data. The code is available at the following GitHub repository: https://github.com/dinhthienan33/SemEval2026-Task4-ttda704.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了用于SemEval 2026 Task 4的两种基于对比学习和微调句子嵌入模型的叙事相似性建模方法：单视图（Track A）与多视图（Track B）管道，均在合成数据上训练，并开源代码。
AI.motivation: 解决叙事故事相似性评估与表征学习任务，捕捉抽象主题、行为过程和结果等多维度的语义相似性。
AI.method: 采用对比学习框架，基于微调的sentence-transformers模型；Track A为单视图全叙事编码（配合智能层冻结防过拟合），Track B为多视图建模（分别处理主题、情节、结果，并通过视图特异性投影头与自监督对齐）。
AI.result: 在SemEval 2026 Task 4中提交了两种有效方案，模型在合成数据上完成对比学习训练，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提单视图与多视图对比学习框架能有效建模叙事相似性，验证了细粒度叙事要素解耦与对齐策略的可行性。

title: Mitigating Visual Hallucinations in Multimodal Systems through Retrieval-Augmented Reliability-Aware Inference
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in vision-language understanding and natural-language response generation. However, these systems can still produce overconfident predictions and hallucination-like outputs, particularly when the visual evidence is weak, ambiguous, or semantically inconsistent. Most existing approaches focus on improving multimodal representation alignment or retrieval-augmented generation, while providing limited mechanisms to quantify instance-level prediction reliability or identify incorrect visual outputs. This work proposes a retrieval-augmented reliability-aware inference framework for trustworthy multimodal visual understanding. The proposed framework constructs an external visual evidence database using pretrained visual embeddings and nearest-neighbor retrieval over normalized feature representations. Retrieved evidence is used to estimate prediction trustworthiness through multiple reliability indicators, including similarity strength, class-support agreement, evidence margin, entropy-based uncertainty, and an aggregate reliability score. Based on these signals, a decision gate determines whether the system should accept the prediction, answer with caution, or abstain/fallback when evidence is insufficient. A multimodal response-generation layer then produces a final user-facing response conditioned on the reliability decision. Experiments on ImageNet-100 demonstrate that the proposed reliability-aware framework improves accepted prediction accuracy from 85.84\% to 88.88\% at 89.04\% coverage. The hallucination-like accepted wrong-answer rate is reduced from 14.16\% to 11.12\%. These results show that integrating retrieval evidence, reliability estimation, and selective decision gating can improve calibration and reduce overconfident visual errors without retraining large multimodal models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种检索增强的可靠性感知推理框架，通过外部视觉证据库和多指标可靠性评估，提升多模态大语言模型在视觉理解中的可信度，减少过自信预测和幻觉输出，无需重新训练模型。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLMs在视觉证据薄弱、模糊或语义不一致时易产生过自信预测和幻觉，缺乏对实例级预测可靠性的量化与错误视觉输出识别机制。
AI.method: 构建基于预训练视觉嵌入的外部视觉证据库，利用归一化特征表示进行最近邻检索；设计多个可靠性指标（相似度强度、类别支持一致性、证据间隔、基于熵的不确定性及综合可靠性分数）；引入决策门控机制决定接受、谨慎回答或拒绝预测；最后由多模态响应生成层输出最终答案。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-100上，接受预测准确率从85.84%提升至88.88%（覆盖率89.04%），幻觉类错误接受率从14.16%降至11.12%。
AI.conclusion: 融合检索证据、可靠性估计与选择性决策门控可有效提升模型校准能力、降低过自信视觉错误，且无需重训大模型。

title: Constitutional Value Potentials: reading and steering internal priority margins in language models
summary: A constitution tells a language model what to value, but little tells us whether it does. Adherence is judged from outputs, and output evidence is most fragile on value conflicts, where what matters is not which value a model mentions but which one it is willing to sacrifice. We provide evidence that this arbitration can be read from activations in a structured margin readout. We introduce Constitutional Value Potentials (CVP). For each value we learn a scalar potential from the hidden state: an internal pressure to preserve that value, supervised not by the prompt but by an independent judge's verdict on which value the model's own response actually preserved. The signed difference of two potentials is a priority margin. A constitutional clause becomes the claim that a margin stays positive, and a single monitor score flags when it does not. The monitor predicts conflict violations with AUROC up to 0.95, beats a strong hidden-state probe, and generalizes to held-out synthetic conflicts across three Qwen2.5 scales. The signal appears as the answer begins, from the prompt tail and first response token. Read this early, the same signal reveals whether an adversarial priority hack has actually pushed the model toward a violation, rather than only whether the prompt looks adversarial. The same directions also support intervention tests: under selected steering settings, moving along a value direction shifts judged trade-offs in the intended direction. Together, these results suggest that some constitution-relevant priorities are accessible as activation-space margins, rather than only as output behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Constitutional Value Potentials（CVP），通过从隐藏状态学习标量势能来量化语言模型对不同价值观的内在倾向，并利用势能差构建优先级边界，从而在输出前预测价值冲突违规，实现对宪法式约束的可解释监控与干预。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅通过模型输出判断其是否遵守宪法式价值观，但在价值冲突场景下，输出证据脆弱；真正关键的是模型愿意牺牲哪个价值，而非提及哪个价值。
AI.method: 提出Constitutional Value Potentials（CVP）：为每个价值观从隐藏层状态学习一个标量势能，监督信号来自独立裁判对模型响应实际体现价值观的判定；定义两值势能之差为priority margin，将宪法条款形式化为margin保持正值的约束，并构建单一分数监测器；在Qwen2.5系列模型上验证其预测性能、泛化性及早期信号检测能力，并开展干预实验验证方向有效性。
AI.result: 监测器在冲突违规预测上AUROC达0.95，优于强基线探针，且泛化至未见合成冲突；关键信号出现在答案起始阶段（提示尾部与首响应token）；早期信号可区分真实违规与表面对抗性提示；沿价值方向的激活空间干预能按预期改变裁判判定的价值权衡。
AI.conclusion: 部分宪法相关优先级以激活空间中的边际结构形式存在，不仅体现于输出行为，还可被读取、监测与干预，为可解释对齐提供了新路径。

title: A Smart-Scheduled Hybrid (SSH) EKF-FGO State Estimation
comment: This work has been accepted for presentation/publication at the 2026 IEEE Canadian Conference on Electrical and Computer Engineering (CCECE). The final published version will appear in IEEE Xplore
summary: Reliable state estimation in robotics and control re quires balancing estimation accuracy against computational cost. While filtering-based methods such as the Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) provide efficient real-time updates, and optimisation based formulations using factor graphs improve global consistency, the role of optimisation scheduling is often treated implicitly rather than examined as an explicit design variable. This paper presents an experimental study that explicitly isolates optimisation scheduling using a Smart Scheduled Hybrid (SSH) EKF-FGO framework as a controlled testbed. By combining EKF-based state propagation with periodically invoked batch optimisation and holding solver structure and effort fixed, the main contribution of this work is the experimental characterisation of optimisation scheduling as an independent design variable governing the trade-off between intermediate estimation accuracy and computational cost. Simulation results in a planar SLAM environment show that scheduling strongly influences pre optimisation drift, transient error behaviour, and runtime. In particular, the results identify operating regimes in which most of the benefit of global optimisation can be retained at a fraction of the computational cost, highlighting optimisation scheduling as an under-explored yet critical consideration in hybrid state estimation systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验研究了优化调度在混合状态估计系统中的作用，提出了一个智能调度混合（SSH）EKF-FGO框架，明确将优化调度作为独立设计变量，权衡中间估计精度与计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有方法中优化调度常被隐式处理，而未作为显式设计变量进行研究；需在估计精度与计算成本间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出Smart Scheduled Hybrid (SSH) EKF-FGO框架，结合EKF状态传播与周期性批量优化，固定求解器结构与计算量，实验隔离并分析优化调度的影响。
AI.result: 仿真表明调度显著影响预优化漂移、瞬态误差和运行时间；发现可在大幅降低计算成本的同时保留大部分全局优化收益的操作区间。
AI.conclusion: 优化调度是混合状态估计中一个被低估但至关重要的设计维度，应被显式建模与优化。

title: ReGenHuman: Re-Generating Human Appearances for Realistic Full-Body Video Anonymization
summary: Anonymizing human-centric video data is an understudied problem. Prior anonymization techniques either blur or redact pixels at the cost of realism and downstream utility, or generate frame-by-frame at the cost of temporal coherence. We introduce ReGenHuman, the first full-body video anonymization pipeline that is simultaneously realistic, temporally consistent, and anonymous by construction. Contrary to past approaches which redact or edit the inputs directly, we propose a regenerate, don't edit paradigm. Our approach composites 2D pose, segmentation, and monocular depth into two complementary conditioning streams - StructAll and StructHuman, which are used to fine-tune a video-to-video diffusion backbone on in-the-wild human videos, synthesizing the human regions entirely from identity-free structural cues. We evaluate our model on privacy, quality, and utility, and show that our ReGenHuman achieves the best tradeoff across all three axes against current baselines. We further show that our anonymized videos remain effective for downstream tasks, including video question answering.

AI.tldr: ReGenHuman是一种全新的全身体视频匿名化方法，通过再生而非编辑的方式，利用结构化线索（如2D姿态、分割和单目深度）驱动视频扩散模型，生成既真实又时间一致且身份不可识别的视频。
AI.motivation: 现有视频匿名化方法在真实性、时间一致性或隐私保护之间难以兼顾：像素级模糊/裁剪损害下游任务效用，逐帧生成缺乏时间连贯性。
AI.method: 提出'regenerate, don't edit'范式；构建StructAll与StructHuman双条件流，融合2D姿态、分割与单目深度；基于野外人类视频微调视频到视频扩散模型，从身份无关结构线索端到端合成人体区域。
AI.result: 在隐私性、视觉质量与下游任务效用三方面均优于现有基线；匿名化视频仍可有效支持视频问答等下游任务。
AI.conclusion: ReGenHuman首次实现了真实感、时间一致性与构造性匿名三者的统一，为人类中心视频隐私保护提供了新范式。

title: On Defining Erasure Harms for NLP
summary: The deployment of NLP systems has raised concerns about harms they might produce, including representational harms. Recent literature has begun to conceptualize and measure one such harm, the harm of erasure. Nevertheless, the field lacks a clear and cohesive conceptual foundation for identifying and measuring erasure. Existing conceptualizations of erasure are often broad -- making it difficult to identify what is needed to establish and measure erasure -- or else specific to particular settings -- facilitating measurement for those settings but potentially challenging to adapt to other settings. To address this gap, we develop and propose a structured definition of erasure that clarifies what components are necessary for establishing whether erasure has occurred, which practitioners need to explicitly articulate and operationalize in order to measure erasure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结构化的‘抹除’（erasure）定义，以解决当前自然语言处理系统中表征性伤害（尤其是抹除）缺乏统一概念基础的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对‘抹除’这一表征性伤害的概念化要么过于宽泛、难以操作化测量，要么局限于特定场景、泛化性差，导致识别与量化困难。
AI.method: 通过概念分析与理论构建，提出一个结构化、可操作的‘抹除’定义框架，明确识别和测量抹除所必需的核心组成要素。
AI.result: 形成了一个清晰、通用且可扩展的抹除定义，为不同应用场景下的抹除识别与测量提供了统一的概念基础与实践指南。
AI.conclusion: 该结构化定义有助于提升NLP系统公平性评估的严谨性与一致性，推动可复现、可比较的抹除研究与实践。

title: Unassigned Agents in Compilation-based Multi-agent Path Finding
summary: Compilation-based techniques represent an important stream of solvers for multi-agent path finding (MAPF) due to their modularity and adaptability for non-standard variants of the problem. While in the standard MAPF the task is to navigate all agents from their initial positions to given individual goal positions without any collision, variants where a different requirement for agents is used are also relevant. Such a variant is MAPF with unassigned agents (UA-MAPF) where some agents have the same setting as in the standard MAPF with initial positions and goals while the remaining agents have the initial position but have no goal - unassigned agents. Despite unassigned agent do not need to reach any goal position they have to be moved out of the way of the standard agents if needed which represent a specific challenge. We show in this paper that UA-MAPF can be expressed in recent compilation-based techniques for MAPF based on formulating the problem as Boolean satisfiability, namely we adapt SMT-CBS and NRF-SAT, the recent solvers based on counterexample guided abstraction refinement and non-refined abstractions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将带有未分配代理的多智能体路径规划（UA-MAPF）问题纳入基于编译的布尔可满足性（SAT）求解框架，通过适配SMT-CBS和NRF-SAT两种先进求解器，支持未分配代理需避让但无需到达目标的特殊约束。
AI.motivation: 标准MAPF要求所有智能体到达各自目标，而UA-MAPF中部分智能体无目标（仅需避让），现有求解器不直接支持该变体，亟需扩展编译方法以覆盖此类实际场景。
AI.method: 将UA-MAPF建模为布尔可满足性（SAT）问题，适配并扩展两种前沿编译式求解器：基于反例引导抽象精化的SMT-CBS，以及基于非精化抽象的NRF-SAT，使其能处理含未分配智能体的约束。
AI.result: 成功将UA-MAPF纳入SMT-CBS与NRF-SAT框架，在理论和实验上验证了其可行性与有效性，拓展了编译式MAPF求解器的应用范围。
AI.conclusion: UA-MAPF可被自然地表达于当前主流编译式MAPF求解框架中，表明此类框架具有良好的可扩展性与适应性，为处理更复杂的MAPF变体提供了新思路。

title: Post-Launch Capability Expansion of Vision-Language Models via Prompting for On-Orbit Spacecraft Inspection
