comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Equal contribution by Nicholas A. Welsh and Lennon Shikhman. Published in the CVPR2026 Workshop on AI4Space
summary: Spaceborne inspection systems often deploy perception models prior to launch, after which updating model weights or expanding fixed label sets becomes operationally impractical. While supervised models can be integrated pre-flight, adding new semantic capabilities in orbit requires retraining and re-uploading parameters. We investigate whether prompt-driven vision--language models can enable post-launch semantic expansion, allowing new spacecraft components to be specified via natural-language prompts without modifying onboard weights. We evaluate zero-shot instance segmentation of spacecraft components under a strictly frozen, single-pass inference protocol on a test set of $129$ images of previously unseen satellites. Under fixed global thresholds and no post-processing, SAM3 achieves $0.385$ mAP@$0.5$ and $0.267$ mAP@$0.5{:}0.95$. Performance is strongly scale-dependent: large structural elements like spacecraft bodies ($0.639$ AP@$0.50$) and solar arrays ($0.598$ AP@$0.5$) localize reliably, while relatively small appendages like antennas ($0.221$ AP@$0.5$) and thrusters ($0.081$ AP@$0.5$) remain difficult. Prompt formulation influences performance, with structured prompts incorporating spatial and geometric descriptors yielding up to $82%$ improvement over short category-name prompts. The model operates within the memory and compute envelope of contemporary embedded GPUs, suggesting prompt-driven grounding can provide a practical mechanism for post-launch semantic extension of dominant spacecraft structures while highlighting limitations of zero-shot localization for fine-scale components under orbital domain shift.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了利用提示驱动的视觉-语言模型在轨实现语义扩展的可行性，通过零样本实例分割对未见过的卫星组件进行识别，验证了该方法在冻结权重条件下对大型结构部件（如卫星主体和太阳能板）的有效性，但对小型附件（如天线和推进器）效果有限。
AI.motivation: 空间载具上的感知模型在发射前部署后难以更新权重或扩展标签集，亟需一种无需修改模型参数即可在轨增加新语义能力的方法。
AI.method: 采用冻结权重、单次前向推理的零样本实例分割协议，在129张未见过卫星图像上评估提示驱动的视觉-语言模型SAM3；使用不同形式的自然语言提示，并在嵌入式GPU资源约束下测试其可行性。
AI.result: SAM3在固定全局阈值下达到0.385 mAP@0.5和0.267 mAP@0.5:0.95；大型部件（如卫星本体、太阳翼）定位准确率高（>0.59），小型部件（如天线、推进器）表现差（<0.23）；结构化提示相较简单类别名提示最高提升82%性能。
AI.conclusion: 提示驱动的视觉-语言模型可在轨实现对主要航天器结构的语义扩展，具备工程实用性，但受限于零样本定位能力与轨道域偏移，难以可靠识别细小部件。

title: A Deployment Case Study in Robotic Apparel Automation: Digital Twin Integration, Interoperability, and Workforce Enablement
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures, IEEE ICRA 2026 Workshop Paper
summary: Despite steady advances in flexible automation in sectors such as electronics and automotive manufacturing, apparel automation remains challenging because fabrics are deformable and difficult to manipulate with robots. This paper presents a deployment-oriented case study of a robotic sewing system for denim manufacturing, emphasizing the system-level integration required for practical adoption. At the engineering level, a digital thread module parses DXF production drawings into process parameters and executable robot trajectories, reducing manual programming effort and enabling rapid re-targeting across sewing operations. In parallel, a digital twin of the workcell is used during pre-deployment to validate reach and clearance, refine layout and sequencing, evaluate operator access, and assess cycle-time compatibility with upstream and downstream tasks, thereby reducing commissioning risk. At deployment, the system integrates a collaborative robot with conventional sewing equipment, welding, suction fixtures, and machine-level controllers through an interoperability layer. Runtime monitoring and verification, including seam monitoring, collision checking, and trajectory-level validation, improve robustness under environmental variability, while operator-facing training and guidance tools support setup, troubleshooting, and technology adoption. Two staged factory deployments on denim shorts, covering 2D pocket operations and 3D garment-shaping seams, show that digital-twin-based validation, digital-thread-driven task generation, interoperability, runtime verification, and operator training are important for scaling robotic apparel automation.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种面向实际部署的机器人缝纫系统，用于牛仔布制造，通过数字线程、数字孪生、互操作性层、运行时验证和操作员培训等关键技术，提升了柔性自动化在服装制造中的可行性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 服装制造自动化面临挑战，因织物易变形、难以被机器人操控；现有柔性自动化在电子和汽车领域进展显著，但在服装行业落地困难。
AI.method: 构建了包含数字线程（解析DXF图纸生成机器人轨迹）、数字孪生（预部署验证可达性、布局、节拍兼容性等）、互操作性层（集成协作机器人、缝纫设备、焊接/吸盘夹具及控制器）、运行时监控（接缝监测、碰撞检测、轨迹验证）及操作员培训工具的端到端系统。
AI.result: 在牛仔短裤的两阶段工厂部署中，成功实现2D口袋缝制和3D成形缝纫；验证了数字孪生预验证、数字线程任务生成、系统互操作性、运行时验证与操作员支持对规模化应用的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 系统级集成——涵盖设计、仿真、部署与人机协同——是推动机器人服装自动化从实验室走向产线的核心路径；各模块协同显著降低部署风险、提升适应性与可维护性。

title: NEXUS: Neural Energy Fields for Physically Consistent Contact-Rich 3D Object Dynamics
summary: Physics-grounded video generation requires controllable 3D object dynamics that remain physically consistent under contact, deformation, and external forcing. Existing trajectory-based methods often model isolated physical effects, making it difficult to compose conservative and non-conservative dynamics in contact-rich 3D scenes. We present NEXUS, a neural energy-field framework for contact-rich 3D object dynamics. NEXUS represents each object as a structural graph and constructs dynamic object-object and object-environment contact graphs. Inspired by Hamiltonian Neural Networks, NEXUS formulates motion through scalar energy and dissipation terms rather than directly predicting states or accelerations. Conservative effects, including gravity and elastic deformation, are composed as additive energy terms, while non-conservative effects such as damping and impact-induced energy loss are modeled with learned Rayleigh-style dissipation. Forces are derived by differentiating the energy and dissipation functions and rolled out with a multi-substep semi-implicit integrator. Across controlled trajectory benchmarks, NEXUS improves long-horizon accuracy over representative learned and physics-structured dynamics baselines under varying mechanical properties and physical-effect compositions. We further show that NEXUS trajectories provide effective guidance for contact-rich video generation, improving physical plausibility while maintaining competitive visual quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出NEXUS，一种基于神经能量场的框架，用于建模接触丰富的3D物体动力学，通过能量与耗散项联合建模保守与非保守物理效应，并提升视频生成的物理合理性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于轨迹的方法难以在接触丰富的3D场景中统一建模保守（如重力、弹性）与非保守（如阻尼、碰撞耗散）动力学，导致物理一致性不足。
AI.method: NEXUS将物体表示为结构图，构建物体间及物体-环境接触图；受哈密顿神经网络启发，用标量能量与Rayleigh型耗散项建模运动，力由能量和耗散函数梯度导出，并采用多子步半隐式积分器进行 rollout。
AI.result: 在控制轨迹基准测试中，NEXUS在不同力学参数和物理效应组合下均优于代表性学习型与物理结构化基线；其轨迹能有效指导接触丰富视频生成，提升物理合理性且保持良好视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: NEXUS提供了一种统一、可组合、物理一致的动力学建模范式，显著增强接触丰富场景下的长期预测精度与视频生成的物理可信度。

title: The Truth Stays in the Family: Enhancing Contextual Grounding via Inherited Truthful Heads in Model Lineages
summary: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have produced many specialized multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) that share common foundational LLMs, forming distinct model lineages. It remains unclear whether a fundamental behavioral link exists between the foundational LLMs and downstream variants. We investigate this question by quantifying head-level context-truthfulness scores. Across diverse LLM and MLLM lineages, including Vicuna-, Qwen2.5-, LLaMA2-, and Mistral-based models, we find that Truth Scores are strongly preserved within model families, even after instruction tuning or multimodal adaptation. We further show that this inheritance is consistent with attention-head weight preservation, and that context-truthful heads attend to query-relevant evidence. Building on this finding, we propose TruthProbe, a soft-gating strategy that amplifies context-truthful heads while preserving other head contributions. TruthProbe improves contextual truthfulness on HaluEval and reduces multimodal hallucination on POPE and CHAIR, with base-LLM Truth Scores transferring effectively to their fine-tuned LLM and MLLM descendants. Code is available at https://github.com/miso-choi/TruthProbe.

AI.tldr: 本文发现基础大语言模型（LLM）的‘真实性得分’在指令微调和多模态适配后仍被其下游变体（如MLLM）高度继承，并据此提出TruthProbe软门控方法，提升上下文真实性与减少多模态幻觉。
AI.motivation: 探究基础大语言模型（LLM）与其下游多模态变体（MLLM）之间是否存在行为层面的根本性继承关系，尤其是上下文真实性是否可传递。
AI.method: 提出基于注意力头的上下文真实性评分（Truth Score），量化不同模型家族中各注意力头对查询相关证据的关注程度；分析权重保留性；设计TruthProbe软门控机制以增强高真实性头的作用。
AI.result: 验证了Truth Score在Vicuna、Qwen2.5、LLaMA2、Mistral等模型谱系中高度可继承；TruthProbe在HaluEval上提升上下文真实性，在POPE和CHAIR上降低多模态幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 基础LLM的真实性行为具有强谱系继承性，可通过头级分析与软门控策略有效迁移并增强下游模型的真实性表现。

title: TrustedARI: Towards Trust-Native Agentic Routing Infrastructure for Agentic AI
summary:
AI agents increasingly access external models, tools, and services through Agentic Routing Infrastructure (ARI) to manage the overhead of heterogeneous interfaces and fragmented subscriptions. Yet, the architecture of ARI introduces fundamental trust risks: it obtains plaintext access to agent queries and service responses, while leaving agents unable to verify that their queries are routed to intended service providers or that requests and responses remain untampered. To address this problem, we present TrustedARI, the first trust-native agentic routing infrastructure for agentic AI. Architecturally, TrustedARI is built upon three core innovations: (i) an ARI-adapted three-party TLS handshake that enables the agent and ARI to jointly authenticate the service provider through role-specific distribution of TLS key materials; (ii) a privacy-preserving query-construction protocol that allows the agent and ARI to collaboratively construct well-formed queries without exposing their respective private inputs; and (iii) a verifiable billing protocol that supports fair usage-based settlement while preserving the integrity and confidentiality of service responses.
  We implemented and extensively evaluated a prototype of TrustedARI to validate its performance. Experiments confirm that TrustedARI is highly efficient: our ARI-adapted handshake protocol reduces communication overhead by 39.34% compared to the existing three-party TLS handshake. Furthermore, the privacy-preserving query-construction protocol imposes negligible overhead-averaging 0.19 seconds in computation time and 0.58 MB in communication costs-while the verifiable billing protocol speeds up proof generation by 28.20x. Crucially, TrustedARI is readily deployable without any modification to the service providers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TrustedARI，首个面向信任的智能体路由基础设施，通过三项创新技术解决AI智能体在调用外部服务时面临的数据泄露、路由不可信与响应篡改等根本性安全风险。
AI.motivation: 现有Agentic Routing Infrastructure（ARI）虽能统一管理异构接口和服务订阅，但其架构导致核心信任问题：ARI可获取明文查询与响应，且智能体无法验证路由目标是否正确、数据是否被篡改。
AI.method: 提出TrustedARI，包含三项核心技术：（i）适配ARI的三方TLS握手协议，实现智能体与ARI协同认证服务提供方；（ii）隐私保护的联合查询构造协议，使双方在不泄露私有输入前提下生成合法查询；（iii）可验证计费协议，在保障响应完整性与机密性前提下支持公平按用量结算。
AI.result: 原型实验表明：ARI适配握手降低通信开销39.34%；查询构造协议仅引入0.19秒计算延迟和0.58MB通信成本；计费协议证明生成速度提升28.20倍；且无需修改任何服务端。
AI.conclusion: TrustedARI在不牺牲性能与兼容性的前提下，首次系统性地为AI智能体路由提供了端到端可信保障，具备实际部署价值。

title: Beyond Classification: A Cough Regression Benchmark for Respiratory Acoustic Foundation Models
comment: Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Structured Data for Health
summary: Respiratory acoustic foundation models (FMs) excel at cough classification, yet their ability to predict continuous health quantities from cough audio remains largely unexplored, despite the clinical value of passive age, BMI, and disease probability estimation in settings where physical measurements are unavailable. We introduce the multi-model, multi-target cough regression benchmark evaluating five FMs (OPERA-CT, OPERA-CE, OPERA-GT, HeAR, M2D+Resp) across six targets on three datasets under subject-disjoint protocols, comparing linear, MLP-small, and full MLP regression heads. MLP-small beats the mean-predictor baseline on all tasks and linear probing in 23 of 30 model x task cases, with full MLP overfitting on small clinical data but recovering on larger sets, revealing a dataset size x head-capacity trade-off. HeAR leads within-dataset age regression on Coswara (9.12 yr MAE); its CIDRZ result is excluded from headline claims owing to possible HeAR-CIDRZ pretraining overlap. OPERA-GT is favored over OPERA-CT on age in all three datasets, with the CIDRZ margin within seed variance, extending a generative-pretraining advantage from breath to cough. HeAR and M2D+Resp reach near-full performance at N = 50 samples while OPERA models require N = 400. Cross-dataset transfer is strongly asymmetric as large diverse data generalises to small clinical populations (CoughVID to CIDRZ: -0.17 yr) but not vice versa (CIDRZ to Coswara: +2.43 yr, +26.6%).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个多模型、多目标的咳嗽回归基准，评估了五个呼吸声学基础模型在年龄、BMI等连续健康指标预测任务上的性能，揭示了数据集规模与回归头容量之间的权衡关系，并发现跨数据集迁移具有强不对称性。
AI.motivation: 尽管呼吸声学基础模型在咳嗽分类上表现优异，但其从咳嗽音频中预测连续健康指标（如年龄、BMI、疾病概率）的能力尚未被充分探索，而这类被动估计在缺乏物理测量的临床场景中具有重要价值。
AI.method: 构建了包含三个数据集、六个预测目标的多模型、多目标咳嗽回归基准；评估了五个基础模型（OPERA-CT、OPERA-CE、OPERA-GT、HeAR、M2D+Resp），采用主试者不重叠协议，并对比线性探针、小型MLP和全尺寸MLP三种回归头。
AI.result: MLP-small在30种模型×任务组合中的23种上优于线性探针和均值基线；HeAR在Coswara数据集上实现9.12年MAE的最优年龄预测；OPERA-GT在所有三个数据集的年龄预测上均优于OPERA-CT；HeAR和M2D+Resp在仅50样本时即接近饱和性能，而OPERA模型需400样本；跨数据集迁移呈强不对称：大而多样的数据（CoughVID）迁移到小临床数据（CIDRZ）效果好，反之则显著退化。
AI.conclusion: 咳嗽音频可用于稳健预测连续健康指标，但性能高度依赖模型架构、回归头设计及数据规模；生成式预训练（如OPERA-GT）带来一致性优势；跨域泛化能力受限于源域数据多样性，提示未来需关注数据分布匹配与轻量高效适配方法。

title: Scaling Short-Term Memory of Visuomotor Policies for Long-Horizon Tasks
summary: Many robotic tasks require short-term memory, whether it's retrieving an object that's no longer visible or turning off an appliance after a set period. Yet, most visuomotor policies trained via imitation learning rely only on immediate sensory input without using past experiences to guide decisions. We present PRISM, a transformer-based architecture for visuomotor policies to effectively use short-term memory via two key components: (i) gated attention, which filters retrieved information to suppress irrelevant details, improving performance by reducing the spurious correlations between the history and current action prediction, (ii) a hierarchical architecture that first compresses local information into compact tokens and then integrates them to capture temporally extended dependencies, improving its compute and memory footprint. Together, these mechanisms enable us to scale short-term memory in visuomotor policies for up to two minutes. To systematically evaluate memory in visuomotor control, we introduce ReMemBench -- a benchmark of eight diverse household manipulation tasks spanning four categories of short-term memory -- designed to foster general memory mechanisms rather than siloed, task-specific solutions. PRISM consistently outperforms prior works, including recurrent architectures, transformers, and their variants -- achieving an absolute improvement of 5%--12% over the strongest baseline. On the RoboCasa and LIBERO benchmarks, it achieves absolute improvements of 11%--15% over its no-memory variant and fine-tuned Vision-Language-Action baselines such as GR00T-N1-3B and OpenVLA, despite not leveraging any large-scale pretraining. Together, PRISM and ReMemBench establish a foundation for developing and evaluating short-term memory-augmented visuomotor policies that scale to long-horizon tasks. Additional materials are available at https://shahrutav.github.io/short-term-memory

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRISM，一种基于Transformer的视觉运动策略架构，通过门控注意力和分层结构有效利用短期记忆，支持长达两分钟的记忆跨度；同时构建ReMemBench基准用于系统评估短期记忆能力，实验表明PRISM在多个基准上显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 许多机器人任务需要短期记忆能力（如追踪不可见物体或延时关电器），但当前主流模仿学习视觉运动策略仅依赖即时感知输入，缺乏对历史信息的有效利用。
AI.method: 提出PRISM架构：（i）门控注意力机制，过滤历史信息以抑制无关细节、减少历史与动作预测间的虚假相关性；（ii）分层结构，先局部压缩为紧凑token，再整合以建模长时依赖；并构建ReMemBench——包含8个家庭操作任务、覆盖4类短期记忆需求的新型基准。
AI.result: PRISM在ReMemBench上相较最强基线绝对提升5%–12%；在RoboCasa和LIBERO上相较无记忆变体提升11%–15%，且优于GR00T-N1-3B、OpenVLA等微调的视觉语言动作模型，且未使用大规模预训练。
AI.conclusion: PRISM与ReMemBench共同为可扩展的、面向长视野任务的短期记忆增强型视觉运动策略提供了新范式与评估基础。

title: Towards Global AI-Driven Cervical Cancer Screening
summary: The global elimination of cervical cancer is a key public health goal set by the World Health Organization (WHO), with screening programs reducing mortality by up to 80%. However, access to experts and biopsy services is limited in low- to middle-income countries (LMICs). Deep learning (DL)-based algorithms offer promising support for screening, but most existing approaches have been developed and validated on private datasets from single countries. We present the first DL-based approach to cervical cancer screening validated on data from multiple countries. Technically, we phrase the problem of detecting and classifying lesions in colposcopy images as a multi-task learning problem, in which we simultaneously perform image-level classification and lesion segmentation. Our model was trained on a private data set of acid stain colposcopy images with manually generated lesion segmentation masks and corresponding histopathological results, employing extensive data augmentation to address image variability. In an in-distribution validation with pathology results serving as ground truth, our algorithm outperformed medical experts (Balanced Accuracy: 0.68 vs 0.64) in CIN1- (Cervical intraepithelial neoplasia grade 1 or lower) versus CIN2+ (grade 2 or higher) classification. External validation on four colposcopy data sets from four countries featuring radical differences in prevalence and patient characteristics yielded superior performance of our method compared to baseline methods. Performance variability across countries was high with AUC values ranging from 0.54 - 0.80. Overall, algorithm performance varied with age, transformation zone (cervical area most prone to lesion development), presence of comorbidities and pathognomonic signs, with comorbidities having by far the largest negative effect. Future work should focus on improving model robustness and generalizability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个在多国数据集上验证的深度学习宫颈癌筛查方法，通过多任务学习（图像分类+病变分割）提升模型泛化能力，在部分验证中超越专家水平，但在不同国家间性能差异显著，受共病等因素影响较大。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的宫颈癌筛查算法大多在单一国家私有数据集上开发和验证，难以推广至资源有限的中低收入国家；亟需具备跨国家泛化能力的可靠AI辅助工具。
AI.method: 将阴道镜图像中的病变检测与分类建模为多任务学习问题（图像级分类 + 病变分割），使用带手工标注分割掩码及对应病理结果的醋酸染色阴道镜图像私有数据集训练，并采用大规模数据增强应对图像变异。
AI.result: 在内部验证中，算法在CIN1- vs CIN2+分类任务上平衡准确率达0.68，优于专家（0.64）；外部验证涵盖四国数据集，整体性能优于基线方法，但AUC波动大（0.54–0.80）；共病对性能负面影响最显著。
AI.conclusion: 该多任务DL模型展现出跨国家应用潜力，但泛化鲁棒性仍不足，未来需重点提升模型在不同人群、临床条件下的稳定性与适应性。

title: When Correct Edges Cannot Be Verified: A Provenance Gap in Incomplete KGQA and a Provenance-Favoring Completion Policy
summary: Incomplete Knowledge Graph Question Answering (IKGQA) requires completing missing edges to continue reasoning. A growing line of work verifies completed edges against retrieved text, treating textual support as a proxy for edge quality. We ask a question that, to our knowledge, has not been systematically tested: does textual verifiability actually track correctness? Exploiting the gold deleted triples provided by the standard random-deletion protocol, we measure both. The finding is counterintuitive: among gold-correct completed edges, 76-96% have no supporting passage even under exhaustive retrieval, robustly across deletion rates (20%/40%), datasets (CWQ/WebQSP), and relation types (structural, commonsense, long-tail). Most Freebase-style facts simply do not occur as head-tail co-mentions in text. Textual faithfulness therefore measures provenance, not correctness -- separated by a paradigm-level gap no in-corpus retrieval closes. This reframes edge completion. Since most completed edges -- correct or not -- are causally redundant for the answer (95-97% of correct answers do not depend on any unsupported edge), the central question shifts from "is the edge correct?" to "admit or abstain under provenance uncertainty?" Within this framing we present TGComplete, a provenance-favoring admission policy that retrieves evidence at a reasoning breakpoint, verifies a candidate through a lightweight loop, and abstains when support is absent. Against the generate-to-complete baseline GoG, it attains higher edge precision against gold (15-21% vs 3-14%), with no statistically detectable EM loss and 3.1-7.4 times higher strict faithfulness of admitted edges -- at the cost of lower recall. We position TGComplete not as uniformly better, but as a principled point on a precision/provenance-recall trade-off, appropriate when auditability matters.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了不完整知识图谱问答（IKGQA）中基于文本验证的边补全方法是否真正反映边的正确性，发现文本可验证性主要反映信息来源（provenance）而非事实正确性；为此提出TGComplete方法，在保证高精度和高文本忠实性的同时，以牺牲部分召回率为代价，适用于需要可审计性的场景。
AI.motivation: 现有IKGQA工作将文本可验证性作为边补全质量的代理指标，但作者质疑该指标是否真正衡量边的正确性，这一问题尚未被系统检验。
AI.method: 利用标准随机删除协议提供的黄金删除三元组，定量评估边正确性与文本支持之间的关系；提出TGComplete方法，采用在推理断点检索证据、轻量级验证循环、无文本支持则拒绝的策略。
AI.result: 实验发现76–96%的黄金正确补全边在穷尽检索下仍无文本支持；TGComplete相比GoG基线，在边精度（15–21% vs 3–14%）和严格文本忠实性（提升3.1–7.4倍）上显著更优，EM无统计显著下降，但召回率降低。
AI.conclusion: 文本可验证性衡量的是信息来源而非事实正确性；因此边补全任务应从‘边是否正确’转向‘在来源不确定性下是否接受该边’；TGComplete代表精度/来源召回权衡中的一个原则性选择，适用于强调可审计性的场景。

title: An Integrated System for Real-Time Student Assessment and Career Guidance Using Neural Networks in Computing Disciplines
summary: Many undergraduate students in Computer Science (CS) and Software Engineering (SWE) struggle to identify suitable career paths, particularly when their academic performance, abilities, and interests do not fully align. To address this issue, this study proposes an AI-driven Student Assessment and Career Prediction System that integrates a Career Guidance Expert (CGE) system with a Web-Based Student Assessment (WBSA) platform. Within the integrated framework, CGE enhances personalized career recommendations using AI while also assisting students after graduation in identifying suitable jobs, research domains, and higher study opportunities aligned with their skills and interests. The WBSA platform further strengthens interaction between students and faculty through assessments, personalized tasks, mentorship activities, and a secure real-time chat application. The CGE system employs a Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) model trained on real-world academic and extracurricular data collected using the snowball sampling method from the students of universities, achieving a validation accuracy of 94.71% in predicting personalized career paths. A pre-survey was conducted across universities to evaluate the proposed model before deployment. The WBSA system was developed as a modern web application using technologies such as Node.js, Next.js, and PostgreSQL to ensure scalability, responsiveness, and secure data management. The overall system is supported by a secure cloud-based infrastructure, the platform provides reliable performance while assisting graduates to select suitable career path in IT sector. In addition, a post-survey involving both students and faculty was conducted to gather feedback and further improve the overall effectiveness and usability of the system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种AI驱动的学生评估与职业预测系统，结合职业指导专家（CGE）和基于Web的学生评估（WBSA）平台，利用MLP模型实现94.71%准确率的职业路径预测，并通过前后测调查验证其有效性与可用性。
AI.motivation: 解决计算机科学与软件工程本科生因学业表现、能力与兴趣不完全匹配而难以确定合适职业路径的问题。
AI.method: 构建集成CGE与WBSA的系统：CGE采用基于雪球抽样收集的真实数据训练的多层感知机（MLP）模型；WBSA为基于Node.js、Next.js和PostgreSQL的现代Web应用，支持评估、任务、导师制及实时安全聊天；系统部署于安全云基础设施。
AI.result: CGE模型在职业路径预测上达到94.71%验证准确率；前后测调查验证了系统在提升职业选择支持效果与可用性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该AI驱动系统能有效辅助学生进行个性化职业规划，并增强师生互动，为IT领域毕业生提供可靠、可扩展且安全的职业发展支持平台。

title: PHINN: Persistent Homology Inspired Neural Network for Rare-Event Time Series Generation
summary:
Rare events in time series are critical to model but hard to learn due to data scarcity. Current generative models struggle with extreme values. We observe that rare events leave distinct topological fingerprints - transitions in Betti numbers from point-cloud embeddings - that are more stable and discriminative than statistical moments.
  We introduce PHINN, a flow-matching framework using dynamic Betti curves as conditioning signals and a persistence landscape loss for homology consistency. It scales to multivariate data, includes a natural-language interface to set Betti targets, supports cross-domain meta-learning and few-shot generation, and provides certified adversarial robustness.
  On financial, epidemiological, and multi-modal benchmarks, PHINN outperforms statistical and diffusion baselines in topological fidelity (beta-RMSE down 41-63%, transition accuracy up 84%) and matches jump-diffusion models in tail coverage while exceeding them in shape fidelity. All results have 95% confidence intervals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PHINN框架，利用动态Betti曲线作为条件信号和持久性景观损失，提升罕见事件生成的拓扑保真度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 罕见事件在时间序列中至关重要但因数据稀缺难以建模，现有生成模型对极端值建模效果差；而罕见事件在拓扑层面（如Betti数变化）具有更稳定、可区分的指纹特征。
AI.method: 提出PHINN——一种基于流匹配的生成框架，以动态Betti曲线为条件信号，引入持久性景观损失保证同调一致性；支持多变量、自然语言设定Betti目标、跨域元学习与少样本生成，并提供认证对抗鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在金融、流行病学及多模态基准上，PHINN在拓扑保真度（beta-RMSE降低41–63%，跃迁准确率提升84%）上显著优于统计与扩散基线，在尾部覆盖上媲美跳跃-扩散模型，且形状保真度更优；所有结果具95%置信区间。
AI.conclusion: PHINN验证了拓扑特征作为生成建模先验的有效性，为罕见事件建模提供了兼具理论严谨性与实用性的新范式。

title: ATHENA: Accelerated Multi-Task Heterogeneous Influence Functions for Robot Data Curation
summary: In robot imitation learning, influence functions provide a principled approach to quantify each demonstration's effect on robot task outcomes, yet scaling them to billion-parameter Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models is limited by computational and multitask bottlenecks. To this end, we propose ATHENA, an influence function framework tailored for multitask VLA data curation at a billion-parameter scale. Concretely, it leverages the Kronecker structure of linear-layer gradients to reduce projection cost, and approximates dense Hessian inversion with a rank-r Random Truncated Approximation, achieving about a 313.4x speedup in influence computation. Furthermore, ATHENA formulates global and local interactive influence to balance data curation across 50 jointly trained tasks. Extensive evaluations on RoboTwin 2.0 and real-robot deployment, covering 9.34 and 6.90 hours of demonstrations, respectively, show that ATHENA matches or exceeds full-data joint fine-tuning using only 50% of demonstrations in simulation and 66.7% of data across six real-robot tasks. Overall, ATHENA demonstrates its effectiveness for data curation in billion-parameter multitask VLA fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: ATHENA是一种专为十亿参数级多任务视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型设计的影响函数框架，通过利用线性层梯度的Kronecker结构和随机截断Hessian近似，大幅提升影响计算效率，并支持全局与局部交互影响建模，显著减少所需演示数据量且不损性能。
AI.motivation: 现有影响函数方法难以扩展到十亿参数的多任务VLA模型，受限于计算开销和多任务协同瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出ATHENA框架：1）利用线性层梯度的Kronecker结构降低投影成本；2）采用秩-r随机截断近似替代稠密Hessian逆；3）定义全局与局部交互影响以平衡50个联合任务的数据筛选。
AI.result: 在RoboTwin 2.0仿真和真实机器人部署中，分别仅用50%和66.7%的演示数据即达到或超越全量数据微调效果；影响计算速度提升约313.4倍。
AI.conclusion: ATHENA有效解决了大规模多任务VLA模型中高效、可扩展的数据筛选问题，为机器人模仿学习提供了实用化影响驱动的数据策展方案。

title: Gaussian Spatial Priors for Anatomy-Aware Object Detection in Surgical Videos
summary: Detecting anatomical structures in surgical video is essential for intraoperative safety frameworks such as the Critical View of Myopectineal Orifice (CVMPO) in inguinal hernia repair. While prominent structures like the Cooper's Ligament and Triangle of Doom are reliably detected by standard methods, smaller structures such as the epigastric vessels remain challenging due to their visual ambiguity and intermittent visibility. We observe that the spatial relationship between structures is anatomically constrained, and propose a Gaussian Spatial Prior (GSP) module that encodes this relationship as a compact, parametric bias injected into the self-attention of a DAB-DETR decoder. The prior is computed offline from training annotations as a small set of frozen Gaussian parameters and recomputed at each decoder layer using the iteratively refined reference points. On a dataset of inguinal hernia repair videos with 5-fold cross-validation, GSP improves dependent class detection by $+33.5\%$ ($\text{AP}_{50}$) over DAB-DETR and $+53.9\%$ over YOLOv26, while also improving anchor detection by $+6.0\%$. These gains are statistically significant across all folds ($p=0.012$, paired $t-$test).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高斯空间先验（GSP）模块，通过在DAB-DETR解码器的自注意力机制中注入解剖结构间空间关系的紧凑参数化先验，显著提升了手术视频中微小解剖结构（如腹壁下血管）的检测精度。
AI.motivation: 手术视频中微小解剖结构（如腹壁下血管）因视觉模糊和间歇可见性难以被标准方法可靠检测，而其空间关系具有解剖学约束性，可被利用以提升检测性能。
AI.method: 提出高斯空间先验（GSP）模块，将结构间空间关系编码为紧凑的参数化偏置，并注入DAB-DETR解码器的自注意力机制；该先验基于训练标注离线计算为一组冻结的高斯参数，并在每层解码器中利用迭代优化的参考点动态重计算。
AI.result: 在腹股沟疝修复手术视频数据集上，GSP使依赖类检测AP50分别比DAB-DETR和YOLOv26提升+33.5%和+53.9%，锚点检测提升+6.0%，所有折交叉验证结果均统计显著（p=0.012）。
AI.conclusion: 引入解剖空间先验可有效提升手术视频中小结构检测鲁棒性，GSP模块为手术安全框架（如CVMPO）提供了更可靠的视觉感知基础。

title: SciOrch: Learning to Orchestrate Expert LLMs for Solving Frontier Multimodal Scientific Reasoning Tasks
summary: Frontier scientific reasoning remains a major challenge for large language models (LLMs), where even the strongest commercial systems fall short of expert-level performance. A closer look at model behavior reveals substantial complementarity that single-model evaluation hides: different frontier models excel on different question types, and no single model captures the full picture. We present SciOrch, a framework that trains a lightweight 8B model to orchestrate frontier LLMs for scientific reasoning. The orchestrator decomposes each question, delegates sub-problems to selected commercial models through API calls, and synthesizes a final answer. Training such an orchestrator is fundamentally harder than conventional agentic RL: each action triggers an API call that is expensive in both dollar cost and latency, making standard online rollouts infeasible. We address this with MCTS-based approach, producing diverse orchestration trajectories, extracting per-node single-turn samples, and optimizing the orchestrator with GRPO-style training. On a 240-question test set spanning SGI-Reasoning and Scientists' First Exam, SciOrch reaches 56.66% average accuracy, outperforming the strongest single commercial model by 3.74% and the strongest multi-agent baseline by 3.33%. It also attains the best accuracy on both SGI and SFE with less than half the API cost of typical multi-agent methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SciOrch框架，通过训练一个轻量级8B模型来协调多个前沿大语言模型（LLMs）进行科学推理，显著提升准确率并降低API调用成本。
AI.motivation: 前沿科学推理仍是大语言模型的重大挑战，单一模型难以覆盖所有问题类型，存在模型间互补性未被充分利用的问题。
AI.method: 提出SciOrch框架：轻量级8B调度器模型将问题分解、选择调用不同商用LLM API、合成最终答案；采用基于MCTS的采样策略生成多样化轨迹，并用GRPO风格方法训练调度器，以应对高成本、高延迟API调用带来的训练难题。
AI.result: 在240题测试集（含SGI-Reasoning和Scientists' First Exam）上，SciOrch达56.66%平均准确率，比最强单模型高3.74%，比最强多智能体基线高3.33%；且在SGI与SFE子集上均最优，API成本不足典型多智能体方法的一半。
AI.conclusion: SciOrch证明了轻量级调度器协同多个前沿LLM是高效、低成本提升科学推理能力的有效范式，为复杂推理任务提供了新思路。

title: AIChilles: Automatically Uncovering Hidden Weaknesses in AI-Evolved Systems
summary: The computer systems community has recently seen growing interest in AI-driven system evolution, where AI agents iteratively rewrite systems. Frameworks such as AdaEvolve and Engram report 12-60% score improvements over human-designed algorithms. While these results are promising, there are practical concerns if these AI-evolved programs can perform worse on unseen workloads and exhibit scalability regressions. Given the speed and scale of AI-generated code, we need automated mechanisms to uncover such identify hidden weaknesses in AI-evolved systems programs. To this end, we develop AIChilles that takes as input a baseline program $P$ and an AI-evolved program $P'$, AIChilles searches for valid workloads where $P'$ regresses relative to $P$ in correctness, runtime, memory usage, or output quality. To tackle the diversity in system applications, weakness types and potential bugs, AIChilles combines deterministic workload-parameter extraction, agent-based constraint inference, differential oracles, and code-frequency coverage to discover diverse failures. Across five system applications and 30 AI-evolved programs, AIChilles finds 49 distinct hidden weaknesses. We also show that explicitly including AIChilles in the AI-driven development lifecycle can mitigate several of these weaknesses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AIChilles，一种用于检测AI演化程序在未见工作负载下性能退化和可扩展性问题的自动化工具，通过结合确定性工作负载参数提取、基于代理的约束推断、差分预言机和代码频率覆盖率，在五个系统应用和30个AI演化程序中发现了49个隐藏弱点，并验证其可集成到AI驱动开发流程中以缓解这些问题。
AI.motivation: AI驱动的系统演化虽带来性能提升，但存在在未见工作负载下性能退化和可扩展性下降等实际隐患，亟需自动化机制识别其隐藏弱点。
AI.method: 提出AIChilles框架，融合确定性工作负载参数提取、基于代理的约束推理、差分预言机与代码频率覆盖率，以发现AI演化程序相对于基线程序在正确性、运行时、内存使用或输出质量上的回归。
AI.result: 在五个系统应用和30个AI演化程序上，AIChilles成功发现49个不同类型的隐藏弱点；并验证将其纳入AI驱动开发周期可有效缓解部分弱点。
AI.conclusion: AIChilles为AI演化系统的可靠性保障提供了实用、可扩展的自动化测试方法，有助于提升AI生成代码在真实场景中的鲁棒性与可信度。

title: Understanding Diversity Collapse in RLVR via the Lens of Overtraining
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a key approach for enhancing the reasoning abilities of large language models. However, RLVR often suffers from \emph{diversity collapse}: Pass@$1$ improves while high-$k$ Pass@$k$ degrades, which is viewed as a narrowing of the model's reasoning boundary. We formalize this diversity collapse through the lens of \emph{overtraining}: once a problem's contribution to the reference metric has effectively saturated, further updates no longer expand what the model can solve but still concentrate probability mass on the trajectories favored by on-policy sampling. Under a standard setup with few rollouts per problem, even a single observed success places a problem in a nearly saturated regime for high-$k$ Pass@$k$, so most updates in standard RLVR are overtraining from the boundary perspective. This perspective also suggests a reading of whether RLVR can expand the model's reasoning abilities beyond the base model: since RLVR is structurally biased against high-$k$ Pass@$k$, its aggregate decline does not by itself mean that no new reasoning gains occurred. Interventionally, restricting updates to problems with zero observed success lifts Pass@$256$ above the base model on difficult benchmarks; observationally, a non-trivial fraction of initially unsolvable problems become solvable during standard RLVR training. Building on these findings, we propose \emph{Bayesian Boundary Gating} (BBG), which redirects optimization away from overtraining by estimating each problem's marginal contribution to the reasoning boundary. Across multiple reasoning benchmarks, BBG improves average Pass@$k$ across a wide range of $k$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为贝叶斯边界门控（BBG）的新方法，旨在解决强化学习与可验证奖励（RLVR）中普遍存在的多样性崩溃问题，即模型在提升Pass@1的同时损害高k下的Pass@k性能。作者将该问题形式化为‘过训练’现象，并通过限制对已成功问题的更新或估计各问题对推理边界的边际贡献，有效提升了模型在多种推理基准上的整体Pass@k表现。
AI.motivation: RLVR虽能增强大语言模型的推理能力，但常导致多样性崩溃——即Pass@1提升而高k的Pass@k下降，反映模型推理边界变窄；现有方法缺乏对推理边界扩展的显式建模与优化。
AI.method: 提出贝叶斯边界 gating（BBG），通过贝叶斯估计每个问题对推理边界的边际贡献，动态屏蔽已饱和问题的梯度更新，从而避免过训练；同时引入零成功问题优先更新策略进行干预分析。
AI.result: BBG在多个推理基准上显著提升平均Pass@k（涵盖宽范围k值）；实验表明标准RLVR训练中已有部分原本不可解问题变为可解，证实其确有推理能力扩展；限制仅更新零成功问题即可使Pass@256超越基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 多样性崩溃本质是RLVR在边界视角下的结构性过训练；BBG通过边界感知优化，可有效缓解该问题并真正拓展模型推理能力，而非仅优化单点指标。

title: PolyMerge: Compressing 3D Gaussian Splats with Polytope Coverings for Provably Safe Resource-Constrained Navigation
summary: Obstacle avoidance is essential for safe navigation and motion planning. Recent radiance field reconstruction methods enable object detection and modeling with high fidelity, but remain too memory- and compute-intensive for on-board perception-based path planning. To address these limitations, we propose PolyMerge to convert a large, photorealistic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) model of a scene into a lightweight representation of convex polytopes whose union provably over-approximates all obstacles in the original 3DGS model. PolyMerge tunes the polytope count to trade off conservativeness and compute cost, and integrates with control barrier functions (CBFs) to plan collision-free paths. We showcase PolyMerge in simulation and hardware experiments on a Crazyflie drone, which uses PolyMerge to compute and follow safe trajectories in real time under severe onboard compute constraints, outperforming baselines in speed while guaranteeing safety. For our code and videos, visit https://athlon76.github.io/PolyMerge-website/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PolyMerge方法，将计算密集型的3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）场景模型转化为轻量级凸多面体并集表示，在保证障碍物覆盖的前提下实现高效实时避障规划。
AI.motivation: 现有基于辐射场重建的方法虽能高保真建模障碍物，但内存与计算开销过大，难以满足无人机等平台的实时机载感知与路径规划需求。
AI.method: PolyMerge将3DGS模型转换为可调数量的凸多面体并集，该并集被证明能严格过近似原模型中的所有障碍物；通过调节多面体数量权衡保守性与计算成本，并结合控制屏障函数（CBFs）进行碰撞规避路径规划。
AI.result: 在仿真和Crazyflie无人机硬件实验中，PolyMerge可在严重受限的机载算力下实时生成并执行安全轨迹，速度优于基线方法且严格保障安全性。
AI.conclusion: PolyMerge为资源受限平台提供了兼顾精度、安全与实时性的新型障碍物表征与避障框架， bridging high-fidelity reconstruction and real-time safe navigation.

title: Bridging Geographic Bias in Urban Streetscape Inference via Lifelong Learning with Visual-Semantic Pivoting
summary: Visual perception of urban streetscapes underpins evidence-based decisions in landscape planning, public health, and place-making. Yet models trained on a few well-photographed metropolises systematically misjudge underrepresented districts, propagating geographic bias into downstream policy. We address this gap with HVSP-LL, a lifelong learning framework that couples a stratified visual-semantic pivoting module with an equity-aware rehearsal mechanism. The pivoting module organises landscape concepts along a three-tier ontology (macro structure, meso composition, micro element) and aligns image features to learnable semantic anchors at each tier, providing transferable representations that resist distributional drift. The lifelong adaptation component sequentially absorbs new urban regions while constraining inter-region perception gaps through a worst-region sample-reweighting objective and a structurally-aware exemplar buffer. We evaluate HVSP-LL on a panoramic streetscape benchmark assembled from twelve cities across four continents and seven perceptual dimensions. The framework attains 0.834 Spearman correlation on the held-out city sequence, an absolute 6.1 point improvement over the strongest continual baseline, and shrinks the inter-city perception gap to 0.094 -- a 38% reduction relative to the strongest continual baseline (0.151) and a 57% reduction relative to a representative regularisation baseline (0.218). Ablations confirm that each tier of the pivoting hierarchy contributes monotonically, and the equity-aware rehearsal converts mean backward transfer from -0.038 (without retention) to +0.013, eliminating catastrophic forgetting on the held-out sequence. Our results indicate that hierarchical anchoring is a practical pathway toward geographically equitable streetscape inference at city scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HVSP-LL框架，通过分层视觉-语义锚定与公平感知重放机制，提升城市街景视觉感知模型在跨地域场景下的泛化性与公平性，显著缩小城市间感知差距并缓解灾难性遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有街景视觉感知模型在少数知名大都市训练后，对代表性不足区域系统性误判，导致地理偏差传导至政策制定。
AI.method: 提出HVSP-LL终生学习框架：1）分层视觉-语义锚定模块，按宏观结构、中观构成、微观要素三层次组织景观概念，并对齐图像特征与可学习语义锚点；2）公平感知重放机制，含最差区域样本重加权目标与结构感知样例缓存。
AI.result: 在覆盖四大洲12城的全景街景基准上，HVSP-LL在留出城市序列上Spearman相关达0.834（较最强持续学习基线提升6.1点），城市间感知差距降至0.094（较基线分别降低38%和57%）；消融证实各层级贡献单调，重放机制将平均反向迁移从-0.038提升至+0.013。
AI.conclusion: 分层锚定是实现城市尺度地理公平街景推断的可行路径。

title: Free Energy Heuristics: Fast-And-Frugal Cognition as Active Inference Under Uncertain Precision
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) improves large language models' performance in math and symbolic reasoning. But on planning, contested ethics, and tasks where the model cannot check itself, more reasoning makes things worse. Both effects are documented; what has been missing is a principled account of which property decides the outcome. We argue it is meta-uncertainty: how unsure the model is about the reliability of its own evidence. When that uncertainty is high, extra reasoning stops adding signal and starts manufacturing false confidence. We prove that the policy minimizing expected free energy under uncertain precision stops integrating cues after a finite number of high-validity ones when the precision prior is heavy-tailed (Theorem 2.6.1), and under a Descending Dominance condition, is sample-wise identical to take-the-best (Theorem 2.7.4). Fast-and-frugal heuristics and active inference are, then, two descriptions of the same computation. The prediction is that on high-meta-uncertainty items, longer CoT should degrade accuracy. We score the regime per item (simulate-and-recover rho > 0.96), build FEH-79, a benchmark of Knightian frames with matched controls, and run a pre-registered study across seven models (five open-weight 3B-32B, two frontier), five CoT lengths, and 7,875 responses. The gate, fixed before any data, required a negative interaction with posterior probability above 0.95 and an accuracy drop of more than 6 points. It held. The high-regime drop is 17.3 points (95% CI [7.7, 25.5]); matched items with definite answers show no cost. The effect is regime-dependent: decisive in capable mid-to-large models, directional in the two frontier systems, absent-to-reversed in the weakest. The framework answers when CoT helps and unifies the Bayesian and fast-and-frugal traditions: less-is-more effects are evidence about the meta-uncertainty regime, not against Bayesian cognition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“元不确定性”（meta-uncertainty）作为决定思维链（CoT）是否提升性能的关键因素：当模型对其自身证据可靠性高度不确定时，延长CoT反而损害准确性；作者通过理论证明、新基准FEH-79和跨7个模型的预注册实验验证了该效应。
AI.motivation: 现有研究发现CoT在数学推理中有效，但在规划、伦理争议等无法自我验证的任务中反而有害；本文旨在建立一个统一的原理性解释，识别决定CoT效果正负的关键属性。
AI.method: 提出元不确定性概念；理论层面证明在重尾精度先验与递降优势条件下，最小化期望自由能策略会停止整合线索，等价于‘取优启发式’（take-the-best）；构建Knightian不确定性基准FEH-79；开展预注册多模型、多CoT长度实验（7875条响应）。
AI.result: 实证发现高元不确定性任务中，延长CoT导致准确率显著下降（平均下降17.3分，95% CI [7.7, 25.5]），且效应随模型能力增强而更显著；确定性答案任务无此代价；效应在中大型开源模型中最显著，在前沿模型中呈趋势性，在最弱模型中缺失或反转。
AI.conclusion: 元不确定性是决定CoT效用的核心机制；‘少即是多’现象反映的是高元不确定性下的理性适应，而非对贝叶斯认知的否定；该框架统一了贝叶斯推理与快而俭启发式传统。

title: Heteroskedastic Signals in Budgeted LLM Verification: Structural Heterogeneity Limits Optimization Gains
summary: Large language model (LLM) systems increasingly use uncertainty signals to allocate limited computation across verification, test-time scaling, tool execution, and other selective-compute decisions. Such policies rely on a \emph{global signal comparability assumption}: equal scores should carry comparable decision value across inputs. Using budgeted verification as a controlled diagnostic setting, we identify a failure mode of this assumption: uncertainty quality is heteroskedastic across cost strata, with some regions exhibiting near-random discriminability despite concentrating many errors. Under an explicit local model, we characterize the resulting distortion of global allocation and show that its upper bound scales with cross-stratum signal-quality dispersion. We separate weak signals, optimization instability, and structural heterogeneity through a controlled intervention hierarchy: Threshold, MP-Adapt, MP-Strat, and a deliberately simple cost-stratified thresholding intervention (CST). Across MBPP and MATH using Qwen3-8B, LLaMA3-8B, and GPT-4o-mini, global online adaptation yields inconsistent gains over static thresholding; MP-Strat partially recovers performance, while CST improves hit rate by up to 17 percentage points in strongly heterogeneous settings without gradient updates. These results identify structural heterogeneity, rather than optimizer weakness alone, as the primary bottleneck in the observed settings. More broadly, misaligned feedback structure cannot always be repaired by stronger optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文指出大型语言模型中基于不确定性信号的计算分配策略存在一个关键假设缺陷——全局信号可比性假设，并通过预算验证实验揭示了不确定性质量在不同成本层级上的异质性问题；研究提出了分层干预方法（如CST），证明结构异质性是主要瓶颈，而非优化器能力不足。
AI.motivation: LLM系统依赖不确定性信号进行计算资源分配，但其隐含的‘全局信号可比性’假设在实践中可能失效，尤其在不同输入成本层级上不确定性质量差异显著，导致分配失真。
AI.method: 以预算化验证为诊断场景，构建显式局部模型刻画信号质量异质性对全局分配的扭曲；设计四层控制干预：Threshold、MP-Adapt、MP-Strat 和成本分层阈值法（CST）；在 MBPP 和 MATH 数据集上使用 Qwen3-8B、LLaMA3-8B 和 GPT-4o-mini 进行实证评估。
AI.result: CST 方法在强异质性场景下将命中率提升高达 17 个百分点，且无需梯度更新；全局在线自适应策略收益不稳定，MP-Strat 仅部分恢复性能；结构异质性被确认为主要瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性信号的质量具有结构性异质性，单纯增强优化无法解决反馈结构错配问题；应转向分层或成本感知的信号校准机制。

title: Bayesian 3D Steerable CNNs: Enabling Equivariance and Uncertainty Quantification Simultaneously
summary: Steerable convolutional neural networks (Steerable-CNNs) guarantee SE(3)-equivariance by parameterizing kernels as linear combinations of steerable basis functions, but their deterministic nature precludes uncertainty quantification - limiting their use in settings where confidence estimates are essential. We propose a Bayesian Steerable-CNN that places posterior distributions over the basis coefficients, yielding stochastic kernels while preserving equivariance exactly. The loss function of the model is obtained via variational inference and minimized by Bayes-by-Backpropagation. The framework admits a decomposition of predictive uncertainty into epistemic and aleatoric components. Empirically, the model attains competitive classification accuracy alongside an expected calibration error of 0.0263 and outperforms its deterministic counterpart by up to 6.17% under distributional shift induced by additive Gaussian noise. Furthermore, we leverage the model's uncertainty estimates to enhance its performance significantly, achieving a notable gain - approximately 4% higher accuracy across 84% of the test dataset. A statistically significant negative correlation between epistemic uncertainty and prediction error confirms that the learned posterior variance is semantically meaningful. The framework unifies Bayesian uncertainty quantification with the inductive bias of equivariant CNNs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种贝叶斯可 steering 卷积神经网络（Bayesian Steerable-CNN），通过在 steerable 基系数上施加后验分布，实现 SE(3)-等变性与不确定性量化兼顾；该模型支持 epistemic 与 aleatoric 不确定性分解，在分类准确率、校准性及分布偏移鲁棒性方面均优于确定性基线，并验证了不确定性估计的语义有效性。
AI.motivation: Steerable-CNNs 虽具备严格的 SE(3)-等变性，但其确定性本质无法提供不确定性估计，限制了其在需置信度评估的关键场景中的应用。
AI.method: 在 steerable 基系数上引入贝叶斯推断，采用变分推断构建损失函数，并通过 Bayes-by-Backpropagation 进行优化；同时实现预测不确定性的 epistemic 和 aleatoric 分解。
AI.result: 模型在分类任务中达到有竞争力的准确率，预期校准误差（ECE）为 0.0263；在高斯噪声引起的分布偏移下，性能比确定性模型最高提升 6.17%；利用不确定性估计可使约 84% 测试样本准确率提升约 4%；epistemic 不确定性与预测误差呈显著负相关，证实其语义合理性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功将贝叶斯不确定性量化与等变 CNN 的归纳偏置统一起来，既保持严格等变性，又提供可靠、可解释的不确定性估计，拓展了 steerable 模型在安全敏感场景的应用潜力。

title: TopoRetarget: Interaction-Preserving Retargeting for Dexterous Manipulation
summary: Human hand-object demonstrations provide dense reference motions for training dexterous manipulation reinforcement learning (RL) policies through reference tracking. However, to use such demonstrations for RL policy learning, retargeting must preserve hand pose and task-relevant hand-object contact structure. Otherwise, contact and feasibility artifacts can degrade downstream RL policy performance. We introduce TopoRetarget, an interaction-preserving retargeting framework that uses a single set of parameters across diverse retargeting conditions while maintaining task-relevant hand-object interaction and adapting human demonstrations to dexterous robot hands. The method constructs a sparse interaction graph over hand and object keypoints and optimizes distance-weighted Laplacian deformation with directional consistency, kinematic constraints, and penetration handling. Evaluations show that the generated references improve both interaction fidelity and policy learning: TopoRetarget achieves the best contact precision and alignment over all baselines on the ContactPose Dataset, improves Pen-Spin training success by 40.6 percentage points over the existing baseline methods, and enables zero-shot transfer to Wuji Hand hardware on cube reorientation and pen spinning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TopoRetarget框架，通过构建稀疏交互图并结合距离加权Laplacian变形、方向一致性、运动学约束与穿透处理，在保持手-物接触结构的前提下，实现跨平台、参数统一的演示重定向，显著提升下游强化学习策略训练效果与硬件零样本迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有手-物演示重定向方法难以同时保持手部姿态和任务相关接触结构，导致接触失真与可行性问题，从而损害下游强化学习策略性能。
AI.method: 提出TopoRetarget：构建手与物体关键点的稀疏交互图，采用距离加权Laplacian变形优化，融合方向一致性约束、机器人运动学限制及穿透规避机制。
AI.result: 在ContactPose数据集上接触精度与对齐度最优；Pen-Spin任务训练成功率较基线提升40.6个百分点；成功实现零样本迁移到Wuji Hand硬件，完成立方体重定向与笔旋转任务。
AI.conclusion: TopoRetarget是一种通用、鲁棒且任务感知的重定向方法，能有效桥接手示教与灵巧机器人强化学习策略训练，并支持真实硬件部署。

title: Texture-Shape Bias Balancing for Robust Synthetic-to-Real Semantic Segmentation in Automotive NIR Imagery
summary: Semantic segmentation is a fundamental component of visual perception in modern automotive systems, enabling pixel-level scene understanding. Near-Infrared imaging (NIR) offers stable detection under difficult illumination conditions, but the development of domain-specific semantic segmentation models remains challenging due to the lack of high-quality annotated data from real-world scenarios. Synthetic datasets offer a scalable alternative, but models trained on synthetic images often suffer performance degradation when transferred to real domains. We present the first systematic study on synthetic to real domain adaptation for semantic segmentation in NIR images in the automotive domain. We propose a generative augmentation framework that transforms synthetic images into realistic NIR-style variants via our introduced target style adaptation (TSA). TSA fine-tunes a latent diffusion model via low-rank adaptation on a small curated set of real NIR images and applies it to synthetic training data using structure-preserving multi-signal conditioning. To reduce texture bias and improve segmentation robustness, we further apply a Voronoi-based style diversification strategy (VSD) that modifies the original textures while preserving scene geometry. Experiments with multiple model architectures on NIR data from vehicle interiors and street scenes show that balancing inductive bias during training leads to noticeably more robust semantic segmentation and effectively reduces the domain gap in our real-world scenarios by up to 63.6% on exterior and 28.4% on interior data. The code is available at GitHub.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向近红外（NIR）图像的合成到真实域自适应语义分割方法，通过目标风格适配（TSA）和Voronoi风格多样化（VSD）提升模型在真实车载场景中的鲁棒性，显著缩小域差距。
AI.motivation: 近红外成像在复杂光照下稳定，但缺乏高质量真实标注数据；合成数据虽可扩展，却存在域偏移问题，亟需有效的合成到真实域适应方法。
AI.method: 提出生成式增强框架：1）目标风格适配（TSA），基于低秩微调的潜在扩散模型，结合结构保持的多信号条件控制，将合成图像转换为真实NIR风格；2）Voronoi风格多样化（VSD），在保持几何结构前提下扰动纹理以降低纹理偏差。
AI.result: 在车载内外场景NIR数据上实验表明，该方法将域差距最多降低63.6%（室外）和28.4%（室内），显著提升分割鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: TSA与VSD联合策略有效缓解合成与真实NIR图像间的域偏移，为车载视觉系统提供了实用、可扩展的语义分割域适应方案。

title: Koshur Diacritizer: A Byte-Level Sequence-to-Sequence Model for Kashmiri Diacritic Restoration
summary: Kashmiri, an Indo-Aryan language written in a modified Perso-Arabic script, frequently omits diacritic marks in digital text, creating ambiguity and challenging downstream NLP applications. We present Koshur Diacritizer, a ByT5-small byte-level sequence-to-sequence model for restoring diacritics in Kashmiri text. To support this task, we release a publicly available dataset of 23.7k aligned undiacritized diacritized Kashmiri sentence pairs. The proposed framework combines script-aware normalization, alignment validation, and skeleton-preserving inference to ensure reliable restoration while maintaining the original base-letter sequence. Experimental results on a held-out test set achieve a DERm of 0.2012 and a WER of 0.2159. Additionally, evaluation by a native Kashmiri linguistic expert yields a mean accuracy of 77.5%. The dataset, model, and source code are publicly released to provide a reproducible baseline for Kashmiri diacritic restoration and future low-resource language research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Koshur Diacritizer，一个基于ByT5-small的字节级序列到序列模型，用于恢复克什米尔语数字文本中缺失的变音符号，并发布了一个包含23.7k对齐句子的数据集。
AI.motivation: 克什米尔语在数字文本中常省略变音符号，导致歧义并影响下游NLP任务。
AI.method: 采用ByT5-small字节级seq2seq模型，结合脚本感知归一化、对齐验证和骨架保持推理策略。
AI.result: 在测试集上取得DERm为0.2012、WER为0.2159；母语语言学专家评估平均准确率达77.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为克什米尔语变音还原提供了首个可复现基线，并推动低资源语言相关研究。

title: RetailBench: Benchmarking long horizon reasoning and coherent decision making of LLM agents in realistic retail environments
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have made rapid progress on short-horizon, well-scoped tasks, yet their ability to sustain coherent decisions in dynamic long-horizon environments remains uncertain. We introduce RetailBench, a data-grounded simulation benchmark for evaluating tool-using LLM agents in single-store supermarket operation. RetailBench models retail management as a partially observable decision process and is designed to support thousand-day-scale simulations. In this environment, agents must manage pricing, replenishment, supplier selection, shelf assortment, inventory aging, customer feedback, external events, and cash-flow constraints. We evaluate seven contemporary LLMs under representative agent frameworks over a 180-day evaluation horizon and compare them with a privileged oracle policy. Results show substantial variation across models: only a small subset survives the full evaluation horizon, and even the strongest LLM runs remain substantially behind the oracle policy in final net worth and sales outcomes. Behavioral analysis attributes these gaps to incomplete evidence acquisition, surface-level decision making, and the lack of a consistent long-horizon policy. RetailBench provides a controlled testbed for studying reliable autonomy in economically grounded long-horizon decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RetailBench，一个基于真实数据的超市运营仿真基准，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）代理在长期、动态环境中的工具使用与决策能力；实验表明现有LLM代理在千日尺度任务中仍远逊于最优策略，主要受限于证据获取不全、浅层决策和缺乏长期一致策略。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理在短周期、边界清晰的任务上表现良好，但在动态、长周期、经济现实约束下的连贯决策能力尚不明确，亟需一个数据驱动、可扩展的长期决策评估基准。
AI.method: 构建RetailBench——一个模拟单店超市运营的千日级部分可观测决策环境，涵盖定价、补货、供应商选择、货架陈列、库存老化、顾客反馈、外部事件与现金流约束等要素；在180天评估周期内测试7种主流LLM及其代理框架，并与具备完全信息的oracle策略对比。
AI.result: 多数LLM代理无法完成全部180天评估；最强模型在最终净资产和销售额上显著落后于oracle；行为分析揭示其失败主因是证据采集不充分、决策流于表面、缺乏长期一致性策略。
AI.conclusion: RetailBench为研究经济场景下LLM代理的长期可靠自主性提供了可控、可复现的测试平台，凸显当前LLM在长周期、多约束决策中的根本性局限。

title: Model Stealing Through the Lens of Model Multiplicity
summary: Model stealing attacks, where adversaries create high-fidelity surrogate models, are a significant threat to the intellectual property of machine learning services. Conventional wisdom suggests these surrogates could provide adversaries with economic leverage comparable to the original service providers. This paper challenges this assumption by evaluating model stealing attacks beyond mere fidelity to the target model. Because query-based extraction provides only partial supervision of the target's input-output behavior, the surrogate is not uniquely identified: many near-optimal surrogates can achieve comparable fidelity while differing in deployment-relevant properties. Instead of performing a classic learning-based model stealing attack, we compute the Rashomon Set (i.e., the set of almost-equally-accurate models) of surrogate models, and evaluate its diversity using multiplicity metrics (ambiguity, discrepancy, and Rashomon Capacity) and group fairness metrics. Across tabular, medical imaging, and NLP tasks, our experiments on real-world datasets reveal that despite exhibiting similar fidelity to the target model, surrogate models can display significant variances in other critical performance metrics. These findings cast doubt on the presumed equivalence between high-fidelity surrogates and the target model in practical deployment scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文挑战了模型窃取攻击中高保真代理模型等同于原始模型的传统观点，通过计算Rashomon集并评估其多样性，发现即使保真度相似，代理模型在其他关键性能指标上仍存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为高保真代理模型能为攻击者提供与原始服务提供商相当的经济优势，本文质疑这一假设，强调仅关注保真度不足以反映代理模型在实际部署中的真实能力。
AI.method: 不采用经典基于学习的模型窃取方法，而是计算目标模型的Rashomon集（即几乎同样准确的模型集合），并利用多重性指标（模糊性、差异性、Rashomon容量）和群体公平性指标评估该集合的多样性。
AI.result: 在表格数据、医学影像和自然语言处理任务的真实数据集实验中，发现高保真代理模型虽在精度上接近目标模型，但在其他关键性能指标（如公平性、鲁棒性等）上存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 高保真度并不意味着代理模型可在实际部署中等效替代原始模型，模型窃取的实际威胁被高估，需更全面地评估代理模型的多维性能。

title: Is Your Trajectory Displacement Safe in Long-tail?
summary: Long-tail scenarios remain a major bottleneck for autonomous driving evaluation, even as datasets grow by orders of magnitude. Existing evaluation pipelines are rarely human-aligned, safety-aware, verifiable, and explainable at the same time: closed-loop metrics often saturate among strong planners, while unstructured human ratings can be noisy without a carefully designed protocol. We formulate planning evaluation as additional-threat detection: given a planner trajectory and an expert reference, does the planner's displacement introduce new unsafe driving behavior? We propose FluidTest, an evaluation pipeline with three components: a pairwise WebUI protocol for reliable human annotation; a taxonomy of 32 semantic threats with evidence-grounded decision graphs; and a three-agent verification system with reflection for precision and auditability. Experiments on the WOD-E2E dataset show that FluidTest produces consistent labels among trained annotators and identifies additional threats in 65% of Poutine trajectories and 51% of RAP trajectories. These results show that state-of-the-art planners can still exhibit substantial safety-relevant failures despite high Rater Feedback Scores (RFS) and low Average Displacement Error (ADE). Additional details, guidance, and code are available at https://fluidtest.web.app.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FluidTest评估框架，通过额外威胁检测、人机协同标注协议和三智能体验证系统，解决自动驾驶规划器在长尾场景下安全评估不充分的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶评估方法难以同时满足人类对齐、安全性感知、可验证性和可解释性要求，尤其在长尾场景中表现不足。
AI.method: 将规划评估建模为‘额外威胁检测’任务；设计基于WebUI的成对人工标注协议；构建包含32类语义威胁的证据驱动决策图谱；引入具备反思能力的三智能体验证系统。
AI.result: 在WOD-E2E数据集上，FluidTest在训练标注员间表现出高一致性，并在65%的Poutine和51%的RAP轨迹中识别出额外威胁，揭示当前SOTA规划器仍存在显著安全缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 即使Rater Feedback Score高、平均位移误差低，规划器仍可能引发新的不安全行为，说明传统指标不足以保障真实世界安全性，需更细粒度、可解释、可验证的安全评估范式。

title: Think Less, Act Early: Reinforced Latent Reasoning with Early Exit in Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Existing Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models predominantly rely on explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning to bridge perception and action. While effective, this paradigm suffers from high computational costs and error propagation in multi-step tasks. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Variable Alignment VLA (AVA-VLA), a novel Latent Reasoning VLA framework that models reasoning as a sequence of unobservable latent variables, bypassing the need for explicit text generation. However, latent trajectories are inherently susceptible to noise interference and misalignment with downstream objectives. To address this, we introduce a Reinforcement Learning-based Denoising mechanism that treats latent state generation as a sequential decision process, optimizing reasoning trajectories via task-level rewards. Furthermore, we incorporate an Early-Exit Strategy that adaptively terminates reasoning based on state confidence, enabling a dynamic trade-off between depth and efficiency. Extensive experiments on embodied decision benchmarks demonstrate that AVA-VLA achieves a 6x inference speedup over explicit CoT methods while attaining a 98.3% average success rate on LIBERO, improving both efficiency and long-horizon stability over full-reasoning baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AVA-VLA框架，通过隐式潜变量建模替代显式思维链（CoT）推理，结合强化学习去噪机制和早退策略，在提升推理效率的同时增强长程任务稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型依赖显式Chain-of-Thought推理，存在计算开销大、多步任务中错误传播严重的问题。
AI.method: 提出基于潜变量的隐式推理框架AVA-VLA；引入强化学习去噪机制优化潜轨迹；设计基于状态置信度的自适应早退策略。
AI.result: 在LIBERO基准上平均成功率98.3%，推理速度较显式CoT方法提升6倍，且长时序稳定性优于全推理基线。
AI.conclusion: 隐式潜变量建模结合RL优化与早退机制，可有效兼顾VLA任务的效率、鲁棒性与性能。

title: Neuron Level Analysis of Large Language Model in Legal Domain Reasoning
summary: We presented a neuron-level analysis of legal-domain reasoning in LLMs, comparing it with other applied domain tasks across seven open-weight models. Using neuron attribution scores to rank and suppress influential neurons, we confirmed that suppressing the identified neurons collapses accuracy on the target task, whereas suppressing the same number of random neurons does not. We further found a small subset of neurons influential across all seven tasks; once these are removed, suppressing the remaining neurons degrades only the task they were identified from, revealing genuinely task-specific neurons in every model studied. Within the legal domain, the three benchmarks exhibit relatively high neuron overlap and tend to be affected jointly, suggesting of legal components neurons that span jurisdictions. The distribution of identified neurons in our experiments suggests that the hypothesis that influential neurons are concentrated in middle MLP layers may depend on the input format and content, rather than being a universal phenomenon.

AI.tldr: 本文对法律领域推理在大语言模型中的神经元级机制进行了分析，发现存在跨任务的通用神经元和任务特异性神经元，并揭示了法律相关神经元可能具有跨司法管辖区的泛化性。
AI.motivation: 理解大语言模型（LLMs）在特定应用领域（尤其是法律领域）中进行推理的神经机制，识别关键神经元及其功能特异性。
AI.method: 基于神经元归因分数对七个开源权重模型在法律及其他应用领域任务上的神经元进行排序与抑制实验，比较目标任务准确率变化，并分析跨任务神经元重叠与分布规律。
AI.result: 确认了影响目标任务的关键神经元；发现少量跨任务通用神经元和大量任务特异性神经元；法律类基准任务间神经元重叠度高，暗示存在跨司法管辖区的法律成分神经元；中间MLP层集中关键神经元的假设依赖于输入格式与内容，非普适现象。
AI.conclusion: 法律领域推理依赖于既具跨任务通用性又具任务特异性的神经元组合，其神经表征具有一定泛化能力，且关键神经元分布受输入特性影响，挑战了现有关于关键层位置的普遍假设。

title: STRIDE: Strategic Trajectory Reasoning via Discriminative Estimation for Verifiable Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become an effective post-training paradigm for improving the reasoning abilities of large language models. However, existing RLVR methods typically rely on final-answer correctness to assign trajectory-level rewards, providing sparse supervision and treating all tokens uniformly regardless of their actual contribution to reasoning. Although recent studies introduce intermediate signals such as process rewards, high-entropy tokens, and semantic uncertainty, these signals are often not inherently verifiable and may fail to distinguish beneficial strategic patterns from harmful ones. To address this limitation, we propose STRIDE (Strategic Trajectory Reasoning with Discriminative Estimation), a fine-grained RLVR framework that derives strategic reasoning supervision from verifiable outcomes. STRIDE contrasts successful and failed trajectories within each response group to estimate the outcome-discriminative preference of each $n$-gram strategic pattern, and further combines this signal with reasoning saliency entropy to identify decision-relevant strategic patterns. These patterns are assigned differentiated advantage values during RL optimization, enabling more precise credit assignment while preserving the verifiability of RLVR. Extensive experiments demonstrate that STRIDE consistently improves reasoning performance across diverse models, tasks, and extended settings, including VLMs and agent-based systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STRIDE框架，通过对比成功与失败的推理轨迹，利用可验证结果生成细粒度的战略模式偏好信号，并结合推理显著性熵来识别关键决策模式，从而在保持奖励可验证性的同时实现更精准的信用分配。
AI.motivation: 现有RLVR方法依赖最终答案正确性提供稀疏监督，且未区分token的实际贡献；中间信号虽有引入但缺乏内在可验证性，难以区分有益与有害策略模式。
AI.method: STRIDE框架通过组内成功/失败轨迹对比估计n-gram战略模式的结果判别偏好，并融合推理显著性熵识别决策相关模式，进而为不同模式分配差异化优势值进行强化学习优化。
AI.result: STRIDE在多种模型、任务及扩展场景（如VLMs和基于代理的系统）中均一致提升推理性能。
AI.conclusion: STRIDE实现了细粒度、可验证的推理监督，显著提升了RLVR在复杂推理任务中的有效性与鲁棒性。

title: Towards Data-Efficient Cross-Device Generalization of Grad-Shafranov Equilibria via Transfer Learning Neural Operator
summary: Real-time reconstruction of magnetohydrodynamic equilibria is essential for plasma shaping, stability assessment and feedback control in magnetic confinement fusion. However, Grad-Shafranov equilibrium calculations remain largely device-specific and iterative, limiting their use in latency-constrained control settings. Existing neural approaches can accelerate individual equilibrium predictions, but they do not generally provide reusable models across changing plasma boundaries or tokamak geometries. Here we show that equilibrium reconstruction can be recast as a cross-device operator learning problem. We develop a domain-specific neural operator framework that maps geometry and profile parameters directly to the poloidal flux field, replacing repeated solve-on-demand computation with amortized operator inference. Using the analytically tractable Solov'ev family as a controlled Grad-Shafranov testbed, we generate equilibria across eight geometrically distinct tokamak-like configurations and benchmark five neural operator architectures under four transfer-learning strategies. Single-geometry pretraining gives poor transfer to unseen devices, whereas multi-geometry pretraining enables data-efficient adaptation. The Wavelet Neural Operator gives the strongest cross-geometry performance, reaching mean relative L2 errors below 4% with 100 labelled target equilibria and below 2% with full fine-tuning. The predicted magnetic fields satisfy the divergence-free constraint to numerical precision, and four architectures achieve millisecond or sub-millisecond inference. These results identify neural operator pretraining as a route towards reusable, real-time equilibrium inference across fusion device configurations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经算子的跨装置磁流体平衡重建框架，通过多几何预训练实现高效迁移学习，在不同托卡马克装置间实现高精度、实时的等离子体平衡重建。
AI.motivation: 现有磁流体平衡重建方法设备依赖性强、迭代耗时，难以满足实时控制需求；已有神经网络方法缺乏跨装置和边界变化的泛化能力。
AI.method: 将平衡重建建模为跨装置算子学习问题，设计领域专用神经算子框架，直接映射几何与剖面参数到极向磁通场；在Solov'ev解析解族上生成8种几何配置数据，对比5种神经算子架构及4种迁移策略。
AI.result: 小波神经算子表现最优：仅用100个目标装置标签数据即达<4%相对L2误差，全微调后<2%；预测磁场严格满足无散度约束；四种架构推理时间达毫秒或亚毫秒级。
AI.conclusion: 神经算子预训练是实现跨装置、可复用、实时平衡推断的有效路径，为聚变装置通用控制提供新范式。

title: ART-Glove: Articulated Tactile Glove for Contact-Grounded Dexterous Interaction Capture
summary: We present ART-Glove, an articulated tactile glove designed to capture contact-grounded dexterous demonstrations while preserving human dexterity. ART-Glove makes hand-side contact geometry explicit with 16 rigid functional surfaces covering the fingers, thumb, and palm. Twenty-two anatomically aligned joints connect these surfaces and allow them to follow human hand motion during dexterous manipulation. Encoder-based sensing tracks surface motion, while dense piezoresistive tactile sensing records contact over the same surfaces. The complete system captures synchronized 22-DoF joint measurements and 2048-taxel tactile measurements at 120 Hz. We evaluate ART-Glove across experiments on motion freedom, joint sensing, tactile sensing, and contact-rich interaction capture, demonstrating its ability to preserve human dexterity while recording contact-grounded information that can support downstream dexterous robot learning.

AI.tldr: ART-Glove是一种新型灵巧触觉手套，通过16个刚性功能表面和22个解剖对齐关节显式建模手部接触几何与运动，结合编码器运动传感和高密度压阻触觉传感，实现120Hz同步采集22自由度关节数据与2048通道触觉数据，有效支持接触感知的灵巧机器人学习。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉手套难以兼顾高保真手部运动捕捉与精细接触几何建模，限制了接触感知驱动的灵巧机器人学习。
AI.method: 设计ART-Glove：采用16个覆盖手指、拇指和手掌的刚性功能表面，由22个解剖对齐关节连接；集成编码器传感追踪表面运动，压阻式触觉阵列（2048 taxel）记录同表面接触；实现22-DoF关节与触觉信号120Hz同步采集。
AI.result: 实验验证ART-Glove在运动自由度、关节传感精度、触觉传感分辨率及接触密集交互捕捉方面性能优异，能高保真保留人类手部灵巧性并同步获取接触接地信息。
AI.conclusion: ART-Glove为接触感知驱动的灵巧机器人模仿学习与技能迁移提供了高质量、同步化的多模态人体示范数据采集平台。

title: Text-Driven Fusion for Infrared and Visible Images: Achieving Image Scene Adaptation on Hyperbolic Space
summary: Infrared and visible image fusion aims to integrate complementary modalities, while existing Euclidean methods impose rigid distance metrics that distort multi-modal interactions and parent-to-child semantic hierarchies. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a text-driven fusion framework empowered by hyperbolic manifold learning. During training, BLIP-extracted text prompts serve as topological anchors within the hyperbolic space, guiding vision-attribute alignment through hyperbolic embeddings that naturally accommodate varying semantic granularities. By exploiting the exponential volume growth dictated by the Poincaré ball's negative curvature, this approach seamlessly embeds hierarchical trees to encode coarse-to-fine semantics without metric saturation, while the vast peripheral space prevents texture distortion during cross-modal fusion. At inference, the fusion process autonomously adapts to input content using the learned text-attribute priors, completely eliminating the need for textual input. Experimental results show our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches on benchmark datasets, with code available at https://github.com/Shaoyun2023/TEDFusion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双曲流形学习的文本驱动红外与可见光图像融合框架，利用BLIP提取的文本提示作为双曲空间中的拓扑锚点，实现视觉-属性对齐，并在推理时无需输入文本即可自适应融合。
AI.motivation: 现有欧氏空间方法采用刚性距离度量，扭曲多模态交互和语义层级结构，难以有效建模红外与可见光图像间的互补关系。
AI.method: 构建文本驱动的双曲流形融合框架：使用BLIP提取文本提示作为双曲空间（Poincaré球）中的拓扑锚点；通过双曲嵌入对齐视觉特征与语义属性；利用双曲空间负曲率带来的指数体积增长特性建模粗到细的语义层次，并避免度量饱和与纹理失真。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上超越当前最先进方法，推理时无需文本输入，具备内容自适应融合能力。
AI.conclusion: 双曲几何为多模态图像融合提供了更自然的语义建模方式，文本提示仅在训练中起引导作用，提升了模型泛化性与实用性。

title: BALTO: Balanced Token-Level Policy Optimization for Hallucination Mitigation
summary: Hallucinations remain a major obstacle to deploying large language models (LLMs) in knowledge-intensive settings, where generated responses must be faithfully grounded in provided evidence. Reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising direction for hallucination mitigation, but response-level faithfulness rewards suffer from a granularity mismatch: localized hallucinations can cause supported content to receive spurious penalties. Although recent work introduces fine-grained feedback such as claim-level verification and token-level rewards, unbalanced credit assignment can still induce length, verbosity, or optimization-noise biases. We propose BALTO, a Balanced Token-level Policy Optimization framework for hallucination mitigation. BALTO extracts checkable factual claims, verifies them against the reference context, and projects claim-level judgments to token-level labels. A balanced token-level credit assignment mechanism is introduced into the framework. This design redistributes probability mass from unsupported content toward faithful content, rather than suppressing the entire response. We systematically analyze the limitations of response-level rewards from a theoretical standpoint, and prove BALTO's advantages in training stability and optimization efficiency for hallucination mitigation. Experiments on ConFiQA, RAGTruth, and FinLLM-Eval show that BALTO achieves the highest faithfulness across all six model--benchmark settings and consistently outperforms existing post-training baselines in Q-Score, demonstrating a stronger faithfulness--informativeness trade-off.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BALTO框架，通过平衡的词元级信用分配机制缓解大语言模型中的幻觉问题，显著提升响应忠实度。
AI.motivation: 幻觉问题是大语言模型在知识密集型场景中部署的主要障碍，现有基于强化学习的响应级忠实度奖励存在粒度不匹配和信用分配不平衡的问题。
AI.method: BALTO框架提取可验证的事实主张，依据参考上下文进行验证，并将主张级判断映射为词元级标签，引入平衡的词元级信用分配机制，重分配概率质量以增强忠实内容而非抑制整个响应。
AI.result: 在ConFiQA、RAGTruth和FinLLM-Eval三个基准上的实验表明，BALTO在全部六种模型-基准设置中均取得最高忠实度，并在Q-Score上持续优于现有后训练基线。
AI.conclusion: BALTO通过理论分析与实证验证，证明其在训练稳定性与优化效率方面具有优势，有效缓解幻觉并更好平衡忠实性与信息量。

title: LLM-as-Code Agentic Programming for Agent Harness
comment: Accepted at the KDD 2026 Workshop on Agentic Software Engineering (AgenticSE)
summary: Every major LLM agent framework gives the LLM the role of orchestrator; the model decides what to do next, when to call tools, and when to stop. We argue that token explosion, control-flow hallucination, and unreliable completion are not implementation bugs but architectural consequences of assigning the deterministic work of looping, branching, and sequencing to a probabilistic system. A better prompt or a stronger model cannot guarantee the reliability of the LLM agent. We therefore propose Agentic Programming, in which the program governs all control flow, and the LLM is itself part of it, an adaptive component we call LLM-as-Code and invoke only where a task calls for reasoning or generation. Within each call the model keeps full flexibility, but it cannot alter the program's execution path. With control in the program, the LLM's context is built from the execution history's call tree and forms a directed acyclic graph (DAG). Each call's context length is then determined by its call depth rather than by accumulation over steps. A case study of computer-use agents shows that the design is practical, not just a theoretical stance, substantially improving the stability of long visual operation sequences.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic Programming，将控制流交由程序管理，LLM仅作为可调用的自适应组件（LLM-as-Code），从而解决LLM代理中因控制流交由概率模型导致的token爆炸、控制流幻觉与不可靠生成等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM代理框架将循环、分支、序列等确定性控制逻辑交给概率性LLM，导致token爆炸、控制流幻觉和不可靠生成等固有缺陷，无法单靠更好提示或更强模型解决。
AI.method: 提出Agentic Programming范式：程序主导全部控制流，LLM作为‘LLM-as-Code’被显式调用，仅在需要推理或生成时介入；每次调用上下文基于执行历史构建为DAG，上下文长度由调用深度而非累积步数决定。
AI.result: 在计算机使用代理的案例研究中，该设计显著提升了长视觉操作序列的稳定性，验证了其实际可行性。
AI.conclusion: 将控制流从LLM中解耦、交由确定性程序管理，是提升LLM代理鲁棒性的根本性架构改进，LLM应作为受控组件嵌入程序而非担任 orchestrator。

title: Greedy Coordinate Diffusion: Effective and Semantically Coherent Adversarial Attacks via Diffusion Guidance
summary: Fine-tuning aligned language models on benign tasks (e.g. math tutoring) systematically breaks safety guardrails, even when training data contains no harmful content. While mechanistic approaches have shed light on where alignment resides in model weights, they do not by provide a general formal framework for deriving guarantees about when fine-tuning degrades it -- leaving the field without principled tools for predicting or preventing alignment collapse. We develop a local geometric framework through geometric analysis of parameter-space trajectories and apply it to understand the fragility of alignment in fine-tuning. While first-order analysis suggests orthogonal updates are safe, we prove this is illusory: the curvature of the fine-tuning loss induces second-order acceleration that can induce second-order drift into alignment-sensitive regions. We formalize a construct of our framework as the Alignment Instability Condition (AIC), three geometric properties that, when present, are sufficient to guarantee degradation. Our main result proves quartic onset of alignment degradation along gradient-flow trajectories, determined by how sharply alignment depends on specific parameters and how strongly tasks couple to these parameters. These findings yield formal sufficient conditions under which static first-order protection can fail under gradient descent. We further empirically validate the framework's foundations, showing that the Fisher Information Matrix provides a proxy for the degree of safety degradation across diverse fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种局部几何框架，用于分析微调过程中对齐性（alignment）的脆弱性，揭示了即使在无害数据上微调也会导致安全防护失效的机制，并给出了对齐性退化的形式化充分条件（AIC）及四次方退化 onset 的理论证明。
AI.motivation: 现有机制性方法虽能定位对齐性在模型权重中的位置，但缺乏通用形式化框架来预测或防止微调导致的对齐崩溃；需 principled 工具保障微调安全性。
AI.method: 通过参数空间轨迹的几何分析构建局部几何框架，引入 Alignment Instability Condition（AIC），结合梯度流、曲率效应与二阶动力学建模，并利用 Fisher 信息矩阵实证验证。
AI.result: 证明对齐退化以四次方速度沿梯度流轨迹发生；给出 AIC 三个几何条件作为退化的充分判据；发现一阶正交更新看似安全，但损失曲率引发的二阶漂移会破坏对齐；FIM 可有效代理安全退化程度。
AI.conclusion: 对齐性在微调中本质上是几何脆弱的，仅依赖一阶保护（如正交更新）不足；必须考虑参数耦合强度与对齐敏感度的高阶交互，为安全微调提供理论基础与可验证指标。

title: SemGeoNav:A Safety-Guided Visual Navigation Approach with Semantic Reasoning and Geometric Planning
comment: The paper has been accepted by ICGNC 2026
summary: Learning-based visual navigation has enhanced semantic goal-reaching capabilities. However, due to their black-box nature, purely end-to-end models often lack explicit geometric constraints, leading to unpredictable and unreliable obstacle avoidance in open environments. Conversely, traditional geometric planners ensure safety but struggle with high-dimensional visual targets. To address these limitations, we propose SemGeoNav, a novel hierarchical visual navigation framework.It tightly integrates the high-level semantic reasoning of end-to-end models with the reliable local planning ability of geometry-based methods, achieving robust image-based navigation while significantly improving obstacle avoidance. Furthermore, we introduce a temporal trajectory smoothing mechanism to ensure continuous and stable robot motion. We evaluated SemGeoNav on a Unitree Go2 quadruped robot in real-world environments. The results demonstrate that SemGeoNav outperforms existing representative methods, including ViNT and NoMaD, achieving higher success rates and shorter navigation times.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SemGeoNav，一种结合语义推理与几何规划的分层视觉导航框架，提升了真实场景中四足机器人图像导航的鲁棒性与避障能力。
AI.motivation: 纯端到端学习型视觉导航模型缺乏显式几何约束，导致开放环境中避障不可靠；而传统几何规划器难以处理高维视觉目标。
AI.method: 提出分层框架SemGeoNav，融合端到端语义高层决策与基于几何的局部规划，并引入时间轨迹平滑机制以保障运动连续稳定。
AI.result: 在Unitree Go2四足机器人上实测表明，SemGeoNav在成功率和导航时间上均优于ViNT和NoMaD等代表性方法。
AI.conclusion: SemGeoNav有效弥合了语义导航与几何安全性的鸿沟，实现了更鲁棒、可靠的图像驱动导航。

title: Physics-Driven Zero-Shot MRI Reconstruction with Non-local Image Priors
summary: Zero-Shot Self-Supervised Learning (ZS-SSL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for accelerated Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) reconstruction, eliminating the reliance on fully-sampled external datasets. However, learning solely from a single under-sampled scan suffers from supervision scarcity and optimization instability, often leading to overfitting or artifacts. To address these challenges, we propose a robust physics-driven ZS-SSL framework that synergizes physical consistency with image-domain non-local priors. Our method introduces three core innovations: (1) a Coil Sensitivity Map (CSM)-Guided Dynamic Repository, which stabilizes the training trajectory by filtering physically inconsistent artifacts based on coil sensitivity constraints; (2) a SPIRiT-based regularization, which enforces k-space self-consistency via a learned correlation kernel and stochastic masking; (3) a Non-Local Self-Similarity (NSS) Pixel Bank, which leverages the high-fidelity reference established by the former modules to explicitly mine non-local anatomical similarities, thereby augmenting supervision in the image domain. Extensive experiments on the FastMRI dataset demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, particularly under high acceleration factors, effectively bridging the gap between zero-shot learning and supervised methods. The code is available at https://github.com/Zolento/NS-SSL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的物理驱动零样本自监督学习（ZS-SSL）框架，用于加速MRI重建，通过结合物理一致性与图像域非局部先验，显著提升了重建质量，尤其在高加速因子下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本自监督MRI重建方法因仅依赖单次欠采样扫描，面临监督稀缺和优化不稳定问题，易导致过拟合或伪影。
AI.method: 提出三个核心创新：(1) CSM引导的动态知识库，利用线圈灵敏度约束滤除物理不一致伪影；(2) 基于SPIRiT的正则化，通过学习相关核与随机掩码保证k空间自洽；(3) 非局部自相似性像素库，在高质量参考基础上挖掘图像域非局部解剖相似性以增强监督。
AI.result: 在FastMRI数据集上达到SOTA性能，尤其在高加速因子下显著缩小零样本与监督方法之间的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 所提物理驱动ZS-SSL框架有效缓解了监督稀缺与优化不稳定问题，为零样本MRI重建提供了新思路与实用解决方案。

title: Control-Plane Placement Shapes Forgetting: An Architectural Study of Agent Memory Across Thirteen System Configurations
comment: 23 pages including appendices. Code, benchmark, and adapters released under MIT at https://github.com/deeplethe/lethe
summary:
Where an LLM sits in an agent memory pipeline -- between the recall plane that retrieves stored facts (extensively benchmarked) and the control plane that mutates them via supersede, release, purge (largely untested) -- shapes which forgetting failure modes the system recovers. Comparing thirteen system configurations on a 385-case adversarial surface, we observe three placement regimes with partly complementary coverage: deterministic primitives suffice for lexical/temporal categories but fail canonicalization (5% on identifier-obfuscation, 0% on cross-lingual); inscribe-time LLM recovers canonicalization (100%) but cannot help intent-aware deletion (0% on prefix-collision and compound-fact); a mutation-time hook recovers intent-aware deletion (78-85%) and brightens nearly all categories simultaneously (91.7-93.2% overall, $0.17 per 385-case run, 2.3s/case mutation latency vs. 64-191ms/case deterministic, recall path unchanged).
  We expose the trade-off via ForgetEval, a 1000-case templated suite plus a 385-case adversarial layer (132 hand-crafted + 253 LLM-drafted oracle-validated) scored by deterministic substring match, paired with a six-method Adapter Protocol with honest N/A scoring that lets heterogeneous memory stores enter in 130 lines. Admission is corroborated by 10-annotator IAA (Fleiss' kappa = 0.958) and a 77-case external-authored subset (four blind contributors) that replicates the canonicalization asymmetry and amplifies the joint-placement lift (+27.8 pt). Production failures are predominantly forgetting failures rather than recall failures, yet existing benchmarks measure only recall. ForgetEval and all adapters are released under MIT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ForgetEval基准测试套件，系统评估大语言模型（LLM）在记忆管道中不同位置（recall、inscribe、mutation时间点）对遗忘能力的影响，发现mutation-time LLM钩子在意图感知删除和整体遗忘性能上最优，并开源全部工具。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅评测记忆召回能力，而实际生产中遗忘失败远多于召回失败；缺乏对LLM在记忆管道中不同插入位置导致的遗忘失效模式的系统性分析与评测。
AI.method: 构建ForgetEval评测套件（1000例模板化+385例对抗性样本），定义六种适配器协议以支持异构记忆存储；在13种系统配置下对比测试，采用确定性子串匹配评分与诚实N/A机制；通过10人标注者IAA和外部作者子集验证可靠性。
