AI.result: 发现三种LLM放置范式：deterministic primitives适用于词法/时序类遗忘但无法处理规范化（如跨语言）；inscribe-time LLM解决规范化（100%），但无法处理意图感知删除；mutation-time hook在意图感知删除达78–85%，整体遗忘准确率达91.7–93.2%，且保持原有召回路径不变。
AI.conclusion: LLM置于memory mutation阶段最有效；ForgetEval填补了遗忘能力评测空白，揭示遗忘失败是主要生产问题，推动遗忘能力成为与召回同等重要的评测维度。

title: UrbanWell: Benchmarking Multimodal Large Language Models for Spatio-Temporal Urban Wellbeing Analytics
comment: accepted by KDD Datasets and Benchmarks Track 2026
summary: Understanding urban wellbeing from multimodal data requires integrating heterogeneous spatial and temporal signals, posing significant challenges for current multimodal large language models (MLLMs). We introduce UrbanWell, a large-scale benchmark designed to systematically evaluate the spatio-temporal reasoning capabilities of MLLMs for urban wellbeing analytics through joint modeling of satellite and street view imagery. UrbanWell spans 38 cities across multiple years and includes diverse indicators covering (1) environmental conditions (CO$_2$, NO$_2$, PM${2.5}$, and Normalized Difference Vegetation Index), (2) spatial accessibility (minimum distance to supermarkets and restaurants), (3) urban form (road length, road density, and land use), (4) urban vitality (population, economic activity diversity, and land use diversity), and (5) subjective perception attributes (e.g., safety, beauty, liveliness, wealth, and quietness). All indicators are aligned at grid level to enable standardized evaluation. Beyond static prediction, UrbanWell defines temporal reasoning tasks, including future value forecasting from historical observations and temporal trend classification. We benchmark 15 state-of-the-art representative MLLMs in a zero-shot setting, providing a comprehensive comparative evaluation across spatial and temporal dimensions. Experimental results indicate that while MLLMs capture salient spatial and perceptual cues, their performance varies substantially across heterogeneous urban indicators spanning environment and subjective perception. UrbanWell serves as a unified benchmark for evaluating multimodal spatial and temporal reasoning in urban wellbeing analytics, offering a standardized testbed for systematic assessment and future research on multimodal urban intelligence. Our codes and datasets are accessible via https://github.com/axin1301/UrbanWell-Benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了UrbanWell基准，用于系统评估多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在城市福祉分析中的时空推理能力，涵盖环境、可达性、城市形态、活力及主观感知等多维度指标，并对15个主流MLLM进行零样本评测。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM难以有效整合异构的时空信号以理解城市福祉，缺乏专门针对城市多模态时空推理能力的系统性评测基准。
AI.method: 构建了大规模、多城市、多年份的UrbanWell基准，融合卫星与街景图像，统一网格级对齐五类城市福祉指标，并设计静态预测、未来值预测和时序趋势分类等时空推理任务；在零样本设置下评测15个SOTA MLLM。
AI.result: 实验表明MLLM能捕捉显著的空间与感知线索，但在不同城市指标（尤其是环境与主观感知类）上性能差异显著；未见模型在所有任务上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: UrbanWell为城市福祉分析中的多模态时空推理提供了首个统一、标准化的评测基准，推动多模态城市智能的研究与发展。

title: A Bifurcation Theory Framework for Gradient Descent on the Edge of Stability
summary: The Edge of Stability (EoS) phenomenon, where gradient descent operates with sharpness exceeding the classical convergence threshold yet the loss decreases over long timescales, is ubiquitous in modern deep learning but remains poorly understood in realistic settings. Prior rigorous analyses have been largely confined to scalar or low-dimensional losses with specific structural forms. In this work, we develop a bifurcation theory framework for gradient descent on the edge of stability that applies directly to overparameterized neural networks. By decomposing the training dynamics into components normal and tangent to the manifold of minimizers, we show that stable EoS training arises from a flip bifurcation in the normal direction, governed by the sign of the first Lyapunov coefficient, while the tangent dynamics drift toward regions of decreasing sharpness. Under mild spectral and geometric assumptions on the loss landscape, we prove convergence to the minimizing manifold when training at the EoS threshold. As a corollary, we recover and unify prior results: we show that the product-stability condition of Gan (2026) is an instance of our framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于过参数化神经网络的梯度下降边缘稳定性（EoS）现象的分岔理论框架，通过分解训练动力学为法向与切向分量，揭示了EoS下稳定训练源于法向的翻转分岔，并在温和假设下证明了其收敛性。
AI.motivation: EoS现象在深度学习中普遍存在但缺乏对现实场景（如过参数化网络）的严格理解，现有理论局限于低维或特殊结构损失函数。
AI.method: 构建基于分岔理论的分析框架，将梯度下降动力学分解为沿极小流形的法向与切向分量，结合Lyapunov系数分析法向稳定性，并考察切向漂移行为。
AI.result: 在损失景观的谱与几何条件假设下，证明了EoS阈值处训练可收敛至极小流形；并统一解释了Gan（2026）提出的乘积稳定性条件。
AI.conclusion: EoS并非异常行为，而是由法向翻转分岔与切向锐度降低共同驱动的可解释、可收敛的动力学机制，为深度学习优化提供了新理论视角。

title: An Augmented Reality Brain-Robot Interface for Generalist Robot Arm Manipulation
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robot and Human Interactive Communication (RO-MAN)
summary: The integration of augmented reality (AR) and EEG-based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) offers a promising path for enabling intuitive control of robots for assistive purposes. However, existing AR brain-robot interface (BRI) systems are often constrained to task-specific structures, limiting their utility in real-world environments. We present an AR BRI designed for generalist robot arm manipulation that combines gaze-based object selection with motor imagery action control. Our system uses eye-tracking for intuitive object targeting and context-aware visual overlays ("Place" and "Use") to guide the user through tasks within a shared autonomy framework. We evaluated the interface through a feasibility study with 18 healthy participants performing three multi-step activities of daily living: drinking, using a drawer, and operating an oven. Our results demonstrate that this interaction paradigm enables effective sequential task execution and high user engagement, achieving a "Good" usability rating (SUS > 70). These findings support the feasibility of the proposed interaction paradigm for complex BCI-driven robotic assistance, and motivate future evaluation with the intended target population. Project website: https://ar-bri-manip.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向通用机械臂操控的增强现实（AR）脑机接口（BCI）系统，结合眼动追踪与运动想象控制，支持日常生活任务的多步执行，并在18名健康受试者中验证了其可行性与可用性。
AI.motivation: 现有AR脑-机器人接口（BRI）系统多为任务专用，难以适应真实复杂环境，亟需一种通用、直观、可扩展的交互范式。
AI.method: 设计了一种融合眼动目标选择与运动想象动作控制的AR BRI系统，采用眼动追踪实现对象选择，结合上下文感知视觉提示（'Place'和'Use'）及共享自主框架引导用户完成任务。
AI.result: 在18名健康参与者完成三项日常生活任务（饮水、开抽屉、操作烤箱）的可行性研究中，系统实现了有效的序列任务执行和高用户参与度，SUS可用性评分>70（'Good'级）。
AI.conclusion: 该AR BRI交互范式在复杂BCI驱动机器人辅助任务中具备可行性，为后续面向目标用户群体（如运动障碍患者）的临床验证奠定基础。

title: Learn Temporal Consistency For Robust Satellite Video Detector
summary: Satellite video object detection (SVOD) for oriented and fine-grained objects plays an important role in satellite applications. Most existing SVOD methods only focus on one or a few coarse-grained categories of moving objects and represent objects with horizontal bounding boxes. They have difficulty extracting complete, accurate, and consistent information about objects in whole satellite videos. In this paper, we propose a satellite video object detection framework based on Temporal Consistency Learning (TCL). TCL adeptly detects oriented and fine-grained objects by leveraging the rich temporal contexts within satellite videos. The framework integrates three key modules: temporal and fine-grained feature aggregation (TFA), structure encoding (SE), and temporal consistency constraint (TCC). TFA and TCC modules facilitate consistent representation learning across frames, while the SE module encodes both appearance and structural information for precise fine-grained recognition. Experimental results on the SAT-MTB benchmark dataset demonstrate TCL's superior performance, achieving a new state-of-the-art oriented and fine-grained detection accuracy of 47.7% mAP--a 4.8% improvement over the baseline. Furthermore, our TCL framework readily accommodates existing image-based detectors, leading to enhanced detection accuracies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间一致性学习（TCL）的卫星视频目标检测框架，用于检测具有方向性和细粒度特征的目标，显著提升了检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有卫星视频目标检测方法多局限于粗粒度类别和水平边界框，难以在整段视频中提取完整、准确且一致的目标信息。
AI.method: 提出TCL框架，包含时间与细粒度特征聚合（TFA）、结构编码（SE）和时间一致性约束（TCC）三个模块，利用卫星视频中的丰富时序上下文实现定向与细粒度目标检测。
AI.result: 在SAT-MTB数据集上达到47.7% mAP，比基线提升4.8%，且可兼容现有图像检测器以进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: TCL框架有效提升了卫星视频中定向与细粒度目标检测的准确性与一致性，为卫星应用提供了更可靠的目标感知能力。

title: Calibrated Triage, Not Autonomy: Confidence Estimation for Medical Vision-Language Models
summary: A vision-language model can answer a question about a medical image fluently and confidently while barely using the image, leaning instead on language priors. In medicine this is the failure that matters most, because the answer looks trustworthy and is not, and the only protection is a confidence score reliable enough to tell the system when to abstain. We ask a deployment question rather than an accuracy one: how much imaging work a model can safely handle alone, and which confidence signal makes that possible. We evaluate seven confidence estimators across five open-weight LVLMs and three medical visual-question-answering datasets spanning broad clinical imaging, radiology, and pathology, with every probe trained only on natural images and applied without adaptation. Recast as bounded selective prediction (automate a case only when confidence clears a threshold, defer the rest), the comparison is cautionary. The standard metrics are poor guides: discrimination barely separates the methods, and the weak calibration of a cheap self-report is cheaply removed by off-domain temperature scaling without changing deployable yield. What distinguishes a usable estimator is the high-confidence region a clinician acts on: the weakest baselines are confidently wrong on 41 to 45 percent of their errors against 1 to 4 percent for the best probe, and no estimator is reliably best across domains or models. Safe handoff is governed at two levels: base-model competence sets a ceiling, so a well-calibrated score recovers roughly a third of radiology cases at a 20 percent error tolerance but almost none of pathology; the confidence layer then decides how much of that ceiling is reachable. The usable role today is calibrated triage, not autonomy: automate the cases a calibrated score marks safe, route the rest to a clinician. We release all outputs, correctness judgments, and confidence scores, with code.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了医疗视觉-语言模型（LVLM）在临床应用中的可信度问题，重点在于如何通过可靠的置信度估计实现安全的自动决策与人工交接。研究发现，现有置信度方法在跨领域（放射、病理等）表现不稳定，标准评估指标（如区分度、校准性）无法有效识别真正可用的置信信号；关键判据是高置信区域中错误率的高低——最优方法仅1–4%错误发生在高置信区，而最差方法达41–45%。结论指出：当前LVLM尚不能自主诊断，但可作为校准后的分诊工具，将高置信案例自动化、其余交由医生处理。
AI.motivation: 医疗场景中，视觉-语言模型可能仅依赖语言先验而非图像内容给出看似可信却错误的答案，而现有置信度评分不可靠，缺乏能指导安全自动化的判据。
AI.method: 在三个医学VQA数据集（涵盖广泛临床影像、放射学和病理学）上，评估七种置信度估计器在五个开源LVLM上的表现；所有置信探针仅在自然图像上训练，未针对医学域微调；采用有界选择性预测框架（仅当置信度超阈值时自动化），并分析校准性、高置信错误率及跨域鲁棒性。
AI.result: 标准指标（如AUC、ECE）无法区分实际部署价值；高置信错误率差异巨大（1–4% vs. 41–45%）；无单一置信估计器在所有模型和领域均最优；基础模型能力设定了上限（如放射科约33%案例可在20%容忍误差下安全自动化，病理几乎为零）；温度缩放可改善校准但不提升可用产出。
AI.conclusion: 当前LVLM不应追求完全自主诊断，而应定位为‘校准式分诊’工具：仅自动化经校准置信分确认安全的案例，其余必须交由临床医生；安全交接需协同优化基础模型能力与置信层设计。

title: Agentic Framework for Deep Learning workload migration via In-Context Learning
summary: Translating deep learning models from PyTorch's flexible, object-oriented design to JAX's functional, stateless setup is usually a manual and error-prone task. Automated migration is challenging because Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle with strict and dynamic API alignment and are prone to mistakes for exacting operations. We propose a fully autonomous system that combines In-Context Learning (ICL) with oracle-driven self-debugging. First, we curated an ICL context that serves as a strict reference for idiomatic JAX styling and test case generation. Second, instead of depending on the LLM to deduce mathematical outputs, we run the source PyTorch modules to get their actual dynamic tensor states. This creates an unchangeable execution oracle. We then use an autonomous agentic loop to synthesize tests based on the oracle data. The test cases are executed repeatedly, and the traceback is sent back to the LLM for self-correction. Ablations show that combining ICL references with oracle grounding and self-debugging greatly outperforms pure instructional and basic agentic baselines. This improvement does not add an excessive computational overhead. Our lightweight pipeline achieves 91% numerical equivalence (compared to baseline: 9%, instruction + self-debugging: 27%) on neural modules, providing a highly reliable, scalable blueprint for cross-framework migration. This has been validated across several state-of-the-art models including SAM (segment anything), T5, Code Whisper amongst others showing high numerical equivalency. Code: https://github.com/AI-Hypercomputer/accelerator-agents/tree/main/MaxCode

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合上下文学习（ICL）与基于执行预言机的自调试机制的全自动PyTorch到JAX迁移系统，显著提升数值等价性至91%，远超基线方法。
AI.motivation: PyTorch到JAX的手动迁移易出错；大模型在严格、动态API对齐和精确运算上表现不佳，亟需可靠自动化方案。
AI.method: 构建严格ICL上下文作为JAX风格参考；利用PyTorch实际运行获取动态张量状态作为不可变执行预言机；通过自主智能体循环生成测试用例并基于报错反馈迭代修正代码。
AI.result: 在多个SOTA模型（SAM、T5、Code Whisper等）上实现91%数值等价性，显著优于纯指令法（9%）和指令+自调试法（27%），且计算开销可控。
AI.conclusion: ICL参考、预言机驱动与自调试三者协同构成高效、可靠、可扩展的跨框架迁移新范式，为深度学习框架迁移提供了实用蓝图。

title: Distilling Drifting Transformers with Representation Autoencoders
summary: Representation Autoencoders (RAEs) have improved diffusion and flow models by semantically richer latent space owing to the strongly label-wise clustered DINO features in the pretrained encoders. Yet in the distillation stage, the severe anisotropy and large curvatures caused by the rich semantic representations would hinder the convergence and performance, making the trajectory-based distillation unstable. In this work, we argue that the RAE latent space is compatible with distillation via the newly proposed Drifting Models. We first quantitatively study the curvatures and isotropy statistics across different autoencoders, and theoretically reveal that Drifting Model itself is highly likely to fail on extremely scattered spaces like reconstruction-based VAEs. These motivate us to apply the drifting paradigm directly to representation autoencoders. Our proposed method, Drift-RAE, distills pretrained flow models in RAE latent spaces using Drifting, together with insightful modifications that improve training stability by thereotically aligning drifting fields with other frameworks. Regarding the experimental evidences, we achieve 1.77 FID on ImageNet 256 dataset using only 10k distillation steps, surpassing state-of-the-art RAE distillation methods and appearing comparative with the original Drifting Model without requiring an auxiliary MAE feature extractor. The code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Drift-RAE方法，将Drifting模型应用于Representation Autoencoders（RAEs）的潜在空间中进行流模型蒸馏，在ImageNet 256上仅用10k步即达1.77 FID，性能优于现有RAE蒸馏方法。
AI.motivation: RAE潜在空间语义丰富但存在严重各向异性和大曲率，导致基于轨迹的蒸馏不稳定；而Drifting模型在高度离散空间（如重建型VAE）中易失败，因此需探索其在RAE空间中的适用性。
AI.method: 提出Drift-RAE：在RAE潜在空间中使用Drifting范式蒸馏预训练流模型，并引入理论驱动的漂移场对齐机制以提升训练稳定性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet 256数据集上仅用10,000蒸馏步达到1.77 FID，超越当前RAE蒸馏最先进方法，且无需额外MAE特征提取器，与原始Drifting模型性能相当。
AI.conclusion: RAE潜在空间可通过Drifting模型有效蒸馏，Drift-RAE在稳定性与性能上均取得突破，验证了语义丰富潜在空间与蒸馏范式的兼容性。

title: V2P-Manip: Learning Dexterous Manipulation from Monocular Human Videos
summary: Achieving autonomous robotic dexterous manipulation requires precise, human-like action sequences at scale. As a scalable supplement to costly teleoperation data, extracting trajectories with both visual fidelity and physical plausibility from monocular videos represents a promising frontier in embodied AI. To this end, we introduce V2P-Manip, an efficient framework designed to learn dexterous manipulation policies directly from human demonstration videos. We establish an efficient, integrated pipeline encompassing 3D asset acquisition, trajectory estimation, and dexterous policy learning. To bridge the gap between visual perception and physical constraints, we introduce a two-stage refinement process to enforce spatial alignment and physical consistency. Evaluations on the TACO and OakInk benchmarks demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms previous methods in pose accuracy, adaptability to unstructured environments, and training efficiency. Ultimately, experimental results confirm an average success rate of over 75% across multiple synthetic manipulation tasks and validate the adaptability of the extracted manipulation priors across diverse dexterous hand embodiments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出V2P-Manip框架，从单目视频中高效提取具备视觉保真度与物理合理性的灵巧操作轨迹，并通过两阶段优化实现感知与物理约束的对齐，在多个基准上显著提升姿态精度、环境适应性与训练效率，平均任务成功率超75%。
AI.motivation: 为降低灵巧机器人操作对高成本遥操作数据的依赖，亟需从单目视频中规模化提取兼具视觉保真度与物理合理性的操作轨迹。
AI.method: 提出V2P-Manip框架，构建包含3D资产获取、轨迹估计与灵巧策略学习的一体化流程，并引入两阶段细化机制以确保空间对齐与物理一致性。
AI.result: 在TACO和OakInk基准上，姿态精度、非结构化环境适应性及训练效率均显著优于先前方法；多合成任务平均成功率超75%，且提取的操作先验可适配多种灵巧手形态。
AI.conclusion: V2P-Manip为从视频学习灵巧操作提供了高效、鲁棒的端到端解决方案，验证了视频到物理策略迁移的可行性与泛化能力。

title: Multi-view feature High-order Fusion for Space Weak Object Detection and Segmentation
summary: Weak objects are common in images and videos of space applications. However, it is hard to learn proper representations from their limited appearance information. Inspired by multi-view learning, we develop simple multi-view attentions, treating their outputs as multi-view features. We also propose a multi-view feature high-order fusion method (MHF) to aggregate more accurate and richer features of weak objects. Our MHF extends the commonly used low-order feature fusion method to higher orders. It enhances the model's capacity to capture relevant and complementary information about weak objects. This is achieved by introducing high-order multi-view features perception and a recursive task-contribution gated selection of multi-view features. The new operation is highly flexible and customizable. It is compatible with various variants of multi-view feature representations. We conduct extensive experiments on two newly constructed space science datasets and an open, large-scale satellite video dataset. Our MHF serves as a plug-and-play module and significantly improves various vision transformers and convolution-based detection and segmentation models. We achieve all state-of-the-art accuracies on both tasks across three datasets. Our MHF can be a new basic module for visual modeling that effectively represents weak objects in terms of multi-view learning. The code will be available at https://github.com/Kingdroper/MHF.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多视角特征高阶融合方法（MHF），用于提升空间应用中弱目标的检测与分割性能，通过高阶多视角感知和递归任务贡献门控选择机制，显著提升了多种视觉模型在多个空间科学数据集上的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 空间图像和视频中普遍存在弱目标，但由于其外观信息有限，难以学习到合适的表征。
AI.method: 提出简单多视角注意力机制生成多视角特征，并设计多视角特征高阶融合方法（MHF），扩展低阶融合至高阶，引入高阶多视角感知与递归任务贡献门控选择机制。
AI.result: 在两个新建空间科学数据集和一个开源大规模卫星视频数据集上，MHF作为即插即用模块，显著提升多种ViT和CNN类检测/分割模型性能，全面达到SOTA精度。
AI.conclusion: MHF可作为面向弱目标表征的新型基础模块，有效支撑多视角学习下的空间视觉建模。

title: SciText2Eq: Assessing LLMs for Explainable Equation Generation for Scientific Creativity
summary: This work investigates the ability of large language models (LLMs) to generate mathematical equations from scientific texts. Prior work faces challenges in unstructured grounding, multi-equation dependency, and humanaligned evaluation. To this end, we construct a dataset of AI research papers, pairing contextual passages with ground-truth equations and variable descriptions. We develop an explainable equation generation workflow and evaluate it across diverse open- and closed-source LLM backbones. We introduce an evaluation protocol combining automatic metrics, LLM-based rubrics, and human judgments to assess accuracy, explainability, and human-LLM alignment. Results indicate that LLMs perform moderately on lexical- and syntactic-based similarity, while struggling with semantic accuracy. Comparisons between LLM-based evaluations and human judgments reveal limited alignment, highlighting challenges in using LLMs to assess equation quality. These findings offer insights for improving equation generation models and developing more reliable evaluation methods for scientific text. We provide code and data for reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大语言模型（LLMs）从科学文本中生成数学公式的任务，构建了包含上下文段落、真值公式及变量描述的新数据集，提出可解释的公式生成流程，并设计融合自动指标、LLM评分与人工判断的多维评估协议；结果表明LLMs在词汇/句法相似性上表现中等，但在语义准确性上不足，且LLM评估与人工判断一致性较低。
AI.motivation: 现有工作面临非结构化 grounding、多公式依赖关系建模困难以及缺乏人类对齐的评估方法等挑战。
AI.method: 构建AI领域科研论文的公式-文本配对数据集；设计可解释的公式生成工作流；在多种开源与闭源LLM上进行实验；提出结合自动指标、LLM-based rubrics和人工评判的综合评估协议。
AI.result: LLMs在lexical/syntactic相似性指标上表现中等，但语义准确性较差；LLM评估结果与人工判断对齐度低，说明当前LLM难以可靠评估公式质量。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM在科学公式生成任务中仍存在显著局限，尤其在语义准确性和评估可信度方面；需改进模型架构与训练策略，并发展更鲁棒的人类对齐评估方法。

title: A Decision-Theoretic View of Test-Time Training: When, How Far, and Which Directions to Adapt
summary: Test-time training (TTT) adapts a pretrained model to each prompt via parameter updates, improving accuracy under pretraining-to-test distribution shifts. Yet, its performance often suffers from instability and sensitivity to hyperparameters such as update steps and subspace. We explain this behavior through a decision-theoretic lens, treating TTT as implicit Bayesian inference in the kernel regime. Under a Gaussian process benchmark, we show that TTT reduces prediction error when updates are spectrally matched to the prompt's signal-to-noise ratio and aligned with query-relevant eigen-directions. This perspective underpins the following results: (1) we show when fixed update steps and subspaces fail under distribution shifts, motivating adaptive strategies; (2) we prove that selecting update steps via prompt evidence admits a PAC-Bayes guarantee against overfitting; and (3) we characterize the Bayes-optimal update subspace under a linear-Gaussian correction model, yielding a scoring rule for selecting Transformer blocks and heads. Our theory helps explain the empirical instability of TTT, taking a step toward principled guidance for when, how far, and which directions to adapt.

AI.tldr: 本文从决策理论角度解释了测试时训练（TTT）的不稳定性，将其视为核空间中的隐式贝叶斯推断，并提出了基于提示证据选择更新步数和最优子空间的理论指导。
AI.motivation: TTT在预训练到测试分布偏移下性能常因不稳定性和对超参数（如更新步数、子空间）敏感而受限，亟需理论解释与指导。
AI.method: 将TTT建模为核空间下的隐式贝叶斯推断，在高斯过程基准下分析其谱匹配性与方向对齐性，并结合PAC-Bayes理论和线性-高斯校正模型推导最优更新策略。
AI.result: （1）揭示固定更新步数与子空间在分布偏移下的失效机制；（2）证明基于提示证据选择更新步数具有PAC-Bayes过拟合保证；（3）刻画贝叶斯最优更新子空间，提出Transformer模块与注意力头的选择评分准则。
AI.conclusion: 该理论为TTT提供了原则性指导——何时适应、适应多远、沿哪些方向适应，有助于缓解其经验不稳定性。

title: Training and Evaluating Diffusion Policies with Long Context Lengths
summary: Imitation learning has enabled highly-dexterous robotic manipulation from RGB observations. Policies trained with these methods, however, typically condition robot actions on only a short history of observations. These policies cannot solve tasks that require memory and can get stuck repeatedly executing the same failing motions. In this work, we first benchmark policy performance as context length is incrementally increased from short to long, across a spectrum of tasks with varying local stability and memory requirements, and in multiple data regimes. To our knowledge, this is the first study to investigate context length in imitation learning at this level of detail. Our results challenge prior claims: naively scaling context length is not as brittle as advertised in literature. With an appropriate conditioning method and denoising backbone (UNet+Cross-Attention), single-task policies achieve high success rates on many tasks in the usual data regime even with naive scaling. Next, we propose a training algorithm to jointly train policies at multiple context lengths, further reducing the sample complexity of long-context learning. Finally, we apply our findings to re-evaluate some previously proposed solutions to long-context imitation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了模仿学习中上下文长度对机器人操作性能的影响，发现适当的方法下增加上下文长度并不如先前认为的那样脆弱，并提出了多上下文长度联合训练算法以降低长上下文学习的样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有模仿学习策略通常仅依赖短时观测历史，难以处理需记忆的任务，易陷入重复失败动作；缺乏对上下文长度系统性影响的细致研究。
AI.method: 通过在不同任务和数据规模下逐步增加上下文长度进行基准测试；采用UNet+交叉注意力作为去噪主干与条件机制；提出一种可联合训练多种上下文长度的策略的训练算法。
AI.result: 验证了在合适条件下单纯扩展上下文长度效果稳健；单任务策略在常规数据下对多数任务仍保持高成功率；所提联合训练算法显著降低了长上下文学习所需的样本量。
AI.conclusion: 上下文长度并非越长越脆弱，关键在于建模方式；多上下文联合训练是提升长时序模仿学习效率的有效路径；相关发现为重新评估已有长上下文方案提供了新依据。

title: EyeMVP: OCT-Informed Fundus Representation Learning via Paired CFP--OCT Pretraining
summary: Color fundus photography (CFP) is the mainstay for large-scale retinal screening, yet its diagnostic capacity is constrained by the lack of depth-resolved structural information. Optical coherence tomography (OCT) provides cross-sectional retinal anatomy, but is less accessible in population-level screening. Here, we present EyeMVP, a cross-modal retinal foundation model that uses paired CFP--OCT pretraining to learn OCT-informed CFP representations. EyeMVP is pretrained on 674,893 strict same-eye same-day paired CFP--OCT image triples from 112,642 patients across eight hospitals in China. The model uses cross-modal masked reconstruction to enrich CFP representations with OCT-associated supervision, while requiring only CFP images at inference. To accommodate the non-aligned imaging geometry between en-face CFP and cross-sectional OCT, EyeMVP combines source-constrained cross-attention with CFP-derived structural masks. Across 16 downstream tasks, including classification, segmentation, few-shot adaptation, and cross-modal retrieval, EyeMVP outperforms representative retinal foundation models and shows consistent gains on tasks involving macular and optic nerve structure. For CFP-challenging macular diseases, EyeMVP achieves an AUROC of 0.948 for macular edema (vs.~0.852 for EyeCLIP) and 0.825 for myopic macular schisis. In an exploratory reader study, EyeMVP exceeds junior and intermediate ophthalmologist groups but does not reach senior ophthalmologist performance on macular edema, while showing numerically higher balanced accuracy than all reader groups on myopic macular schisis. These results suggest that pixel-level cross-modal reconstruction can enrich CFP representations with OCT-associated supervision, providing a practical route toward stronger CFP-based retinal analysis in screening settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EyeMVP，一种基于严格配对CFP-OCT图像预训练的跨模态视网膜基础模型，通过跨模态掩码重建提升CFP表征能力，在16项下游任务中显著优于现有模型，尤其在黄斑疾病诊断上表现突出。
AI.motivation: CFP虽广泛用于大规模视网膜筛查，但缺乏深度结构信息；OCT虽提供断层解剖信息，却难以普及。亟需一种仅依赖CFP、却能融入OCT结构先验的模型。
AI.method: 提出EyeMVP模型，基于67.5万组严格同眼同日CFP-OCT图像三元组进行跨模态预训练；采用跨模态掩码重建目标，并结合源约束交叉注意力与CFP衍生结构掩码，以应对CFP与OCT成像几何不匹配问题。
AI.result: 在16项下游任务（分类、分割、少样本适配、跨模态检索）中全面超越现有视网膜基础模型；黄斑水肿AUROC达0.948（优于EyeCLIP的0.852），病理性近视黄斑劈裂达0.825；读者研究表明其性能介于中级与高级眼科医生之间。
AI.conclusion: 像素级跨模态重建可有效将OCT结构监督注入CFP表征，为筛查场景下增强CFP分析能力提供了可行路径。

title: Contaminated Collaboration: Measuring Gender Bias Transfer in LLM-Assisted Student Writing
summary: Gender bias in LLMs has been studied extensively in model outputs, with biased prompts shown to amplify stereotyped generations. Whether such bias propagates into text produced by humans who use these systems, however, remains underexplored. We investigate whether gender bias in an LLM writing assistant transfers into career plan essays written by students. We first verify that a gender-biased prompt induces gender-differentiated language in LLM-generated essays, while a neutral prompt does not. We then recruited participants (N = 123) in a controlled environment to write career plan essays for paired biographical profiles differing only in gender under three conditions: no AI assistance, neutral LLM assistance, or gender-biased LLM assistance. Students in the biased condition produced essays with a significantly larger agentic gap and more gender-stereotypic occupation suggestions than those in the control and neutral conditions. Our results also reveal that this bias transfer is asymmetric: agency is suppressed in female-target essays while male-target writing remains largely unaffected. Our findings highlight the risk of bias propagation in AI-assisted writing, calling for fairness-aware design in educational AI tools.

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨了大型语言模型（LLM）中的性别偏见是否会通过AI写作助手传递给人类用户，发现使用带有性别偏见提示的LLM会显著影响学生撰写的生涯规划论文，导致对女性目标人物的能动性压制和刻板职业建议，且该偏见传递具有不对称性。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLM输出中的性别偏见已被广泛研究，但尚不清楚这种偏见是否会传导至人类用户在使用AI辅助时所产出的文本，尤其在教育场景中缺乏实证考察。
AI.method: 首先验证LLM在性别偏见提示下生成文本存在性别差异；随后开展受控实验（N=123），让学生在无AI、中性LLM辅助、性别偏见LLM辅助三种条件下，为仅性别不同的传记撰写生涯规划论文，并量化分析能动性差距与职业刻板程度。
AI.result: 偏见LLM辅助组学生的论文表现出显著更大的能动性差距和更多性别刻板的职业建议；且该效应呈不对称：女性目标文本的能动性被抑制，而男性目标文本基本未受影响。
AI.conclusion: LLM中的性别偏见可传导至人类写作输出，尤其在教育应用中构成公平性风险，亟需在AI教育工具设计中嵌入公平性考量。

title: Auditing Reward Hackability in Code RL Training Environments
summary: We measure the rate at which code RL environments accept incorrect solutions as correct. On a 49-task sample of SWE-bench Verified, 28.5% of tasks have test suites weak enough that a Docker-verified incorrect patch passes them. On 20 R2E-Gym tasks across 6 repositories, the same pipeline at single-shot exploit generation yields 25.0%. A random-effects meta-analysis over 134 frontier model submissions to SWE-bench Verified finds, within the same human-rated difficulty stratum, model Pass@1 is +14.14 percentage points higher on flagged-hackable tasks than on robust ones (95% CI [+11.80, +16.48]; one-sided p < 10^-6; I^2 = 0%; 123 of 134 models positive). We then describe a procedure for hardening the broken tasks. An inline LLM judge with a Docker gold-sanity gate runs each generated test against the gold solution before the judge is consulted. On the 11 broken tasks in the audit, the gate flags 65 of 105 decisive LLM-generated tests as failing on the gold patch itself, a 61.9% per-augmentation defect rate the LLM judge alone misses. With diversity-biased retry, the loop converges 9 of 11 tasks to a gated upgrade.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了当前代码RL环境测试套件的脆弱性，发现大量任务存在测试不充分问题，导致错误补丁被误判为正确；作者提出了一种结合Docker黄金校验门与LLM裁判的测试增强流程，并验证其能有效修复多数脆弱任务。
AI.motivation: 现有代码生成评测基准（如SWE-bench Verified、R2E-Gym）中的测试套件存在漏洞，易被错误补丁‘绕过’，从而高估模型性能，亟需识别并加固这些脆弱任务。
AI.method: 1) 对SWE-bench Verified和R2E-Gym任务进行实证审计，统计错误补丁通过率；2) 基于134个前沿模型提交结果开展随机效应meta分析，评估任务脆弱性对Pass@1的影响；3) 提出‘Docker gold-sanity gate + inline LLM judge’的测试增强流程，并在11个脆弱任务上验证其修复效果。
AI.result: 28.5% SWE-bench Verified任务、25.0% R2E-Gym任务存在测试脆弱性；脆弱任务上模型Pass@1平均高出14.14个百分点；所提加固流程在11个脆弱任务中成功修复9个，其中65/105 LLM生成测试被Docker门拦截（61.9%缺陷率）。
AI.conclusion: 测试套件脆弱性是当前代码智能评测的重大隐患；单纯依赖LLM生成测试不可靠，必须引入可执行的黄金标准校验机制；该研究为构建鲁棒的代码评测基准提供了可落地的加固范式。

title: Localizing Credit at the Divergence: Path-Conditioned Self-Distillation for LLM Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement learning from verifiable rewards assigns a single scalar to each rollout, leaving token-level credit assignment underspecified in long reasoning traces. On-policy self-distillation addresses this by letting the same model act as a teacher conditioned on privileged information, producing a dense per-token signal. But the common choice of a ground-truth answer is only an endpoint cue: on terse-answer tasks, the teacher falls silent at the intermediate positions where path-level guidance matters most. We propose Hindsight Self-Distillation (HSD), which conditions the teacher on a successful peer rollout drawn from the current training group. Such a peer is an exact sample from the success-conditioned policy, requiring no additional sampled rollouts. By providing a full successful continuation rather than only the final answer, the resulting credit signal concentrates at the divergence position between a failed rollout and a successful peer. Across Qwen3-8B and Qwen3-32B on math and code benchmarks, HSD obtains the best result against GRPO variants and on-policy distillation baselines, with the largest gains on terse-answer tasks such as AIME.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为‘回溯式自我蒸馏（HSD）’的新方法，通过利用同批次中成功的样本作为教师信号源，为失败的推理路径提供细粒度、位置敏感的信用分配，显著提升了在数学和代码等短答案任务上的强化学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于验证奖励的强化学习方法仅提供单个标量奖励，难以进行token级信用分配；而传统自蒸馏中使用真实答案作为教师信号，在中间步骤缺乏指导，尤其在短答案任务中效果受限。
AI.method: HSD让模型以同批次中一个成功的rollout作为条件，充当‘教师’生成密集的每token监督信号，该成功样本直接来自当前策略的成功分布，无需额外采样。
AI.result: 在Qwen3-8B和Qwen3-32B模型上，HSD在数学（如AIME）和代码基准测试中优于GRPO变体及各类on-policy自蒸馏基线，提升最显著的是短答案任务。
AI.conclusion: HSD通过引入成功peer作为条件教师，实现了更精准的路径级信用分配，有效缓解了末端奖励稀疏性问题，为长链推理中的强化学习提供了新范式。

title: RHO: Your Coding Agent is Secretly a Roboticist
comment: 46 pages, 9 figures, 15 tables. Project page: https://rho-robotics.github.io
summary: Code-as-Policies (CaP) has shown that large language models (LLMs) can write code to solve robotics tasks by composing perception, planning, and control primitives. Recent CaP systems, however, rely on multi-turn code-generation loops at test time, which is often infeasible for real-time robot control. We introduce Robotics Harness Optimization (RHO), a novel paradigm in which tool-enabled coding agents, at training time, propose and search for interpretable, neurosymbolic multi-file policy repositories (Repositories-as-Policies) that compose these primitives rather than a single prompt, function, or file. RHO searches with reflective feedback from environment reward and execution rather than teleoperation demonstrations. It generalizes to perturbed pick-and-place settings like LIBERO-PRO, where OpenVLA scores 0.0% and $π_{0.5}$ averages 12.83%. Using the same low-level primitives, RHO reaches a 45.0% success rate, 2.5x higher than the strongest multi-turn agentic system, and 3.5x higher than $π_{0.5}$. On Robosuite, RHO sets a new state-of-the-art of 70.0%, exceeding the prior multi-turn record of 68.29% using single-turn execution with no corrective LLM code edits at deployment. When an LLM is used in the control loop, as on RAI's O3DE benchmark, RHO optimizes the deployed agent's multi-file harness of prompts, tools, and control code, improving held-out success from 23.5% to 44.3% with 20% less wall-clock time and 27% fewer tool calls.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Robotics Harness Optimization (RHO)，一种在训练时通过工具增强的编码智能体搜索可解释、神经符号化的多文件策略库（Repositories-as-Policies）的新范式，显著提升机器人任务成功率，优于现有多轮代码生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有Code-as-Policies（CaP）方法依赖测试时多轮代码生成，难以满足实时机器人控制需求。
AI.method: RHO在训练阶段利用工具增强的编码智能体，通过环境奖励与执行反馈进行反思式搜索，构建由感知、规划与控制原语组成的多文件策略库（Repositories-as-Policies），而非单提示、单函数或单文件策略。
AI.result: 在LIBERO-PRO上成功率达45.0%，是当前最强多轮系统性能的2.5倍；在Robosuite达70.0% SOTA；在RAI O3DE上将成功率从23.5%提升至44.3%，同时减少20%运行时间和27%工具调用。
AI.conclusion: RHO通过训练时的神经符号化多文件策略库优化，摆脱测试时多轮LLM干预，在效率与泛化性上显著优于现有CaP方法，为实时机器人控制提供新范式。

title: Beyond Scalar Distances: Semantic Attribute Gradients from Frozen MLLMs for Visual Embeddings
summary: Vision encoders for retrieval are typically trained with class-label supervision: each training pair reduces to a scalar that uniformly pushes the embedding apart or pulls it together, as if every visual attribute either differed or matched. A multimodal large language model (MLLM), shown the same pair, can articulate those attributes and use them to predict whether the images share a class. We propose \textbf{SAGA}, a framework that turns this language-grounded, attribute-aware perception into a training signal for the encoder itself. Specifically, we use Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to reward the MLLM for correct predictions on the vision encoder's tokens. Since correct predictions require those tokens to expose the specific attributes that differ or match between the pair, the gradient pushes the encoder to encode them, replacing the uniform pair-level scalar with attribute-resolved supervision. An auxiliary attention-distillation loss anchors the encoder's embedding to tokens the MLLM attended to, and a standard metric-learning loss shapes the embedding geometry for nearest-neighbour retrieval. The MLLM is frozen throughout and discarded at inference, matching the deployment cost of a metric-learning baseline. SAGA improves Recall@1 by 3 to 6 points over state-of-the-art baselines on CUB-200-2011, Cars-196, FGVC-Aircraft, and iNaturalist Aves on zero-shot image retrieval.

AI.tldr: SAGA是一种利用冻结的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）生成属性级监督信号来训练视觉编码器的新框架，通过GRPO奖励机制、注意力蒸馏和度量学习损失，显著提升零样本图像检索性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于类别标签监督的视觉编码器训练方式仅提供粗粒度的成对相似性标量信号，无法建模图像间细粒度的视觉属性差异或匹配；而MLLM能显式描述这些属性并预测类别一致性，可转化为更精细的监督信号。
AI.method: 提出SAGA框架：1）冻结MLLM，用其对图像对进行属性描述与类别一致性预测；2）采用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）奖励MLLM在视觉编码器token上的正确预测，引导编码器暴露判别性属性；3）引入辅助注意力蒸馏损失，使编码器嵌入对齐MLLM关注的token；4）保留标准度量学习损失优化嵌入几何结构。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011、Cars-196、FGVC-Aircraft和iNaturalist Aves四个细粒度数据集上，SAGA在零样本图像检索任务中Recall@1指标比当前最优基线提升3–6个百分点。
AI.conclusion: SAGA成功将MLLM的语言理解能力转化为可训练视觉编码器的细粒度属性监督信号，在不增加推理开销的前提下显著提升了检索性能，验证了语言模型作为‘感知教练’的有效性。

title: Beyond NL2Code: A Structured Survey of Multimodal Code Intelligence
comment: Work completed in January 2026. Updating now
summary: While LLMs have substantially advanced text-to-code synthesis, many real programming tasks specify intent through visual artifacts such as screenshots, charts, documents, vector drawings, videos, and interactive states. These tasks require models to connect visual perception to executable programs, because correctness depends not only on syntax but also on layout, geometry, data semantics, editability, interaction behavior, and domain-specific constraints that apply after execution. This survey examines Multimodal Code Intelligence, covering systems that generate, edit, refine, execute, or reason with code under visually grounded inputs and outputs. We first formulate the field by the role that code plays in each task, distinguishing code as a rendered artifact, an editable symbolic structure, a scientific representation, an intermediate reasoning trace, or an executable policy or tool interface. We then organize benchmarks and methods into four domains: Graphical User Interface, Scientific Visualization, Structured Graphics, and Frontier Tasks and Frameworks. This taxonomy connects mature artifact-generation problems to emerging agentic and unified settings and allows us to compare how different tasks treat evidence of correctness. Looking ahead, we argue that future research may benefit from four verification-centered directions. Multi-signal validation can combine complementary evidence of correctness, multi-state verification can test behavior across execution trajectories, cross-task transfer testing can probe reusable visual-code skills, and verifiable agent traces can reveal whether agent actions are grounded in visual evidence. Together, these directions may move multimodal code generation from single-output imitation toward evidence-grounded executable systems.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了多模态代码智能（Multimodal Code Intelligence）这一新兴领域，聚焦于基于视觉输入（如截图、图表、文档等）生成、编辑或推理代码的任务，并提出以代码在任务中的角色（如渲染结果、可编辑结构、科学表示等）为分类依据的系统性框架；同时梳理了GUI、科学可视化、结构化图形等四大应用领域，并指出未来研究应朝多信号验证、多状态验证、跨任务迁移测试和可验证智能体轨迹四个以验证为中心的方向发展。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型虽在文本到代码生成上取得进展，但大量真实编程任务依赖视觉线索（如截图、图表、交互状态等），需模型将视觉感知与可执行代码关联，而不仅关注语法正确性，还需满足布局、几何、语义、可编辑性、交互行为及领域约束等多维要求。
AI.method: 本文采用综述与分类方法：首先按代码在任务中扮演的角色（渲染产物、符号结构、科学表征、推理中间态、可执行策略/工具接口）构建理论框架；再依据应用领域（GUI、科学可视化、结构化图形、前沿任务与框架）组织现有基准与方法；最后提出四个以验证为中心的未来研究方向。
AI.result: 建立了多模态代码智能的系统性分类体系与领域划分，明确了不同任务对‘正确性证据’的差异化处理方式，并提出了多信号验证、多状态验证、跨任务迁移测试和可验证智能体轨迹四条前瞻性研究路径。
AI.conclusion: 多模态代码智能需从单一输出的模仿式生成，转向基于多维证据的可验证、可执行系统构建；强调视觉-代码联合建模与严格验证机制是推动该领域走向实用的关键。

title: Mind-Studio: Executable World Models with Lookahead Evaluation for Partially Observable Games
summary: World-model synthesis aims to turn interaction experience into an internal model of environment dynamics. Existing symbolic approaches often fit observed transitions or mixtures of local rules, but they do not produce a complete executable program that can run independently of the real environment. We present Mind-Studio, a framework that synthesizes executable pygame-style world models from state-action-next-state trajectories using large language models. Mind-Studio combines entropy-selected traces with a lightweight game skill file containing object, action, and static scene information extracted from screenshots. We evaluate synthesis quality with a K-step lookahead fidelity protocol that compares generated world-model rollouts against Real-ALE rollouts from the same state. On Montezuma's Revenge, Mind-Studio improves chosen-action next-state prediction from 0.3% for PoE-World to 48.7% while verifying 5 of 8 subgoals; across Alien, Assault, and Skiing, it achieves stronger branch-level fidelity than prior learned lookahead sources.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Mind-Studio框架，利用大语言模型从状态-动作-下一状态轨迹中合成可执行的Pygame风格世界模型，并通过K步前向预测保真度协议评估其性能，在多个Atari游戏中显著提升预测准确率和子目标验证能力。
AI.motivation: 现有符号化方法难以生成完全独立、可执行的世界模型程序，无法脱离真实环境运行。
AI.method: Mind-Studio结合熵选择的轨迹与轻量级游戏技能文件（含截图提取的对象、动作和静态场景信息），利用大语言模型合成可执行的Pygame风格世界模型。
AI.result: 在Montezuma's Revenge中，所提方法将选定动作的下一状态预测准确率从PoE-World的0.3%提升至48.7%，并验证了8个子目标中的5个；在Alien、Assault和Skiing上，分支级前向预测保真度优于以往方法。
AI.conclusion: Mind-Studio能有效合成高保真、可执行的世界模型，为基于模型的强化学习提供了新路径。

title: Is Code Better Than Language for Algorithmic Reasoning
summary: For tool-augmented language models, comparing natural-language reasoning with code-execution pipelines is difficult because the comparison changes both the intermediate representation and the execution mechanism. We separate these factors with an intermediate intervention: the model expresses its reasoning as executable code, and the language model simulates that code in context to produce an answer. On a 40-task verifiable algorithmic benchmark, deterministic code execution outperforms natural-language reasoning by +31.6pp. We observe that the intermediate intervention is not meaningfully different from natural-language reasoning (+0.15pp). These results suggest that, in our evaluated setting, changing the intermediate representation alone does not explain the tool-use advantage, providing evidence for the performance gains requiring reliable external execution. We formalize this intuition with a simple statistical decision-theoretic model that characterizes when execution dominates end-to-end risk in our disentangled trace-generation/execution regime. We validate our theory using a reconstruction intervention that leverages a proxy language model to infer natural-language reasoning traces from code representations, recovering performance comparable to the original natural-language reasoning pipeline. All experiments are at https://github.com/TerryTong-Git/ToolProj.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分离中间表示和执行机制，探究工具增强型语言模型中自然语言推理与代码执行管道的性能差异。实验表明，确定性代码执行显著优于自然语言推理（+31.6pp），而仅将中间表示改为可执行代码但仍在语言模型内模拟执行时，性能几乎无提升（+0.15pp），说明外部可靠执行才是关键优势来源；作者进一步提出统计决策理论模型并用重建干预验证该结论。
AI.motivation: 比较自然语言推理与代码执行在工具增强语言模型中的效果困难，因二者同时改变中间表示和执行机制；需解耦这两个因素以明确性能增益来源。
AI.method: 设计中间干预：模型生成可执行代码作为推理表达，但由同一语言模型在上下文中模拟执行（而非调用外部解释器）；构建40任务可验证算法基准；提出统计决策理论模型刻画执行与端到端风险的关系；引入重建干预——用代理语言模型从代码表示反推自然语言推理轨迹。
AI.result: 确定性代码执行比自然语言推理高31.6个百分点；中间干预（代码生成+模型内模拟）仅提升0.15个百分点；重建干预恢复的性能接近原始自然语言推理 pipeline；理论预测与实验一致。
AI.conclusion: 在所评估设定下，仅改变中间表示（如改用代码）不足以带来显著性能提升，工具使用的优势主要源于外部、可靠的代码执行，而非表示形式本身；这为理解工具增强模型的有效性提供了新证据。

title: HOLO-MPPI: Multi-Scenario Motion Planning via Hierarchical Policy Optimization
summary: Robots deployed in the real world must plan motions across diverse scenarios without per-scenario retuning. End-to-end reinforcement learning (RL) can generalize across scenarios but often becomes brittle under distribution shift, reward misspecification, and stochastic interactions. Model predictive path integral (MPPI) control enables strong real-time refinement without gradients, but its performance depends on a well-shaped sampling prior, while manually designing the priors does not scale to multi-scenario deployment. We present HOLO-MPPI (High-level Offline, Low-level Online MPPI), a multi-scenario motion planning framework that combines high-level policy learning with low-level stochastic optimal control. Offline, we learn a high-level policy that proposes scenario-robust plans in an abstract action space, with a learned world model for online rollout. Online, the policy serves as a data-driven prior generator that parameterizes MPPI's sampling distribution conditioned on the current observation and goal. MPPI then optimizes low-level control sequences around this prior in real time to adapt to local disturbances. We instantiate HOLO-MPPI in autonomous driving by designing an effective high-level action space and tailored model architectures. Our evaluation across diverse driving scenarios shows that HOLO-MPPI improves upon MPPI and end-to-end RL baselines while maintaining real-time control.

AI.tldr: HOLO-MPPI 是一种结合高层离线策略学习与低层在线随机最优控制的多场景运动规划框架，通过数据驱动先验提升 MPPI 在真实世界中的鲁棒性与实时性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在局限：端到端强化学习在分布偏移和奖励设计不佳时易失效；MPPI 控制依赖人工设计的先验，难以扩展至多场景部署。
AI.method: 提出 HOLO-MPPI 框架：离线阶段训练高层策略（在抽象动作空间中生成场景鲁棒计划）并学习世界模型；在线阶段该策略作为数据驱动先验生成器，动态参数化 MPPI 的采样分布，MPPI 在此基础上实时优化底层控制序列。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶多场景评估中，HOLO-MPPI 在性能上优于纯 MPPI 和端到端 RL 基线，同时保持实时控制能力。
AI.conclusion: 将高层语义规划与低层最优控制解耦，并以学习先验替代手工设计，可有效提升机器人在多样化现实场景中的泛化性、鲁棒性与实时性。

title: MotionVLA: Vision-Language-Action Model for Humanoid Motion
summary: Generating realistic humanoid motion from scene images and text involves both low-frequency pose semantics and high-frequency physical dynamics. However, many existing methods tokenize motion with a single shared codebook, forcing heterogeneous motion signals into the same quantization space. Our frequency-domain analysis of human motion data reveals a clear mismatch between single-codebook quantization and motion statistics: five DCT coefficients capture 93% of joint-position energy but only 37% of joint-velocity energy, which can bias quantization toward pose statistics and under-represent high-frequency velocity components. A second challenge lies in adapting a standard autoregressive model to effectively model high-frequency physical signals in motion sequences. Therefore, we propose DSFT, a dual-stream frequency tokenizer that separates motion into Base and physical streams and compresses them independently with DCT truncation and BPE. Furthermore, we present MotionVLA, a Qwen3.5-based model that arranges Base and physical tokens in a unified sequence, where Phys tokens are predicted after Base tokens. Experiments on HumanML3D and MBench show that, despite using a lightweight 2B backbone, MotionVLA reduces the Diversity gap to real data by over 50% on HumanML3D and improves Motion-Condition Consistency by 3.8% on MBench, supporting frequency-aware dual-stream decoupling as an effective formulation for autoregressive motion generation. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/MotionVLA. Website: https://aigeeksgroup.github.io/MotionVLA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DSFT双流频率分词器和基于Qwen3.5的MotionVLA模型，通过将运动信号解耦为低频姿态（Base）与高频物理动力学（Phys）两路独立建模，显著提升生成运动的真实性与条件一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用单一码本对运动进行量化，无法适配运动中低频姿态语义与高频物理动态在统计特性上的差异，导致高频速度信息表征不足；同时标准自回归模型难以有效建模高频率物理信号。
AI.method: 提出DSFT双流频率分词器：利用DCT截断分离Base流（保留低频姿态能量）和Phys流（聚焦高频速度能量），并分别用BPE编码；构建MotionVLA模型（基于Qwen3.5），将Base与Phys token按序拼接，Phys token在Base token之后预测。
AI.result: 在HumanML3D上多样性差距降低超50%，在MBench上运动-条件一致性提升3.8%；仅用2B轻量骨干网络即达优效。
AI.conclusion: 频率感知的双流解耦是自回归运动生成的有效范式，能更好兼顾姿态语义与物理真实性。

title: FinBalance: A Multi-Document Accounting Reconciliation Benchmark
comment: 18 pages, 12 figures. Code and data: https://github.com/Devansh1105/finbalance
summary: Existing financial-NLP benchmarks mostly evaluate prepared artifacts such as filings, tables, or extracted values. Real accounting begins earlier: source documents must be reconciled into cited journal entries, aggregated into a balance sheet, and checked for contradictions. We introduce FinBalance, a multi-document accounting reconciliation benchmark built from source-document bundles across eight industries, three period types, and five difficulty levels. Human-authored business scenarios, accounting policies, tax/FX treatments, document schemas, distractors, and inconsistency templates are composed by a deterministic generator whose ledger produces journal entries,balance sheets, and 23 inconsistency-code labels. On a 710-record evaluation split, six contemporary LLMs reach at most 46% exact final-balance-sheet accuracy. Four models show a 26-41 pp gap between BS_exact, the model's reported balance sheet, and BS_recon, the balance sheet obtained by replaying its entries through our ledger. Models often recover numerically plausible entries but fail to bind them to supporting documents and aggregate them consistently. Citation-pressure prompting barely changes document-linking errors, while ledger-feedback ablations substantially improve reported balance sheets and expose inconsistency-detection trade-offs. Expert finance reviewers validate the benchmark design and labels.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FinBalance，一个用于多文档会计对账的基准数据集，旨在评估大语言模型在真实会计流程中的表现，包括从源文档到日记账、资产负债表的生成与一致性检查。实验表明现有LLM在此任务上表现不佳，尤其在文档引用和数值聚合一致性方面存在显著缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有金融NLP基准多聚焦于已处理的结构化数据（如财报、表格），而真实会计始于源文档对账，需生成日记账、汇总资产负债表并检测矛盾，缺乏对此端到端流程的评估基准。
AI.method: 设计了一个确定性生成器，构建包含8个行业、3种期间类型、5个难度级别的源文档包；集成人工编写的商业场景、会计政策、税务/汇率处理规则、文档模式、干扰项及不一致模板；生成日记账、资产负债表及23类不一致标签；通过710条样本评估6个主流LLM，并引入引用压力提示与账簿反馈消融分析。
AI.result: 六个当代LLM在最终资产负债表精确匹配率上最高仅46%；四个模型在BS_exact与BS_recon之间存在26–41个百分点差距；模型常生成数值合理但无法正确绑定源文档或一致聚合；引用压力提示对文档链接错误改善甚微，而账簿反馈显著提升报告资产负债表质量，同时揭示不一致检测的权衡。
AI.conclusion: FinBalance揭示了当前LLM在真实会计推理中关键能力（如文档溯源、逻辑聚合、一致性验证）的严重不足；强调需结合领域知识（如会计准则、账簿机制）设计评估与训练方法，而非仅依赖通用语言建模。

title: Rhythm of the Deep: A Computational-Linguistic Test of Duality of Patterning in Sperm Whale Codas
summary: Human language has often been described as combining structure at two levels: lower-level units combine into larger units, which then combine into larger sequences. We test for this design feature, duality of patterning, in sperm whale codas using 1,483 codas from the Dominica Sperm Whale Project. Because acoustic similarity can imitate symbolic structure, we treat the problem as computational-linguistic structure discovery from continuous audio rather than as a direct claim about language or meaning. We use a consensus of frozen audio encoders, held-out structural tests, per-statistic nulls, and acoustic-null recoverability gates. The evidence supports a narrow two-tier architecture. At the lower tier, clicks compose into codas not by a stable ordered rule, but by which clicks are present together with their inter-click rhythm. At the upper tier, coda tokens show bout-level sequential dependence, with an NSB second-order transfer-entropy lift of 0.132 bits (p = 0.002). Under tempo scaling, encoder-derived click identity is strongly rate-bound, while coda identity remains substantially more stable, yielding a measurable abstraction gradient across the click-to-coda step. Rhythm-only baselines recover substantial lower-tier structure but fail to reproduce the upper-tier sequential-dependence signal. We do not claim language, semantics, perception, or human-like phonemes. Instead, we report representation-level evidence for a duality-of-patterning-like architecture whose lower tier is rhythmic rather than segmental, and provide a portable null-controlled framework for testing combinatorial structure in induced acoustic token systems.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析多米尼克抹香鲸项目中的1483个抹香鲸咔哒声（codas），利用冻结音频编码器共识、结构化检验、单统计量零假设及声学零假设可恢复性门控等方法，发现其存在一种双层结构：底层由节奏而非音段构成，高层则表现出序列依赖性；研究未声称其为语言，而是提供了类似双重模式结构的表征级证据，并提出了一套可迁移的、受零假设控制的组合结构检验框架。
AI.motivation: 检验抹香鲸咔哒声中是否存在人类语言所具有的‘双重模式’（duality of patterning）结构特征，即低层单元组合成高层单元的两层结构设计，但避免对语言、语义或感知做直接断言。
AI.method: 采用冻结音频编码器共识、预留结构测试、逐统计量零假设检验、声学零假设可恢复性门控；使用NSB二阶转移熵量化序列依赖性，并进行节律-速率分离分析以评估抽象梯度。
AI.result: 支持窄幅双层架构：底层由点击（clicks）依共现与节奏组合为咔哒声（codas），非固定顺序规则；高层咔哒声在发声组（bout）内存在显著序列依赖性（转移熵提升0.132 bits，p=0.002）；咔哒声身份比点击身份在节奏缩放下更稳定，呈现可测量的抽象梯度；仅节奏基线能复现底层结构，但无法复现高层序列依赖信号。
AI.conclusion: 抹香鲸咔哒声系统展现出类双重模式的表征层级结构，其底层为节奏性而非音段性；该研究提供了一种零假设可控、适用于各类诱导声学符号系统的组合结构分析框架。

title: MoECa: Aligning Feature Reuse with Expert Decomposition in Diffusion Transformers
summary: Diffusion Transformers with Mixture-of-Experts (DiT-MoE) improve model capacity under sparse activation, but diffusion inference is still bottlenecked by redundant computation across timesteps. Existing caching methods mainly operate at the token level, which becomes suboptimal in DiT-MoE because each token update is internally decomposed into multiple routed expert branches. Our analysis shows that cross-timestep redundancy in DiT-MoE is better characterized at the expert-branch level than at the whole-token level. Based on this observation, we propose MoECa, a fine-grained caching framework that performs branch-level feature reuse across timesteps. MoECa further introduces expert-aware adaptive control and synchronized cache updates across MoE and attention paths to maintain stable intermediate states. Experiments on multiple DiT-MoE models show that MoECa consistently achieves a better speed-quality trade-off than prior caching methods, with up to 2.83$\times$ inference speedup and minimal quality degradation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MoECa，一种针对扩散Transformer中混合专家（DiT-MoE）模型的细粒度缓存框架，通过在专家分支级别而非token级别进行特征重用，结合专家感知自适应控制与同步缓存更新机制，显著提升推理速度并保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有缓存方法在DiT-MoE中效果不佳，因其按token级缓存，而DiT-MoE中每个token更新由多个路由专家分支组成，跨时间步冗余更适于在专家分支级建模。
AI.method: 提出MoECa框架，实现专家分支级别的跨时间步特征复用；引入专家感知的自适应控制机制；设计MoE路径与注意力路径间的同步缓存更新策略以稳定中间状态。
AI.result: 在多个DiT-MoE模型上验证，MoECa相较先前缓存方法取得更优的速度-质量权衡，最高达2.83×推理加速，且图像质量损失极小。
AI.conclusion: 专家分支级缓存是提升DiT-MoE推理效率的关键新范式，MoECa为高效扩散生成提供了可扩展、稳定的缓存解决方案。

title: Robots that Collaborate: Sequential Asymmetric Imitation for Learning Coupled Robot Policies
summary: Collaborative mobile manipulation requires robots to coordinate with a partially observed partner while physically interacting through shared objects. This is difficult because failures often arise not from poor local skills, but from mistimed waiting, yielding, pulling, releasing, or repositioning. We study this problem with two bimanual mobile manipulators coupled through rigid and deformable objects. We propose Sequential Asymmetric Imitation (SAI), a single-teleoperator curriculum for learning coupled multi-robot behaviors without synchronized dual-operator demonstrations or explicit inter-robot communication. SAI trains Robot A from unilateral demonstrations with a compliant human partner, trains Robot B against the deployed Robot A policy, and then refines Robot A using sparse interventions near coordination failures. This staged process exposes the policies to increasingly realistic partner behaviors, including delay, phase mismatch,insufficient yielding, and interaction conflict. Across real-world dual-robot manipulation tasks, SAI improves task success, phase synchronization, and partner-contingent yielding over independent imitation and curriculum-ablation baselines. These results suggest that physically coupled collaboration can be learned through the structure of the imitation curriculum, rather than through synchronized multi-operator demonstrations or explicit coordination mechanisms.Project page:http://cyc0429.github.io/sai-project-page/

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sequential Asymmetric Imitation（SAI）方法，通过单操作员分阶段模仿训练双机器人协同操作，无需同步双操作员示范或显式通信，显著提升任务成功率与协作协调性。
AI.motivation: 协作式移动操作中，失败常源于时机不当（如等待、让行、拉拽等），而非局部技能不足；且真实场景中伙伴状态部分可观测、物理耦合复杂（刚性/柔性物体）。
AI.method: Sequential Asymmetric Imitation（SAI）：分三阶段——1）用人类柔顺配合示范训练Robot A；2）用已部署的Robot A策略作为对手训练Robot B；3）在协作失败点附近对Robot A进行稀疏人工干预微调。
AI.result: 在真实双机器人操作任务中，SAI相比独立模仿和消融基线，在任务成功率、相位同步性、伙伴依赖型让行动作等方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 物理耦合的协作行为可通过模仿学习的课程设计结构习得，无需同步多操作员示范或显式协调机制。

title: HiRo: A Compact Four-Directional Hierarchical Reservoir Token-Mixer for Efficient Image Classification
summary: Recent image classification models must balance local feature modeling, cross-window interaction, and parameter efficiency. Many high-performing architectures rely on fully trainable token-mixers, which improve representation learning but increase parameter count, optimization complexity and computational cost. We propose a parameter-efficient image classification model called HiRo that integrates shifted-window partitioning with multi-directional hierarchical reservoir computing. Images are divided into non-overlapping patches (treated as tokens), linearly projected, normalized, and enriched with 2D sinusoidal positional encodings, then processed within local windows. Inside each window, tokens are scanned in four directions and passed through a two-stage slice-and-mix reservoir module. In the first stage, directional sequences are split into contiguous slices, each processed by its own fixed reservoir with a trainable closed-loop readout. The resulting slice outputs are summarized using the start, end, and mean representations, and then mixed by a second-stage fixed reservoir for each direction. The mixed slice representations are expanded back to the token level and fused with the first-stage outputs, after which the four directional outputs are realigned and averaged. Consecutive blocks alternate between regular and shifted windows to enable cross-window interaction, followed by layer normalization, a residual feed-forward network, and global pooling for classification. This design combines regular and shifted window partitioning with hierarchical multi-directional reservoirs to make an efficient local-to-cross-window token-mixing framework for image classification. Despite using under 1M trainable parameters and significantly lower memory and time than transformer-style baselines, HiRo also achieves 99.46%, 85.57%, and 59.10% accuracy on MNIST, CIFAR-10, and CIFAR-100, respectively.

AI.tldr: HiRo是一种参数高效的图像分类模型，结合了移位窗口划分和多方向分层储备池计算，在保持低参数量（<1M）的同时，在MNIST、CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上取得优异准确率。
AI.motivation: 解决现有高性能图像分类模型在局部特征建模、跨窗口交互与参数效率之间难以兼顾的问题，尤其是全可训练token-mixer带来的高参数量、优化复杂度和计算开销。
AI.method: 提出HiRo模型：将图像划分为非重叠patch并添加2D正弦位置编码；在常规/移位窗口内，对token沿四个方向扫描，经两级固定储备池（第一级按方向切片处理+可训练读出，第二级混合切片表示）处理；再融合、对齐、平均，并通过残差FFN和全局池化完成分类。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100上分别达到99.46%、85.57%、59.10%准确率，参数量低于1M，内存与时间开销显著低于Transformer基线。
AI.conclusion: HiRo通过将移位窗口划分与多方向分层储备池相结合，构建了一种高效、轻量且具备跨窗口交互能力的局部token混合框架，为参数受限场景下的图像分类提供了新思路。

title: SAG: SQL-Retrieval Augmented Generation with Query-Time Dynamic Hyperedges
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers an effective approach for large language models to access external knowledge. However, existing methods rely on dense similarity retrieval and face inherent limitations in handling structured constraints and multi-hop reasoning. Incorporating knowledge graphs partially alleviates these issues, but at the cost of semantic fragmentation, high maintenance overhead, and difficult incremental updates. This paper introduces SAG (SQLRetrieval Augmented Generation), a structured architecture for retrieval and agent systems. Instead of pre-building a global static graph, SAG converts each chunk into one semantically complete event and a set of indexing entities, then uses SQL join queries to dynamically link events that share entities into local hyperedges,constructing, at query time, a dynamically instantiated local index structure. This design avoids the need for global graph rebuilding and ongoing maintenance; the system naturally supports incremental writes, concurrent processing, and continuous scaling through its reliance on standard database infrastructure. Across HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHop, and MuSiQue, three standard multi-hop benchmarks,SAG achieves the best results on 8 out of 9 Recall@K metrics, reaching 80.0% Recall@5 on MuSiQue, the benchmark with the highest multi-hop reasoning demands.SAG has also been deployed at a production scale of hundreds of millions of data items, with online retrieval latency kept within seconds. Project site and code are available at https://github.com/Zleap-AI/SAG-Benchmark.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAG（SQL检索增强生成）框架，通过将文本块转换为语义完整事件和索引实体，并利用SQL连接动态构建局部超边索引结构，解决RAG在结构化约束与多跳推理上的局限，支持增量更新、并发处理与线性扩展，在多个多跳问答基准上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法依赖稠密相似性检索，难以处理结构化约束和多跳推理；知识图谱虽部分缓解问题，但存在语义碎片化、维护开销高、增量更新困难等问题。
AI.method: SAG将每个文本块建模为一个语义完整的事件及一组索引实体，运行时通过SQL JOIN动态链接共享实体的事件，形成局部超边结构，构建动态实例化的本地索引，依托标准数据库基础设施实现增量写入与并发处理。
AI.result: 在HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHop和MuSiQue三个多跳基准上，SAG在9项Recall@K指标中取得8项最优，其中MuSiQue上Recall@5达80.0%；已在生产环境部署超亿级数据，线上检索延迟控制在秒级。
AI.conclusion: SAG通过结构化、数据库原生的动态索引机制，兼顾语义完整性与工程可扩展性，为RAG提供了更鲁棒、可维护、易扩展的多跳推理新范式。

title: RecourseBench: A Modular Framework for Reproducible Algorithmic Recourse Evaluation
summary: Algorithmic recourse methods provide counterfactual explanations that inform individuals of the actions required to overturn an unfavorable model decision. Despite rapid methodological progress, principled comparison remains elusive; existing frameworks are often difficult to extend and lack both interoperability and systematic verification that integrated methods faithfully reproduce their originally reported results. We introduce \emph{RecourseBench}, a unified evaluation framework built around three commitments namely, modularity, reproducibility, and interactivity. The framework decomposes the pipeline into five fully decoupled layers -- Data, Preprocessing, Model, Recourse Method, and Evaluation -- governed by abstract interfaces and a dynamic registry. To address the reproducibility gap in prior benchmarks, we introduce a four-tier classification system in which every integrated method is validated by an automated test suite against its originally reported results. We further provide an interactive web interface for flexible, configuration-driven comparison across methods, datasets, and model architectures. Our framework currently integrates 28 state-of-the-art recourse methods and, to our knowledge, constitutes the first recourse benchmark to explicitly enforce method-level reproducibility through automated, quantitative testing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了RecourseBench，一个模块化、可复现且交互式的反事实解释（algorithmic recourse）评估框架，旨在解决现有方法比较困难、缺乏互操作性和结果验证不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有算法反事实解释方法缺乏统一、可扩展、可互操作且可验证的评估框架，导致方法间难以公平比较和结果复现。
AI.method: 提出RecourseBench框架，包含五个解耦层（数据、预处理、模型、反事实方法、评估），采用抽象接口与动态注册机制；引入四层分类与自动化测试套件，确保集成方法严格复现原论文结果；并提供交互式Web界面支持配置化对比。
AI.result: 集成了28种前沿反事实方法，是首个通过自动化定量测试显式保障方法级可复现性的反事实基准框架。
AI.conclusion: RecourseBench为反事实解释研究提供了标准化、可验证和易用的评估基础设施，推动该领域向更严谨、可比和可复现的方向发展。

title: Re-feeding Is Not Replaying: Measuring Replay Noise in Counterfactual Token-Credit Estimation
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures. Code, per-pivot data, logs, and registration: https://github.com/thaw-ai/thaw (benchmarks/, paper/refeed-drift/)
summary: Per-token counterfactual credit estimation asks which token in a language-model rollout caused the final answer to be right or wrong: cut the transcript at a pivot, substitute an alternative token, replay continuations, and compare outcomes. Published methods re-feed the transcript prefix as a fresh prompt, assuming this reproduces the state the model passed through during generation. We measure what that assumption costs on a stock inference engine, with a three-pass design: continuations resumed from the verified decode-time KV state, an identical second exact pass (a replica noise floor), and a re-feed pass. Across six configurations and three models (including a GRPO-trained checkpoint), at low-margin decision tokens, re-feeding changes the credit estimate at rates 14-28 percentage points above the replica floor (7-21pp under a treatment-independent conditioning; problem-clustered t = 2.9-6.4). Most changes are zero-boundary crossings of the quantized estimator rather than polarity reversals, and the perturbation is consistent with mean-zero, so averaged quantities are largely safe; but selection is not: a critical-token set chosen by thresholding $|\hat{A}_t|$ under re-feed overlaps the exact-resume selection at Jaccard 0.34-0.90, versus a 0.63-0.96 replica ceiling. A causal confirmation closes the loop: under vLLM's batch-invariant kernels all three passes are identical on every measured channel, with both disagreement rates exactly zero. Replica passes themselves disagree on 9-23% of eligible estimates: single-sample credit measurements at decision tokens are unreliable under any replay. Settings were fixed in advance; exact-pass cache hits in the second campaign are instrumented (100% hit rate, 3,434 pivots); total compute was under 10 USD. We recommend that counterfactual credit studies resume decoder state or use batch-invariant kernels, and report a replica floor.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了语言模型中逐词反事实信用估计的准确性，发现重新输入前缀（re-feed）会导致显著误差，建议使用解码器状态恢复或批处理不变核，并报告复制基线。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设重新输入前缀能复现模型生成时的状态，但该假设的实际代价未知，需量化其对信用估计的影响。
AI.method: 采用三通设计：从解码时验证的KV状态恢复续写、完全相同的第二次精确通路（复制噪声基线）、以及重新输入前缀的通路；在多个模型和配置下测量差异，并通过vLLM的批处理不变核进行因果验证。
AI.result: 重喂前缀导致信用估计错误率比复制基线高14–28个百分点；关键token选择的Jaccard相似度仅为0.34–0.90，远低于复制上限0.63–0.96；复制通路自身在9–23%的可估测点上也存在分歧。
AI.conclusion: 逐词反事实信用估计中，重喂前缀引入不可忽略偏差，尤其影响关键token识别；应优先采用解码器状态恢复或批处理不变推理内核，并始终报告复制基线以评估可靠性。

title: HATS: A Human-Agent Teleoperation System for Multi-Arm Data Collection
summary: Many real-world manipulation scenarios, such as handling complex collaborative tasks and dealing with large workspaces, require coordination of more than two robotic arms. Consequently, an effective multi-arm teleoperation system is required to collect demonstrations for training coordinated multi-arm manipulation policies. However, existing teleoperation frameworks mainly focus on single-operator or multi-operator setups, facing a practical trade-off between the cognitive load placed on a single operator and the coordination cost incurred by multiple operators. To address this problem, we introduce HATS, a human-agent teleoperation system that enables a single human operator, assisted by an MLLM-based agent, to collect data for multi-arm manipulation tasks. Our system decouples the control space: two primary arms are directly teleoperated by the human, while two assistive arms are controlled by a training-free agent that handles sub-tasks. In addition, the human operator can use voice commands to prevent collisions and correct assistive arm behaviors during execution. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that HATS achieves data collection efficiency and success rates comparable to expert dual-human teams. Moreover, downstream policy evaluations demonstrate the efficacy and quality of the data collected through HATS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HATS系统，通过单个人类操作员与基于MLLM的智能体协作，实现多机械臂协同操作的数据收集，显著降低认知负担并提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有遥操作框架在单操作员或多操作员设置中面临认知负荷与协调成本之间的权衡，难以高效支持多机械臂协同任务的数据收集。
AI.method: HATS系统将控制空间解耦：人类直接遥操作两个主臂，基于MLLM的免训练智能体控制两个辅助臂执行子任务；人类可通过语音命令实时干预以避免碰撞和纠正行为。
AI.result: 实验表明HATS在数据收集效率和成功率上媲美双人专家团队，下游策略训练验证了所收集数据的有效性与高质量。
AI.conclusion: HATS为多臂协同操作提供了一种高效、低负担的遥操作范式，推动了复杂机器人任务的数据驱动学习。

title: RefGC-SR$^2$: Reference-guided Generated Content Super-Resolution and Refinement
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. The last two authors are co-corresponding authors. Please visit our project page at https://cmlab-korea.github.io/RefGC-SR2/
summary: Reference-guided generation (e.g., object compositing, customization) has progressed rapidly, yet current pipelines share a fundamental limitation: the object-centric high-resolution reference image (HRRI) provided by users is downsampled to a fixed low-resolution (LR) before being fed into the model, so the fine-grained details are discarded before the output is even produced. In addition, the generation step then introduces its own artifacts (e.g., identity distortion) on top of this loss. Existing reference-guided generated content refinement (RefGCR) methods can correct some of these artifacts but still operate in the LR domain; reference-guided super-resolution (RefSR) methods recover resolution but assume natural-image degradations and ignore the artifact distribution of generative pipelines. To address both gaps in a single formulation, we introduce a new task: reference-guided generated content super-resolution-refinement (RefGC-SR$^2$), where the original HRRI is reused at the post-processing stage to recover lost details, refine generative artifacts, and upscale the output simultaneously. We construct the first real-world triplet data generation pipeline for this RefGC-SR$^2$ task, training a diptych-conditioned generator to synthesize paired low-quality anchors that public pretrained models cannot provide. We further present a frequency-aware diffusion transformer model for RefGC-SR$^2$ that selectively injects fine details from the HRRI while removing generative artifacts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our RefGC-SR$^2$ model successfully (i) refines the object identity faithfully with respect to the reference, and (ii) recovers high-resolution details, so that the final result is significantly higher quality and practically more usable compared to existing RefGCR and RefSR baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新任务RefGC-SR²，即参考引导的生成内容超分辨率-精细化，旨在同时恢复高分辨率细节、修正生成伪影并提升输出分辨率；为此构建了首个真实三元组数据生成流程，并设计了频率感知扩散Transformer模型，在多个指标上显著优于现有RefGCR和RefSR方法。
AI.motivation: 现有参考引导生成方法在输入阶段即下采样高分辨率参考图，导致细节丢失，且生成过程引入身份失真等伪影；而现有细化（RefGCR）和超分（RefSR）方法分别局限于低分辨率域或假设自然退化，无法协同解决该问题。
AI.method: 提出RefGC-SR²新任务，构建真实三元组（HRRI, 低质锚图, 高质目标）数据生成管线；训练双条件（diptych-conditioned）生成器合成训练锚图；设计频率感知扩散Transformer模型，在后处理中联合利用HRRI进行细节注入与伪影去除。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提RefGC-SR²模型能忠实保持对象身份并恢复高分辨率细节，最终输出质量显著优于RefGCR和RefSR基线，实用性更强。
AI.conclusion: RefGC-SR²统一解决了参考引导生成中细节丢失与伪影共存的核心问题，为高质量可控图像生成提供了新范式。

title: Formalize Once, Edit the Rest: Efficient Lean-Based Answer Selection for Math Reasoning
comment: 15 pages, 1 figure. Code available at https://github.com/ucr-rai/base-and-edit
summary: With large language models (LLMs) increasingly applied to mathematical reasoning, formal proof assistants such as Lean can be leveraged to verify reasoning outputs with machine-checkable rigor, enabling use cases such as answer selection in test-time scaling with K sampled candidate answers. However, employing Lean requires that LLM outputs, originally in natural language, first be formalized. Existing Lean-based answer-selection work uses an autoformalization model to generate a formal statement in Lean for each candidate answer independently, incurring a significant computational cost. We propose BASE, a base-and-edit pipeline that formalizes a single base candidate per problem and derives the remaining K-1 statements by editing the answer expression in place. To facilitate this, we train a rewriter model LEANSCRIBE to localize the answer in the base formalization and generate a reusable edit function for the other K-1 candidates. BASE simultaneously improves selection accuracy and reduces formalization cost - a Pareto improvement that holds on all 12 (dataset, solver) configurations across four benchmarks and three solvers, cutting autoformalizer calls by about 5x at K=8, with the reduction expected to become larger as K grows. Code is available at https://github.com/ucr-rai/base-and-edit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BASE方法，通过base-and-edit流程减少LLM生成答案在Lean中形式化的计算开销：先对一个基础答案形式化，再用LEANSCRIBE重写模型生成编辑函数复用于其余K-1个候选答案，实现准确率提升与成本降低的Pareto改进。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Lean的答案选择方法需对每个候选答案独立进行自动形式化，计算开销大；亟需一种更高效的形式化策略以支持大规模测试时扩展（test-time scaling）。
AI.method: 提出BASE（base-and-edit）流程：1）选取一个基础候选答案进行完整形式化；2）训练专用重写模型LEANSCRIBE，定位基础形式化中的答案表达式并生成可复用的编辑函数；3）用该函数直接修改基础形式化，生成其余K-1个候选的形式化表述。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集、三种求解器共12种配置下均实现选择准确率提升与形式化成本下降（K=8时自动形式化调用减少约5倍），且优势随K增大而增强。
AI.conclusion: BASE是一种高效、可扩展的自动形式化范式，显著降低Lean验证所需的计算负担，同时提升答案选择性能，为LLM数学推理与形式验证结合提供了实用新路径。

title: Know Your Limits : On the Faithfulness of LLMs as Solvers and Autoformalizers in Legal Reasoning
comment: 10 pages, submitted to COLM 2026 (under review, average score of 6.25 across 4 reviewers) and accepted by the AI4Law workshop at ICML. This is the version where we already addressed most of the reviews from the COLM reviewers
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong performance on reasoning tasks, but whether this reflects faithful logical inference or heuristic approximation remains unclear. We study this question in legal entailment by comparing three paradigms, including pure LLM classification, LLM-based Formal Reasoning, and solver-based Formal Reasoning using the Z3 SMT solver, on a re-annotated subset of ContractNLI across five LLMs. Our re-annotation reveals a systematic and measurable gap between pragmatic legal interpretation and strict formal entailment, where a substantial proportion of legally sound inferences are not formally grounded without additional unstated assumptions. While introducing formal structure improves accuracy, with LLM-based Formal Reasoning achieving the highest benchmark performance, we show that this gain does not imply faithful reasoning. We identify three recurring failure modes: scope laundering, where LLMs report solver-inconsistent classifications without executing the underlying formal reasoning, producing conclusions that appear logically grounded but are not; implicit constraint blindness, where LLMs overlook logical constraints present in formal representations; and program synthesis failures, where LLMs generate incorrect Z3 code despite structured prompting. Critically, scope laundering persists across all models, raising serious concerns about the faithfulness of LLM-based formal reasoning as a proxy for symbolic execution. These results reveal a fundamental gap between benchmark accuracy and logical faithfulness.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在法律蕴含任务上对比纯LLM分类、基于LLM的形式推理和基于Z3求解器的形式推理，揭示了LLM在推理中存在表面准确但逻辑不忠实的问题，识别出三种典型失败模式，指出当前基准准确率不能反映真实逻辑忠实性。
AI.motivation: 探究大语言模型在推理任务中的表现是否源于忠实的逻辑推理，还是仅依赖启发式近似，特别是在法律蕴含这一需严格逻辑的领域。
AI.method: 在ContractNLI数据集的重标注子集上，对比三种范式（纯LLM分类、LLM-based Formal Reasoning、solver-based Formal Reasoning）在五个LLM上的表现，并系统分析错误模式。
AI.result: 发现法律实践解释与形式蕴含之间存在系统性差距；LLM-based Formal Reasoning虽性能最高，但存在scope laundering、implicit constraint blindness和program synthesis failures三类不忠实推理现象；scope laundering在所有模型中普遍存在。
AI.conclusion: 基准准确率提升并不等价于逻辑忠实性增强，LLM在形式化推理中常产生看似合理实则未经验证的结论，暴露了其作为符号执行代理的根本局限性。

title: Surprise-Guided MergeSort: Budget-Efficient Human-in-the-Loop Ranking via Adaptive Comparison Scheduling
summary: Pairwise comparison is the gold standard for subjective ranking tasks; however, exhaustive annotation requires a massive number of human comparisons ($O(n^2)$). While sorting-based methods have reduced this burden to $O(n\log n)$, they still require expensive human judgment for every single comparison. To further improve annotation efficiency, we propose leveraging a Vision-Language Model (VLM) not as an annotator replacement, but as a \emph{question prioritizer} to identify which comparisons genuinely require human judgment. The proposed \textbf{Surprise-Guided MergeSort (SGS)} framework achieves this through three integrated components: (1) a bottom-up MergeSort scheduler that structures comparisons and exploits transitivity, (2) a composite Surprise Scorer -- combining position-bias-cancelled VLM confidence, Elo gap, and vote entropy -- to quantify comparison ambiguity, and (3) an adaptive budget allocator that routes high-surprise pairs to humans while automating low-surprise pairs via transitivity inference. Validation was conducted on six diverse benchmarks spanning text similarity (STS-B, BIOSSES, SICKR-STS) and image quality assessment (KonIQ-10k, TID2013, LIVE Challenge). SGS effectively identified and skipped up to 535 non-informative comparisons per session. Consequently, it achieved Kendall's $τ{\times}100$ improvements of $+6$ to $+12$ over Active Elo under the same total budget. These results demonstrate that combining VLM-guided surprise metrics with algorithmic sorting provides a generally consistent accuracy-efficiency trade-off across diverse domains.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Surprise-Guided MergeSort（SGS）框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）作为‘问题优先级排序器’，识别哪些成对比较真正需要人工判断，从而在保持排序准确性的同时显著减少人工标注量。
AI.motivation: 成对比较虽是主观排序任务的金标准，但穷举式标注成本过高（O(n²)）；现有排序方法虽将复杂度降至O(n log n)，但仍需对每次比较进行人工判断。亟需进一步提升标注效率。
AI.method: 提出SGS框架，包含三部分：(1) 自底向上的MergeSort调度器，利用传递性结构化比较；(2) 复合‘惊奇度评分器’，融合消除位置偏差的VLM置信度、Elo分差与投票熵；(3) 自适应预算分配器，将高惊奇度对交由人工，低惊奇度对通过传递性自动推断。
AI.result: 在6个跨模态基准（文本相似度与图像质量评估）上验证，SGS每轮会跳过最多535个非信息性比较；在相同总预算下，Kendall’s τ×100比Active Elo提升+6至+12。
AI.conclusion: 将VLM引导的惊奇度度量与算法排序结合，可在多领域实现一致且优越的精度-效率权衡。

title: APEX: Adaptive Policy Execution for Precise Manipulation
summary: Modern imitation learning methods, including visuomotor and Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies, typically output high-level action references that are executed by low-level controllers. However, the absence of higher-order reference signals, together with the policy's lack of awareness of the underlying low-level control dynamics during training, inevitably induces an execution gap. As a result, realized actions deviate systematically from policy-commanded ones, with a critical impact on precision-sensitive manipulation. Prior work either modifies the policy architecture or the low-level controller, both requiring intrusive changes to the pretrained policy or packaged controller. This raises a natural question: when the policy and controller are both treated as inaccessible black boxes, can we bridge the execution gap? We propose Adaptive Policy Execution (APEX), a plug-and-play framework inserted between the policy and the controller that reconstructs a dynamically feasible reference from policy outputs and adapts at test-time according to low-level state feedback, with a provable convergence guarantee. Extensive empirical studies show that APEX reduces controller-induced tracking error by 41.2% on demonstration replay and improves manipulation success by 4.8--25.8 percentage points across four visuomotor and VLA policy classes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为APEX的即插即用框架，用于在不可修改的预训练策略与底层控制器之间弥合执行差距，通过动态重构可行参考信号并在测试时根据底层状态反馈自适应调整，显著提升操作精度。
AI.motivation: 现有模仿学习方法因策略缺乏对底层控制动力学的认知，导致策略输出与实际执行间存在系统性偏差，影响高精度操作；而现有解决方案需修改策略或控制器，不适用于黑箱场景。
AI.method: 提出APEX框架，作为策略与控制器之间的中间层，利用策略输出重构动态可行的动作参考，并基于低层状态反馈进行测试时自适应调整，具备可证明的收敛性保证。
AI.result: 实验表明，APEX在演示回放中将控制器引起的跟踪误差降低41.2%，并在四类视觉运动及视觉-语言-动作策略上将操作成功率提升4.8–25.8个百分点。
AI.conclusion: APEX是一种无需修改预训练策略或封装控制器的通用、即插即用解决方案，有效弥合执行差距，显著提升机器人精细操作性能。

title: DLWM: Diverse Latent World Models for Efficient Multimodal Reasoning
comment: Preprint. 9 pages main text, 15 pages total including appendix, 2 figures
summary: Reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have improved considerably in recent years. Existing approaches typically rely on explicit chain-of-thought or continuous latent-space trajectories to enhance multi-step reasoning. However, these methods generally assume that an input admits a single latent interpretation and unfold reasoning along a fixed path or under a uniform computation budget. In real-world multimodal settings, visual observations are often subject to occlusion, blur, viewpoint variation, or semantic ambiguity, giving rise to multiple plausible interpretations. A uniform reasoning strategy not only limits the model's ability to explore multiple hypotheses but also incurs high memory usage and rollout cost. We present DLWM (Diverse Latent World Models), a multimodal reasoning framework that combines latent-space reasoning with reinforcement learning. First, we construct a set of diverse latent world hypotheses in continuous latent space, each capturing a different plausible interpretation of the visual input, and unfold latent reasoning independently on each hypothesis. An orthogonality-based diversity regularizer explicitly prevents hypothesis collapse. Second, we formulate the latent reasoning process as a resource-constrained sequential decision problem and introduce a resource-aware reinforcement learning policy that adaptively allocates computation across hypotheses, dynamically deciding whether to expand, terminate, or merge reasoning paths, thereby substantially reducing memory footprint and improving rollout efficiency. Experiments on multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that DLWM outperforms existing methods by 2-5 points in accuracy while reducing memory usage by 24%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DLWM框架，通过构建多样化的潜在世界假设并结合资源感知的强化学习策略，在多模态推理中实现更高效、准确的多假设推理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设输入只有一种潜在解释，采用固定推理路径或统一计算预算，难以应对现实多模态场景中因遮挡、模糊、视角变化或语义歧义导致的多种合理解释问题，限制了多假设探索能力并带来高内存与计算开销。
AI.method: 1）在连续潜在空间中构建一组正交性约束的多样化潜在世界假设，各自独立展开潜空间推理；2）将潜推理建模为资源受限的序贯决策问题，引入资源感知的强化学习策略，动态决定各假设路径的扩展、终止或合并。
AI.result: 在多个多模态推理基准上，DLWM比现有方法准确率提升2–5个百分点，同时内存使用减少24%。
AI.conclusion: DLWM通过显式建模多假设与自适应计算分配，显著提升了多模态推理的鲁棒性、效率与准确性，为复杂视觉场景下的灵活推理提供了新范式。

title: A Large-Scale Multi-Dimensional Empirical Study of LLMs for Conversation Summarization
summary: Despite the significant advancement of LLMs in conversation summarization, their evaluation remains limited by insufficient scenarios, input lengths, and sample sizes. Furthermore, existing benchmarks often omit frontier reasoning systems and efficient small models, or lack fine-grained, multi-dimensional assessments.
