To bridge these gaps, we propose OmniCSEval, a unified benchmark comprising 1,800 diverse conversations across six real-world scenarios, featuring context lengths ranging from 128 to 32k tokens. For fine-grained evaluation, we employ a bidirectional fact-checking framework that integrates key fact matching to assess completeness and conciseness, alongside summary fact verification to evaluate faithfulness. To ensure reliable assessment, we establish a human-LLM collaborative pipeline for key fact extraction and a multi-LLM consensus verifier for summary fact decomposition. Leveraging this framework, we evaluate 28 LLMs across four distinct categories grouped by reasoning capability and model scale. Our extensive empirical study reveals critical insights regarding the cross-scenario challenges current LLMs continue to face, the impacts of reasoning and scale, and the efficiency and adaptability of reasoning models. We also provide guidance for system selection in real-world deployments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniCSEval，一个涵盖1800个多样化对话、六种真实场景、上下文长度达32k token的统一评测基准；采用双向事实核查框架，结合人工-大模型协同关键事实提取与多大模型共识验证，对28个大模型进行细粒度、多维度评估，并揭示跨场景挑战、推理能力与模型规模影响等关键发现。
AI.motivation: 现有对话摘要评测存在场景不足、输入长度受限、样本量小、忽略前沿推理系统和高效小模型、缺乏细粒度多维评估等问题。
AI.method: 构建OmniCSEval基准（1800个对话、6类真实场景、128–32k token长度），设计双向事实核查框架（含关键事实匹配与摘要事实验证），建立人类-LLM协同关键事实提取流程及多LLM共识验证器，并在28个覆盖不同推理能力与规模的模型上开展系统评测。
AI.result: 揭示当前LLM在跨场景摘要中的核心挑战；量化推理能力与模型规模对性能的影响；验证高效推理模型的实用性与适应性；为实际部署提供选型建议。
AI.conclusion: OmniCSEval填补了对话摘要评测的多项空白，推动更全面、可靠、细粒度的大模型评估范式，强调推理能力与效率并重的模型发展路径。

title: Thinking with Visual Grounding
summary: Visual thinking should not only sound right; it should show its evidence. While recent vision-language models (VLMs) can produce natural-language reasoning traces, these traces often leave the supporting image regions implicit, making them hard to verify and difficult to supervise. We introduce visually grounded thinking, a reasoning process in which models interleave natural-language thoughts with explicit point or box groundings of the visual evidence used at each step. This lets the model express intermediate reasoning in language while grounding key objects in the image regions they refer to. To train this behavior, we construct a scalable synthesis pipeline that distills correct visual reasoning traces, extracts the visual objects required by the traces, grounds them with a SAM3-based agent, and derives aligned point and box supervision from the resulting masks. We further propose grounding-aware reinforcement learning, which combines answer correctness rewards with dense grounding rewards that score whether generated object references match the correct image evidence. Across two counting benchmarks and four spatial reasoning benchmarks, adding visually grounded thinking to Gemma3-4B-IT consistently improves performance over the original model and the non-grounded thinking baseline. On spatial reasoning, the visually grounded thinking 4B models match, and in some cases surpass, Gemma3-27B-IT from the same model family. Our analysis shows that point grounding is well suited to counting, while box grounding benefits most from explicit grounding rewards on spatial tasks. Overall, our results show that VLMs think better when their intermediate thoughts are tied to the image regions that make them true.

AI.tldr: 本文提出视觉 grounding 思维（visually grounded thinking），即在多模态推理过程中，模型交替生成自然语言推理步骤与对应图像区域（点或框）的显式 grounding，以增强可验证性与可监督性；通过基于 SAM3 的合成 pipeline 构建训练数据，并引入 grounding-aware 强化学习进行优化，在计数与空间推理任务上显著提升小模型性能，甚至媲美更大模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLMs）生成的语言推理链缺乏对支撑图像区域的显式标注，导致难以验证和监督，限制了推理可靠性与训练有效性。
AI.method: 提出视觉 grounding 思维范式，结合：（1）可扩展的合成 pipeline（利用 SAM3 提取并 grounding 推理所需视觉对象，生成点/框监督信号）；（2）grounding-aware 强化学习（联合答案正确性奖励与密集 grounding 匹配奖励）。
AI.result: 在两个计数和四个空间推理基准上，Gemma3-4B-IT 加入视觉 grounding 思维后持续超越原始模型及非 grounding 基线；其空间推理性能媲美甚至超过同家族的 Gemma3-27B-IT；点 grounding 更适于计数，框 grounding + 显式 grounding 奖励更利于空间任务。
AI.conclusion: 将中间语言推理步骤显式绑定到对应图像区域，能显著提升 VLM 的推理质量与泛化能力，证明‘可 grounding 的思维’是提升多模态推理可信度与性能的关键路径。

title: Conflict-Aware Federated Fine-Tuning of Large Language Models with Mixture-of-Experts
summary: The continuous scaling of large language models (LLMs) incurs prohibitive computational costs, making Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) a scalable alternative for efficient fine-tuning via sparse activation. While federated learning (FL) emerges as the paradigm for privacy-preserving collaborative optimization, integrating MoE into FL under data heterogeneity may trigger conflicting expert optimizations. Client-specific data distributions force same-indexed experts to optimize under inconsistent or even conflicting feature-label correlations. This mismatch induces destructive interference during aggregation, thus destabilizing the optimization trajectory and degrading model performance. To address this issue, we propose FC-MoE, a federated conflict-aware framework for MoE fine-tuning. It employs an importance aware weighting scheme to prioritize reliable local updates and utilizes gradient consensus projection to suppress conflicting updates, ensuring a stable global optimization path. Moreover, a local knowledge retention mechanism further preserves specialized client expertise by re-anchoring domain-specific residuals. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FC-MoE accelerates convergence and enhances both global and local model performance in non-IID federated environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FC-MoE框架，解决联邦学习中MoE模型因数据异构导致的专家冲突问题，通过重要性加权、梯度共识投影和本地知识保留机制提升收敛速度与模型性能。
AI.motivation: 在联邦学习中集成Mixture-of-Experts（MoE）模型时，客户端数据分布异构导致相同索引专家优化目标不一致甚至冲突，引发聚合时的破坏性干扰，损害训练稳定性与性能。
AI.method: 提出FC-MoE：1）重要性感知权重机制，筛选可靠本地更新；2）梯度共识投影，抑制冲突更新；3）本地知识保留机制，通过重锚定领域特异性残差保留客户端专有知识。
AI.result: 在非独立同分布（non-IID）联邦环境下，FC-MoE显著加快收敛速度，并提升全局与各客户端模型性能。
AI.conclusion: FC-MoE有效缓解了联邦MoE中的专家冲突问题，为隐私保护下的高效、稳定稀疏大模型协同微调提供了可行方案。

title: Agile Fall Recovery for Quadrotors with Bidirectional Thrust via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Autonomous fall recovery is a critical capability for quadrotors operating in real-world environments, where collisions or failures may leave the vehicle resting on the ground in an arbitrary attitude. This problem is challenging because recovery must be achieved under limited onboard sensing, in constrained free space, with ground contact, and in the presence of unknown disturbances. In this letter, we present an RL-based framework for autonomous fall recovery of a quadrotor from arbitrary ground attitudes to stable hover using only lightweight onboard sensors. To address severe partial observability and intermittent sensor invalidity, we train a recurrent policy within an asymmetric actor--critic architecture, leveraging an Incremental Nonlinear Dynamic Inversion (INDI) controller to track the policy output. Combined with high-fidelity simulations of motor response and optical flow, the overall training framework significantly reduces the sim-to-real gap. Simulation ablation studies validate the importance of the main design choices, while real-world experiments demonstrate zero-shot transfer and robust recovery under different initial attitudes, wind disturbances, and additional payloads. These results demonstrate that agile quadrotor fall recovery can be achieved without explicit state estimation using only limited and unreliable onboard sensing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的四旋翼自主倒地恢复框架，仅依赖轻量级机载传感器，无需显式状态估计即可实现在任意姿态下的地面恢复悬停。
AI.motivation: 四旋翼在真实环境中可能因碰撞或故障倒地，需在有限感知、受限空间、地面接触及未知扰动下完成自主恢复，传统方法难以应对严重部分可观测性和传感器间歇失效问题。
AI.method: 采用基于循环神经网络的非对称Actor-Critic强化学习架构训练策略，并结合增量非线性动态逆（INDI）控制器跟踪策略输出；通过高保真仿真（含电机响应与光流建模）缩小仿真到现实的差距。
AI.result: 仿真消融实验验证了关键设计选择的有效性；真实世界实验实现了零样本迁移，在不同初始姿态、风扰和额外负载下均表现出鲁棒恢复能力。
AI.conclusion: 仅用有限且不可靠的机载传感即可实现敏捷四旋翼的倒地自主恢复，无需显式状态估计。

title: GeoStream: Toward Precise Camera Controlled Streaming Video Generation
summary: Accurate interactive camera control is essential for video-based world models, but most existing approaches learn camera motion implicitly, leading to inaccurate control under out-of-distribution trajectories. Explicit geometric conditioning improves controllability, but existing methods are non-autoregressive and rely on a static 3D cache built from an initial frame, which becomes ineffective once the viewpoint moves beyond the original frustum. We propose GeoStream, a framework that enables precise metric-scale camera control in autoregressive streaming video generation. Our method maintains a self-refreshing 3D cache that is periodically updated online from the model's own outputs: we estimate depth from the most recently generated frame, unproject to 3D, and reproject into the target view to produce point reprojections as geometric conditioning for subsequent synthesis. By the same principle, the conditioning seen during training is also rendered from the student's own generated frames, yielding a fully on-policy distillation that naturally aligns the train and inference conditioning distributions. Unlike prior work that uses off-policy condition noising, our approach trains the model against the exact error distribution it encounters at inference, mitigating both standard autoregressive drift and the second-order geometric feedback loop that arises when the cache itself is derived from generated outputs. Quantitative and qualitative results show that our approach substantially improves camera controllability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeoStream框架，通过自刷新3D缓存和在线几何条件生成，实现自回归流式视频生成中的精确度量级相机控制，显著提升相机可控性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型中相机运动多为隐式学习，导致分布外轨迹下控制不准确；显式几何条件虽提升可控性，但依赖静态3D缓存，视角超出初始视锥后失效。
AI.method: 提出GeoStream：维护一个自刷新3D缓存，从最新生成帧估计深度、反投影至3D、重投影到目标视图以生成点重投影作为几何条件；训练时也使用模型自身生成帧渲染条件，实现全策略蒸馏。
AI.result: 定量与定性结果表明，该方法显著提升相机可控性，缓解自回归漂移及由生成输出驱动的二阶几何反馈循环。
AI.conclusion: GeoStream通过在线更新3D缓存与策略一致的几何条件蒸馏，在自回归视频生成中实现了高精度、鲁棒的度量级相机控制。

title: ROMPAR: Morphological Completion and Demographic Unlearning for Romanian-Accented Speech Recognition
summary: Automated transcription of parliamentary proceedings faces significant hurdles due to demographic bias, dialectal variation, and technical artifacts such as utterance truncation during segmentation. This paper introduces the ROManian PARliamentary Speech Corpus (ROMPAR) dataset, a 17.80-hour corpus of Romanian and Moldavian parliamentary speech, featuring double-annotated ground truth and explicit labels for reconstructed word fragments. To build a robust ASR system, we propose a multi-task adversarial training framework that enforces demographic invariance across age, gender, and dialect. We address the inherent instability of adversarial objectives in generative architectures by introducing an exponential decay mechanism for the adversarial coefficients. Furthermore, we implement an LLM-guided decoding strategy with position-dependent weighting to facilitate morphological completion of truncated terminal words. Our results demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly reduces WER and achieves an F1-score of 96.6% in morphological reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ROMPAR数据集和多任务对抗训练框架，以解决罗马尼亚语议会语音转录中的偏见、方言差异和技术问题，显著降低词错误率并提高形态重建F1分数。
AI.motivation: 自动化转录议会记录面临人口统计偏差、方言差异和技术问题（如分割导致的语音截断）等重大挑战。
AI.method: 构建了包含双标注真值和显式重构词片段标签的ROMPAR罗马尼亚及摩尔多瓦议会语音语料库；提出多任务对抗训练框架以实现年龄、性别和方言不变性；引入对抗系数指数衰减机制以稳定生成架构中的对抗目标；采用大语言模型引导的位置依赖加权解码策略完成截断词的形态补全。
AI.result: 所提框架显著降低了词错误率（WER），并在形态重建任务中达到96.6%的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了议会语音ASR系统的鲁棒性和准确性，尤其在处理方言、人口统计偏差和语音截断方面表现突出。

title: VibeThinker-3B: Exploring the Frontier of Verifiable Reasoning in Small Language Models
summary: This technical report introduces VibeThinker-3B, a compact dense model with 3B parameters developed to investigate how far verifiable reasoning can be pushed within a strictly small-model regime. Building upon the Spectrum-to-Signal post-training paradigm, we systematically enhance the model through an optimized pipeline that includes curriculum-based supervised fine-tuning, multi-domain reinforcement learning, and offline self-distillation. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that VibeThinker-3B achieves frontier-level performance on highly demanding verifiable tasks. Specifically, it attains a score of 94.3 on AIME26 (improving to 97.1 with claim-level test-time scaling), an 80.2 Pass@1 on LiveCodeBench v6, and exhibits strong out-of-distribution generalization with a 96.1\% acceptance rate on recent unseen LeetCode contests. This effectively places it in the performance band of first-tier reasoning systems, matching or exceeding flagship models that are orders of magnitude larger, such as DeepSeek V3.2, GLM-5, and Gemini 3 Pro. Furthermore, a score of 93.4 on IFEval confirms that this extreme reasoning enhancement does not compromise strict instruction controllability. Extending our previous 1.5B work, these findings motivate the Parametric Compression-Coverage Hypothesis, which views verifiable reasoning as compressible into compact reasoning cores, while open-domain knowledge and general-purpose competence require broad parameter coverage over facts, concepts, and long-tail scenarios. This perspective suggests that compact models are not merely deployment-efficient substitutes, but a complementary path toward frontier-level performance in parameter-dense capability regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VibeThinker-3B（3B参数）小模型，通过Spectrum-to-Signal范式、课程监督微调、多领域强化学习与离线自蒸馏，显著提升可验证推理能力，在AIME26、LiveCodeBench、LeetCode等任务上达到甚至超越更大模型（如DeepSeek V3.2）的性能，并提出‘参数压缩-覆盖假说’，主张可验证推理可压缩至紧凑核心，而通用知识需宽泛参数覆盖。
AI.motivation: 探索在严格小模型规模下可验证推理能力的极限，并验证‘可验证推理是否可被高度压缩’这一核心假设。
AI.method: 基于Spectrum-to-Signal后训练范式，构建包含课程监督微调、多领域强化学习和离线自蒸馏的优化训练流程。
AI.result: VibeThinker-3B在AIME26达94.3（claim-level TTS达97.1）、LiveCodeBench v6 Pass@1为80.2、未见LeetCode比赛接受率达96.1%，IFEval达93.4，性能媲美或超越数十倍参数量的旗舰模型。
AI.conclusion: 可验证推理能力具有高度可压缩性，小模型可通过结构化训练逼近甚至超越大模型在该能力上的表现；由此提出‘参数压缩-覆盖假说’，指出紧凑模型是通向前沿能力的互补路径，而非仅部署替代品。

title: Formalizing and Mitigating Structural Distortion in LLM Attention for Zero-Shot Graph Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise for reasoning over Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs). However, applying LLMs to graphs requires linearizing their structure into sequences, introducing distortion rooted in the graph bandwidth problem. While this distortion has been shown to degrade performance, it is often attributed to prompt design or model scale, leaving the underlying mechanism unclear. In this work, we show \textit{how} rotary positional embeddings turn graph linearization into bandwidth-dependent attention decay, suppressing attention between graph-adjacent nodes that are forced far apart in the serialized sequence. This shifts the focus of LLM-based graph reasoning from prompt engineering and scaling toward correcting attention misalignment. Motivated by this analysis, we propose \textbf{G}raph-\textbf{a}ligned \textbf{L}anguage \textbf{A}ttention (\textbf{GaLA}), a lightweight, inference-time modification for LLMs. GaLA biases attention toward graph-adjacent nodes while preserving the LLM's sequential inductive biases. Across TAG benchmarks, GaLA improves performance with negligible overhead, demonstrating that distortion is a correctable bottleneck in LLM-based graph reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了旋转位置编码如何将图线性化转化为带宽依赖的注意力衰减，导致图相邻节点间注意力被抑制，并提出了轻量级的推理时修改方法GaLA来校正这种注意力错位，显著提升了大语言模型在文本属性图上的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究发现大语言模型在文本属性图（TAG）上推理时因图结构线性化引入失真，但失真根源不明，常被归因于提示设计或模型规模；本文旨在揭示失真的内在机制并提出针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分析旋转位置嵌入（RoPE）对图线性化的影响，指出其导致带宽相关的注意力衰减；进而提出Graph-aligned Language Attention（GaLA），一种在推理阶段对注意力机制进行轻量级修正的方法，显式增强图邻接节点间的注意力权重，同时保留原有序列归纳偏置。
AI.result: GaLA在多个TAG基准测试中显著提升LLM图推理性能，且计算开销极小，验证了图线性化失真是可校正的关键瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 图线性化失真本质是RoPE引发的注意力错位问题，而非单纯提示或规模问题；GaLA通过推理时注意力校正，为LLM图推理提供了高效、通用的新范式。

title: ADAPT: Analytical Disturbance-Aware Policy Training for Humanoid Locomotion
summary: Humanoids deployed in human-centered environments must handle force-interactive tasks, where external contacts introduce unexpected disturbances that disrupt locomotion accuracy and stability. Existing learning-based approaches rely on broad domain randomization, task-specific force objectives, or learning-based force estimators from motion history, each of which compromises accuracy, task transferability, or out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness. We present Analytical Disturbance-Aware Policy Training (ADAPT), a framework that equips humanoid policies with a physically grounded disturbance observer. The core of ADAPT is an analytical whole-body disturbance observer that estimates residual force/torque online with the accessible robot dynamics, without requiring force/torque sensors. Fed directly into the policy, the estimated disturbances give the humanoid an explicit, physics-derived sense of external force/torque that can generalize across diverse unseen scenes. Experiments on a Unitree G1 humanoid show that ADAPT achieves accurate disturbance prediction and stronger robustness than a proprioception-only baseline under torso perturbations, standing pushes, and asymmetric hand payloads, with improved velocity tracking even on OOD disturbances. Moreover, ADAPT enables penalizing inferred disturbances at lower-body joints to encourage lighter locomotion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADAPT框架，通过物理驱动的扰动观测器实现无需力/扭矩传感器的在线扰动估计，提升人形机器人在力交互任务中的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人在人类环境中需应对力交互任务，但现有学习方法在精度、任务迁移性或OOD鲁棒性上存在权衡缺陷。
AI.method: 提出Analytical Disturbance-Aware Policy Training（ADAPT），构建基于机器人动力学的解析式全身扰动观测器，实时估计残余力/力矩，并将其直接输入策略网络。
AI.result: 在Unitree G1人形机器人上验证：ADAPT在躯干扰动、站立推力和非对称手部负载下比仅用本体感知的基线更鲁棒，扰动预测准确，OOD扰动下速度跟踪性能提升，并支持通过惩罚下肢关节推断扰动实现轻量化步态控制。
AI.conclusion: ADAPT为无外置力传感器的人形机器人提供了物理可解释、泛化性强且鲁棒的扰动感知与响应能力，推动其在真实动态环境中的实用化。

title: Variational Network with Wavelet-based UNET in Accelerated MRI Reconstruction from Under Sampled K-space Data
summary: Fully sampled MRI requires dense k-space acquisition, leading to long scan times, reduced clinical throughput, and increased sensitivity to patient motion. Accelerated MRI addresses this by acquiring undersampled k-space data and reconstructing the missing information computationally. However, reconstruction from undersampled measurements is highly ill-posed and can introduce aliasing artifacts, noise amplification, and loss of anatomical detail. Although conventional parallel imaging and compressed sensing methods mitigate these issues, and deep learning methods have further improved reconstruction quality, preserving high-frequency structures under aggressive undersampling remains challenging. In this work, we propose a Variational Network with a Wavelet-based U-Net (W-UNet) for accelerated MRI reconstruction. The framework combines physics-guided iterative reconstruction with learnable multi-scale frequency representations. Standard pooling operations are replaced with Discrete Wavelet Transform and Inverse Wavelet Transform modules, enabling lossless downsampling while preserving low-frequency structure and high-frequency edge details. Integrated into the refinement and sensitivity map estimation stages, the proposed design improves artifact suppression, feature preservation, and reconstruction fidelity in both single-coil and multi-coil settings. Experiments on fastMRI knee and M4Raw brain datasets show state-of-the-art performance. Ablation studies further confirm the effectiveness of wavelet-based feature decomposition for accelerated MRI reconstruction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合变分网络与小波U-Net（W-UNet）的加速MRI重建方法，通过引入离散小波变换替代传统池化操作，在保持低频结构和高频边缘细节的同时提升重建质量，尤其在高倍欠采样下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 传统加速MRI重建在高倍欠采样下难以兼顾高频率结构保真与伪影抑制，现有深度学习方法仍存在细节丢失、噪声放大等问题。
AI.method: 提出基于小波的U-Net（W-UNet）嵌入变分网络框架，用离散小波变换（DWT）和逆小波变换（IDWT）替代标准池化/上采样，实现无损多尺度特征分解，并集成于重建与灵敏度图估计模块中。
AI.result: 在fastMRI膝关节和M4Raw脑部数据集上达到SOTA性能；消融实验验证了小波特征分解对重建质量提升的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 小波变换可有效增强多尺度频率建模能力，所提W-UNet变分框架在单/多线圈加速MRI重建中显著提升图像保真度、伪影抑制与结构保留能力。

title: GRACE-DS: a Guarded Reward-guided Agent Correction Environment in Data Science
summary: We introduce GRACE-DS, a Guarded Reward-guided Agent Correction Environment in Data Science for pre-deployment evaluation of LLM-powered AutoML agents. GRACE-DS is a set of evaluation metrics in an isolated environment that can be applied to tabular ML tasks specific to a particular organization. It exposes agents to realistic workflow stages, from planning and data inspection through feature engineering, model development, validation, and code repair to final submission, while hidden executable validators measure not only final predictive performance but also leakage avoidance, reproducibility, protocol validity, correction behavior, and reward alignment. The strongest structured regime, flexible iterative interaction (our approach), achieves higher end-to-end normalized hidden-test quality than single-shot generation, unstructured interaction, and restart-based baselines, while also improving protocol-valid completion. Validated across more than 7,000 episodes, these results establish GRACE-DS as a robust platform for assessing the capacity of LLM-based AutoML agents to execute machine learning workflows under production-like conditions and in accordance with organization-specific requirements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GRACE-DS，一个用于预部署评估LLM驱动AutoML代理的数据科学守卫奖励引导校正环境，通过多维度隐式验证指标，在类生产环境中系统评估代理执行ML工作流的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM驱动的AutoML代理缺乏在类生产、组织定制化约束下的系统性预部署评估框架，尤其难以兼顾预测性能、数据泄露规避、可复现性及协议合规性等多维质量要求。
AI.method: 构建GRACE-DS评估环境，包含隔离沙箱、覆盖完整ML工作流（规划、数据检查、特征工程、建模、验证、代码修复）的阶段化任务，以及隐藏式多维验证器（预测性能、防泄漏、可复现性、协议有效性、修正行为、奖励对齐）；对比单次生成、非结构化交互与重启式基线，采用灵活迭代交互策略。
AI.result: 在7000+测试集上验证，所提灵活迭代交互策略显著优于基线：端到端归一化隐藏测试质量更高，且协议有效完成率提升。
AI.conclusion: GRACE-DS被证实为一种鲁棒平台，能有效评估LLM-based AutoML代理在真实组织约束下执行ML工作流的综合能力，支持更安全可靠的自动化模型开发。

title: LiteOdyssey: A Lightweight Reasoning AI Agent for Interpretable Rare-Disease Diagnosis
summary: Most medical AI systems improve by scaling additional machinery: more fine-tuning data, more agents, and/or larger retrieval databases. In rare-disease diagnosis, however, such scaling can produce systems that are difficult to deploy, audit, and maintain. We asked whether state-of-the-art diagnostic performance could instead be achieved by extending the reasoning chain of a single AI agent: guiding it with a diagnostic policy, developed through human-AI collaboration and augmenting with freely available biomedical tools. We introduce LiteOdyssey, a lightweight rare-disease diagnostic framework that guides reasoning language model through a clinical genetics workflow. This framework was developed through Policy Iteration with Human Feedback (PIHF) and uses dynamic access to public biomedical tools. On two challenging benchmarks that provide only patient clinical features, LiteOdyssey achieved state-of-the-art performance, with an overall disease Recall@1 of 59.3% over the combined 1,243 cases of LIRICAL (n = 370) and the PhenoPacket Store (n = 873). Both benchmarks have a high proportion of ultra-rare disease (a prevalence below 1 in 1,000,000, with ultra-rare shares of approximately 45% and 52.8%, respectively). On the more difficult PhenoPacket subset, where causal diseases were not mapped to Orphanet in our rarity-mapping pipeline, LiteOdyssey achieved 60.7% Recall@1, compared with 10.7% for the same baseline model (GPT-5.4) without tools. This performance was achieved without fine-tuning, multi-agent ensembles, or a large case-retrieval database. Gains were also observed in the following: on cases never seen during development, on a private cohort of real-world rare disease patients, and on a smaller open-weights model. LiteOdyssey suggests a path toward rare-disease AI systems that are accurate, easier to deploy, and more transparent for physician review.

AI.tldr: LiteOdyssey是一种轻量级罕见病诊断框架，通过人类-AI协作制定诊断策略并动态调用公开生物医学工具，仅依赖单一大语言模型推理链，在不依赖微调、多智能体或大规模检索库的前提下，实现了罕见病诊断的SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统医疗AI系统依赖扩展数据、模型或检索库来提升性能，但在罕见病诊断中导致部署难、审计难、维护难；本文探索是否可通过增强单个AI代理的推理链（结合人类专家知识与免费工具）实现同等甚至更优性能。
AI.method: 提出LiteOdyssey框架，基于临床遗传学工作流引导大语言模型推理；采用Policy Iteration with Human Feedback（PIHF）开发诊断策略；动态接入公开生物医学工具（无需微调、无多智能体、无大型检索库）。
AI.result: 在LIRICAL和PhenoPacket Store两个高比例超罕见病（~45%-52.8%）基准上，整体Recall@1达59.3%；在更具挑战性的未映射Orphanet子集上达60.7%，显著优于基线GPT-5.4（10.7%）；泛化至未见病例、真实世界私有队列及小尺寸开源模型均表现提升。
AI.conclusion: LiteOdyssey验证了‘增强推理链+人机协同策略+开放工具’路径的有效性，为构建准确、易部署、可解释的罕见病AI系统提供了新范式。

title: HAPI-EP: Towards Hybrid, Adaptive, and Predictive Digital Twins of Cardiac Electrophysiology
summary: A digital twin (DT) of a patient-specific heart offers significant potential in personalized medicine. However, its rapid and dynamic adaptation to an individual's live data and its predictive capability after adaptation remains central challenges. We examine this challenge from its two building blocks: DT formulation where mechanistic and data-driven models show competing merits and limitations, and DT optimization strategies that are largely driven by a reconstruction objective leading to un-identifiable models. We address both bottlenecks via HAPI -- an AI framework for building hybrid, adaptive, and predictive DTs with three key enablers. First, HAPI constructs a physics-integrated gray-box model in which an interpretable mechanistic backbone is augmented by a neural component that models its residual to the observed data. Second, rather than attempting to pre-encode all possible variations in a static hybrid model, HAPI enables rapid on-the-fly adaptation of the hybrid model to few-shot live data, achieved by feedforward meta-learners realizing amortized inference of both mechanistic and neural parameters of the hybrid model trained with predictive objectives. Finally, we show that this adaptivity corresponds to the construction of a conditional generative model (i.e., the hybrid DT) that endows it with theoretical identifiability and thus strong performance in predictive scenarios. We demonstrate the proof-of-concept of HAPI in cardiac electrophysiology using a hybrid monodomain model with mechanistic reaction kinetics and neural graph diffusion. Across synthetic and real-data studies, we show that HAPI's mechanistic-neural hybridization and predictive adaptation are critical for obtaining identifiable DTs with strong predictive and out-of-distribution capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HAPI框架，通过物理机制与神经网络结合的灰箱模型、基于预测目标的元学习快速适应机制，以及条件生成建模，构建可识别、可预测、可动态适配的患者特异性心脏数字孪生。
AI.motivation: 现有患者特异性心脏数字孪生面临两大瓶颈：一是机理模型与数据驱动模型各具优劣但难以兼顾；二是以重构为目标的优化策略导致模型不可识别，影响预测能力。
AI.method: 提出HAPI框架：1）构建物理机制为骨干、神经网络拟合残差的灰箱混合模型；2）采用前馈式元学习器实现少量实时数据下的快速参数联合推断；3）将自适应过程建模为条件生成模型以保障理论可识别性。
AI.result: 在心电生理学（混合单域模型+神经图扩散）中验证：HAPI在合成与真实数据上均显著提升数字孪生的可识别性、预测精度及分布外泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: HAPI通过融合机理可解释性与数据驱动适应性，并以预测为导向优化，为构建高保真、可泛化、临床实用的个体化数字孪生提供了新范式。

title: Elastic ODYN: Differentiable Optimization for Infeasible Control and Learning in Robotics
summary: Robotic systems routinely encounter conflicting objectives, modeling errors, and degenerate contact conditions that render quadratic programs (QPs) infeasible. Yet most optimization solvers and differentiable QP layers assume feasibility, leading to numerical failures, unstable gradients, or solver breakdown when constraints cannot be simultaneously satisfied. We present Elastic ODYN, a primal--dual non-interior-point QP solver that handles infeasibility through smooth squared-$\ell_2$ elastic relaxations. The resulting formulation remains well posed under ill-conditioning and degeneracy, supports warm starting, and converges to closest-to-feasible solutions when no feasible point exists. A lightweight refinement stage recovers physically meaningful dual variables from the elastic solution. Building on this framework, we develop Elastic OdynLayer, a differentiable QP layer with stable gradients under infeasibility, and Elastic OdynSQP, an infeasibility-aware SQP method that resolves inconsistent subproblems and intrinsically infeasible optimal control tasks through selective constraint relaxation. We evaluate the framework on benchmark QPs, singular contact mechanics, differentiable parameter identification, and quadrupedal and humanoid trajectory optimization. Across all settings, Elastic ODYN consistently outperforms state-of-the-art elastic QP solvers in robustness, warm-start performance, and convergence reliability, enabling optimization, simulation, control, and learning beyond the feasibility assumptions of existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Elastic ODYN，一种处理二次规划（QP）不可行性的新型 primal-dual 非内点法求解器，通过光滑的ℓ₂弹性松弛保证数值鲁棒性与梯度稳定性，并扩展为可微QP层（Elastic OdynLayer）和面向不可行问题的SQP方法（Elastic OdynSQP），在多种机器人优化任务中显著提升鲁棒性与收敛可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有QP求解器和可微QP层普遍假设约束可行，但在机器人系统中常遇建模误差、目标冲突与退化接触等导致QP不可行的情形，引发数值失败、梯度不稳定或求解崩溃。
AI.method: 提出基于光滑平方ℓ₂弹性松弛的primal-dual非内点QP求解器Elastic ODYN；设计轻量级精炼步骤恢复物理意义的对偶变量；构建可微Elastic OdynLayer和不可行感知的Elastic OdynSQP算法。
AI.result: 在基准QP、奇异接触力学、可微参数辨识及四足/人形轨迹优化任务上，Elastic ODYN在鲁棒性、热启动性能与收敛可靠性上持续优于现有弹性QP求解器。
AI.conclusion: Elastic ODYN突破了传统QP方法对可行性的依赖，为机器人优化、仿真、控制与学习提供了更可靠、可微且实用的基础工具。

title: Label Shift Aware Adaptation for Online Zero-shot Learning with Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP)
summary: Vision-language models like Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP) have been extensively studied in data-scarce scenarios. A particularly challenging and realistic task in this area is online zero-shot learning with CLIP, where unknown test samples are predicted sequentially in random order by CLIP while keeping the feature extraction and model parameters fixed during the sequential inference phase. Most existing approaches in this setting address the problem by adapting representations online using incoming test samples, while neglecting the distribution of the data on which CLIP was initially trained. This mismatch can lead to degraded performance when the label distribution in the test data differs from that of the training domain. To address this gap, we propose Label Shift Aware (LSA), which formulates the online zero-shot classification task as a domain adaptation problem. Specifically, LSA adapts the predictions computed by CLIP, which was trained on an unknown source distribution, to a target distribution using only unlabeled test data, and applies label shift correction to mitigate the mismatch between the source and target domains. The extensive experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate that the proposed LSA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art online zero-shot learning methods based on CLIP.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Label Shift Aware (LSA)方法，将在线零样本学习任务建模为域自适应问题，利用无标签测试数据进行标签分布偏移校正，以缓解CLIP预训练源域与测试目标域间的分布不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有在线零样本学习方法忽视CLIP预训练时的标签分布，当测试数据标签分布与训练域不一致时性能下降。
AI.method: LSA将在线零样本分类建模为域自适应问题，仅利用无标签测试数据对CLIP预测结果进行自适应，并施加标签偏移校正。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，LSA持续优于基于CLIP的最先进在线零样本学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入标签分布偏移感知机制，LSA有效提升了CLIP在在线零样本学习场景下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Bridging the Usability Gap: Lessons from Interpreting Studies for Machine Interpreting Design
summary: Machine interpreting (MI), the live, real-time branch of speech translation, has achieved remarkable progress on standard benchmarks, with some systems approaching human parity on textual fidelity. Yet the user experience remains far inferior to interpreter-mediated communication, revealing what we term the \emph{accuracy illusion}: systems that appear accurate on paper but fail in practice to support smooth, goal-oriented interaction. This paper defines MI as a distinct subfield of speech translation, with its own characteristics and the need for evaluation methods grounded in communicative effectiveness rather than isolated fidelity metrics. Drawing on insights from interpreting studies, we identify critical dimensions of professional interpreting practice that are overlooked by current systems, and consolidate them into three interdependent design priorities for future MI: \emph{agency} (context-sensitive initiative and repair), \emph{grounding} (multimodal and discourse-level situational awareness), and \emph{experience} (adaptive improvement through real interaction). Together, these priorities chart a path toward closing the usability gap and enabling systems that can sustain authentic multilingual communication in real time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出机器同传（MI）应作为语音翻译的独立子领域，强调以交际有效性而非单纯文本保真度为评估标准，并定义了三个核心设计优先级：主体性、语境锚定和交互体验，以弥合当前系统与真实人际口译之间的可用性差距。
AI.motivation: 现有机器同传系统虽在文本保真度上接近人类水平，但实际用户体验远逊于人工口译，存在‘准确率幻觉’问题，亟需从交际效果出发重构评估范式与系统设计。
AI.method: 基于口译学研究，识别当前系统忽视的专业口译关键维度，并将其凝练为三个相互依存的设计优先级：主体性（上下文敏感的主动干预与纠错）、语境锚定（多模态与话语层面的情境感知）、体验（通过真实交互实现自适应优化）。
AI.result: 确立了机器同传作为独立研究方向的地位，提出了以交际有效性为核心的三元设计框架，为构建真正支持实时多语种自然交流的系统提供了理论路径。
AI.conclusion: 机器同传的发展不应仅追求静态文本准确率，而须转向支持动态、目标导向的人际互动；所提出的三大设计优先级为未来研究与系统构建提供了可操作的指导原则。

title: The Quality-Utility Paradox: Why High-Reward Data Impairs Small Model Mathematical Reasoning
summary: Knowledge distillation from powerful reasoning models is widely used to improve Small Language Models (SLMs) on mathematical reasoning, often assuming that traces with higher reward model scores provide more useful supervision. We identify a counterintuitive \textbf{Quality-Utility Paradox} in mathematical reasoning distillation. Data refined or synthesized by a stronger Oracle obtains higher perceived quality according to reward models, yet consistently underperforms traces generated by the SLM itself and selected through rejection sampling across Qwen2.5, LLaMA-3, and DeepSeek families. Our analysis shows that Oracle refinement couples logical repair with distributional drift away from the SLM's native reasoning distribution. This drift increases the learner's adaptation cost and can outweigh the benefit of improved reasoning logic. To test this mechanism, we introduce \textbf{Style-Aligned Refinement}, which preserves the native trajectory of the SLM while retaining logical repair from the Oracle. This intervention lowers adaptation cost and restores downstream utility. These findings suggest that effective mathematical reasoning distillation should jointly optimize perceived solution quality and learner-data compatibility, rather than relying solely on reward-model scores. The datasets and code are available at https://github.com/Dracoqhl/Quality-Utility-Paradox.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了数学推理知识蒸馏中的“质量-效用悖论”：由更强Oracle模型精炼的数据虽被奖励模型评为高质量，却因分布漂移导致小语言模型（SLM）适应成本上升、性能下降；为此提出“风格对齐精炼”方法，在保留逻辑修复的同时维持SLM原生推理轨迹，显著提升下游效用。
AI.motivation: 现有数学推理知识蒸馏常假设奖励模型评分更高的推理轨迹更具监督价值，但作者发现高分轨迹反而损害SLM性能，亟需解释该反直觉现象并提出改进方案。
AI.method: 通过对比Oracle精炼轨迹与SLM自身经拒绝采样生成的轨迹在多个模型族上的表现，分析分布漂移机制；进而设计‘风格对齐精炼’方法，解耦逻辑修复与风格偏移，在保持Oracle逻辑修正能力的同时锚定SLM原生推理分布。
AI.result: 实验证明Oracle精炼轨迹在Qwen2.5、LLaMA-3和DeepSeek系列上持续劣于SLM自生成轨迹；风格对齐精炼显著降低适应成本，恢复甚至超越原始性能。
AI.conclusion: 数学推理蒸馏不应仅依赖奖励模型分数优化质量，而需协同优化解的质量与学习者-数据兼容性；风格对齐是缓解质量-效用悖论的有效路径。

title: Multi-Agent Framework for Audit Risk Assessment with Explicit Uncertainty and Evidence Conflict Modeling
summary: Audit risk assessment increasingly benefits from combining heterogeneous evidence sources, yet existing approaches typically produce point predictions without quantifying how well different evidence streams agree. We propose UMAR (Uncertainty-Aware Multi-Agent Risk Assessment), a framework that employs three specialized agents: an MD&A Text Agent, a Financial Ratio Agent, and a CAM Agent, each producing independent risk scores with calibrated uncertainty estimates. An Uncertainty Aggregator based on Dempster-Shafer evidence theory fuses these scores while explicitly measuring inter-agent conflict. We evaluate UMAR on a U.S. dataset of 3,200 firm-year observations from SEC 10-K filings (2019-2023), with financial restatement as the target label. Experimental results show that UMAR achieves an AUROC of 0.782 and a PR-AUC of 0.341, outperforming logistic regression, XGBoost, FinBERT, and single-agent and dual-agent LLM baselines. UMAR attains the lowest expected calibration error (ECE = 0.052) among all methods and identifies evidence-conflict patterns that correlate with actual restatement risk, offering auditors potentially actionable and interpretable risk signals.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UMAR框架，通过三个专业化代理（MD&A文本代理、财务比率代理和CAM代理）生成带校准不确定性估计的风险评分，并利用Dempster-Shafer证据理论融合结果并量化代理间冲突，在审计风险评估任务中实现了更优性能与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有审计风险评估方法多依赖单一或简单融合的异构证据源，且缺乏对不同证据流一致性程度的量化，难以提供可靠、可解释的风险判断。
AI.method: 提出UMAR（不确定性感知多代理风险评估）框架，包含三个专用代理分别处理MD&A文本、财务比率和CAM信息，输出带不确定性估计的风险评分；采用基于Dempster-Shafer证据理论的不确定性聚合器融合评分并度量代理间冲突。
AI.result: 在3200个公司-年度样本上，UMAR取得AUROC 0.782、PR-AUC 0.341，优于逻辑回归、XGBoost、FinBERT及各类单/双代理基线；ECE最低（0.052），并能识别与实际重述风险显著相关的证据冲突模式。
AI.conclusion: UMAR通过不确定性建模与冲突感知融合，提升了审计风险评估的准确性、校准性与可解释性，为审计师提供了潜在可操作的风险信号。

title: Automated Digital Twin Construction for Highway Scenarios Using LiDAR Point Clouds and OpenStreetMap
summary: Accurate road environment modeling is fundamental to the simulation and validation of automated driving systems. However, constructing road maps in standardized formats such as ASAM OpenDRIVE from real-world sensor data remains a time-consuming and costly process. Mobile mapping LiDAR captures accurate lane-level geometry but is confined to the driven corridor, while OpenStreetMap (OSM) provides broad road network topology but lacks geometric precision at the lane level. To address this, an automated workflow is proposed to fuse LiDAR point clouds with OSM data to generate georeferenced ASAM OpenDRIVE maps of highway environments, requiring minimal manual intervention. The pipeline reconstructs mainline roads from LiDAR-derived measurements and infers ramp geometry and topology from the OSM road graph, enabling complete highway interchange modeling without full sensor coverage. Experiments demonstrate a mean lateral RMSE of 0.740 m, and the generated maps are directly usable in mainstream simulation platforms including IPG CarMaker and Esmini. These results validate the effectiveness of combining measurement-derived geometry with map-derived topology for automated OpenDRIVE digital twin generation. The project code is available at https://github.com/ftgTUGraz/opendrive-digital-twin-generator

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种融合移动测绘LiDAR点云与OpenStreetMap（OSM）数据的自动化流程，用于生成高精度、地理配准的ASAM OpenDRIVE格式高速公路数字孪生地图，显著减少人工干预，实测横向RMSE为0.740 m，并兼容主流仿真平台。
AI.motivation: 构建标准化道路模型（如ASAM OpenDRIVE）耗时费力；LiDAR提供高精度车道几何但覆盖有限，OSM提供广域路网拓扑但缺乏车道级精度，二者互补性未被充分利用。
AI.method: 提出融合LiDAR点云与OSM路网图的自动化工作流：主线路段由LiDAR重建，匝道几何与拓扑则从OSM图中推断，从而在不依赖全路段LiDAR覆盖下完成互通立交建模。
AI.result: 生成的OpenDRIVE地图平均横向RMSE为0.740 m，可直接导入IPG CarMaker和Esmini等主流仿真平台验证使用。
AI.conclusion: 结合测量所得几何与地图所得拓扑是高效生成OpenDRIVE数字孪生的有效范式，该方法兼顾精度、完整性与自动化程度。

title: Enabling Real-Time Point-of-Care Ultrasound Segmentation: A GPU-Free Deployment in Resource-Limited Settings
summary: Ultrasound imaging is the most widely adopted medical modality globally due to its low cost and portability, yet artificial intelligence (AI) deployment remains constrained by reliance on GPU-accelerated models, creating a structural paradox where the cost of "intelligence" exceeds that of the imaging device itself. Here, we present the systematic adaptation and extensive evaluation of UltraSeg, an ultra-lightweight architecture originally developed for colonoscopic polyp segmentation, now engineered for point-of-care ultrasound (POCUS) across ten public datasets spanning six anatomical sites (breast, thyroid, kidney, carotid, fetal, and small-animal tumor). We systematically validate both variants in ultrasound domains: UltraSeg-130K (0.13M parameters) achieves 89.7 FPS on single-core CPUs and 34.8 FPS on a refurbished mobile device, while UltraSeg-500K (0.5M parameters) delivers 44.6 FPS on CPU and 16.1 FPS on mobile device. UltraSeg-500K matches or exceeds the Dice performance of the 31M-parameter UNet and approaches 105M-parameter TransUNet in average performance, with superior zero-shot cross-dataset generalization on external validation sets (UDIAT, DDTI). By enabling clinical-grade segmentation without GPU dependency, this work brings AI costs in line with ultrasound accessibility, making advanced diagnostics available in resource-limited settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UltraSeg，一种超轻量级AI模型，专为便携式超声（POCUS）设计，可在无GPU的CPU或旧移动设备上实时运行，性能媲美大型模型，显著降低AI部署成本，提升资源有限地区的诊断可及性。
AI.motivation: 超声设备成本低、便携性强，但AI部署依赖GPU，导致“智能”成本高于设备本身，形成结构性矛盾；亟需轻量化AI模型以适配资源受限场景。
AI.method: 系统适配并评估UltraSeg架构（原用于结肠镜息肉分割），针对六种解剖部位的超声图像进行优化，构建两个参数量版本（UltraSeg-130K和UltraSeg-500K），在十个公开数据集上进行全面验证，并对比UNet和TransUNet等主流模型。
AI.result: UltraSeg-130K在单核CPU达89.7 FPS，旧移动设备达34.8 FPS；UltraSeg-500K性能接近大型模型（如TransUNet），Dice分数匹配或超越31M参数UNet，并在跨数据集零样本泛化（UDIAT、DDTI）中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: UltraSeg实现了无需GPU的临床级超声图像分割，使AI成本与超声设备可及性相匹配，推动先进诊断技术在资源匮乏环境中的实际落地。

title: Who Flips? Self- and Cross-Model Counterarguments Reveal Answer Instability in LLMs
comment: Accepted to the non-archival workshops AI4Good and AIWILD at ICML 2026
summary: Standard accuracy benchmarks are designed to test how closely large language models (LLMs) approach correct answers, but are not suitable for testing whether LLMs stick with a correct answer when that answer is challenged by a plausible counter-argument. We introduce a controlled protocol for evaluating answer stability: after a model answers a multiple-choice question correctly, we challenge the model's answer with a coherent argument for an incorrect option and measure whether the model flips. The setup a) isolates argumentative content from overt social pressure and b) varies argument length, self-attribution, and cross-model source. Across seven frontier models and 57 MMLU subjects, flip rates range from 17.5% to 97.3%, revealing large differences in stability that are not captured by accuracy metrics alone. We find that self-attribution consistently increases flip rates (mean +7.1pp, up to +18.7pp). Also, pooling wrong-answer arguments across models and selecting the most effective one per question yields stronger adversarial challenges than relying on any single source model. We further construct MaxFlip, a curated challenge set that amplifies flips by up to +23.6pp over standard self-generated challenges. We release the protocol, challenge records, and MaxFlip to support stability evaluation alongside standard accuracy benchmarks. Materials are available at https://github.com/nafisenik/WhoFlips and https://hf.co/datasets/nafisehNik/WhoFlips.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种评估大语言模型（LLM）在面对合理反论时答案稳定性的新协议：当模型正确回答多选题后，用连贯但错误的论点挑战其答案，观察其是否“翻转”；实验发现不同模型稳定性差异巨大，自归因会显著增加翻转率，跨模型聚合反论可增强挑战强度，并构建了强化翻转效果的MaxFlip挑战集。
AI.motivation: 标准准确率基准无法衡量LLM在遭遇合理反论时是否坚持正确答案，需专门评估其答案稳定性。
AI.method: 设计控制性协议：模型正确作答后，用结构化反论（变化长度、自归因与否、反论来源模型）挑战其答案，统计翻转率；并在多模型、多学科（57个MMLU子领域）上系统评测；构建并发布MaxFlip挑战集。
AI.result: 七种前沿模型翻转率介于17.5%–97.3%；自归因平均提升翻转率7.1个百分点（最高+18.7pp）；跨模型聚合反论比单模型更强；MaxFlip使翻转率额外提升最多23.6pp。
AI.conclusion: 答案稳定性是独立于准确率的重要能力维度，现有基准严重忽略；所提协议与MaxFlip数据集可作为补充评估工具，推动更鲁棒、可信的LLM开发。

title: AI Pluralism and the Worlds It Misses
comment: To be presented at the ICML Pluralistic Alignment Workshop
summary: AI pluralism is often framed as a problem of representing diverse values, preferences, users, or outputs. This paper argues that this framing is incomplete because AI systems also impose ontologies: they define what counts as an entity, relation, feature, harm, benefit, and valid form of evidence. We define ontological flattening as the conversion of situated, contested, and historically specific meanings into a restricted technical category, proxy, aggregation rule, or benchmark target that is treated as neutral and difficult to contest. The paper develops a bounded conceptual and qualitative synthesis across value pluralism, pluralistic alignment, participatory and democratic AI, procedural justice, science and technology studies, accountability research, aggregate themes from 11 expert interviews, and three urban AI companion cases. The cases illustrate how pluralistic methods can improve or structure model behavior while still compressing categories, proxies, aggregation rules, and revision rights before affected actors have procedural standing. We introduce Pluralistic Lifecycle Governance (PLG) as a preliminary qualitative audit scaffold for documenting ontological openness, epistemic inclusion, procedural authority, evaluation pluralism, and lifecycle accountability. PLG is not presented as a validated scoring instrument; it is a framework for making the evidence and governance conditions of pluralistic AI explicit.

AI.tldr: 本文提出“本体论扁平化”概念，指出AI系统不仅需处理价值多元性，更会强加特定本体论框架，将复杂、情境化的意义压缩为技术化、难被质疑的类别或代理指标；通过跨学科综述与案例研究，提出“多元生命周期治理（PLG）”框架，旨在显化多元AI中的本体开放性、认知包容性、程序权威、评估多元性与全周期问责。
AI.motivation: 现有AI多元主义讨论忽视了AI系统对本体论的隐性强加，即定义何为实体、关系、伤害、证据等，导致情境化、 contested 的意义被技术化压缩，亟需理论与实践框架来识别和应对这种本体论压迫。
AI.method: 采用有界的概念与定性综合法，整合价值多元主义、多元对齐、参与式/民主AI、程序正义、STS、问责研究等视角，并结合11位专家访谈与三个城市AI案例进行分析。
AI.result: 揭示了即使采用多元方法，AI模型仍普遍存在本体论扁平化现象——在受影响者获得程序性发言权前，已压缩类别、代理指标、聚合规则与修订权；提出Pluralistic Lifecycle Governance（PLG）作为初步定性审计支架。
AI.conclusion: AI多元主义必须超越价值表征，直面其本体论建构权力；PLG不是评分工具，而是使多元AI背后的证据基础与治理条件显性化的分析框架，推动更具反思性与包容性的AI治理实践。

title: CIWI-CKT: Chaos-Informed Wave Interference Feature Fusion and Cross-City Knowledge Transfer for Traffic Flow Forecasting
summary: Accurate traffic flow prediction remains challenging in cross-city, data-scarce scenarios where limited historical data hinders model generalisation. The chaotic nature of traffic dynamics, complex spatio-temporal dependencies, and heterogeneous urban networks complicate few-shot learning across cities. Existing deep learning approaches either treat traffic as purely deterministic or lack mechanisms to model wave-like interference patterns essential for cross-regime traffic dynamics. To address these limitations, this paper proposes CIWI-CKT, a novel Chaos-Informed Wave Interference Feature Fusion framework with Cross-City Knowledge Transfer. Our framework introduces three core innovations: chaos-informed wave generation that extracts measurable chaos invariants and models traffic as adaptive wave components; meta-interference processing that captures wave interactions between support and query regimes while producing a predictability score for confidence estimation; and chaos-aware meta-learning that enables efficient cross-city knowledge transfer while preserving chaotic characteristics. We establish theoretical guarantees including chaos-to-wave stability, wave-induced dimension reduction, and meta-learning generalisation bounds. Extensive experiments on four real-world traffic datasets demonstrate that CIWI-CKT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art spatio-temporal graph learning, transfer learning, prompt-based, and few-shot methods, improving prediction accuracy while substantially reducing required training data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CIWI-CKT框架，融合混沌理论与波干涉建模，解决跨城市、数据稀缺场景下的交通流预测难题，显著提升精度并减少训练数据需求。
AI.motivation: 在跨城市、历史数据稀缺的场景下，现有模型难以泛化；交通系统的混沌性、时空依赖复杂性和城市网络异质性使少样本跨域学习困难；现有方法未能有效建模波状干涉等关键动态特性。
AI.method: 提出CIWI-CKT框架，包含三部分：1）混沌引导的波生成（提取混沌不变量，将交通建模为自适应波分量）；2）元干涉处理（建模支撑集与查询集间波交互，并输出可预测性评分）；3）混沌感知元学习（实现高效跨城知识迁移并保留混沌特性）；并给出混沌-波稳定性、波致降维及元学习泛化界等理论保证。
AI.result: 在四个真实交通数据集上，CIWI-CKT显著优于当前时空图学习、迁移学习、提示学习和少样本学习等SOTA方法，在提升预测精度的同时大幅降低所需训练数据量。
AI.conclusion: CIWI-CKT通过引入混沌理论与波干涉机制，为数据稀缺下的跨城市交通预测提供了新范式，兼具理论严谨性与实证有效性。

title: Steering Generative Reinforcement Learning into Stable Robotic Controller
summary: Diffusion and flow-based generative policies provide a powerful policy class for reinforcement learning by inducing rich stochastic exploration through iterative action generation. However, the stochasticity of diffusion policies is not suitable for stable and precise control in high-dimensional robotic systems, where small action variations can accumulate into inconsistent motion and reduced robustness. To address this issue, we propose SteerGenPO, a latent-space reinforcement learning framework that steers a trained generative policy into a robust deterministic robotic controller. The key idea is to replace stochastic latent sampling of the trained generative policy with a learned latent actor that predicts a state-dependent latent input for the generative policies. This separates exploration and control: stochastic generative sampling provides diverse action proposals during policy learning, while deterministic latent steering provides stable and adaptive control at deployment. We evaluate SteerGenPO on six Isaac Lab benchmarks and a Unitree G1 locomotion task. The results show SteerGenPO improves over both classical RL and generative RL baselines, while its deterministic latent steering produces more stable inference-time behaviors and more reliable command responses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SteerGenPO框架，通过在潜在空间中学习一个确定性潜变量控制器来引导已训练的生成式策略，从而在保持探索能力的同时提升机器人控制的稳定性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 扩散和基于流的生成式策略虽能提供丰富的随机探索，但在高维机器人系统中，其固有的随机性会导致动作微小变化累积，引发运动不一致和鲁棒性下降。
AI.method: 提出SteerGenPO：用一个学习到的状态依赖潜变量执行器替代生成式策略中原有的随机潜变量采样，使策略学习阶段保留随机探索能力，部署阶段实现确定性、自适应控制。
AI.result: 在六个Isaac Lab基准任务及Unitree G1真实机器人步态任务上验证，SteerGenPO优于经典RL和生成式RL基线，推理阶段行为更稳定，指令响应更可靠。
AI.conclusion: 将生成式策略的探索能力与确定性潜变量控制解耦，可兼顾学习效率与部署鲁棒性，为生成式RL在真实机器人控制中的应用提供了新范式。

title: Adaptive Inference-Time Scaling via Early-Step Latent Verification for Image Editing
summary: Instruction-based image editing has made notable progress with recent advances in generative models. However, the quality of the edited result is still influenced by the randomly sampled initial noise, particularly in complex editing scenarios. An unsuitable initial noise may lead to unsatisfactory editing results. Recent inference-time scaling methods address this issue by sampling multiple initial noises and selecting better candidates. Nevertheless, most of them follow a decode-then-verify scheme which introduces an efficiency-accuracy trade-off. When decoding is performed after limited inference steps, the decoded images often remain too noisy for reliable assessment, whereas sufficiently denoised images require much higher computational cost. To address this issue, we propose VeriLatent, a plug-and-play adaptive inference-time scaling framework with early-step latent verification for image editing. Specifically, we propose a novel verifier that scores each initial noise through a latent-space editing activation map at an early stage. It identifies promising candidates by assessing whether they can induce an effective edit in the correct region. This enables efficient early pruning without decoding latents into images. Building on this, we further develop an adaptive search strategy for inference-time scaling. It allocates inference budgets according to editing difficulty, thereby reducing the number of function evaluations (NFE). Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks and different base models demonstrate that VeriLatent consistently improves both editing performance and inference-time scaling efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VeriLatent框架，通过在潜在空间早期验证初始噪声的有效性，实现高效、自适应的推理时缩放，提升指令驱动图像编辑的质量与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于指令的图像编辑方法受随机采样初始噪声影响，尤其在复杂场景下效果不稳定；而现有推理时缩放方法采用‘解码后验证’策略，存在效率与精度权衡问题。
AI.method: 提出VeriLatent框架：1）设计基于潜在空间编辑激活图的早期噪声验证器，无需解码即可评估初始噪声质量；2）构建自适应搜索策略，根据编辑难度动态分配推理预算，减少函数评估次数（NFE）。
AI.result: 在多个基准和不同基础模型上实验表明，VeriLatent显著提升了编辑性能与推理时缩放效率。
AI.conclusion: VeriLatent是一种即插即用、高效的推理时缩放框架，通过潜在空间早期验证与自适应预算分配，有效缓解了初始噪声敏感性与效率-精度权衡问题。

title: Scaling Human and G2P Supervision for Robust Phonetic Transcription
summary: Expert phonetic annotation is costly, especially for non-standard dialects and atypical speech. A common alternative is using Grapheme-to-Phoneme (G2P) models to auto-generate phonetic labels from text transcripts at scale. We study how automatic phonetic transcription performance scales with human and G2P supervision in English. Using a curated 80-hour benchmark spanning native, non-native and post-stroke speech, we identify a supervision quality threshold: G2P supervision helps only when fewer than 20-30 hours of human annotation are available. Beyond this threshold, it provides no significant benefit and can reduce cross-dialect robustness. What is effective after this threshold is ASR pretraining which we use to achieve a 2.3x reduction in weighted phone feature error rate over prior systems, with strong gains on non-native and aphasic speech. These results suggest that quantity-driven G2P scaling may yield diminishing returns for robust generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在英语语音识别中，自动音素转录性能如何随人工标注和G2P模型监督的变化而变化；发现G2P仅在人工标注少于20–30小时时有益，超过后反而损害跨方言鲁棒性；ASR预训练则显著降低音素特征错误率，尤其对非母语和失语症语音效果更优。
AI.motivation: 专家音素标注成本高，尤其对非标准方言和异常语音；G2P虽可替代，但其监督效果随标注量变化尚不明确。
AI.method: 基于涵盖母语、非母语及中风后语音的80小时基准数据集，系统评估不同监督比例（人工 vs. G2P）下音素转录性能，并对比ASR预训练的效果。
AI.result: G2P监督仅在<20–30小时人工标注时提升性能；超此阈值后无益甚至损害跨方言鲁棒性；ASR预训练使加权音素特征错误率降低2.3倍，尤其改善非母语与失语症语音识别。
AI.conclusion: 单纯依赖G2P扩大监督规模难以持续提升泛化能力；高质量ASR预训练比数量驱动的G2P更具效益。

title: TimeVista: Exploring and Exploiting Vision-Language Models as Judges for Time Series Forecasting
summary: High-quality time series forecasting is pivotal for real-world decision-making. However, traditional point-wise metrics often fail to reveal complex temporal patterns and align poorly with human intuitive preferences. While the ''LLM-as-a-Judge'' paradigm has revolutionized text evaluation by providing flexible, human-aligned judgment, its application to time series remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we leverage Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as judges for time series forecasting, harnessing their ability to comprehend time series plots grounded in textual information. Specifically, we propose a novel framework integrating micro- and macro-level judgments informed by contextual information to evaluate time series forecasting. To this end, we introduce TimeVista, a comprehensive VLM-as-a-Judge benchmark comprising 5563 time series samples paired with detailed evaluation rubrics. Extensive meta-evaluations demonstrate that VLMs are highly reliable judges, achieving significantly higher consistency with human preferences than conventional metrics. Building upon our benchmark, we comprehensively assess recent Time Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) under the VLM-as-a-Judge paradigm. Our results demonstrate that VLMs serve as robust and interpretable judges, providing a comprehensive, human-aligned standard for evaluating time series models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TimeVista框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）作为'裁判'评估时间序列预测结果，通过微观与宏观结合的判断方式，显著提升与人类直觉偏好的一致性，并构建了含5563个样本的基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 传统点式评估指标难以捕捉时间序列中的复杂时序模式，且与人类直观偏好不一致；而LLM-as-a-Judge范式在文本评估中成功，但在时间序列领域尚未探索。
AI.method: 提出基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的'VLM-as-a-Judge'新范式，融合微观（局部细节）与宏观（整体趋势）判断，并构建TimeVista基准——包含5563个时间序列样本及详细评估量规。
AI.result: VLM作为裁判展现出高可靠性，在元评估中显著优于传统指标；对主流时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）的评估验证了其鲁棒性、可解释性及与人类偏好的高度一致性。
AI.conclusion: VLM-as-a-Judge是一种更全面、更符合人类直觉的时间序列预测评估新标准，TimeVista为该方向提供了坚实基准与方法论支撑。

title: MosaicQuant: Inlier-Outlier Disaggregation for Unified 4-Bit LLM Quantization
summary: 4-bit quantization significantly reduces the memory footprint and accelerates the inference of large language models (LLMs). However, its limited bit-width representation struggles to faithfully capture both dense common values (\emph{inliers}) and rare large-magnitude values (\emph{outliers}), causing substantial accuracy degradation. Existing mixed-precision methods mitigate this by retaining outliers in high precision, but at the cost of breaking the uniformity of low-bit execution, introducing precision conversion and extra data movement that undermine practical speedup. We propose \textbf{MosaicQuant}, a unified 4-bit LLM quantization paradigm built on a novel principle of \emph{inlier--outlier disaggregation}. Rather than elevating outlier precision, MosaicQuant quantizes the full weight matrix into a dense 4-bit base component, where inliers are captured faithfully while outlier are inevitably quantized. A sparse 4-bit residual component is then introduced to compensate for these quantization errors, selectively targeting the most error-critical weight blocks where output distortion is shown to be concentrated. However, a unified representation alone is insufficient, as naïvely executing the sparse residual as a separate kernel still breaks the unified low-bit inference pipeline. To bridge this gap, we introduce \textbf{ZipperEngine}, which fuses sparse block computation into the dense 4-bit GEMM kernel via an overlapped pipeline, unifying not only the representation but also the execution into a single coherent low-bit inference pipeline. Extensive experiments on LLaMA3 and Qwen3 demonstrate that MosaicQuant preserves near-FP16 accuracy while achieving up to $1.24\times$ speedup over the W16A16 baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MosaicQuant，一种基于inlier-outlier分离原则的统一4位LLM量化范式，并设计ZipperEngine融合稀疏残差计算到稠密4位GEMM中，实现表示与执行的双重统一，在保持近FP16精度的同时提升推理速度。
AI.motivation: 4位量化虽节省内存并加速推理，但难以同时准确表示常见值（inliers）和罕见大值（outliers），导致精度显著下降；现有混合精度方法虽缓解此问题，却破坏低比特执行一致性，引入额外开销。
AI.method: 提出MosaicQuant：将权重矩阵分解为稠密4位基础分量（忠实表示inliers）与稀疏4位残差分量（针对性补偿关键块的量化误差）；进一步设计ZipperEngine，通过重叠流水线将稀疏块计算融合进稠密4位GEMM内核，实现端到端统一低比特推理。
AI.result: 在LLaMA3和Qwen3上实验表明，MosaicQuant在保持近FP16精度的同时，相比W16A16基线最高提速1.24倍。
AI.conclusion: MosaicQuant结合inlier-outlier分离与ZipperEngine执行融合，实现了表示与计算的双重低比特统一，在精度与速度间取得更优平衡，为高效LLM部署提供了新范式。

title: WaveSync: Constrained Wavefront Optimization for Synchronized Co-Speech Gestures in Humanoid Robots
summary: Expressive co-speech gestures are crucial for natural human-robot interaction, but generating them on physical humanoid robots is difficult because gesture strokes must align with speech emphasis while satisfying strict kinematic and dynamic constraints. Unlike virtual avatars, humanoid robots cannot freely execute rapid or overlapping motions, making word-level synchronization and hardware-safe motion planning a coupled problem. We present \textbf{WaveSync}, a hybrid framework in which a Large Language Model decomposes dialogue responses into structured semantic schemas and assigns per-word importance weights, constructing a continuous Semantic Importance Wave. Gesture trajectories are shaped through Dynamic Movement Primitives, enforcing kinematic feasibility while enhancing expressiveness. A Wavefront Optimization stage aligns peak-to-peak gesture-speech synchronization and resolves residual kinematic violations through gesture-duration compression and forward propagation. Experimental evaluation based on five dialogue scenarios shows that our method achieves high synchronization accuracy and outperforms three baselines in both objective and subjective evaluations. Each component in WaveSync plays a necessary role in producing gestures that are expressive, semantically grounded, and kinematically compliant. The code, resources, and videos are available at \href{https://github.com/pairs-lab/WaveSync}{WaveSync}

AI.tldr: 本文提出WaveSync框架，通过大语言模型生成语义重要性波形，并结合动态运动原语和波前优化，实现人形机器人在对话中生成既具表现力又符合运动学约束的协同语音手势。
AI.motivation: 人形机器人生成富有表现力的协同语音手势面临挑战：手势需与语音重音对齐，同时满足严格的运动学和动力学约束；与虚拟头像不同，物理机器人无法自由执行快速或重叠动作，导致词级同步与硬件安全运动规划成为耦合问题。
AI.method: WaveSync是混合框架：1）大语言模型将对话响应分解为结构化语义模式并分配词级重要性权重，构建连续语义重要性波；2）使用动态运动原语（DMP）生成符合运动学可行性的手势轨迹并增强表现力；3）波前优化阶段实现峰-峰级语音-手势同步，并通过手势时长压缩和前向传播解决残余运动学违规。
AI.result: 在五个对话场景的实验评估中，该方法实现了高同步精度，在客观和主观评价中均优于三个基线方法；各模块对生成兼具表现力、语义依据和运动学合规的手势均不可或缺。
AI.conclusion: WaveSync成功解决了物理人形机器人协同语音手势生成中的同步与运动学约束耦合难题，为自然人机交互提供了可扩展、可解释且硬件友好的解决方案。

title: City landscape in sight: A crowdsourced framework for unlocking urban-scale window view perceptions from real estate imagery
summary: City landscapes viewed through home windows influence quality of life, yet perceptions of actual window views at the urban scale remain understudied. This study presents an approach for large-scale mapping of perceptions using 12,334 window view images (WVIs) collected from actual residential properties listed on real estate platforms in Wuhan, China, representing a rarely explored form of urban view imagery that offers advantages over the rendered or simulated window views commonly examined in previous studies. Through a non-immersive virtual reality platform, we collected 27,477 pairwise comparisons across six perceptual dimensions (e.g.\ Vivid) from 304 participants based on 499 WVIs. A hybrid neural network model was trained to predict human perceptions of all crowdsourced WVIs and map their spatial distribution. Results reveal significant spatial autocorrelation with distinct hot and cold spots across the whole city. Floor level strongly influences human perceptions: while higher floors offer more preferred and extensive window views, lower-floor windows provide residents with quiet and vivid views. An inference model further shows that window view composition matters considerably: high ratios of sky, trees, and low-rise buildings enhance people's preferences and perceptions of vividness, whereas high ratios of high-rise buildings increase perceptions of monotony and oppression. Importantly, these effects are non-linear: the excessive presence of certain elements can alter their impact on human perception. This work advances urban-scale understanding of residents' visual experiences and provides evidence-based guidance for human-centric urban planning and real estate to optimise visual landscapes from windows.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用武汉住宅平台上的12,334张真实窗景图像（WVIs），结合27,477次成对感知比较实验与混合神经网络建模，首次在城市尺度上系统映射居民对窗景的多维感知（如鲜活度、偏好度等），揭示其空间自相关格局、楼层影响及窗景构成要素（天空、树木、建筑等）的非线性效应，为以人为本的城市规划与房地产设计提供实证依据。
AI.motivation: 城市住宅窗景影响居民生活质量，但城市尺度下对真实窗景的感知研究仍严重不足；现有研究多依赖渲染或模拟图像，缺乏真实场景数据支撑。
AI.method: 采集武汉房产平台12,334张真实窗景图像（WVIs）；通过非沉浸式VR平台收集304名参与者对499张样本图像在6个感知维度上的27,477次成对比较；构建混合神经网络模型预测全部WVIs的感知得分并生成空间分布图；结合空间统计与可解释AI分析楼层、构图要素的影响机制。
AI.result: 发现窗景感知存在显著空间自相关，呈现明显冷热区；楼层高度显著影响感知：高楼层更受偏好且视野开阔，低楼层则更显安静与鲜活；窗景构成中天空、树木和低层建筑比例提升偏好与鲜活感，高层建筑比例增加单调与压抑感；且上述影响均呈非线性关系。
AI.conclusion: 真实窗景的感知具有可量化、可映射、可解释的空间规律，其驱动因素（楼层、构图）存在复杂非线性作用；该成果推动了城市视觉体验研究从个体实验走向大规模实证，并为优化居住视觉环境提供了科学路径。

title: In-Domain Supervised Pathology Report Classification: A Reproducible Pipeline from Data Curation to Production-Matched Evaluation
summary: We introduce an in-domain supervised pipeline designed to counter the out-of-distribution performance drop that hampers supervised biomedical NLP models, a problem observed when models trained on pathology reports are moved across cancer registries. Our contribution is a reproducible recipe for training a supervised classifier from routinely collected cancer registry data. It describes how to build the in-domain training set and a production-matched holdout, and to choose operating points that keep the false-negative rate (FNR) very low while keeping reviewer workload manageable. The pipeline standardizes data curation with facility-stratified sampling and separate handling of reports linked to registry cases, and includes a blinded manual audit to estimate positive-case prevalence and label noise. On a 418k-report holdout set, the Kentucky model achieved FNR 0.003 and false-positive rate (FPR) 0.097, improving over the Seattle-trained MOSSAIC OncoID baseline (FNR 0.010, FPR 0.183) and raising F1 from 0.860 to 0.922. In a blinded manual review of 600 reports, estimated positive prevalence declined from 0.500 to 0.398, indicating substantial label noise with errors concentrated in rare primary sites.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向领域内监督学习的可复现流程，用于解决生物医学NLP模型在跨癌症登记处迁移时因分布外数据导致的性能下降问题；通过设施分层采样、区分处理关联报告、盲审估计标签噪声等方法，在肯塔基数据集上显著降低假阴率（FNR）并提升F1分数。
AI.motivation: 解决监督式生物医学NLP模型在不同癌症登记处间迁移时因分布偏移导致的性能显著下降问题。
AI.method: 构建领域内训练集与生产匹配的保留集；采用设施分层采样进行数据整理；对链接到登记病例的报告单独处理；引入盲审人工审计以估计阳性病例流行率和标签噪声；选择兼顾极低假阴率与可控人工复核工作量的操作点。
AI.result: 在41.8万报告的保留集上，肯塔基模型FNR为0.003、FPR为0.097，F1达0.922，优于西雅图训练的MOSSAIC OncoID基线（FNR 0.010，FPR 0.183，F1 0.860）；盲审600份报告发现阳性率从0.500降至0.398，表明存在显著标签噪声，且错误集中于罕见原发部位。
AI.conclusion: 该可复现流程能有效缓解跨登记处迁移中的分布偏移问题，在保持极低假阴率的同时控制人工审核负担，适用于基于常规癌症登记数据训练临床NLP分类器的实际部署场景。

title: PAL-Bench: Evidence-Grounded Profile Reconstruction from Longitudinal Personal Albums
summary: Longitudinal personal albums are weak-schema multimodal databases: noisy perceptual records whose key facts require joins across faces, text, timestamps, locations, and repeated events. Existing visual, video, document, and lifelog benchmarks test sub-problems, but not album-scale profile reconstruction with social identity binding and evidence citation. Benchmarking this task is difficult because the ground truth needed for evaluation--owner profiles, social graphs, face-name maps, and evidence provenance--is private state that real albums cannot safely release. We introduce PAL-Bench, a controlled benchmark for evidence-grounded reconstruction under a public-record contract. Its Evidence Compiler builds latent private worlds, programs target-level evidence paths, renders album pixels, re-measures them through perception pipelines, and exports audited public/private views. Agents receive only perception-derived public records; targets, identifier maps, and evidence paths remain hidden. PAL-Bench contains 50 synthetic users, 36,659 public photo records, and 2,799 targets over owner facts, identities, and relations. A privacy-preserving audit with 10 participants confirms that PAL-Bench evidence structures match real private albums, though equivalent releases remain privacy-prohibitive. Across seven systems and two compute-matched diagnostics, a seven-metric protocol reveals a gap between plausible profile summarization and faithful social reconstruction: systems recover some owner facts but struggle with recurring identities and evidence citation. PAL-TRACE, a reference framework that freezes identity bindings before owner-fact mining, performs best but leaves hard identity resolution far from solved. PAL-Bench provides a testbed for perceptual entity resolution, multimodal data integration, temporal evidence aggregation, and provenance-aware structured prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PAL-Bench，一个用于证据驱动的个人相册档案重建的受控基准，通过合成数据模拟真实私有相册结构，在保护隐私前提下评估系统在社会身份绑定与证据引用方面的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅测试子任务，无法评估相册尺度下的社会身份绑定与证据引用；而真实相册的ground truth（如用户档案、社交图谱、人脸-姓名映射）因隐私敏感难以公开，亟需兼顾真实性与隐私安全的新型基准。
AI.method: 设计PAL-Bench：Evidence Compiler构建隐式私有世界、编程证据路径、渲染图像并经感知流水线重测量，输出可审计的公/私视图；代理仅访问感知生成的公开记录，目标、标识映射和证据路径均隐藏。
AI.result: 包含50个合成用户、36,659张公开照片、2,799个目标（涵盖所有者事实、身份与关系）；10人隐私审计确认其证据结构贴近真实相册；七系统评测显示当前方法能部分恢复所有者事实，但在重复身份识别与证据引用上表现薄弱；PAL-TRACE框架（先冻结身份绑定再挖掘事实）效果最优但仍存挑战。
AI.conclusion: PAL-Bench为感知实体解析、多模态数据融合、时序证据聚合与溯源感知结构预测提供了首个兼顾隐私与真实性的测试平台，揭示了当前系统在社会身份一致性建模与证据可追溯性上的根本局限。

title: Z-Plane Neural Networks: Bounded Geometric Activation Replaces ReLU and LayerNorm
summary: Modern deep neural networks rely on Euclidean scalar activations (e.g., ReLU) and global normalization techniques (e.g., LayerNorm) to prevent gradient instability in deep architectures. However, these mechanisms inherently cause dead neurons, discard critical directional information, and destroy the orthogonality of feature representations. Inspired by the frequency-modulation transmission of biological axons, we propose the Z-Plane Neural Network, which maps hidden states into 2D phasor bundles on a hypersphere. We introduce a novel geometric activation function, Radial Bounding($\mathbf{x} / \max(1, \|\mathbf{x}\|_2)$), which limits the energy magnitude while preserving the phase (direction). We demonstrate mathematically that this isotropic activation maintains 1-Lipschitz continuity and prevents gradient vanishing by preserving tangential gradients. Empirically, a 100-layer Z-Plane Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP)-entirely devoid of ReLU and LayerNorm-successfully converges on the MNIST dataset with 98.34% accuracy and absolute numerical stability, proving that bounded geometric activation alone is sufficient for stable deep learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Z-Plane神经网络，用2D相量束和径向裁剪激活函数替代传统ReLU与LayerNorm，在100层MLP上实现稳定训练和高精度。
AI.motivation: 传统Euclidean激活（如ReLU）和全局归一化（如LayerNorm）导致神经元死亡、丢失方向信息、破坏特征正交性；受生物轴突频率调制启发，需保留方向与正交性并避免梯度不稳定。
AI.method: 将隐状态映射到超球面上的2D相量束；提出几何激活函数Radial Bounding（x / max(1, ||x||₂)），限制能量幅值但保留相位（方向）；理论证明其满足1-Lipschitz连续性且保持切向梯度以防止梯度消失。
AI.result: 在MNIST上，100层无ReLU、无LayerNorm的Z-Plane MLP达到98.34%准确率，且数值绝对稳定。
AI.conclusion: 仅靠有界几何激活即可支撑深度学习的稳定训练，无需传统非线性激活与归一化模块。

title: Reinforcement Learning with Inner-loop Dynamics Estimator for Aerial Manipulation under Uncertainty
summary: Aerial manipulators enable physical interaction in hard-to-reach environments; however, the combined problem of direct whole-body aerial manipulation under rapid arm motion, payload changes, and related unknown dynamic uncertainty remains a largely unsolved problem. We present a hierarchical control framework that combines Reinforcement Learning (RL) with an inner-loop dynamics estimator to address this problem. The RL outer loop maps desired 6-degrees-of-freedom (DOF) end-effector targets to coordinated whole-body commands, enabling direct task-driven control without relying on a fully accurate coupled dynamic model in the policy layer. An inner loop then tracks these commands while compensating for transient inertial shifts and uncertainty during execution via a dynamics estimator scheme without requiring system model knowledge. We validate the proposed approach on a custom quadrotor equipped with a 3-DoF manipulator through hardware experiments under varying payload conditions. Compared with RL+PID and RL+INDI+PID baselines, the proposed method reduces end-effector tracking error and improves task success rate across the tested hardware conditions. These results show that combining learned whole-body coordination with estimator-based low-level compensation improves the precision and robustness of aerial manipulation under changing operating conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合强化学习（RL）与内环动力学估计器的分层控制框架，用于解决无人机机械臂在快速臂运动、负载变化及动态不确定性下的全机身直接操作难题。
AI.motivation: aerial manipulators在难以到达环境中实现物理交互的需求日益增长，但其在快速臂运动、负载变化和动态不确定性下的全机身直接操作仍缺乏有效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用分层控制框架：外环为强化学习控制器，将6自由度末端执行器目标映射为协调的全机身指令；内环为基于动力学估计器的跟踪控制器，在不依赖精确耦合动力学模型的情况下补偿瞬态惯性变化和不确定性。
AI.result: 在搭载3自由度机械臂的定制四旋翼平台上进行了硬件实验，结果表明该方法相比RL+PID和RL+INDI+PID基线方法显著降低了末端执行器跟踪误差并提高了任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 将学习驱动的全机身协调控制与估计器驱动的底层补偿相结合，可提升空中操作在变化工况下的精度与鲁棒性。

title: Keep It in Mind: User Centric Continual Spatial Intelligence Reasoning in Egocentric Video Streams
summary: We introduce UCS-Bench, a dataset spanning 170+ hours of egocentric visual observations with 8.1K+ timestamped questions for diagnosing User-Centric Continual Spatial intelligence in egocentric video streams. UCS-Bench targets a new problem that emphasizes dynamic spatial reasoning, long-term memory, and their alignment with users' real-time locations. We propose DirectMe, a framework that incrementally constructs and maintains a structured spatial memory from streaming egocentric observations. DirectMe enables robust tracking and recall of object locations, all relative to the user's movement over time. By tightly coupling visual perception with memory updates and spatial reasoning, our approach supports long-horizon queries that require recalling interactions, resolving viewpoint-induced ambiguities, and adapting to dynamic scenes. Our experiments show that DirectMe significantly improves the spatial reasoning of leading multimodal LLMs; it also surpasses many spatially aware and long-form streaming video models. We hope our benchmark and solution will advance spatial intelligence research for egocentric AI assistants. Data and code are available at https://github.com/cocowy1/UCS-Bench.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了UCS-Bench数据集和DirectMe框架，用于评估和提升以用户为中心的持续空间智能，尤其在动态空间推理、长时记忆与实时定位对齐方面。
AI.motivation: 针对现有方法在 egocentric 视频流中缺乏对动态空间推理、长时记忆及与用户实时位置对齐能力的评估与建模问题，提出新基准与解决方案。
AI.method: 构建包含170+小时第一人称视频和8.1K+时间戳问题的UCS-Bench数据集；提出DirectMe框架，通过增量式构建结构化空间记忆，紧密耦合视觉感知、记忆更新与空间推理。
AI.result: DirectMe显著提升了主流多模态大模型的空间推理能力，并优于多种具备空间感知能力或处理长视频流的模型。
AI.conclusion: UCS-Bench与DirectMe为egocentric AI助手的空间智能研究提供了新基准与有效技术路径。

title: From Argument Components to Graphs: A Multi-Agent Debate with Confidence Gating for Argument Relations
comment: Accepted for publication in the proceedings of KES 2026
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly assessed and utilized in the field of Argument Mining (AM), thanks to their strong general reasoning capabilities. However, standard training-free models often miss sophisticated details, specifically in contexts where two parts of the text have to be analyzed together. Furthermore, self-correction mechanisms tend to reinforce initial hallucinations in reasoning. Overcoming these limitations typically requires expensive, domain-specific supervised fine-tuning. Recent work has shown that a multi-agent paradigm can address such weaknesses for the component classification task through dialectical refinement with a Proponent-Opponent-Judge architecture, setting a promising direction for training-free approaches in the field. In this paper, we extend and evaluate this framework on the Argument Relation Identification and Classification (ARIC) task, reformulating it as a debate over component pairs. Besides that, we introduce a confidence gating mechanism that enables debating only on the uncertain cases and accepting the initial prediction when confidence is high. On the UKP Argument Annotated Essays v2 corpus, we demonstrate that the selective debate achieves the highest Macro F1 among all training-free methods, while debate over all samples degrades performance below that of one of the baselines. All generative approaches also outperform fine-tuned RoBERTa models on Macro F1, suggesting that the under-representation of the Attack class was more damaging to supervised fine-tuning than to inference-only models. Additionally, our framework produces human-readable debate transcripts, offering interpretability absent from both single-agent and supervised classifiers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体辩论（Proponent-Opponent-Judge）与置信度门控机制的训练免费框架，用于Argument Relation Identification and Classification（ARIC）任务，在UKP数据集上超越所有训练免费方法，并优于微调RoBERTa，同时提供可解释的辩论记录。
AI.motivation: 标准无训练大语言模型在Argument Mining中难以捕捉需联合分析的文本细节，且自纠错易强化幻觉；而监督微调成本高、领域依赖强。
AI.method: 扩展多智能体辩证精炼框架（Proponent-Opponent-Judge）至ARIC任务，将其建模为对论元对的辩论；引入置信度门控机制，仅对低置信预测启动辩论。
AI.result: 在UKP v2数据集上，选择性辩论取得最高Macro F1（优于所有训练免费方法及微调RoBERTa）；全样本辩论反而性能下降；生成式方法整体优于RoBERTa；框架输出可读辩论日志。
AI.conclusion: 置信度门控的多智能体辩论是一种高效、可解释、无需训练的ARIC解决方案，凸显了推理阶段优化相较于监督微调的优势。

title: Measuring Whether LLM Tutors Teach or Solve: A Diagnostic for Educational Impact
summary: Large language models are increasingly proposed as educational tutors, yet stronger task-solving ability does not necessarily imply stronger learning support. Motivated by recent calls to measure the social impact of NLP systems in practice, we study whether public LLM tutoring benchmarks distinguish learning-supportive behavior from mere answer production. We propose a lightweight diagnostic based on the gap between solving-oriented and pedagogy-oriented benchmark performance. Using public MathTutorBench leaderboard results, we show that these dimensions are only partially aligned: across eight publicly reported models, the correlation between solving and pedagogy composites is 0.421, and several models shift meaningfully in rank when evaluation moves from solving to pedagogy. We then analyze the public TutorBench sample and show that agency-relevant behaviors are explicitly encoded in benchmark rubrics, especially in active-learning settings that reward guiding questions, calibrated hints, and non-disclosive scaffolding. Together, these findings suggest that educational-impact evaluation should not treat task success as a sufficient proxy for learning support. We argue that public tutoring benchmarks can better support positive-impact evaluation by reporting solving-oriented and pedagogy-oriented scores separately and by making disclosure-sensitive, student-agency-preserving criteria more explicit.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大型语言模型（LLM）作为教育导师的有效性，指出解题能力强并不等同于教学支持能力强；通过分析MathTutorBench等公开辅导基准，发现解题能力与教学能力相关性较弱（r=0.421），且模型排名在两类评估间显著变化；研究强调应区分并分别报告‘解题导向’与‘教学导向’指标，并在评测标准中更明确体现学生主体性（如引导式提问、适度提示、非直接答案提供）等教育原则。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM教育应用多以任务求解能力为代理指标，但教育本质在于促进学习而非仅给出答案；需检验公共辅导评测基准是否真正捕捉到支持学习的教学行为，响应NLP系统社会影响实证评估的呼吁。
AI.method: 提出一种轻量级诊断方法——比较模型在‘解题导向’与‘教学导向’两类基准上的性能差距；基于公开MathTutorBench排行榜数据计算二者复合得分的相关性及排名变化；进一步对TutorBench样本进行细粒度分析，考察评测细则中是否显式编码支持学生主体性（agency）的教学行为（如引导提问、校准提示、非披露式支架）。
AI.result: 八种公开模型在解题与教学维度得分相关性仅为0.421，多个模型排名发生明显变动；TutorBench评测细则确已包含对学生主体性敏感的行为要求，尤其在主动学习场景中强调引导性、渐进性与非直接性教学策略。
AI.conclusion: 单纯依赖任务完成度无法充分衡量LLM的教育价值；公共辅导评测应分离报告解题与教学两类指标，并更清晰地将保护学生主体性、促进深度学习的教学原则嵌入评测标准，以推动具有正向教育影响的模型发展与评估。

title: The Reservoir Attention Network: Cross-Pass State in Pretrained Transformers via Content-Addressable Reservoir Injection
summary: A feasibility and dynamics study of the Reservoir Attention Network (RAN), an architecture that injects a fixed, randomly-initialized reservoir into the mid-layer attention of a pretrained transformer to carry state across forward passes. Experiments span GPT-2 (124M, 355M) to Qwen2.5 (0.5B, 1.5B) on a single consumer GPU. The tasks are minimal probes chosen to isolate individual mechanisms; the broader always-alive agent vision is treated throughout as compute-limited future work, not a claim of this paper. The reservoir is left untrained (fixed random) by design: this isolates whether untrained recurrent dynamics alone suffice to carry usable cross-pass state, leaving trained recurrence as a complementary, more expensive direction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Reservoir Attention Network（RAN）的新架构，通过在预训练Transformer的中层注意力机制中注入固定、随机初始化的储层（reservoir），以在前向传播间维持状态；实验验证了仅靠未训练的循环动力学即可实现跨步状态传递，无需参数更新。
AI.motivation: 探索是否仅依靠未训练的循环动力学（即固定随机储层）就能在Transformer前向传播间有效维持和传递状态，从而为'始终在线的智能体'提供轻量可行路径。
AI.method: 将固定、随机初始化的储层嵌入预训练Transformer（GPT-2、Qwen2.5）的中层注意力模块，保持储层完全冻结（不训练），在多个规模模型和最小机制探针任务上进行评估。
AI.result: 实验证明，即使储层完全未训练，也能在多种模型规模（124M–1.5B）和任务上稳定携带并利用跨前向传播的状态，表明未训练循环动力学本身具备状态维持能力。
AI.conclusion: 固定随机储层可作为低成本、即插即用的跨步状态载体，验证了‘无训练递归’的有效性，为未来可扩展的持续状态建模提供了新思路，但尚未实现通用持续代理。

title: PATCH: Action-Chunk-Conditioned Latent Patch Innovation Monitoring for Robot Manipulation
summary: Learning-based manipulation policies have made substantial progress in real-world robot manipulation, particularly for short-horizon action generation. However, deployment in open workspaces remains fragile under unexpected local scene dynamics, such as moving objects, transient occlusions, or disturbances near the intended motion. Existing runtime monitors often rely on global observation anomalies, policy uncertainty, or frame-level visual changes, and struggle to distinguish task-relevant execution risk from benign visual variation. We introduce PATCH, an action-chunk-conditioned latent patch innovation monitor for deployment-time intervention. Given the active action chunk, PATCH defines a projected execution corridor, predicts latent patch evolution inside it, and accumulates persistent residuals unexplained by the robot's own motion. These residuals form a localized intervention signal that allows PATCH-Router to pause execution, select an available recovery source, and resume the original policy once localized innovation subsides. Experiments on real robot rollout data show that PATCH produces more stable and context-relevant triggers than competing runtime monitors. Real-robot deployment further demonstrates monitor-driven intervention and policy resumption for disturbance-aware manipulation. Project Page: https://yananzhou5555.github.io/PATCH/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PATCH，一种基于动作块条件的潜在补丁创新监测器，用于在部署时进行干预，通过预测执行走廊内的潜在补丁演化并累积未被机器人自身运动解释的残差，实现对局部场景动态（如移动物体、瞬时遮挡）的鲁棒响应。
AI.motivation: 现有运行时监测器难以区分任务相关执行风险与良性视觉变化，导致在开放工作空间中面对意外局部场景动态（如移动物体、瞬时遮挡）时表现脆弱。
AI.method: PATCH基于当前动作块定义投影执行走廊，预测走廊内潜在补丁的演化，并累积由机器人自身运动无法解释的持续残差，形成局部干预信号；PATCH-Router据此暂停执行、选择恢复源并待局部创新减弱后恢复原策略。
AI.result: 在真实机器人 rollout 数据上的实验表明，PATCH 比现有运行时监测器产生更稳定、上下文更相关的触发信号；真实机器人部署验证了其驱动干预与策略恢复能力。
AI.conclusion: PATCH 提供了一种细粒度、动作感知的局部创新监测机制，显著提升了学习型操作策略在动态开放环境中的部署鲁棒性。

title: Comparing Human Gaze and Vision-Language Model Attention in Safety-Relevant Environments
comment: 30 pages, 33 figures. Submitted as a preprint. Code and data available upon reasonable request
summary:
Human visual attention plays an important role in how people perceive and respond to environments containing potential risks. This study investigates whether large vision-language models can identify the same regions of a scene that attract human attention in safety-relevant environments. Eye-tracking data were collected from ten participants viewing 33 scene images representing environments with varying levels of potential risk using Pupil Invisible wearable glasses. Gaze coordinates were mapped onto stimulus images to generate population-averaged human gaze heatmaps. In parallel, GPT-4o was prompted through the OpenAI Vision Application Programming Interface (API) to generate spatial predictions of visual attention, which were converted into saliency maps for comparison with human gaze patterns.
