  Spatial alignment between human gaze heatmaps and model-generated saliency maps was evaluated using four complementary metrics: Pearson correlation (r = 0.515 +- 0.117), Normalised Scanpath Saliency (NSS = 0.988 +- 0.323), Kullback-Leibler divergence (KL = 1.766 +- 0.844), and Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve using the Judd formulation (AUC-Judd = 0.806 +- 0.076). A cross-model comparison with Gemini Pro, Gemini Flash, and Claude showed that all models exceeded the AUC-Judd chance baseline of 0.5 and achieved positive NSS scores. Gemini Pro demonstrated the strongest spatial localisation according to three of the four metrics, whereas GPT-4o produced the closest distributional match to human attention as measured by KL divergence.
  These findings suggest that large vision-language models can identify regions that broadly correspond to where humans direct visual attention in safety-relevant scenes without requiring eye-tracking training data. The results highlight the potential of vision-language models as a scalable tool for approximating human attentional patterns.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了大型视觉语言模型（如GPT-4o、Gemini Pro等）在安全相关场景中预测人类视觉注意区域的能力，发现其生成的显著性图与人类眼动热图具有中等至良好的空间一致性，无需眼动训练数据即可近似人类注意模式。
AI.motivation: 探究大型视觉语言模型是否能识别出与人类在安全相关环境中相同的关键注意区域，以支持无需眼动仪的注意力建模与风险评估应用。
AI.method: 采集10名被试观看33张风险场景图像的眼动数据，生成群体平均注视热图；同时使用GPT-4o等模型通过视觉API生成空间注意预测，并转换为显著性图；采用Pearson相关、NSS、KL散度和AUC-Judd四项指标量化模型预测与人类注视的空间对齐程度。
AI.result: GPT-4o在KL散度上最接近人类注意分布；Gemini Pro在三项指标上空间定位最优；所有模型AUC-Judd均显著高于随机基线（0.5），NSS均为正值，表明具备基本注意预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 大型视觉语言模型可在无眼动训练数据前提下，较可靠地近似人类在安全场景中的视觉注意分布，具备作为可扩展注意力建模工具的潜力。

title: PVminerLLM2: Improving Structured Extraction of Patient Voice via Preference Optimization
summary:
Motivation: Patient-generated text contains critical information on patients' lived experiences, social context, and care engagement, but remains largely unstructured, limiting its use in patient-centered outcomes research. Prior work introduced the PV-Miner benchmark and PVMinerLLM models for structured extraction. However, supervised fine-tuning (SFT) alone struggles with rare, fine-grained, and unevenly distributed errors, particularly in token-critical structured outputs.
  Results: We present PVminerLLM2, an improved set of LLMs for structured patient voice extraction that applies preference optimization to address token-critical errors beyond the reach of supervised fine-tuning. Our method introduces (i) a preference objective with token-level gated stabilization term that prevents degradation of absolute token likelihood under preference optimization, and (ii) confusion-aware preference pair construction to better capture low-separation distinctions. We further incorporate token-importance weighting and inverse-frequency reweighing to address token imbalance and class skew. Across multiple model sizes, PVMinerLLM2 consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving gains of up to 4.43% (Code), 3.50% (Sub-code), and 1.55% (Span), and outperforms baseline LLM trained with existing preference optimization methods.
  Availability and Implementation: The supplementary material, code, evaluation scripts, and trained models for PVminerLLM2 are publicly available at: https://github.com/Data-Mining-Lab-Yale/PVminerLLM2

AI.tldr: 本文提出PVminerLLM2，通过引入带门控稳定项的偏好优化目标、混淆感知的偏好对构建及重要性加权策略，显著提升患者生成文本中细粒度结构化信息提取的准确性，尤其在token级错误纠正上优于监督微调及其他偏好优化方法。
AI.motivation: 患者自述文本蕴含关键临床和社会信息，但其非结构化特性限制了在以患者为中心的研究中的应用；现有基于监督微调（SFT）的方法难以处理稀有、细粒度且分布不均的token级错误。
AI.method: 提出PVminerLLM2，采用偏好优化替代纯监督微调，核心包括：(i) 带token级门控稳定项的偏好目标，防止绝对token概率退化；(ii) 混淆感知的偏好对构造；(iii) token重要性加权与逆频重加权以缓解类别不平衡。
AI.result: PVminerLLM2在多个模型尺寸下持续超越强基线，在Code、Sub-code和Span指标上分别提升最多4.43%、3.50%和1.55%，且优于现有偏好优化训练的LLM。
AI.conclusion: 偏好优化结合token级稳定性约束与数据构造策略，可有效解决患者语音结构化提取中细粒度、token关键型错误问题，为医疗文本结构化提供新范式。

title: Sensor-Conditioned Representation Learning via Scene-Relevant Observation Quotients
summary: Learned representations in intelligent sensing systems are often evaluated by reconstruction fidelity or downstream prediction accuracy, but these criteria do not specify which latent distinctions are justified by the sensing process. In sensor-conditioned environments, nuisance factors can change measurements without changing the scene, while distinct scenes may be indistinguishable under limited sensing capability. This paper formulates sensor-conditioned representation correctness as preserving sensing-supported scene distinctions while suppressing nuisance-induced and sensor-unsupported variation. We introduce the scene-relevant observation quotient, a representation target induced by sensing-supported distinguishability after nuisance canonicalization, and develop Observation-Quotient Tucker-Structured Autoencoding (OQ-TSAE), a scene-nuisance factorized framework with diagnostics for false distinction, false merge, nuisance sensitivity, and latent ordering consistency. Experiments on a controlled benchmark show that quotient-consistent supervision improves representation-correctness diagnostics over reconstruction-oriented, metric-learning, and contrastive-learning baselines. Sensitivity, perturbation, and ablation studies show the importance of quotient-aligned supervision, reliable quotient relations, and quotient geometry. Complementary real-radar experiments show that a reconstruction-only OQ-TSAE variant retains competitive downstream utility, robustness under observation degradation, and low seed-to-seed variability. These results suggest that sensor-conditioned representations should be evaluated not only by predictive utility, but also by whether their latent geometry preserves sensing-justified scene distinctions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向传感器条件的表征正确性评估框架，定义了‘场景相关观测商’作为表征目标，并设计了OQ-TSAE模型来区分场景本质变化与干扰/传感器限制导致的伪变化，实验表明其在诊断表征错误（如误区分、误合并）方面优于传统重建或对比学习方法。
AI.motivation: 现有智能感知系统中的学习表征多依赖重建保真度或下游任务精度评估，但未明确哪些潜在区分是由传感过程本身所支持的；传感器受限和干扰因素可能导致测量变化不反映真实场景差异，或不同场景在传感下不可区分。
AI.method: 提出‘场景相关观测商’（scene-relevant observation quotient）作为理论目标，构建Observation-Quotient Tucker-Structured Autoencoding（OQ-TSAE）框架，实现场景因子与干扰因子解耦，并提供四种诊断指标：虚假区分、虚假合并、干扰敏感性、潜变量序一致性。
AI.result: 在可控基准上，基于商一致监督的OQ-TSAE显著提升表征正确性诊断性能；敏感性、扰动与消融实验证明商对齐监督、可靠商关系及商几何结构的关键作用；真实雷达实验显示仅用重建的OQ-TSAE变体仍保持强下游性能、鲁棒性与低随机种子方差。
AI.conclusion: 传感器条件下的表征应不仅以预测效用为评价标准，更需考察其潜在几何结构是否忠实保留传感所支持的场景区分能力；观测商为该目标提供了可建模、可诊断的理论基础与实践框架。

title: ReQAT: Achieving Full-Precision Reasoning Accuracy with 4-bit Floating-Point Quantization-Aware Training
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) achieve strong problem-solving through long chain-of-thought, but their deployment is constrained by the high cost of full-precision inference and growing KV cache footprints. Microscaled FP4 formats enable efficient FP4 deployment; however, fully quantizing weights, activations, and KV caches (W4A4KV4) causes severe reasoning degradation that existing PTQ and QAT fail to recover. We identify that FP4 failures concentrate on low-entropy tokens--precise symbolic commitments such as digits and operators--where quantization noise inflates sampling errors that cascade through reasoning traces. Based on this insight, we propose ReQAT, a reasoning-centric FP4 training framework with three components: (i) Trace-Aligned QAT (TAQ), which revisits identical reasoning traces to focus updates on critical low-entropy decisions; (ii) Selective Entropy Minimization (SEM), which reinforces confidence at low-entropy positions; and (iii) Q-FIT, a quantization-friendly initialization that jointly calibrates RoPE-consistent KV cache transformations to stabilize QAT. Under the same training budget, ReQAT not only recovers but surpasses BF16 fine-tuning accuracy, while delivering up to 3.9x throughput speedup on NVIDIA DGX Spark and 3.1x on B200.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReQAT框架，通过推理中心化的FP4训练方法，在保持高效低精度部署的同时，显著提升大型推理模型的准确性和推理速度。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型（LRMs）在长思维链推理中表现优异，但其全精度推理成本高且KV缓存占用大；现有FP4量化方法（W4A4KV4）导致严重推理退化，尤其是对低熵符号类token（如数字、运算符）敏感。
AI.method: 提出ReQAT框架，包含三部分：(i) Trace-Aligned QAT（TAQ），复用相同推理路径聚焦关键低熵决策更新；(ii) Selective Entropy Minimization（SEM），增强低熵位置置信度；(iii) Q-FIT，一种量化友好的初始化方法，联合校准RoPE一致的KV缓存变换以稳定QAT。
AI.result: 在相同训练预算下，ReQAT不仅恢复甚至超越BF16微调精度，并在NVIDIA DGX Spark和B200上分别实现最高3.9倍和3.1倍吞吐量加速。
AI.conclusion: ReQAT是一种有效的推理导向FP4训练方案，解决了低熵token量化噪声放大问题，实现了高精度与高效率的统一。

title: VENOM: Versatile Embodied Network for Omni-bodied Motion tracking
summary: Achieving expert-level expressive full-body motion tracking across multiple humanoids solely from demonstration data remains a challenging and relatively an underexplored problem in humanoid robot learning. Cross-embodiment motion tracking policies are mostly trained by decoupling the control problem into upper and lower body control. This work proposes VENOM, a cross-embodiment full-body motion tracking model for humanoids in simulation. VENOM is a GPT-based motion tracker trained on multiple humanoid data that can track the entire body without the requirement to split into upper and lower body control. We curate a multi-humanoid motion tracking dataset called the VENOM dataset that contains states, actions, and rewards and train VENOM and the baselines on this dataset. In this letter, we evaluate VENOM's performance against baselines and show that we can achieve a stable motion tracker across different humanoids more capable than an MLP trained on multiple humanoid data with supervised learning alone, and also show that despite lack of reward feedback, VENOM closely matches the tracking capability of experts that were trained using asymmetric-actor critic reinforcement learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VENOM，一种基于GPT的跨形态人形机器人全身运动跟踪模型，无需上下身解耦控制，在多机器人仿真数据上实现稳定、专家级运动跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨形态运动跟踪方法多依赖上下身解耦控制，难以实现专家级、端到端的全身运动跟踪；且该问题在人形机器人学习中仍具挑战性且研究不足。
AI.method: 提出基于GPT架构的VENOM模型，构建包含状态、动作与奖励的多机器人运动跟踪数据集（VENOM dataset），在该数据集上进行监督训练，不依赖强化学习中的奖励反馈。
AI.result: VENOM在多个仿真人形机器人上展现出比MLP基线更稳定的全身运动跟踪能力，性能接近使用非对称Actor-Critic强化学习训练的专家策略，尽管未使用奖励信号。
AI.conclusion: VENOM验证了纯监督式大模型方法在跨形态全身运动跟踪任务中的有效性，为摆脱强化学习复杂训练流程提供了新范式。

title: Show the Signal, Hide the Noise: Spectral Forcing for Pixel-Space Diffusion
summary: Pixel-space diffusion models are trained on full-bandwidth noisy images, yet the useful signal available to the denoiser is strongly frequency dependent. Under rectified-flow diffusion and natural-image power-law spectra, the per-band data-to-noise contour $k^{*}(t) = (1-t)^{-2/α}$ separates a signal-bearing low-frequency region from a noise-dominated high-frequency region at each time $t$. We show that this implicit coarse-to-fine structure is not merely descriptive: it induces a capacity-allocation problem. A standard pixel-space denoiser must discover the moving bandwidth boundary internally and can spend computation on frequency-time regions where the optimal prediction collapses to deterministic baselines rather than data-distribution modeling. To make this boundary explicit, we introduce Spectral Forcing, a parameter-free, time-conditional 2D-DCT low-pass operator applied to the noisy input before the patch embedder. Its cutoff expands monotonically with the diffusion time and becomes the identity at the data endpoint. Through controlled synthetic experiments, we identify the regime in which the operator is beneficial: coarse patch tokenization and data whose high-frequency content is predominantly noise rather than essential signal. On ImageNet-256 with JiT-700M/32, Spectral Forcing consistently improves both FID and Inception Score across different training epochs, demonstrating robust gains throughout training; at finer tokenization, the spectral forcing is still competitive. We further insert the unchanged operator into SenseNova-U1, a unified text-to-image model, where it improves DPG-Bench and GenEval, showing that the input-side spectral prior transfers beyond class-conditional generation. These results suggest a route to capacity-efficient pixel-space diffusion by showing the signal and hiding the noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Spectral Forcing方法，通过在扩散过程中对噪声图像施加时变低通滤波（基于2D-DCT），显式利用扩散过程中的频域粗到细结构，提升像素空间扩散模型的容量效率与生成质量。
AI.motivation: 像素空间扩散模型在全带宽噪声图像上训练，但不同频率分量在不同扩散时间步的信息量差异显著；标准模型需隐式学习这一频-时结构，易浪费计算资源于无信息区域。
AI.method: 引入Spectral Forcing：一种无参数、时间条件的2D-DCT低通滤波操作，作用于噪声输入图像，在扩散早期抑制高频噪声，截止频率随时间单调增长，终点处退化为恒等映射。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-256上使用JiT-700M/32模型，Spectral Forcing稳定提升FID和Inception Score；在SenseNova-U1文本到图像模型中亦提升DPG-Bench与GenEval指标。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模扩散过程中的频域结构（即‘显示信号、隐藏噪声’）可提升像素空间扩散模型的容量利用率和泛化性，且适用于多种架构与任务。

title: Long-Context Modeling via GSS-Transformer Hybrid Architecture with Learnable Mixing
summary: Modeling long-range dependencies remains a central challenge in natural language processing. Transformer architectures achieve strong performance via self-attention but scale quadratically ($O(N^2)$) with sequence length, while State Space Models (SSMs) scale linearly ($O(N)$) but suffer from a selective recall bottleneck, struggling to retrieve precise information from compressed states. This creates a fundamental tradeoff between efficiency and perplexity. To tackle these challenges, we propose the \textit{Parallel Hybrid Architecture (PHA)}, which runs Gated State Spaces (GSS), Grouped Query Attention (GQA), and Feed-Forward Networks (FFNs) as independent parallel branches fused by a learnable mixing mechanism. Instead of forcing SSMs to approximate attention or serializing the two paradigms, PHA allows each branch to specialize: GSS captures global context, while attention performs selective retrieval, with FFN providing complementary processing. On WikiText-103, PHA achieves 16.51 PPL at 125M parameters, outperforming Hedgehog (16.70) and H3-125M (23.70). Scaling to 180M parameters yields 16.42 PPL, which gives comparable results with the pure attention baseline while delivering 24\% higher throughput and up to 40\% lower memory usage at long contexts. On OpenWebText, our 125M model achieves 19.72 PPL, outperforming standard Transformers (20.60) and GSS hybrid baselines (19.80). These results demonstrate that separating sequence modeling paradigms into parallel specialists enables Transformer-level perplexity with substantially improved efficiency for long-context language modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种并行混合架构（PHA），将门控状态空间模型（GSS）、分组查询注意力（GQA）和前馈网络（FFN）作为独立并行分支，并通过可学习的混合机制融合，以兼顾长程依赖建模的效率与性能。实验表明，PHA在WikiText-103和OpenWebText上达到或超越Transformer的困惑度，同时显著提升吞吐量并降低内存占用。
AI.motivation: 解决Transformer自注意力二次复杂度与状态空间模型（SSM）选择性回忆瓶颈之间的根本权衡问题，即高效性与建模精度难以兼得。
AI.method: 提出并行混合架构（PHA），将Gated State Spaces（GSS）、Grouped Query Attention（GQA）和Feed-Forward Networks（FFN）设为三个独立并行分支，通过可学习混合机制融合；各分支分工明确：GSS捕获全局上下文，注意力实现精确信息检索，FFN提供补充处理。
AI.result: 在WikiText-103上，125M参数PHA达到16.51 PPL，优于Hedgehog（16.70）和H3-125M（23.70）；180M参数时达16.42 PPL，吞吐量提高24%，长上下文内存降低最多40%；在OpenWebText上，125M模型PPL为19.72，优于标准Transformer（20.60）和GSS混合基线（19.80）。
AI.conclusion: 将不同序列建模范式解耦为并行专家模块，可在保持Transformer级困惑度的同时，大幅提升长上下文语言建模的效率。

title: Latent Thought Flow: Efficient Latent Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly rely on intermediate reasoning, yet explicit Chain-of-Thought (CoT) suffers from a linguistic space bottleneck: each thought must be decoded into tokens, causing high inference overhead. Latent reasoning moves deliberation into continuous space, but existing methods mostly learn deterministic or reward-maximizing paths, lacking a principled way to allocate probability across trajectories with different correctness and costs. We propose Latent Thought Flow (LTF), which models reasoning as variable-length continuous trajectories and trains a sampler to match a reward-induced posterior over answer quality and computation cost. We instantiate this with a continuous GFlowNet using stochastic latent transitions. To handle sparse answer supervision, we introduce an Entropy-Weighted Subtrajectory Balance objective for intermediate rewards and a reference-prior regularizer to anchor exploration. Experiments under finetuning and transfer learning settings show that LTF outperforms explicit CoT and latent reasoning baselines, improving accuracy by 9.5% while reducing reasoning length by 27.2% on average compared with strong latent reasoning baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Latent Thought Flow (LTF)，一种基于连续空间的潜意识推理方法，通过连续GFlowNet建模可变长度的隐式推理轨迹，并引入熵加权子轨迹平衡目标和参考先验正则化，以在答案质量与计算成本间实现概率化权衡；实验表明其在准确率和推理长度上均优于显式CoT及现有潜推理方法。
AI.motivation: 显式思维链（CoT）存在语言空间瓶颈，而现有潜推理方法缺乏对不同正确性与成本轨迹的概率分配原则。
AI.method: 提出Latent Thought Flow（LTF），将推理建模为可变长度连续轨迹，采用连续GFlowNet与随机潜在转移，并设计熵加权子轨迹平衡目标和参考先验正则化来应对稀疏监督。
AI.result: 在微调与迁移学习设置下，LTF相比强潜推理基线，平均准确率提升9.5%，推理长度减少27.2%。
AI.conclusion: LTF为潜推理提供了更灵活、高效且概率化的建模范式，在精度与效率间取得更好平衡。

title: Multi-Fidelity SINDy: Sparse Discovery of Nonlinear Dynamical Systems with Fidelity-Weighted Measurements
summary: Data from simulations and experiments are rarely noise-free and often exhibit heterogeneous levels of fidelity. Measurement uncertainty may vary across repeated observations, sensing devices, or even within a single experiment. This work addresses the problem of discovering nonlinear dynamical systems from such inhomogeneous data. We extend the Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamical Systems (SINDy) framework to account for variable noise levels by combining Ensemble SINDy and Weak SINDy within a weighted regression formulation derived from generalized least squares. A statistical justification for the weighting strategy is also provided. The methodology is validated on several benchmark systems, including ordinary and partial differential equations. In addition, we show the benefit of multi-fidelity integration for forecasting the dynamics of a double pendulum system. The results confirm that the proposed approach mitigates the adverse effects of heteroscedastic noise and that repeated, low-cost, low-quality measurements can improve model recovery, in some cases matching or outperforming reconstructions obtained using only high-fidelity data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种加权回归方法，将Ensemble SINDy与Weak SINDy结合，以应对异方差噪声下的非线性动力系统发现任务，并在多个基准系统上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现实中的仿真和实验数据常带有异质噪声（即异方差性），传统SINDy方法难以有效处理此类不均匀不确定性。
AI.method: 扩展SINDy框架，融合Ensemble SINDy与Weak SINDy，构建基于广义最小二乘的加权回归模型，并提供统计意义上的加权策略依据。
AI.result: 在常微分与偏微分方程等基准系统及双摆系统预测任务中验证有效；低质量重复测量可提升模型恢复效果，有时媲美甚至优于仅用高保真数据的结果。
AI.conclusion: 所提加权方法能有效缓解异方差噪声的不利影响，支持多保真度数据融合，在动力系统建模中具有鲁棒性和实用性。

title: Pride and Prejudice: Toward an Information-Theoretic Framework for Mutually Communicative Driver Behavior Modeling
comment: 16 pages, 10 figures. Accepted for the IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems (T-ITS), June 2026
summary: Mixed autonomy driving becomes unsafe and inefficient when autonomous vehicles (AVs) and human-driven vehicles (HVs) misread each other's intentions. We study this problem as implicit mutual communication in lane changes. The proposed framework models how the ego vehicle both expresses its intent and probes the other driver's preference under epistemic uncertainty. It combines a level-k Bayesian persuasion game with virtual features for proactive signaling, information-theoretic rewards for mutual communication, and adaptive weights of communication affordances. We further introduce the Pride-Inquiry (P-I) and Pride-Prejudice (P-P) planes to analyze communication intensity and tendency. The model is calibrated with a Communication-Based Multi-Agent Inverse Reinforcement Learning algorithm (C-MIRL) on the naturalistic NGSIM dataset. Compared with the non-communicative baseline, the proposed model reduces the prediction error of mandatory lane changes by up to 20% while maintaining strong generalization. Driver-In-the-Loop questionnaire scores are positively correlated with the calibrated communication variables, supporting the subjective validity of the model. The learned rewards further show that inquiry and listening affordances contribute more than pride and expression alone, and that inquiry preference varies more strongly across drivers. These results support explicit modeling of mutual communication and epistemic uncertainty in interactive driving.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种建模自动驾驶与人类驾驶车辆间隐式双向通信的框架，通过结合层级贝叶斯说服博弈、虚拟信号特征、信息论奖励及自适应通信权重，在NGSIM数据集上校准后显著降低强制换道预测误差（达20%），并验证了通信变量的主观有效性。
AI.motivation: 混合自主驾驶中，自动驾驶车（AV）与人类驾驶车（HV）因误读彼此意图而导致不安全与低效；本文聚焦于换道场景下的隐式双向意图沟通问题。
AI.method: 提出基于层级-k贝叶斯说服博弈的框架，引入虚拟特征实现主动信号表达，采用信息论奖励衡量双向通信质量，并设计自适应通信能力权重；构建Pride-Inquiry（P-I）与Pride-Prejudice（P-P）分析平面；使用Communication-Based Multi-Agent Inverse Reinforcement Learning（C-MIRL）在NGSIM数据上进行模型校准。
AI.result: 相比无通信基线，强制换道预测误差最高降低20%；驾驶员问卷得分与校准后的通信变量呈正相关；学习到的奖励表明‘探究’与‘倾听’能力比‘自负’与‘表达’更重要，且‘探究’偏好在驾驶员间差异更大。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模交互驾驶中的双向通信与认知不确定性具有必要性与有效性，为混合交通系统设计提供了理论支撑与实证依据。

title: SPARK: Spatial Policy-driven Adaptive Reinforcement learning for Knowledge distillation
summary: Low-bit quantization enables deployment of image restoration (IR) networks on resource-constrained devices, but introduces rounding noise that disproportionately degrades high-frequency regions such as edges and fine textures. Existing knowledge distillation (KD) methods apply distillation signals uniformly across all spatial locations, overlooking the varying reconstruction difficulty across image regions. To address this, we propose SPARK (Spatial Policy-driven Adaptive Reinforcement Learning for Knowledge Distillation), a framework that adaptively allocates distillation effort using a lightweight reinforcement learning (RL) policy network. At each training step, a difficulty feature extractor computes four signals, namely Laplacian variance, pixel variance, student reconstruction error, and teacher-student knowledge gap, which are fed into a compact policy CNN that produces a stochastic spatial weight map to modulate the KD loss during quantization-aware training (QAT). SPARK is IR task-agnostic, adds no inference cost, and integrates into any existing QAT pipeline without architectural changes. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that SPARK consistently outperforms PTQ, QAT, and state-of-the-art (SOTA) KD approaches across multiple student architectures, achieving reconstruction quality closest to the full-precision teacher under significant computational constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPARK框架，通过轻量级强化学习策略网络自适应地分配知识蒸馏（KD）努力，以解决低比特量化在图像恢复任务中对高频区域（如边缘和纹理）的不均衡退化问题。该方法在训练时根据局部重建难度动态生成空间权重图，调节KD损失，无需修改模型结构或增加推理开销，且在多个基准数据集和学生模型上显著优于现有PTQ、QAT及SOTA KD方法。
AI.motivation: 低比特量化虽利于资源受限设备部署，但会引入舍入噪声，尤其损害图像高频区域；而现有知识蒸馏方法在空间上均匀施加蒸馏信号，忽视了不同图像区域的重建难度差异。
AI.method: 提出SPARK框架：设计一个轻量级强化学习策略网络，在每步训练中，由难度特征提取器（计算Laplacian方差、像素方差、学生重建误差、师生知识差距）生成输入，驱动紧凑型策略CNN输出随机空间权重图，用于调制量化感知训练（QAT）中的KD损失。
AI.result: 在多个图像恢复基准数据集和不同学生架构上，SPARK consistently surpasses PTQ、QAT及SOTA KD方法，重建质量最接近全精度教师模型，且无额外推理成本、不改变原有QAT流程或网络结构。
AI.conclusion: SPARK是一种任务无关、即插即用的知识蒸馏增强策略，通过空间自适应机制有效缓解量化带来的高频信息损失，为低比特图像恢复模型提供了高效实用的训练范式。

title: Towards Pareto-Optimal Tool-Integrated Agents with Pareto Ranking Policy Optimization
summary: Recent advances in tool-integrated language agents have significantly improved their ability to solve complex reasoning tasks. However, existing alignment methods predominantly focus on maximizing task accuracy, while overlooking auxiliary objectives such as tool-use efficiency, which are essential for practical deployment. To address this gap, we introduce ParetoPO, a two-stage multi-objective optimization framework for aligning tool-using large language models (LLMs) under competing objectives. In the first stage, ParetoPO leverages hypervolume-guided dynamic scalarization to adapt reward weights based on global Pareto frontier progress. In the second stage, it replaces scalarized learning signals with Pareto-ranking-based advantage computation, promoting nondominated trajectories through dominance-aware credit assignment. This design enables fine-grained, action-level optimization across multiple conflicting objectives. Experimental results on mathematic reasoning and multi-hop QA tasks show that ParetoPO consistently discovers policies with superior accuracy-efficiency trade-offs compared to static and heuristic baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ParetoPO框架，通过两阶段多目标优化方法，在准确率与工具使用效率等冲突目标间实现权衡，提升工具增强型大语言模型的对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐方法主要关注任务准确率，忽视工具使用效率等对实际部署至关重要的辅助目标。
AI.method: ParetoPO是两阶段多目标优化框架：第一阶段采用超体积引导的动态标量化调整奖励权重；第二阶段用基于Pareto排序的优势计算替代标量化信号，实现动作级的非支配轨迹优化。
AI.result: 在数学推理和多跳问答任务上，ParetoPO显著优于静态及启发式基线，在准确率与效率之间取得更优权衡。
AI.conclusion: ParetoPO为工具增强型LLM提供了更实用、更细粒度的多目标对齐方案，兼顾性能与效率。

title: SpecAlign: Efficient Specification-Grounded Alignment of Large Language Models via Synthetic Data
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in real-world applications, alignment is no longer governed by a single universal notion of safety or helpfulness, but instead by provider- or application-specific model specifications. These specifications are typically long, structured, and frequently updated, yet existing alignment pipelines lack a systematic mechanism to operationalize them as training signals. In this paper, we propose specification-grounded alignment, a new alignment paradigm that treats provider-authored model specifications as the primary alignment target rather than abstract principles or static benchmarks. To instantiate this paradigm, we introduce SpecAlign, a framework that synthesizes alignment data directly from specification documents. SpecAlign combines structured rule annotation, controllable specification instantiation, and multi-agent adversarial data synthesis to generate fine-grained, boundary-aware preference pairs that capture both compliant behaviors and meaningful specification violations. Experiments across multiple model specifications and backbone models demonstrate that training with SpecAlign consistently improves rule compliance while preserving general capabilities and avoiding over-conservative behavior. These results suggest that grounding alignment in explicit model specifications enables rapid, precise, and scalable adaptation of LLM behavior to evolving policy requirements.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 specification-grounded alignment 的新对齐范式，以提供方撰写的模型规范为对齐目标，并设计了 SpecAlign 框架，通过结构化规则标注、可控规范实例化和多智能体对抗数据合成，生成细粒度、边界感知的偏好数据，从而提升大语言模型对动态更新规范的合规性，同时保持通用能力和避免过度保守。
AI.motivation: 现有对齐方法难以系统地将长、结构化且频繁更新的提供方模型规范转化为训练信号，导致对齐无法快速适配实际应用中的多样化、动态化政策需求。
AI.method: 提出 SpecAlign 框架：1）结构化规则标注；2）可控的规范实例化；3）多智能体对抗数据合成，用于生成细粒度、边界感知的偏好对（compliant vs. violating）。
AI.result: 在多个模型规范与骨干模型上的实验表明，SpecAlign 显著提升规则合规性，同时保持通用能力、避免过度保守行为。
AI.conclusion: 将对齐锚定于显式模型规范，可实现对 LLM 行为的快速、精准、可扩展适配，是应对现实场景中不断演进政策要求的有效路径。

title: When Generator Replay Degrades: Projected Rehearsal Orchestration for Heterogeneous Federated Class-Incremental Learning
summary: Federated class-incremental learning (FCIL) becomes substantially harder when clients observe different label subsets, progress through tasks at different stages, and provide uneven supervision for the same semantic concepts. Existing FCIL methods often preserve old knowledge through input-space synthesis, but they can be fragile under heterogeneous task streams and difficult to transfer across modalities. To alleviate such issues, we propose PRO, a framework that replaces synthetic input replay with projected rehearsal orchestration. To remove external pretraining, we evaluate all methods under the same warmup. After this, PRO maintains compact class-level projected memories on the server and allows clients perform balanced pseudo multi-task training over current examples and old projected memories. To handle stronger representation drift, we further introduce PRO-MAX, which augments PRO with neighborhood-weighted memory alignment while preserving the same server-light principle that the server only aggregates model updates and memory statistics. Across image, text, and graph benchmarks, PRO and PRO-MAX improve retention and final utility under heterogeneous streams while remaining competitive in homogeneous FCIL. Even when baselines are given expanded replay budgets, they degrade under supervision imbalance and stage misalignment, indicating that replay quantity alone does not resolve replay-quality failures. Additional weak-task diagnostics further show that larger replay mismatch is associated with larger downstream degradation, while our method keeps projected memories better aligned with the evolving representation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRO框架，通过投影式排练编排替代合成输入重放，解决联邦类增量学习中客户端标签子集异构、任务进度不一致和监督不平衡等问题；进一步提出PRO-MAX增强邻域加权记忆对齐，提升表征漂移鲁棒性，在多模态基准上显著提升知识保留与最终性能。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦类增量学习方法依赖输入空间合成重放，在客户端标签分布、任务阶段和监督强度高度异构时表现脆弱，且难以跨模态迁移。
AI.method: 提出PRO框架：服务端维护紧凑的类别级投影记忆，客户端在当前样本与旧投影记忆上进行平衡的伪多任务训练；进一步提出PRO-MAX，在保持服务端轻量（仅聚合模型更新与记忆统计）前提下引入邻域加权记忆对齐。所有方法在统一无预训练warmup下评估。
AI.result: PRO与PRO-MAX在图像、文本、图数据等多模态异构FCIL基准上均优于基线，显著提升知识保留率与最终任务性能；即使基线获得更大重放预算，仍因监督不平衡与阶段错位而性能下降；弱任务诊断表明，PRO系列方法能更好维持投影记忆与动态表征的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 投影式记忆重放比合成输入重放更鲁棒、更可迁移；记忆质量（对齐性）比重放数量更重要；PRO系列框架为异构联邦增量学习提供了高效、轻量、跨模态兼容的新范式。

title: DataLadder: A Simulation-Enabled Interconversion Toolchain for the Embodied Data Pyramid
summary: Generalist robot policies require trustworthy evaluation and robot-usable training data, but both are difficult to scale with physical robots alone. Real-robot trials and demonstrations remain the most faithful source of deployment signals, yet they are slow, costly, and hard to reproduce. We present DataLadder, a simulation-enabled interconversion toolchain for human-robot aligned model evaluation and data generation, denoted as Robot $\rightleftharpoons$ Simulation $\rightleftharpoons$ Human. On the one hand, the Robot $\rightarrow$ Simulation $\rightarrow$ Human pathway supports human-robot aligned model evaluation by reconstructing real-robot tabletop organization tasks as calibrated digital twins for scalable evaluation, while using human embodied feedback to inspect and refine the naturalness of simulated motions. On the other hand, the Human $\rightarrow$ Simulation $\rightarrow$ Robot pathway supports human-robot aligned data generation: it lifts ego-centric human demonstrations into simulation, checks them under robot physical constraints, and converts them into robot-centered trajectories, annotations, and visual observations. Together, these pathways use the JoySim simulator as both a scalable evaluation layer and a physical consistency filter for robot data generation. We further package the core reconstruction, simulation, rendering, and realism-augmentation modules as cloud services on JD Cloud, turning the system into reusable infrastructure for robot data generation and model evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DataLadder，一个基于仿真、支持人-机器人双向对齐的模型评估与数据生成工具链，通过Robot↔Simulation↔Human路径实现可扩展、可信的机器人通用策略开发。
AI.motivation: 通用机器人策略亟需可扩展、可信的评估方法和机器人可用的训练数据，但纯实物实验成本高、难复现；真实机器人数据虽最可靠却难以规模化。
AI.method: 构建DataLadder工具链，包含两条核心路径：1）Robot→Simulation→Human：将真实桌面整理任务重建为校准数字孪生体用于可扩展评估，并引入人类具身反馈优化仿真动作自然性；2）Human→Simulation→Robot：将第一视角人类演示提升至仿真环境，经机器人物理约束检验后转化为机器人中心轨迹、标注及视觉观测；底层依托JoySim仿真器，并将核心模块封装为京东云服务。
AI.result: 实现了人-机器人对齐的可扩展模型评估与高质量仿真-实机映射数据生成，验证了数字孪生评估的有效性与人类演示转机器人轨迹的可行性，并成功部署为云基础设施。
AI.conclusion: DataLadder通过仿真中介打通人、机器人与仿真三元闭环，在保障物理一致性的前提下显著提升机器人策略评估与数据生产的效率与可信度，为通用机器人发展提供可复用基础设施。

title: Landmark-free Assessment of Lower-limb Alignment with Implicit Neural Shape Functions from Knee Radiographs
summary: Radiographic assessment of lower-limb alignment (LLA) is important for predicting joint health and surgical outcomes in total knee arthroplasty. Traditional measurement methods are manual and time-consuming, while recent machine learning approaches typically rely on locating a fixed set of anatomical landmarks. This dependence limits flexibility and may require re-annotation when clinical definitions change. To address this, we propose an automated workflow using Implicit Neural Shape Functions (INSF). Rather than relying on explicit landmark coordinates, we encode the anatomy into a compact latent space and regress clinical alignment measurements directly from these latent codes. This architecture allows for rapid extendability to new tasks without altering the backbone representation. We trained our method on an internal dataset of 566 knee radiographs, each annotated with the outline of the femur and tibia. We evaluated it on both an internal test dataset of 50 patients and a separate external set of 402 preoperative cases from the MRKR dataset. Manual clinical measurements are available for these data, and the MRKR measurements will be made publicly accessible. Performance was comparable to state-of-the-art landmark-based methods and manual agreement, while offering a flexible shape representation that can be extended to additional measurement tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于隐式神经形状函数（INSF）的自动化下肢力线评估方法，通过学习解剖结构的紧凑潜在表示直接回归临床对线测量值，避免了传统手工测量和依赖固定解剖标志点的机器学习方法的局限性，具备良好泛化性和可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 传统放射学下肢力线（LLA）评估方法耗时且依赖人工；现有机器学习方法多基于固定解剖标志点定位，灵活性差，临床定义变更时需重新标注。
AI.method: 采用隐式神经形状函数（INSF）将股骨与胫骨轮廓编码为紧凑潜在空间，并直接从该潜在码回归临床对线测量值，无需显式地标点坐标。模型在566例膝关节X光片（含股骨和胫骨轮廓标注）上训练。
AI.result: 在内部测试集（50例）和外部MRKR数据集（402例）上评估，性能媲美当前基于标志点的最先进方法及人工测量一致性；同时提供更灵活、可快速扩展至新测量任务的形状表征。
AI.conclusion: INSF框架为放射学下肢力线评估提供了无需固定地标、易于扩展、高精度的自动化替代方案，具有临床实用潜力。

title: AuAu: A Benchmark for Auditing Authoritarian Alignment in Large Language Models
summary: The worldwide surge of authoritarianism, combined with the increasing central role in users' everyday lives, raises the question of to what extent specific models exhibit or promote authoritarian attitudes and characteristics. We introduce AuAu, a comprehensive benchmark that aims to assess the risk of LLMs generating responses with authoritarian tendencies. This benchmark combines three evaluation approaches: (i) psychometric questions from an extensive pool of 15 human validated instruments; (ii) contextual behavior vignettes probing intended actions in concrete situations; and (iii) responses to realistic user prompts. Unlike prior work, AuAu evaluates not only a general closeness towards authoritarianism but also the established sub-concepts Authoritarian Aggression, Authoritarian Submission, and Conventionalism. Evaluating 17 models from China, the EU, Russia, and the USA, we find that all tested models exhibit substantial authoritarian response rates under the psychometric evaluation, though rates drop significantly in increasingly more realistic downstream task. We further find that an authoritarian system prompt easily manipulates 15 out of 17 models to promote increased authoritarianism. Our results underscore the need for continued, systematic auditing of LLM-based AI systems to detect and ultimately mitigate undesired authoritarian tendencies in generated output. Our code and data are available at: https://github.com/andreaseinwiller/AuAu

AI.tldr: 本文提出了AuAu基准，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）生成具有威权主义倾向响应的风险，涵盖心理测量题、情境行为小品和真实用户提示三类评估方式，并区分威权侵略、威权顺从与传统主义三个子维度；实验发现17个模型普遍存在威权倾向，且易受威权系统提示操纵。
AI.motivation: 全球威权主义抬头与大型语言模型在日常生活中日益核心的地位，促使研究者关注模型是否隐含或助长威权主义态度。
AI.method: 构建AuAu基准，整合三类评估：（i）基于15种人工验证的心理测量量表题目；（ii）情境行为小品以探测具体情境下的意图行动；（iii）对真实用户提示的响应分析；并分别评估总体威权倾向及其三个经典子维度（威权侵略、威权顺从、传统主义）。
AI.result: 17个来自中国、欧盟、俄罗斯和美国的模型在心理测量评估中均表现出显著威权响应率，但在更贴近现实的任务中该比率明显下降；15个模型在威权系统提示下显著增强威权倾向。
AI.conclusion: 需持续、系统地审计LLM系统，以识别并缓解其输出中潜在的威权主义倾向；AuAu为该方向提供了可复现、多维度的评估框架。

title: State-Grounded Multi-Agent Synthetic Data Generation for Tool-Augmented LLMs
summary: Training tool-augmented LLM agents requires large corpora of multi-turn, tool-grounded conversational data that is expensive to annotate, privacy-constrained in production settings, and largely absent from public datasets. We present StateGen, a synthetic data generation platform that produces scored, reasoning-trace-rich training conversations by orchestrating a four-role LLM loop: a persona-conditioned user simulator, an agent under test, a state-grounded tool simulator, and a multi-axis LLM judge. The key architectural contribution is an authoritative state manager that maintains a structured world-state object across turns, enforcing a backend-is-truth invariant that eliminates the dominant class of tool-call hallucinations by construction. StateGen extends naturally to hierarchical multi-agent settings by declaring sub-agents as tools, all sharing a single state object. We report results on 64,698 evaluated conversations across three production corpora: tool-call hallucination scores reach 9.66/10, the system supports persona-driven variation via a 23-dimensional trait vector, and a cleanly separated train and golden evaluation set split confirms the data is not memorization bait (per-criterion gap analysis). Comparison with eight external systems shows that no single publicly available platform combines multi-turn generation, state-grounded tool simulation, hierarchical multi-agent support, and built-in judge scoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出StateGen，一个用于生成高质量、多轮、工具增强型LLM代理训练数据的合成平台，通过四角色LLM循环（用户模拟器、代理、工具模拟器、多维度评判器）及权威状态管理器，显著降低工具调用幻觉，支持层次化多智能体扩展，并在多项指标上优于现有公开系统。
AI.motivation: 缺乏大规模、多轮、工具接地的对话训练数据，且真实数据存在标注成本高、隐私受限、公开数据稀缺等问题。
AI.method: 构建StateGen平台，采用四角色LLM协同循环（用户模拟器、代理、状态驱动的工具模拟器、多轴LLM裁判），核心是维护跨轮次结构化世界状态的权威状态管理器，确保‘后端即真理’，从而从机制上消除工具调用幻觉；并支持将子代理声明为工具以实现层次化多智能体扩展。
AI.result: 在64,698轮对话评估中，工具调用幻觉得分达9.66/10；支持23维人格向量驱动的多样化对话生成；训练集与黄金评估集分离验证无记忆化倾向；对比8个外部系统，StateGen是唯一同时支持多轮生成、状态接地工具模拟、层次化多智能体及内置评分的平台。
AI.conclusion: StateGen为工具增强型LLM代理提供了可扩展、可控、可信的合成数据生成范式，其状态中心架构有效解决了工具幻觉这一关键瓶颈，并为复杂多智能体系统训练奠定数据基础。

title: Robust Transformer-Based One-Step Stock Index Forecasting via Shifted Data Augmentation
summary: Transformers have shown remarkable success in sequence modeling, yet their direct application to financial time series remains challenging due to noisy signals, short-memory dynamics, and distributional shifts. This paper proposes a modified Transformer architecture for one-step stock index forecasting, combined with advanced learning-rate scheduling and a novel Shifted Data Augmentation (SDA) technique. We evaluate the proposed framework on two benchmark stock index datasets, VN30 and S&P 500. Experimental results demonstrate that cosine annealing with warmup consistently improves forecasting accuracy over the generalized inverse-power scheduler. Furthermore, SDA substantially reduces forecasting errors and run-to-run variability while improving robustness to hyperparameter selection. The combination of cosine annealing scheduling and SDA achieved the best performance on both datasets, indicating that data augmentation can play a more important role than increasing model complexity in Transformer-based financial forecasting. These findings provide a practical and computationally efficient approach for robust stock index forecasting in noisy financial environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的Transformer架构，结合余弦退火学习率调度和新型偏移数据增强（SDA）技术，用于单步股票指数预测，在VN30和S&P 500数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 直接将Transformer应用于金融时间序列存在挑战，包括信号噪声大、短期记忆动态和分布漂移等问题。
AI.method: 提出一种改进的Transformer架构，结合余弦退火学习率调度与新型偏移数据增强（SDA）技术，用于单步股票指数预测。
AI.result: 实验表明余弦退火调度优于广义逆幂调度；SDA显著降低预测误差和运行间变异性，并提升超参数选择鲁棒性；二者组合在两个数据集上均取得最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 在基于Transformer的金融预测中，数据增强比增加模型复杂度更为重要，该方法为噪声金融环境下的稳健股票指数预测提供了实用且计算高效的方案。

title: DIFF-IPPO: Diffusion-Based Informative Path Planning with Open-Vocabulary Belief Maps
summary: Exploration and object search require robots to perceive their environment, identify regions of interest, and plan trajectories that improve target-detection likelihood or maximize information gain. Many IPP methods, especially in continuous environmental monitoring, rely on Gaussian-process belief models, while object-search settings often produce complex, multimodal belief maps from semantic or open-vocabulary perception. Global trajectory generation directly conditioned on such non-Gaussian belief maps remains comparatively underexplored. Although diffusion-based planners offer strong capabilities for modeling such distributions, their use in informative path planning remains limited. In this work, we propose DIFF-IPPO, a pipeline that integrates an open-vocabulary belief map generator with a diffusion-based planner for global trajectory generation over belief maps. The method generates trajectories that concentrate sensor coverage over high-belief regions, achieving normalized detection scores between 81.49% and 86.55% across different dataset scenarios. We validate the system in a simulated search-and-rescue scenario where the planner searches candidate building regions to locate a burning building. In this setting, a team of five drones using batched belief-map-conditioned trajectory generation achieves first detections in 3.5 minutes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DIFF-IPPO，一种结合开放词汇语义感知与扩散模型规划器的全局信息路径规划方法，用于在非高斯信念图上生成高效探测轨迹，在搜救仿真中实现快速目标定位。
AI.motivation: 现有信息路径规划（IPP）方法在处理由开放词汇感知生成的复杂、多峰非高斯信念图时缺乏有效全局轨迹生成能力；扩散模型虽擅长建模复杂分布，但在IPP中应用尚少。
AI.method: 提出DIFF-IPPO框架：首先利用开放词汇模型生成语义信念图，再通过扩散模型直接以该信念图为条件进行全局轨迹采样与优化，使轨迹集中覆盖高置信度区域。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上达到81.49%–86.55%的归一化检测得分；在五机协同搜救仿真中，平均首次检测时间仅3.5分钟。
AI.conclusion: DIFF-IPPO验证了扩散模型在非高斯信念驱动的信息路径规划中的有效性，为开放词汇感知与自主探索任务提供了新范式。

title: Focus, Align, and Sustain: Counteracting Gradient Dilution in Incremental Object Detection
summary: Adapting Detection Transformers to Incremental Object Detection (IOD) poses a systemic challenge, as set-based optimization is inherently destabilized by sequential learning. In this work, we identify Gradient Dilution as the root cause of performance degradation, wherein optimization signals required to preserve old knowledge are progressively weakened. This phenomenon manifests as a cascading erosion of preservation gradients in magnitude, direction, and support coverage, driven by three tightly coupled factors: Signal Dispersion, where foreground gradients are overwhelmed by background noise; Assignment Drift, where stochastic query-target matching induces inconsistent gradient trajectories; and Support Attrition, where gradients from retained samples insufficiently cover the old-class feature space, weakening decision boundaries under interference from new classes. To counteract this, we propose FAS, a unified framework that Focuses, Aligns, and Sustains gradient flow throughout incremental learning. Specifically, we introduce prior-injected queries to focus discriminative signals by filtering background interference at the source. We further propose deterministic anchor distillation to align query-target assignments and enforce semantic consistency across stages under unstable matching. Finally, we devise manifold-support replay to sustain distributional support of old classes, counteracting representational erosion induced by continual updates. Extensive experiments show that FAS restores robust optimization dynamics and outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving over 5.0 AP improvement in the challenging 40+10x4 incremental setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAS框架，通过聚焦、对齐和维持梯度流来解决检测Transformer在增量目标检测中因梯度稀释导致的性能退化问题，显著提升模型在复杂增量设置下的表现。
AI.motivation: 检测Transformer在增量目标检测中面临系统性挑战，其基于集合的优化机制在顺序学习下易失稳；作者指出‘梯度稀释’是根本原因，并分析其三大成因：信号弥散、匹配漂移与支持衰减。
AI.method: 提出FAS统一框架：1）引入先验注入查询以聚焦判别性信号；2）采用确定性锚点蒸馏对齐查询-目标匹配，保障语义一致性；3）设计流形支持回放以维持旧类特征空间分布支持。
AI.result: 在40+10×4等极具挑战性的增量设定下，FAS相较SOTA方法提升超5.0 AP，有效恢复稳健优化动力学。
AI.conclusion: 梯度稀释是制约增量检测Transformer性能的核心机制，FAS通过梯度流的聚焦、对齐与持续维持，从优化源头提升模型稳定性与持续学习能力。

title: XAI-Grounded Explanation Generation for Speech Deepfake Detection with Training-Free Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Speech deepfake detection (SDD) systems require trustworthy explanations for reliable decision-making. Existing explanation ways mainly fall into two categories. Traditional explainable AI (XAI), such as gradient-based attribution, produces low-level attribution signals tightly coupled with model decisions, and harder to be understood by human than natural language explanations. Meanwhile, large language model (LLM)-based explanation generation often produces generic and ungrounded descriptions due to the lack of heuristic evidence and task-specific supervision, stemming from limited grounded explanation datasets for SDD. We therefore propose a training-free explanation framework that integrates XAI evidence with multimodal LLMs to generate grounded and specific explanations. Using the PartialSpoof dataset, we construct a grounded explanation dataset and show that methods with XAI increase inside accuracy by over 45\%, verified through human evaluation and faithfulness checks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的解释框架，将XAI证据与多模态大语言模型结合，生成有依据、具体的语音深度伪造检测（SDD）解释，并在PartialSpoof数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有语音深度伪造检测（SDD）系统的解释方式存在两类问题：传统XAI方法生成低层归因信号，人类难以理解；而基于LLM的解释缺乏任务相关监督和依据，易产生泛化、无根据的描述。根本原因是缺乏面向SDD的有依据解释数据集。
AI.method: 提出一种无需训练的解释框架，融合XAI（如梯度归因）提供的证据与多模态大语言模型，构建基于PartialSpoof数据集的有依据解释数据集，并利用该框架生成可解释结果。
AI.result: 在PartialSpoof数据集上验证表明，引入XAI证据的方法使内部准确性提升超45%，并通过人工评估与可信性检验得到证实。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架能有效生成更可信、具体且人类可理解的SDD解释，为可解释语音伪造检测提供了新范式。

title: Architectural Wisdom: A Framework for Governing Optimization in AI Systems
summary: Modern AI systems exhibit structural failures that capability scaling alone does not reliably fix: they optimize under-specified objectives with no architectural mechanism to question whether the objective should be optimized at all. Engagement maximization can amplify harmful pathways; tool-using agents can commit irreversible actions; preference-trained language models can become sycophantic. We argue that this failure is a wisdom problem, not an intelligence problem. We use "wisdom" in a deliberately architectural sense, not as a claim about virtue, consciousness, or moral omniscience. Intelligence accepts a goal and optimizes within it; wisdom interrogates whether the goal should be optimized at all. The two are separable architectural properties. We propose architectural wisdom as a corrigible objective-governance layer above the optimization substrate. The layer makes three structural commitments explicit and nondegenerate before any action: temporal horizon, relational boundary, and irreversibility. It is realized by four components (Structural Utility Transform, Moral Admissibility Interface, Arbitration and Escalation Controller, Value Revision Channel) that compute a six-coordinate wisdom tuple over horizon, relational coverage, irreversibility, admissibility, value revision, and auditability. We motivate the architecture by eight cases drawn from contemporary AI failures, secular wisdom traditions, and hard ethical situations, and defend the distinction against the intelligence-completeness thesis using goal-questioning over goal-taking, Bostrom's orthogonality, structural separation in our exemplar cases, and persistent failure modes despite capability scaling. The framework is the conceptual contract for a larger architecture whose formal specifications and empirical validation are developed in subsequent work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种‘架构性智慧’（architectural wisdom）框架，旨在解决现代AI系统因目标优化缺乏自我质疑能力而导致的结构性失败问题；该框架通过在优化底层之上引入一个可校正的目标治理层，显式建模时间视野、关系边界与不可逆性，并由四个组件生成六维智慧元组。
AI.motivation: 现代AI系统虽能力增强，却仍频繁出现结构性失败（如沉迷优化、不可逆错误、谄媚输出），根源在于其仅具备‘智能’（接受并优化给定目标），缺乏‘智慧’（质疑目标本身是否应被优化）。
AI.method: 提出‘架构性智慧’概念，定义其为可分离于智能的、显式建模时间视野、关系边界和不可逆性的目标治理层；设计四个核心组件（结构效用变换、道德可容许性接口、仲裁与升级控制器、价值修订通道），共同输出六维智慧元组。
AI.result: 构建了一个概念性框架，明确区分智慧与智能的架构角色，通过八类现实与伦理案例验证其必要性，并从目标质疑vs目标采纳、博斯特罗姆正交性、结构分离性及能力缩放失效等角度驳斥‘智能完备性’假设。
AI.conclusion: 智慧是AI安全的关键独立架构属性，需通过显式、可校正、非退化的目标治理机制来实现；该框架为后续形式化建模与实证验证提供基础契约。

title: How to Score Experts for One-Shot MoE Expert Pruning: A Unified Formulation and Selection Principle
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models reduce per-token computation through sparse expert activation, yet deployment still requires storing the full expert pool, making one-shot expert pruning a practical approach for reducing memory usage. Although effective, existing criteria are largely heuristic, and no single criterion is universally optimal. Thus, establishing a principle for selecting pruning criteria suited to different deployment objectives remains an important yet largely underexplored problem in one-shot expert pruning. To this end, we introduce a unified formulation for one-shot MoE expert pruning organized around three factors: routing frequency, gate weighting, and activation strength. The formulation yields a criteria selection principle: task-agnostic pruning should favor routed-token-averaged, gate-free activation-based criteria, whereas task-specific pruning can benefit from retaining routing-frequency and gate-weight information. Beyond this principle, the formulation also provides a systematic view of existing heuristic criteria and gives rise to two new task-agnostic criteria, Mean Activation Norm (MAN) and Mean Squared Activation Norm (MSAN). Across four representative MoE models and 16 diverse benchmarks, MAN and MSAN are consistently strong in the task-agnostic setting, obtain the top-two average ranks, and improve average performance by up to 8.8 points over the strongest baseline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的一次性MoE专家剪枝框架，基于路由频率、门控权重和激活强度三要素，提出了适用于任务无关与任务相关场景的剪枝准则选择原则，并新提出MAN和MSAN两种任务无关剪枝准则，在多个模型和基准上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE模型专家剪枝标准多为启发式，缺乏普适性与理论指导，亟需建立面向不同部署目标的剪枝准则选择原则。
AI.method: 构建基于路由频率、门控权重和激活强度的统一剪枝公式，据此推导出任务无关与任务相关场景下的剪枝准则选择原则，并提出两种新准则MAN和MSAN。
AI.result: MAN和MSAN在4个MoE模型、16个基准测试中 consistently 表现最优，平均排名前二，性能较最强基线最高提升8.8分。
AI.conclusion: 该统一框架不仅系统解释了已有启发式方法，还为MoE模型高效部署提供了可解释、可扩展的剪枝理论基础与实用准则。

title: SoK: Security and Privacy of Foundation-Model-Powered Robots
summary: Foundation models are reshaping robotics by enabling robots to interpret open-ended instructions, reason over multimodal contexts, and operate in complex, open-world environments. However, their integration also introduces security and privacy (S&P) risks that extend beyond the FMs themselves to embodied execution pipelines, supporting ecosystems, and broader governance impacts. Existing literature reviews provide valuable insights but often focus on specific FM types, risk categories, mitigation strategies, or trust boundaries. Consequently, the field lacks a unified structure for analyzing where risks originate, how they propagate across robotic systems, and where mitigations should intervene. To address this gap, we propose a progressive F-E-S-G structural boundary framework for analyzing the S&P of FM-powered robots. The framework comprises four layers: the Foundation model layer (F), Embodied system layer (E), Supporting ecosystem layer (S), and Governance impact layer (G). Building on this structure, we develop a multi-level taxonomy that organizes prior studies along three levels: F-E-S-G trust boundary, security-privacy concerns, and risk-mitigation perspectives. We further annotate each study using fine-grained coding attributes, including target, lifecycle stage, mechanism, system access, and effect. Guided by this framework and taxonomy, we systematize 96 papers. Our analysis uncovers multiple threat patterns, defense mismatches, and evaluation gaps that are difficult to identify from a single-boundary perspective. Based on these findings, we identify open challenges and future directions to provide a research agenda for developing secure, privacy-preserving, and responsibly governed FM-powered robotic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为F-E-S-G的四层结构框架，用于系统分析大模型驱动机器人中的安全与隐私风险，并基于该框架构建了多级分类法，系统梳理了96篇相关论文，揭示了威胁模式、防御错配和评估缺口等关键问题，为未来研究提供了方向。
AI.motivation: 现有文献综述往往聚焦于特定类型的基础模型、风险类别、缓解策略或信任边界，缺乏统一框架来分析风险来源、传播路径及干预位置。
AI.method: 提出F-E-S-G四层结构边界框架（基础模型层、具身系统层、支持生态系统层、治理影响层），并构建多级分类法与细粒度编码体系，对96篇论文进行系统化标注与分析。
AI.result: 识别出多种威胁模式、防御错配和评估缺口，这些发现难以通过单一边界视角发现；系统化整理了现有研究并揭示其局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为分析大模型驱动机器人的安全与隐私问题提供了统一结构，有助于推动构建安全、隐私保护且负责任治理的机器人系统，并为后续研究提供清晰议程。

title: Trusted Multi-View Deep Learning Classification of Fetal Congenital Heart Disease with Feature-level and Decision-level Fusion
summary: Congenital heart disease (CHD) refers to the abnormal anatomical structure caused by the abnormal development of the heart and great vessels during embryonic development. Traditional diagnostics often fail to achieve high accuracy and efficiency, especially given the complexity of cardiac anatomy. This study presents a specialized multi-view deep learning framework for CHD binary classification using echocardiographic images. A large-scale CHD dataset, including five views, was used to train the model, enabling it to integrate multi-angle image data. The framework utilizes advanced feature extraction and attention mechanisms to improve diagnostic precision and reliability. An uncertainty-based decision-making component is also integrated to handle low-quality images, enhancing diagnostic outcomes. Experimental results show that this method achieves top-tier performance on our dataset and provides a robust tool for early CHD detection, underscoring its potential for clinical use. The dataset and source code will be released upon paper acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种面向先天性心脏病（CHD）二分类的多视角深度学习框架，利用五种超声心动图视角数据，结合先进特征提取、注意力机制与不确定性决策模块，显著提升诊断精度与鲁棒性，尤其适用于低质量图像场景。
AI.motivation: 传统CHD诊断方法在复杂心脏解剖结构下难以兼顾高准确率与高效率，亟需更可靠的自动化辅助诊断工具。
AI.method: 构建专用多视角深度学习框架，融合五种超声心动图视角；采用先进特征提取网络与注意力机制；引入基于不确定性的决策模块以应对低质量图像。
AI.result: 在自建大规模CHD多视角数据集上达到领先性能，展现出优异的诊断精度、鲁棒性与临床适用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为CHD早期筛查提供了高效、可靠的新范式，具备明确的临床转化价值；相关数据集与源代码将在论文录用后公开。

title: GRACE: Step-Level Benchmark for Faithful Reasoning over Context
summary: Many reasoning tasks require models to reason over input context, from document-grounded question answering to rule-based deduction. Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting produces traces that appear transparent, yet individual steps can silently deviate from the source evidence, even when the final answer is correct. Existing methods detect hallucinations at the response level but fail to identify where in the chain a failure occurs or what type it is. We introduce GRACE, the first human-annotated step-level faithfulness benchmark with a data-driven error taxonomy for context-grounded textual reasoning. GRACE covers CoT traces from 10 models across 4 source datasets, with each step annotated for faithfulness, error category, and natural language explanation. A data-driven taxonomy, discovered bottom-up via unsupervised clustering, organizes failures into two tracks: GRACE-Inference (deductive errors) and GRACE-Grounding (factual grounding errors), with four categories each. The evaluation set is human-annotated and challenging by design. Our experiments reveal substantial headroom for current models. In addition, integrating step-level faithfulness signals into reinforcement learning pipelines improves both downstream accuracy and reasoning reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了GRACE，首个针对链式推理（CoT）步骤级忠实性的人工标注基准，并构建了基于数据驱动的错误分类体系，用于识别推理链中具体哪一步出错及错误类型；实验表明当前模型仍有较大提升空间，且将步骤级忠实性信号融入强化学习可提升准确率与推理可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法只能在整体响应层面检测幻觉，无法定位链式推理中具体哪一步出错或错误类型，因此需要细粒度、步骤级的忠实性评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了名为GRACE的人工标注步骤级忠实性基准，覆盖10个模型在4个源数据集上的CoT推理链；通过无监督聚类自底向上发现错误模式，建立双轨错误分类体系（GRACE-Inference和GRACE-Grounding，各含4类）；并在强化学习中引入步骤级忠实性信号进行优化。
AI.result: GRACE成为首个步骤级、人工标注、具备细粒度错误分类的忠实性基准；实验证明当前模型在该基准上表现较差，存在显著提升空间；引入步骤级忠实性信号后，下游任务准确率与推理可靠性均得到提升。
AI.conclusion: 步骤级忠实性评估对可信推理至关重要；GRACE为诊断和改进链式推理提供了新工具与标准；将细粒度忠实性信号纳入训练流程可有效增强模型可靠性。

title: AdaSTORM: Scaling LLM Reasoning on Dynamic Graphs via Adaptive Spatio-Temporal Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable potential in dynamic graph reasoning, but suffer from a scaling bottleneck: current models can only handle graphs with tens of nodes, constrained by exponential reasoning overhead and finite context windows. While multi-agent systems (MAS) offer collective reasoning and topology-aware orchestration, capabilities naturally suited for graph-structured tasks, their application to dynamic graphs remains unexplored. This paper presents Scaling LLM Reasoning on Dynamic Graphs via Adaptive Spatio-Temporal Multi-Agent Collaboration (AdaSTORM), a framework that reformulates large-scale dynamic graph reasoning into two stages: (i) Adaptive Partitioning, partitioning large-scale dynamic graphs into subregions that match the model's reasoning capacity while minimizing inference cost; and (ii) Collaborative Reasoning, aligning graph partition topologies with a spatio-temporal decoupled multi-agent architecture. AdaSTORM is the first multi-agent framework tailored for dynamic graph reasoning. Extensive experiments show that AdaSTORM successfully breaks through the scaling bottleneck, scaling reasoning to thousand-node graphs with over 90% accuracy across several large-scale dynamic graph settings without external tools, significantly outperforms seven competitive baselines. Furthermore, it achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on existing benchmarks and generalizes robustly to real-world datasets. The source code is available at: https://github.com/irisorchid107/AdaSTORM/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaSTORM框架，通过自适应时空多智能体协作，突破大语言模型在动态图推理中的规模瓶颈，实现千节点级图的高效高精度推理。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型在动态图推理中受限于指数级推理开销和有限上下文窗口，难以扩展至大规模图；多智能体系统虽适合图结构任务，但尚未应用于动态图场景。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：(i) 自适应划分，将大规模动态图划分为匹配模型推理能力的子区域以最小化推理成本；(ii) 协同推理，将图划分拓扑与时空解耦的多智能体架构对齐。
AI.result: AdaSTORM在多个千节点级动态图设置中达到90%以上准确率，显著优于7个基线方法，在现有基准和真实数据集上均取得SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: AdaSTORM是首个面向动态图推理定制的多智能体框架，有效解决了LLM在该任务上的可扩展性瓶颈，并具备强泛化能力。

title: InstantForget: Update-Free Backdoor Unlearning with Inference-Time Feature Reset
summary: Backdoor unlearning aims to remove a malicious trigger behavior from a deployed model while preserving clean utility. We study the update-free inference-time setting, where model parameters remain frozen. First, we audit a common projection assumption under oracle paired clean and triggered features. Projection succeeds mainly on BadNets and leaves WaNet, Blended, and SIG at 0.683, 0.888, and 0.941 ASR on CIFAR-10 ResNet-18. This failure is not explained by spectral compactness, spatial locality, or subspace misalignment. It is predicted by a logit-triplet gap involving the target margin, target-logit drop, and non-target logit rise. We then introduce InstantForget, a clean-calibrated gated reset that flags anomalous features with a Mahalanobis score and moves only flagged features toward a neutral non-target representation. With one fixed operating point selected on held-out triggered validation, InstantForget reduces average ASR to 0.071 across four non-adaptive CIFAR-10 triggers without triggered samples or parameter updates at deployment. It also reaches 0.981 detection AUROC and transfers to six of eight tested backbones. Reported failures under WaNet, ModelNet10 point blend, two backbone geometries, and adaptive feature-compactness attacks define the method's scope.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InstantForget方法，在不更新模型参数的情况下，通过清洁校准的门控重置机制，在推理时有效消除后门攻击触发行为，显著降低平均攻击成功率（ASR）至0.071，并具有高检测AUROC（0.981）和良好跨骨干网络泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于投影假设的后门遗忘方法在多种常见后门攻击（如WaNet、Blended、SIG）上失效，亟需一种无需参数更新、适用于推理阶段的通用后门消除方法。
AI.method: 提出InstantForget：利用马氏距离分数识别异常特征，对被标记特征进行门控重置，将其向中性非目标表征移动；仅依赖清洁样本校准，无需触发样本或参数更新。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10 ResNet-18上，InstantForget将四种非自适应后门攻击的平均ASR降至0.071；检测AUROC达0.981；可迁移至8个骨干网络中的6个；但在WaNet、ModelNet10点混合等特定场景下失效。
AI.conclusion: InstantForget是一种高效、轻量、部署友好的推理时后门遗忘方法，其有效性由logit-triplet gap理论刻画，但存在对特定攻击类型和模型结构的局限性。

title: ATOM-Bench: A Real-World Benchmark for Atomic Skills and Compositional Generalization in Manipulation Policies
summary: Generalist manipulation policies are increasingly presented as foundation models for robotic control, but their real-world generalization remains difficult to diagnose. A policy may succeed on demonstrated tasks while still failing to execute fine-grained atomic skills or recombine learned skills in new task structures. We introduce \textbf{ATOM-Bench}, a real-world benchmark for evaluating both atomic skills and compositional generalization in manipulation policies. ATOM-Bench factorizes tabletop manipulation into motor atoms and instruction atoms, and contains 30 atomic tasks and 24 held-out compositional tasks across paired single-arm and dual-arm robot tracks. We collect 3,000 human demonstrations for atomic fine-tuning and release both the demonstration data and evaluation rollout data to support reproducible real-world evaluation. Policies are fine-tuned on atomic tasks and evaluated on both atomic skill acquisition and held-out compositional tasks. We further introduce Atomic Score (AS) and Compositional Failure Share (CFS) to distinguish failures caused by weak atomic skills from failures caused by limited compositional reuse. Through 2,700 physical rollouts on five representative manipulation policies, we find that current policies can acquire simple instruction-grounding skills, but still struggle with fine-grained motor atoms, counting, and logical filtering. More importantly, strong atomic performance does not reliably transfer to held-out compositional tasks. ATOM-Bench provides a diagnostic testbed for studying whether failures arise from weak motor execution, poor instruction grounding, or limited compositional reuse.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ATOM-Bench，一个用于评估机器人操作策略在原子技能掌握与组合泛化能力方面的现实世界基准测试平台，并引入Atomic Score（AS）和Compositional Failure Share（CFS）指标来诊断失败根源。
AI.motivation: 现有通用操作策略虽在演示任务上表现良好，但难以诊断其在细粒度原子技能执行及技能重组能力上的真实泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建ATOM-Bench基准，分解桌面操作为运动原子与指令原子，包含30个原子任务和24个未见组合任务；收集3000条人类演示用于微调，并设计AS与CFS指标进行失败归因分析；在五种代表性策略上开展2700次真实机器人实验。
AI.result: 当前策略能掌握简单指令理解，但在细粒度运动控制、计数和逻辑筛选上仍不足；且强原子性能并不保证组合任务成功。
AI.conclusion: ATOM-Bench可有效区分失败源于运动执行弱、指令接地差或组合复用能力不足，为通用操作策略提供可诊断的现实评估框架。

title: MamBOA: State-Space Architecture for Video Recognition
summary: Fine-grained action recognition demands temporal reasoning that general-purpose architectures address through different cost-accuracy tradeoffs: 3D dense operators couple computation to the input volume, while difference-based methods approximate motion through rigid, hand-crafted subtraction of uncontextualized features - each reflecting a deliberate design choice with corresponding limitations in expressiveness or flexibility. We present MamBOA, a backbone-agnostic temporal framework built upon a novel interleaved scan structure that recasts the selective state-space recurrence (S6) as a native motion synthesizer. By interleaving consecutive feature representations extracted from a pretrained backbone into a single alternating sequence, the proposed scan structurally drives the recurrence to encode both temporal observations of each position within a shared hidden state, separated by only a single decay step - rendering the inter-frame transition an intrinsic component of the state dynamics rather than an externally computed quantity. A cascade of dedicated alignment and decoding operations then distills this joint encoding into an explicit motion representation, which a dual-path pooling mechanism adaptively aggregates by balancing attention-driven selection with uniform temporal coverage. The framework interfaces seamlessly with CNN, Transformer, and Mamba backbone families, adding only ~2.1 GFLOPs per feature pair. On Diving48, MamBOA achieves 85.02% Top-1 accuracy with an image-pretrained backbone and 86.24% with a video-pretrained backbone processing the entire video in a single forward pass - demonstrating that structurally induced state-space dynamics constitute a principled and general foundation for motion modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MamBOA框架，一种骨干网络无关的时间建模方法，通过交错扫描结构将选择性状态空间递归（S6）重构为原生运动合成器，实现高效、灵活且表达力强的细粒度动作识别。
AI.motivation: 现有细粒度动作识别方法在时间建模上存在局限：3D卷积计算开销大，差分法缺乏上下文与灵活性；亟需一种兼顾表达力、灵活性与效率的通用时间建模机制。
AI.method: 提出基于交错扫描结构的MamBOA框架：将骨干网络提取的连续特征交错成单一序列，驱动S6递归在共享隐状态中联合编码帧间动态；再经对齐、解码及双路径池化生成显式运动表征。
AI.result: 在Diving48数据集上，使用图像预训练和视频预训练骨干分别达85.02%和86.24% Top-1精度，仅增加约2.1 GFLOPs/特征对，支持CNN/Transformer/Mamba等多种骨干。
AI.conclusion: 结构诱导的状态空间动力学是一种原理清晰、通用性强的运动建模范式，为细粒度动作识别提供了新基础。

title: Weaving Multi-Source Evidence for Biomedical Reasoning: The BioMedHop Benchmark and BioWeave Framework
summary: Biomedical question answering (QA) increasingly requires reasoning over interacting entities, where supporting evidence is scattered across biomedical knowledge graphs, literature documents, and web-accessible resources. However, existing biomedical QA benchmarks mainly focus on exam-style knowledge, literature comprehension, or short-range multi-hop inference, leaving source-conditioned graph reasoning and evidence topology construction underexplored. To fill this gap, we introduce BioMedHop, a multi-source graph-grounded benchmark for evaluating biomedical reasoning over structured evidence topologies. BioMedHop contains 10,045 instances across KG, document, web, and hybrid evidence settings, covering shared-neighbor matching, intersection reasoning, path-based reasoning, and counting, with option-based, open-ended, and numeric count renderings. To support this benchmark, we further propose BioWeave, a source-aware reasoning framework that retrieves biomedical KG paths, gathers supporting clues from documents and web sources, assembles them into a unified evidence graph, and verifies answers through entity-level evidence support. Comprehensive experiments show that BioWeave achieves the best overall performance among compared methods on BioMedHop, outperforming the strong hybrid baseline ToG-2 by 10.5% in the overall average. Moreover, BioWeave consistently improves different LLM backbones and enables smaller models, such as Qwen3-4B, to achieve reasoning performance comparable to GPT-4-Turbo.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了BioMedHop基准和BioWeave推理框架，旨在解决现有生物医学问答任务中多源图推理与证据拓扑构建的不足。BioMedHop包含10,045个跨知识图谱、文献、网页及混合证据的实例；BioWeave通过源感知路径检索、多源证据聚合与实体级验证，显著提升性能，使小模型（如Qwen3-4B）达到接近GPT-4-Turbo的水平。
AI.motivation: 现有生物医学QA基准主要关注考试式知识、文献理解或短程多跳推理，缺乏对源条件图推理和证据拓扑结构构建的评估。
AI.method: 提出BioMedHop多源图 grounded 基准，并设计BioWeave源感知推理框架：检索KG路径、从文献与网页中提取线索、构建统一证据图、基于实体级支持验证答案。
AI.result: BioWeave在BioMedHop上整体平均性能比强基线ToG-2高10.5%；在多种LLM后端上均表现更优，且使Qwen3-4B等小模型达到接近GPT-4-Turbo的推理性能。
AI.conclusion: BioMedHop填补了多源生物医学图推理评估空白，BioWeave为源异构证据下的复杂推理提供了可扩展、高效的新范式。

title: Exploiting Search in Symbolic Numeric Planning with Patterns
comment: Under Review at the Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research
summary: In this paper, we present a procedure for numeric planning based on Symbolic Pattern Planning (SPP). Given a numeric planning problem $Π$, a pattern $\prec$ is a sequence of actions used to define a formula encoding the subsequences of $\prec$ executable from a starting state $S$. Cardellini, Giunchiglia, and Maratea (2024a) follow the Planning as Satisfiability approach by defining, at each step $n \ge 0$, a formula $Π^\prec_n$ in which $(i)$ the pattern $\prec$ is computed only for $n=0$ in the initial state $I$ of $Π$, and then exploited at each step $n$, $(ii)$ the starting state $S$ is set to $I$, and $(iii)$ the set $G$ of goals is required to hold in the last state that can be reached by one of the subsequences of $\prec$ concatenated $n$ times. The procedure begins with $n=0$, terminates as soon as $Π^\prec_n$ is satisfiable, and otherwise proceeds by incrementing $n$. In this paper, possibly at each step, $(i)$ we symbolically search for an intermediate state $P$ reachable from $I$, closer to a goal state, $(ii)$ dynamically recompute the pattern $\prec_h$ -- to be used in the next step -- in $P$, $(iii)$ refine the pattern $\prec_g$ used to reach $P$, and $(iv)$ start the new search from the state $S$ which can be either the initial state $I$ or the last computed intermediate state $P$, exploiting the computed patterns $\prec_g$ and $\prec_h$ to define the pattern $\prec$ to be used in the search. In particular, at each step, we define a formula $Π^{\prec}_{S,P}$ encoding the existence of a state $P'$ closer than $P$ to a goal state, with $P'$ reachable from the starting state $S$ when using the pattern $\prec$. We present different techniques for producing such formulas, each corresponding to a different strategy for exploring the search space. We prove their correctness and completeness, the latter under certain conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于符号模式规划（SPP）的数值规划新方法，通过动态计算中间状态与模式、逐步逼近目标状态，并构造相应逻辑公式进行求解，具有正确性证明和特定条件下的完备性。
AI.motivation: 传统Symbolic Pattern Planning（SPP）在数值规划中固定初始状态和模式，难以高效逼近目标；本文旨在提升搜索效率与灵活性，通过动态重构模式与引入中间状态来增强规划能力。
AI.method: 在每步搜索中：(i) 符号化搜索更接近目标的中间状态P；(ii) 在P处动态重算新模式≺_h；(iii) 精炼用于到达P的模式≺_g；(iv) 基于I或P作为新起点，结合≺_g与≺_h构造整体模式≺，并构建公式Π^≺_{S,P}编码可达性。提出多种公式生成技术对应不同搜索策略。
AI.result: 提出了动态模式重构与分段符号搜索的新框架；给出了多种公式构造技术；证明了各方法的正确性，并在一定条件下证明其完备性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升了数值规划中基于SPP的求解效率与适应性，为复杂数值域规划问题提供了更灵活、可验证的符号化求解路径。

title: Unsupervised Learning for Missing Modalities in Multimodal Learning
summary:
This paper addresses the missing-modality challenge in multi-modal learning by introducing Unsupervised Learning for Missing Modalities in Multi-Modal Learning (UL4M4), a flexible framework that imputes missing feature embeddings in a task-independent manner before supervised prediction. We propose modality-specific
  normalization and a novel partial-modality distance metric to enable fair clustering of incomplete observations, capturing cross-modal structures while preserving scale-invariance across varying dimensionalities and modality counts. Cluster centers from this unsupervised stage guide an iterative greedy imputation process for any
  missing modalities during training or inference, supporting arbitrary numbers of modalities and arbitrary missing patterns per sample. The imputation module is lightweight, uses frozen encoders, and decouples from the downstream task, allowing easy integration with any fusion/prediction architecture. Extensive experiments under diverse and highly incomplete regimes demonstrate UL4M4's robustness, achieving, to
  the best of our knowledge, the first consistent F1-Micro scores above 0.7 on challenging missing configurations even when more than 50\% of modality slots are missing. Results are also stable across cluster sizes and significantly outperform state-of-the-art baselines. Code is available here: https://github.com/h-ismkhan/Multimodal-Learning-with-Missing-Modalities-via-Unsupervised-Learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UL4M4框架，通过无监督学习对多模态数据中的缺失模态进行任务无关的特征嵌入插补，利用模态特定归一化与新型部分模态距离度量实现公平聚类，并通过迭代贪心插补策略处理任意缺失模式，在高度不完整场景下展现出优异且稳定的性能。
AI.motivation: 解决多模态学习中模态缺失带来的挑战，现有方法通常依赖任务相关假设或难以应对任意缺失模式和模态数量变化。
AI.method: 提出UL4M4框架：采用模态特定归一化与部分模态距离度量进行无监督聚类；以聚类中心为指导，设计轻量级、冻结编码器的迭代贪心插补模块，支持任意模态数与缺失模式。
AI.result: 在多种高度不完整设定下，F1-Micro分数首次稳定超过0.7（即使超50%模态缺失），性能优于SOTA基线，且对聚类数目鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: UL4M4是一种灵活、解耦、即插即用的无监督缺失模态插补框架，显著提升多模态模型在缺失数据下的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

title: Video-Based Optimal Transport for Feedback-Efficient Offline Preference-Based Reinforcement Learning
summary: Conveying complex objectives to reinforcement learning (RL) agents often requires meticulous reward engineering. Preference-based RL (PbRL) offers a promising alternative by learning reward functions from human feedback, but its scalability is hindered by high labeling costs. Inspired by advances in Video Foundation Models (ViFMs), we present Video-based Optimal Transport Preference (VOTP), a semi-supervised framework that learns effective reward functions from only a handful of labels. By leveraging optimal transport to align visual trajectories within the rich representation space of ViFMs, VOTP effectively generates high-fidelity pseudo-labels for large amounts of unlabeled data, substantially reducing human supervision. Extensive experiments across locomotion and manipulation benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of VOTP, which outperforms state-of-the-art offline PbRL methods under limited feedback budgets. We also showcase the robustness of VOTP in the presence of visual distractors and validate its utility on real robotic tasks, where it learns meaningful rewards with minimal human input.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VOTP框架，利用视频基础模型和最优传输技术，仅需少量人工标注即可学习高效奖励函数，显著降低偏好型强化学习中的人工监督成本。
AI.motivation: 偏好型强化学习（PbRL）因人工标注成本高而难以扩展，亟需减少对人类反馈的依赖。
AI.method: 提出Video-based Optimal Transport Preference（VOTP）半监督框架，利用视频基础模型（ViFM）的表征空间，通过最优传输对齐视觉轨迹，生成高质量伪标签以扩充少量真实标注数据。
AI.result: 在运动与操作基准任务上，VOTP在有限反馈预算下显著优于现有离线PbRL方法；对视觉干扰鲁棒，并在真实机器人任务中验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: VOTP为低标注成本下的奖励建模提供了新范式，推动了偏好型强化学习在现实场景中的实用化。

title: Enhancing Precision Agriculture with a Hybrid Deep Learning Framework for Multi-Class Plant Disease Classification and Interpretability
summary: This study proposes an overall deep learning architecture for multi-class classification of plant diseases from high-resolution leaf imagery, with a particular interest in investigating the behavior of ResNet-50 and a hybrid ResNet + Vision Transformer (ViT) design. A specially gathered image database with 15,200 training images and 3,800 validation images spanning 38 classes across multiple crops, including tomato, apple, grape etc. were subjected to preprocessing steps such as resizing, normalization, and data augmentation to enhance model robustness. Multiple architectures, including ResNet-50, MobileNetV2, and EfficientNet-B0, were trained and compared with the hybrid ResNet + ViT model. All models were fine-tuned using the AdamW optimizer and cross-entropy loss, with early stopping applied to prevent overfitting and ensure generalization. Furthermore, interpretability techniques such as Grad-CAM and saliency maps were implemented to indicate disease-relevant regions, while segmentation-based analysis was performed to identify the affected parts of a leaf. For every one of the considered architectures, ResNet-50 led to the highest accuracy of 98.74%, whereas the hybrid ResNet + ViT model achieved a competitive accuracy of 98.58%, showing that the hybrid architectures were effective in capturing both local and overall information. The experimental results showcase the promise of transformer-based models to achieve highly accurate, interpretable, and computationally efficient computer-based multi-class multi-disease classification systems, providing helpful assistance for cultivation management practices as well as for precision farming.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于高分辨率叶片图像多类植物病害分类的深度学习架构，重点比较了ResNet-50与ResNet+ViT混合模型的性能，在38类病害数据集上ResNet-50达到98.74%最高准确率，混合模型达98.58%，并结合Grad-CAM等可解释性方法提升诊断可信度。
AI.motivation: 为实现高精度、可解释且计算高效的多作物多病害自动识别，支持精准农业与栽培管理决策。
AI.method: 构建并对比多种CNN（ResNet-50、MobileNetV2、EfficientNet-B0）及ResNet+ViT混合架构；使用AdamW优化器、交叉熵损失与早停策略训练；引入Grad-CAM、显著图和分割分析增强模型可解释性。
AI.result: ResNet-50在38类病害数据集（15200训练+3800验证图像）上取得98.74%最高准确率，ResNet+ViT混合模型达98.58%，验证了其融合局部与全局特征的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Transformer与CNN混合架构在植物病害分类中具有潜力，兼顾高精度、可解释性与计算效率，适用于实际农业场景。

title: PACT: Privileged Trace Co-Training for Multi-Turn Tool-Use Agents
summary: Multi-turn tool-use agents must reason, call tools, and adapt to observations across several interaction turns. Post-training such agents is challenging, as reinforcement learning often suffers from sparse rewards and weak credit assignment despite matching the prompt-only inference setting, while supervised fine-tuning on expert traces provides dense process supervision but can over-constrain the model to fixed trajectories. To tackle this, we propose PACT, a Privileged trAce Co-Training framework for multi-turn tool-use agents. The key idea is to use expert traces only as training-time optimization signals rather than rollout-time hints. PACT keeps rollout generation prompt-only, then uses expert traces to guide optimization through two complementary signals: a trace-conditioned RL surrogate that evaluates prompt-only rollouts under expert-trace context, and a component-aware SFT loss that supervises reasoning prefixes and tool-calls with annealed strength. To reduce over-reliance on the training-only trace context, PACT further introduces a prompt-only anchoring. We also provide a latent-trace view that connects the two trace-based objectives and explains how expert traces can guide optimization without being used during rollout generation. Experiments on FTRL, BFCL, and ToolHop show that PACT consistently improves over strong SFT- and RL-based baselines, highlighting the value of privileged trace co-training for multi-turn tool-use learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PACT框架，通过结合强化学习和监督微调的优势，在不依赖专家轨迹进行推理的情况下，利用专家轨迹作为训练时的优化信号，提升多轮工具使用智能体的性能。
AI.motivation: 多轮工具使用智能体的后训练面临挑战：强化学习稀疏奖励与信用分配弱；监督微调虽提供密集过程监督但易过度约束模型。
AI.method: 提出Privileged trAce Co-Training（PACT）框架，包含迹条件RL代理损失、组件感知SFT损失（带退火强度）及提示锚定机制，并引入潜在轨迹视角统一两种基于轨迹的目标。
AI.result: 在FTRL、BFCL和ToolHop数据集上，PACT持续优于强SFT和RL基线。
AI.conclusion: 专家轨迹作为训练时特权信号而非推理时提示，能更有效地指导多轮工具使用智能体的学习。

title: Phase-Aware Guidance Injection for Recurrent MAPPO in Assembly-Line Disruption Recovery
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, accepted by the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE 2026)
summary: Disruption recovery in industrial assembly lines requires timely decisions under machine faults, worker absence, and emergency orders. Existing methods either rely on rigid handcrafted recovery logic or learn adaptive policies that do not readily exploit heterogeneous external recovery knowledge at decision time to reduce abnormal recovery time (ART) and preserve on-time delivery (OTD). To address this gap, we propose a phase-aware guidance injection framework that augments a trained recurrent MAPPO (RMAPPO) scheduling policy through logit-level action bias during evaluation. The framework provides a unified decision-time interface for rule-based, replay-based, and online LLM-based guidance, while activating intervention only during abnormal and recovery phases. Experiments on a custom AssemblyLineEnv show that high-quality rule guidance yields the strongest gains, replay-based guidance degrades smoothly under imperfect availability, and online LLM guidance still provides useful intermediate improvements. These results show that decision-time guidance injection can exploit heterogeneous recovery hints without redesigning the actor.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种相位感知的引导注入框架，用于在工业装配线中断恢复中，通过在评估阶段对RMAPPO策略进行logit级动作偏差增强，动态融合规则、回放和在线大语言模型等多种异构恢复知识，从而减少异常恢复时间并保障准时交付。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖僵化的手工恢复逻辑，要么学习自适应策略但无法在决策时有效利用异构外部恢复知识，导致异常恢复时间（ART）较长、准时交付率（OTD）下降。
AI.method: 提出相位感知的引导注入框架，在训练好的循环MAPPO（RMAPPO）调度策略基础上，于评估阶段在logit层面引入动作偏差；统一支持规则型、回放型和在线LLM型三类引导，并仅在异常与恢复阶段激活干预。
AI.result: 在自定义AssemblyLineEnv上的实验表明：高质量规则引导效果最优；回放式引导在可用性下降时性能平滑退化；在线LLM引导仍能提供有效的中间改进。
AI.conclusion: 决策时刻的引导注入可在不重设计策者网络的前提下，有效利用异构恢复知识提升中断恢复性能。

title: From Correlation to Causation in Lane Change Prediction for Automated Driving: A Causal Explanation Framework
summary: Lane-change prediction is a central task in intelligent vehicles, where early maneuver anticipation can support safer decision-making. However, many existing approaches mainly learn statistical associations between observed driving variables and future maneuvers, while overlooking the causal dependencies among the input variables themselves. This limits interpretability, especially when physically related variables such as longitudinal gap, relative longitudinal velocity, and Time-To-Collision (TTC) are treated as independent flat inputs. This article presents a causal-inference-based framework for lane-change prediction and explanation. The proposed approach combines linguistic feature construction, expert-constrained causal discovery, deep structural causal modeling with Deep End-to-end Causal Inference (DECI), intervention-based effect analysis, refutation testing, and recursive causal-chain explanation. The objective is not only to predict the future maneuver, but also to identify candidate variables that directly contribute to the prediction, the upstream factors influencing them, and the causal chains through which these effects propagate. The framework achieves average F1-scores above 95% during the first three seconds before the lane-marking crossing event. Beyond prediction accuracy, the framework uses intervention-based effect analysis to distinguish influential from weakly influential variables under the learned causal structure. It further distinguishes candidate direct contributors from mediated effects and generates contrastive causal-chain explanations that clarify why the predicted maneuver is favored and why the alternative maneuvers are less supported. The main contribution is therefore a mechanism-aware lane-change prediction pipeline that moves beyond correlation-based classification toward more interpretable causal reasoning for maneuver prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于因果推理的换道预测与解释框架，结合语言特征构建、专家约束的因果发现、深度结构因果建模（DECI）、干预效应分析、证伪检验与递归因果链解释，在提升预测准确率（F1 > 95%）的同时，实现可解释的因果机制识别与对比式因果解释。
AI.motivation: 现有换道预测方法多依赖统计关联，忽视输入变量间的因果依赖关系，导致可解释性差，尤其在处理物理相关变量（如纵向间距、相对速度、TTC）时将其视为独立扁平输入。
AI.method: 融合语言特征构造、专家约束因果发现、基于DECI的深度结构因果建模、干预效应分析、证伪测试及递归因果链解释。
AI.result: 在换道事件前三秒内平均F1-score超95%；能区分强/弱影响变量、直接贡献者与中介效应，并生成对比式因果链解释。
