Results from random-split experiments show that overlapping segmentation, combined with smaller fixed learning rates (0.01-0.001), yields the highest accuracies, due to temporal redundancy and dense sampling of hemodynamic transitions. However, SI evaluation reveals a substantial drop in accuracy, demonstrating limited generalization to unseen participants. Under SI evaluation, non-overlapping segmentation outperformed overlapping windows, with the best accuracy of 56.11% achieved using PCA features with a 20-second window and a 0.1 learning rate. These findings indicate that eliminating temporal redundancy helps the model learn more robust and generalizable representations of cognitive load across individuals. Although adaptive learning rate strategy improved training stability, it did not surpass the performance of optimally selected fixed learning rates. The study highlights the critical role of segmentation strategy and learning rate selection in improving model generalization and identifies methodological considerations essential for developing reliable, real-time, and SI cognitive load classification systems using fNIRS.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统评估了EEGNet在fNIRS信号认知负荷分类中的性能，重点考察了时间分段策略、窗口长度、特征提取方法和学习率配置对模型泛化能力（尤其是被试独立SI评估）的影响；结果表明非重叠分段结合PCA与20秒窗口在SI设置下表现最优（56.11%），揭示消除时间冗余有助于提升跨被试泛化性。
AI.motivation: fNIRS信号存在时间变异性、被试间差异及对预处理敏感等问题，导致认知负荷准确分类困难，亟需系统评估深度学习模型（如EEGNet）在不同实验设置下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用EEGNet架构，系统比较多种因素：时间分段（重叠/非重叠）、窗口长度（10s/20s/30s）、特征提取（ANOVA/PCA/FastICA）、学习率（固定/自适应）及评估协议（随机划分/被试独立SI）；在公开fNIRS数据集上进行消融实验与对比分析。
AI.result: 随机划分下，重叠分段+小固定学习率（0.01–0.001）效果最佳；但在被试独立（SI）评估中性能显著下降，其中非重叠分段+PCA+20秒窗口+0.1学习率达到最高准确率56.11%；自适应学习率提升训练稳定性但未超越最优固定学习率。
AI.conclusion: 时间分段策略和学习率选择对fNIRS认知负荷分类模型的跨被试泛化能力起关键作用；非重叠分段通过减少时间冗余可促进更鲁棒的表征学习，为构建实时、可靠的被试独立系统提供了重要方法学启示。

title: Self-Questioning Vision-Language Models: Reinforcement Learning for Compositional Visual Reasoning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are AI systems that process both images and text, yet they often struggle with compositional visual reasoning questions that require chaining multiple steps together, such as identifying objects, counting them, and comparing the results. Existing approaches improve this reasoning by training models on human-written step-by-step explanations, but creating these annotations is expensive and difficult to scale. We propose a self-questioning framework that trains a VLM to break visual questions into smaller sub-questions and answer each one before producing a final response, using a reinforcement learning algorithm called Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). The model is never shown examples of how to decompose questions, it discovers this behavior on its own, guided by a reward signal that scores whether the output contains sub-questions and whether the final answer is correct. We apply this framework to a 3-billion-parameter model, training on both synthetic scenes of geometric shapes (CLEVR) and real-world photographs (A-OKVQA). On A-OKVQA, both self-questioning and standard reinforcement learning substantially improve accuracy over the untrained model (52.2% and 51.6% vs. 46.8%). We introduce the first self-questioning VLM by rewarding not only the final answer like standard RL but additionally for generating intermediate sub-questions, enabling it to discover compositional decomposition strategies. These results suggest that teaching AI systems to ask themselves intermediate questions is a promising strategy for complex visual reasoning, particularly when the difficulty of a question warrants explicit step-by-step decomposition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工标注的自提问框架，使视觉语言模型（VLM）能自主将复杂视觉问题分解为子问题，并通过强化学习（GRPO）优化推理过程，在A-OKVQA等基准上显著提升准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM在组合式视觉推理（如识别、计数、比较）上表现不佳，而依赖人工编写分步解释的训练方法成本高、难扩展。
AI.method: 提出自提问框架，利用Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）强化学习算法，奖励模型生成中间子问题及正确最终答案，不提供任何分解示例，让模型自主发现分解策略。
AI.result: 在A-OKVQA数据集上，自提问方法将准确率从46.8%提升至52.2%，标准RL为51.6%；首次实现了无需人工分解标注的自提问VLM。
AI.conclusion: 引导AI自我提问中间问题是提升复杂视觉推理能力的有效新范式，尤其适用于需显式分步推理的难题。

title: Tying the Loop -- Tied Expert Layers in Mixture-of-Experts Language Models
summary:
Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures efficiently scale Large Language Models (LLMs) by activating only a small fraction of their experts per token, yet the full parameter count - dominated by the expert parameters - must be held in training and inference memory. To address this, we introduce Expert Tying, an architectural modification that shares expert parameters across consecutive transformer layers while preserving independent, layer-wise routing and attention.
  We evaluate this approach across common, state-of-the-art architectures, including OLMoE, Qwen3, and DeepSeek-style MoEs. Our pretraining experiments demonstrate that tying experts can reduce memory footprint by almost 2x at virtually no degradation in perplexity or downstream quality. By exploiting the parameter redundancy inherent in MoE pathways, our method provides a highly favorable compute-to-memory trade-off, advancing efficient training and scaling of next-generation LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Expert Tying方法，在MoE架构中跨连续Transformer层共享专家参数，显著降低内存占用（近2倍），同时几乎不损失模型性能。
AI.motivation: MoE架构虽能高效扩展大语言模型，但其庞大的专家参数需全程驻留内存，造成训练与推理内存压力。
AI.method: 在连续Transformer层间共享专家参数，同时保持各层独立的路由机制和注意力计算。
AI.result: 在OLMoE、Qwen3、DeepSeek等主流MoE架构上验证，内存减少近2倍，困惑度与下游任务性能几乎无损。
AI.conclusion: Expert Tying通过利用MoE路径中的参数冗余，在计算与内存间实现更优权衡，推动下一代大模型的高效训练与扩展。

title: When in Doubt, Plan It Out: Committed Small Language Model Deliberation for Reactive Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) policies often degrade in unfamiliar environments because they lack explicit deliberation. We propose Plan, Align, Commit, Think (PACT), a hybrid architecture that combines a fast, reactive RL policy with a slow, deliberative Small Language Model (SLM) planner. PACT invokes the SLM asynchronously to generate and validate candidate action plans. Once a plan is verified through simulation as safe, feasible, and complete, it is executed directly, bypassing the RL policy without retraining or modifying it. Evaluated on three FrozenLake configurations of increasing difficulty, PACT outperforms all baselines while relying on a 2B-parameter SLM backbone, suggesting that deliberative planning and reactive execution are more powerful in concert than either is alone in these settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PACT混合架构，结合快速反应的强化学习策略与慢速深思熟虑的小型语言模型（SLM）规划器，在不修改或重训练RL策略的前提下提升其在陌生环境中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 强化学习策略在陌生环境中性能下降，因其缺乏显式的推理与规划能力。
AI.method: 提出Plan, Align, Commit, Think（PACT）架构：RL策略负责快速反应，小型语言模型（SLM）异步生成并仿真验证候选动作计划；验证通过后直接执行计划，绕过RL策略。
AI.result: 在三个难度递增的FrozenLake任务上，PACT显著优于所有基线方法，且仅依赖2B参数的SLM主干模型。
AI.conclusion: 在所测试环境中，将深思熟虑的规划能力与快速反应执行相结合，比单独使用任一机制更有效；该方法无需修改现有RL策略，具有即插即用优势。

title: LLM-Powered Virtual Population for Demand Simulation and Pricing
summary: We develop an LLM-powered virtual population model that simulates demand for pricing decisions, in settings where products are described by rich unstructured information, such as text descriptions and images, and where decision makers need not only mean-demand predictions but also uncertainty estimates for counterfactual prices. Our model represents exposed customers as draws from a finite mixture of customer personas. For each persona, product, and candidate price, an LLM elicits a persona-level purchase probability using both structured persona information and unstructured product information. These probabilities are aggregated through calibrated mixture weights to form a predictive distribution of aggregate demand. The resulting simulator can evaluate counterfactual prices under various pricing objectives, including expected revenue and risk-aware criteria such as conditional value at risk. We test the framework on an online H&M fashion dataset with product descriptions and images. The calibrated LLM-based simulator achieves the best overall predictive performance among the models considered, and supports sample-efficient pricing decisions. Our framework provides a practical way to use LLMs as demand simulators for products with limited historical demand data but rich product information. By producing a full predictive demand distribution rather than only a point forecast, it enables managers to compare candidate prices, quantify demand uncertainty, and choose prices that target either average-case revenue or risk-aware objectives.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的虚拟人群模型，用于在产品信息丰富（如文本和图像）但历史需求数据有限的场景下，模拟定价决策的需求，并提供均值预测及不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 解决产品具有丰富非结构化信息（如文本、图像）但历史需求数据稀少时，传统需求预测模型难以准确建模且缺乏不确定性量化能力的问题。
AI.method: 构建一个由客户画像混合分布表示的虚拟人群；对每个画像-产品-价格组合，利用LLM融合结构化画像信息与非结构化产品信息，生成个性化购买概率；再通过校准的混合权重聚合为整体需求预测分布。
AI.result: 在H&M时尚数据集上验证，该LLM驱动的校准模拟器在预测性能上优于对比模型，支持样本高效定价决策，并能输出完整需求分布以支持期望收益或风险感知（如CVaR）等多样化定价目标。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为利用LLM作为需求模拟器提供了实用路径，尤其适用于非结构化产品信息丰富而历史销售数据稀缺的场景，显著提升了定价决策的灵活性与鲁棒性。

title: SpatialAvatar-0: High-Quality 4D Head Avatar with Multi-Stage Reconstruction
summary: High-quality 4D head avatars from one or a few source portraits are central to telepresence, AR/VR, and digital-human interaction. 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as the dominant representation, with two complementary regimes (generalizable feed-forward predictors and per-subject refiners) maturing in parallel. However, existing feed-forward predictors are trained on a single dataset family with a hard-coded source count, inheriting the corresponding domain bias. Per-subject refiners require 300K--600K iterations and rely on adaptive densification that destroys upstream Gaussian layouts, preventing the two regimes from sharing a representation end-to-end. To bridge both regimes we propose SpatialAvatar-0 on a shared FLAME-mesh-bound Gaussian representation: a feed-forward generator with a parameter-free K-source mean-pool and a monocular-temporal to multi-view-spatial two-phase schedule that anchors against identity-prior collapse onto the smaller multi-view set. We further introduce a 10K-iter layout-preserving per-subject refinement loop that freezes the FLAME-binding and Gaussian count and replaces densification with a three-component anti-spike regularization. On VFHQ/HDTF cross-domain zero-shot we surpass the in-domain leader GAGAvatar by +1.5 dB PSNR despite never training on either test domain, and on the SplattingAvatar monocular benchmark we lead every reported metric, surpassing the 300K-iter GeoAvatar by +1.3 dB PSNR at up to 60x shorter per-subject schedule than common SOTA baselines. Website: https://spatialwalk.github.io/SpatialAvatar-0.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpatialAvatar-0，一种基于FLAME网格绑定高斯表示的端到端可训练框架，统一了通用前馈生成与单主体精调两种范式，在跨域零样本和单目基准上均超越SOTA方法，同时大幅缩短精调迭代次数。
AI.motivation: 现有3D高斯溅射（3DGS）方法中，通用前馈预测器存在数据集与源图像数量的领域偏差，而单主体精调器迭代长、破坏高斯布局，二者难以共享统一表示并端到端协同。
AI.method: 提出SpatialAvatar-0：1）采用FLAME网格绑定的共享高斯表示；2）设计无参K源均值池化前馈生成器；3）引入单目-时序→多视图-空间两阶段训练调度以抑制身份坍缩；4）开发仅10K次迭代的布局保持精调环，冻结FLAME绑定与高斯数量，并用三组分抗尖峰正则替代自适应致密化。
AI.result: 在VFHQ/HDTF跨域零样本测试中PSNR超越GAGAvatar +1.5 dB（未在任一测试域训练）；在SplattingAvatar单目基准上全面领先，PSNR较300K迭代GeoAvatar提升+1.3 dB，且单主体精调耗时仅为SOTA基线的1/60。
AI.conclusion: SpatialAvatar-0成功桥接通用生成与个性化精调两大范式，在质量、泛化性与效率上实现协同突破，为高质量4D头像建模提供了新范式。

title: Does Traversal Order Matter? A Systematic Study of Tree Traversal Methods in Transformer Grammars
summary: Transformer Grammars (TGs) enhance language modeling by incorporating syntactic tree structures. Despite the potentially significant impact on model performance of how syntactic trees are linearized in TGs, existing studies rely solely on Depth-First Traversal (DFT) for linearization. In this paper, we expand the traversal design space by exploring Breadth-First Traversal (BFT) and a novel hybrid traversal strategy, Production-Rule Traversal (PRT), which combines the structural lookahead of BFT with the early lexical generation of DFT. We integrate these traversal methods with varying tree configurations and masking strategies, and empirically evaluate their performance on language modeling, syntactic generalization and summarization. We reveal the inherent trade-offs between nested composition and global lookahead, providing actionable recommendations for designing task-aware Transformer Grammars.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了Transformer Grammars中语法树线性化的不同遍历策略，提出了一种结合广度优先与深度优先优点的新方法PRT，并在语言建模、句法泛化和摘要任务上进行了实证评估。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer Grammars仅使用深度优先遍历（DFT）进行语法树线性化，而遍历方式对模型性能可能有显著影响，因此需拓展遍历设计空间。
AI.method: 提出了三种树遍历策略：深度优先遍历（DFT）、广度优先遍历（BFT）和新型的生成规则遍历（PRT）；结合不同树结构与掩码策略，在多个NLP任务上进行实验评估。
AI.result: 揭示了嵌套组合能力与全局前瞻能力之间的内在权衡；PRT在多项任务中展现出优于DFT和BFT的综合性能。
AI.conclusion: 语法树遍历策略对Transformer Grammars性能具有关键影响，应依据具体任务需求选择或设计适配的遍历方式。

title: Bayesian Inference and Decision Audits for Public Archives of Frontier AI Evaluations
summary: Public AI evaluations are often read as terminal leaderboards, yet the underlying evidence is a selective time series shaped by reporting rules, benchmark revisions, and missingness. Repeated public archives for LiveBench and Open LLM Leaderboard v2 serve as the primary longitudinal record; LMArena provides a preference stress test; and GAIA and tau-bench contribute limited agentic pilots. Together, these archives instantiate a Bayesian inference problem: under a fixed reporting convention, one constructed terminal-only example over $1{,}000$ systems is compatible with two pre-terminal histories, yielding times of $23.03$ or $75.13$ to reach within $0.05$ of the ceiling under the same terminal-tail model. In synthetic posterior comparisons, action-facing diagnostics differ across observation regimes. The candidate selection-aware frontier model fails synthetic recovery, objective-archive prediction, preference transfer, and uncertainty calibration; correspondingly, fixed audit gates reject its stronger claims. An archive-and-adjudication protocol reconstructs public evaluation histories, isolates a verified timing boundary, and falsifies unsupported frontier claims.

AI.tldr: 本文指出公共AI评估存在选择性时间序列问题，通过分析多个评估档案（如LiveBench、Open LLM Leaderboard v2等），揭示其作为贝叶斯推理问题的本质，并提出‘档案与裁决’协议以重建评估历史、界定可信时间边界并证伪未经支持的前沿主张。
AI.motivation: 公共AI评估常被误读为最终排行榜，而实际数据受报告规则、基准更新和缺失值影响，缺乏对评估动态演化的严谨建模。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯推理框架建模评估时间序列，结合合成后验比较与诊断实验，检验候选前沿模型在多种观测机制下的表现，并设计‘档案与 adjudication’协议重构评估历史。
AI.result: 发现同一终端结果可对应多个前置演化路径；候选前沿模型在多项诊断任务（如合成恢复、偏好迁移、不确定性校准）中失败；固定审计门限拒绝其强主张。
AI.conclusion: 需超越静态排行榜思维，建立可追溯、可验证的动态评估机制，‘档案与裁决’协议为AI评估可信性提供了新范式。

title: When Confidence Lacks Concepts: Interpretable OOD Detection via Representation Perturbations
summary: Deep neural networks have achieved remarkable performance across medical imaging tasks, yet their tendency to overgeneralize under distributional shifts poses a major obstacle to safe clinical deployment. Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection methods aim to mitigate this risk, but most existing approaches rely on opaque internal signals with poorly understood semantic meaning, limiting trust in safety-critical settings. In this work, we propose an interpretable OOD detection framework that probes the stability of model predictions under class-conditioned semantic perturbations. Leveraging sparse autoencoders (SAEs), we learn class-specific concept vectors from in-distribution data that disentangle dense intermediate representations into sparse, semantically meaningful components. At inference, we perturb deeper-layer representations using the concept vectors associated with the model's predicted class and measure the class logits stability. We hypothesize that in-distribution samples exhibit low sensitivity to such perturbations, as their representations align with class-specific semantic directions, whereas OOD samples show amplified deviations due to representational misalignment. By framing OOD detection as a concept conditioned stability analysis, our approach provides both a discriminative OOD signal and an interpretable lens into the internal mechanisms driving model uncertainty, making it particularly suitable for high stakes medical applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稀疏自编码器（SAE）学习类别特定概念向量、通过扰动深层表征并分析预测稳定性来实现可解释的分布外（OOD）检测新框架，适用于高风险医学影像场景。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在医学影像中表现优异，但面对分布偏移时易过泛化，现有OOD检测方法依赖不透明的内部信号，缺乏可解释性，难以满足临床安全需求。
AI.method: 利用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）从分布内数据中学习类别特异的概念向量，将密集中间表征解耦为稀疏、语义明确的成分；推理时，基于模型预测类别对应的概念向量扰动深层表征，并测量类别logits的稳定性。
AI.result: 该方法能有效区分分布内与分布外样本，同时提供语义可解释的不确定性分析依据，提升模型在医学应用中的可信度。
AI.conclusion: 将OOD检测建模为概念条件下的稳定性分析，不仅提升了检测性能，更提供了可解释的安全验证机制，为临床AI部署提供了新范式。

title: OneFocus: Enabling Real-World X-ray Security Screening with a Unified Vision-Language Model
summary: X-ray contraband detection is critical for security in large-scale logistics and transportation, yet conventional detectors struggle to adapt to emerging contraband types and lack fundamental visual understanding. Vision-language models (VLMs) offer strong generalization but are hindered by the scarcity of high-quality X-ray image-caption data. To bridge this critical gap, we present MMXray, a meticulously curated benchmark of 52,124 image-caption pairs spanning 28 fine-grained classes of X-ray contraband. To enrich MMXray with realistic occlusion patterns, we further introduce CleanDET, a dedicated synthesis dataset containing clean foreground contraband images from 28 categories and background images with diverse density levels, together with AnyContraSyn, a controllable synthesis method designed to operate on CleanDET. We also develop OnePipe, an extensible pipeline for systematic data curation. Built on MMXray, we propose OneFocus, a unified VLM that supports four core tasks: visual question answering, contraband localization, classification, and image understanding. OneFocus achieves state-of-the-art performance in X-ray contraband understanding and demonstrates robust cross-domain generalization, establishing a strong vision-language baseline for security screening.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MMXray基准数据集和OneFocus视觉语言模型，以解决X射线违禁品检测中数据稀缺与泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统X射线违禁品检测器难以适应新型违禁品且缺乏基本视觉理解能力；现有视觉语言模型因高质量X射线图像-文本对数据稀缺而受限。
AI.method: 构建了包含52,124对图像-文本的MMXray基准；提出CleanDET合成数据集与AnyContraSyn可控合成方法以模拟真实遮挡；开发OnePipe数据整理流程；基于MMXray设计支持四类任务的统一VLM OneFocus。
AI.result: OneFocus在X射线违禁品理解任务上达到SOTA性能，并展现出强跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MMXray与OneFocus为安检领域的X射线视觉语言建模建立了坚实基准与有效范式。

title: Data-Driven Decoding of Russell's Circumplex Model of Affect
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Affective computing increasingly relies on deep learning to represent emotions, yet latent spaces often remain opaque, high-dimensional black boxes. This paper investigates whether Transformers' embeddings recover the geometric regularities of Russell's circumplex model. We unify two complementary experiments testing the hypothesis that, after training models on text and speech, their resulting latent spaces encode a topology consistent with valence-arousal and reproduce human-like neighborhood relations. Specifically, we evaluate deep representations extracted from Transformer-based text (RoBERTa) and speech (wav2vec 2.0) encoders, along with a multimodal Transformer fusion architecture, across naturalistic datasets like MSP-Podcast and controlled LLM-generated stimuli. Our analysis reveals that multimodal fusion of text and audio yields perfect topological alignment with Russell's primary emotion ordering. Furthermore, in a zero-shot setting using generic text embeddings, projected fine-grained emotion terms fall close to their established human-mapped coordinates. Our contribution is a novel, data-driven framework for validating emotion models, demonstrating that Russell's circumplex structure is intrinsically encoded in the embeddings of these modalities rather than being solely an artifact of human labeling, thereby bridging the gap between psychological theory and representation learning.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了Transformer模型的嵌入空间是否能恢复Russell环形情绪模型的几何规律，发现多模态融合（文本+语音）能完美对齐该模型，并验证了情绪表征在嵌入空间中天然具备心理学基础。
AI.motivation: 情感计算中深度学习模型的潜在空间常为高维黑箱，缺乏可解释性；本文旨在检验其是否隐含心理学公认的情绪结构（如Russell环形模型）。
AI.method: 统一分析RoBERTa（文本）、wav2vec 2.0（语音）及多模态Transformer融合模型在自然与合成数据上的嵌入空间拓扑结构，评估其与valence-arousal坐标系及人类标注邻域关系的一致性。
AI.result: 多模态融合嵌入实现与Russell模型的完美拓扑对齐；零样本下通用文本嵌入经投影后，细粒度情绪词亦接近人类标注坐标。
AI.conclusion: Russell环形结构并非仅源于人工标注，而是内生于Transformer等模型的跨模态表征中；本文提出首个数据驱动的情绪模型验证框架，弥合了心理理论与表示学习之间的鸿沟。

title: Calibrated Sampling-Free Uncertainty Estimation in Bayesian Deep Learning
summary: Modern deep learning models remain notoriously prone to overconfidence, limiting their reliability in high-stakes applications. Bayesian methods aim to counter this by learning a distribution over model parameters, and recent advances now make this feasible for large-scale architectures at costs comparable to AdamW. However, a challenge remains at test time: predictions must be averaged across many forward passes with weights sampled from the posterior, which is prohibitively expensive. Variance propagation offers an efficient alternative, computing layer-wise analytical approximations of uncertainty in a single forward pass. While such techniques are effective for MLPs, their extension to modern architectures remains challenging, due to increased depth and diversity of layer types. To fill this gap, we propose Calibrated Variance Propagation (CVP), which introduces a new propagation method for normalization layers, combines it with recent techniques for handling activation functions, and absorbs residual error through a light calibration step. CVP yields comparably accurate uncertainty estimates to MC sampling across transformers and CNNs, at a fraction of the cost. Against prior variance propagation work, CVP improves coverage at $0.5\%$ risk from $8.2\%$ to $14.6\%$ with BEiT-3 on Visual Reasoning (NLVR2) and from $2.6\%$ to $10.8\%$ with ViLT on VQAv2, with gains extending to convolutional architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Calibrated Variance Propagation（CVP），一种高效、准确的不确定性估计方法，适用于Transformer和CNN等现代深度学习架构，在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 现代深度学习模型在高风险应用中因过度自信而可靠性不足；贝叶斯方法虽可缓解该问题，但测试时需多次采样，计算昂贵；现有方差传播方法难以适配复杂现代架构。
AI.method: 提出CVP方法：1）为归一化层设计新方差传播机制；2）融合最新激活函数不确定性处理技术；3）引入轻量校准步骤吸收残差误差。
AI.result: CVP在BEiT-3（NLVR2）上将0.5%风险下的覆盖率从8.2%提升至14.6%，在ViLT（VQAv2）上从2.6%提升至10.8%，并在CNN上验证有效性；精度媲美蒙特卡洛采样，但成本大幅降低。
AI.conclusion: CVP是一种兼顾效率与准确性的不确定性估计新范式，成功拓展方差传播至主流大模型架构，为实际部署提供可行方案。

title: CEVAR: Centerline Embedding Extraction for Endovascular Aneurysm Repair
summary: Long-term mortality rates after endovascular aneurysm repair (EVAR) remain elevated due to post-EVAR rupture caused by loss of seal in stent graft sealing zones. Structured CT review using centerline measurements improves detection, but current workflows require manual centerline editing and expert operators. We propose a transformer framework for automated, protocol-driven sealing zone assessment that combines 3D centerline tracking with embedding-based geometric prediction. Two state-of-the-art image-to-graph models are evaluated for aorto-iliac centerline extraction from follow-up CT and for measurement of stent position, vessel diameters, and seal lengths according to EVAR4C protocol. Across the full test set and a challenging no-contrast subset, the proposed fully automatic method outperforms the commercial semi-automatic workflow.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的全自动框架，用于依据EVAR4C协议评估腹主动脉瘤腔内修复术（EVAR）后的封堵区，结合3D中心线追踪与嵌入式几何预测，在无对比剂CT子集上也优于商用半自动工作流。
AI.motivation: EVAR术后远期死亡率仍高，主要因封堵区密封失效导致动脉瘤破裂；现有基于中心线的CT评估方法依赖人工编辑和专家操作，效率低、可及性差。
AI.method: 提出一种Transformer框架，融合3D中心线跟踪与embedding-based几何预测；评估两种SOTA图像到图模型，分别用于腹主动脉-髂动脉中心线提取及按EVAR4C协议测量支架位置、血管直径和封堵长度。
AI.result: 在完整测试集及具挑战性的无对比剂CT子集上，该全自动方法性能均优于商用半自动工作流。
AI.conclusion: 所提全自动、协议驱动的封堵区评估框架可提升EVAR术后随访的准确性与可扩展性，降低对专家依赖。

title: Robust Dual-Signal Fusion: Hybrid Neuro-Symbolic Gating with Compressed Chain-of-Thought Refinement for Irony Detection in Social Media Texts
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) natively default to literal semantic interpretations, making zero-shot irony detection a persistent challenge. We introduce the Robust Dual-Signal (RDS) Fusion framework, a hybrid neuro-symbolic architecture that compresses Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning trajectories without Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). Evaluated on a strictly held-out TweetEval test set (N=734), RDS achieves 78.1% accuracy and a Macro F1 of 0.777, matching the absolute performance ceiling of the fine-tuned BERTweet. On the heavily imbalanced iSarcasm dataset, the frozen CoT pipeline filters 22.5% of out-of-distribution hallucinations, yielding a zero-shot Macro F1 of 0.6726 and Ironic F1 of 0.4821, outperforming multiple heavily supervised SemEval transformer ensembles. A statistical ablation confirms this structural synergy: adding the symbolic prior to the neural baseline yields no significant gain (p = 0.242), and the marginal benefit of adding the CoT pipeline to that prior is heavily compressed (p = 0.149). Only the complete, concurrent fusion of all three signals achieves a statistically validated improvement over the baseline (p = 0.005).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需监督微调的鲁棒双信号（RDS）融合框架，结合神经与符号方法，通过压缩思维链（CoT）推理路径提升零样本反语检测性能，在多个数据集上达到甚至超越有监督模型的效果。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型天然倾向于字面语义理解，导致零样本反语检测长期面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出Robust Dual-Signal (RDS) Fusion框架，一种混合神经-符号架构，压缩Chain-of-Thought（CoT）推理轨迹，且不依赖监督微调（SFT）。
AI.result: 在TweetEval测试集上达78.1%准确率和0.777 Macro F1，媲美微调BERTweet；在iSarcasm数据集上实现零样本Macro F1=0.6726、Ironic F1=0.4821，优于多个有监督SemEval模型；统计消融证实仅完整三信号（神经+符号先验+CoT）并发融合能带来显著提升（p=0.005）。
AI.conclusion: 神经、符号先验与CoT三者并发融合是提升零样本反语检测性能的关键，单一或两两组合无显著增益。

title: Prediction of Runtime Parameters of Parallel Chemistry Applications via Active and Generative Learning
summary: In this work, we develop two main Machine Learning based approaches to predict the runtime parameters of highly scalable parallel chemistry computations.These approaches employ active and generative learning together with the empirically determined gradient boosted regression tree models chosen among a rich suite of machine learning models. When evaluated on Coupled-Cluster with Singles and Doubles computations, our models achieve a mean absolute error percentage (MAPE) as low as 0.023 and a coefficient of determination as high as 99.9%. Furthermore, when combined with active learning to mitigate the lack of large amounts of training data, our models score a MAPE about 0.2 with 20-25% of the original dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于机器学习的方法，利用主动学习和生成式学习结合梯度提升回归树模型，准确预测大规模并行化学计算的运行时参数，在耦合簇计算中取得了极高的预测精度，并在数据量减少至20-25%时仍保持良好性能。
AI.motivation: 解决大规模并行化学计算中运行时参数难以高效准确预测的问题，尤其在训练数据有限的情况下。
AI.method: 采用主动学习与生成式学习策略，结合多种机器学习模型筛选出最优的梯度提升回归树模型进行预测。
AI.result: 在Coupled-Cluster with Singles and Doubles计算上，模型达到最低0.023的MAPE和高达99.9%的决定系数；仅用20-25%数据配合主动学习时MAPE约为0.2。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法显著提升了运行时参数预测精度与数据利用效率，为高性能计算中的化学模拟提供了实用的机器学习解决方案。

title: 3D Consistency Optimization for Self-Supervised Monocular Video Depth Estimation
summary: Reliable monocular video depth estimation is crucial for downstream 3D reasoning and embodied AI in endoscopic navigation. However, existing self-supervised approaches typically treat video frames independently or rely on weak temporal regularization. These methods, lacking a holistic perception of the underlying 3D scene, inevitably suffer from geometrically inconsistent predictions and severe cross-frame drift. To address these limitations, we introduce a new paradigm that recasts sequential video depth estimation as an unconstrained multi-view 3D reconstruction problem, enabling full exploitation of the powerful geometric priors embedded in recent 3D foundation models. The core of our approach is a 3D consistency optimization framework driven by three constraints: image-level photometric rendering, explicit world-coordinate geometric alignment, and multi-scale temporal gradient consistency. Such unified optimization elegantly anchors isolated frames to a globally coherent 3D structure. Our method has been validated in both the self-supervised training scenarios and challenging zero-shot clinical environments. Results show that the proposed approach achieves state-of-the-art spatial accuracy, outperforming the frame-based, video-based depth estimators and the multi-view 3D reconstruction baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将单目视频深度估计重构为无约束多视图3D重建问题的新范式，利用3D基础模型的几何先验，通过光度渲染、世界坐标对齐和时序梯度一致性三重约束实现全局一致的深度估计，在自监督与零样本临床场景中均达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督单目视频深度估计方法通常独立处理帧或依赖弱时序正则化，缺乏对底层3D场景的整体感知，导致几何不一致和跨帧漂移。
AI.method: 将视频深度估计建模为无约束多视图3D重建问题，构建基于光度渲染、显式世界坐标几何对齐和多尺度时序梯度一致性的3D一致性优化框架。
AI.result: 在自监督训练和零样本临床环境中均验证有效，空间精度超越帧级、视频级深度估计器及多视图3D重建基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过统一优化将孤立帧锚定到全局一致的3D结构中，显著提升了单目内窥镜视频深度估计的几何一致性与鲁棒性。

title: Follow the Latent Roadmap: Navigating Revocable Decoding for Diffusion LLMs with Anchor Tokens
summary: Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) offer a promising avenue for parallel generation but face a trade-off between decoding speed and quality. While revocable decoding strategies attempt to mitigate errors by verifying and remasking tokens, they typically operate within a mixed-quality context. This leads to two critical failures: \textit{Error Propagation}, where new tokens absorb toxic information from erroneous context, and \textit{Local Error Reinforcement}, where errors mutually reinforce each other to evade detection. To alleviate these challenges, we propose ASRD (Anchor Supervised Revocable Decoding), a training-free framework that operates within the embedding space. ASRD explicitly decouples the decoding context into trusted \textit{Anchor Tokens}, which are identified via temporal consistency, and uncertain candidates. Leveraging a dynamic Anchor Tokens Cache, we introduce two complementary mechanisms: (1) Anchor-Guided Generation, which injects entropy-weighted anchor signals into masked positions to implicitly rectify attention toward the reliable global skeleton; and (2) Anchor-Perturbed Verification, which applies orthogonal perturbations to uncertain candidate tokens, destabilizing and remasking errors driven by fragile local consensus. Extensive experiments on math and coding benchmarks demonstrate that ASRD outperforms recent remasking baselines, achieving accuracy improvements of up to 6.4\% while accelerating inference throughput by up to 7.2$\times$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ASRD框架，通过在嵌入空间中解耦可信锚点词元与不确定候选词元，利用锚点引导生成和锚点扰动验证两种机制，有效缓解错误传播与局部错误强化问题，在数学与编程基准上显著提升准确率与推理速度。
AI.motivation: 扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）在并行生成中面临解码速度与质量的权衡；现有可撤销解码策略因在混合质量上下文中操作，易导致错误传播和局部错误强化。
AI.method: 提出无需训练的ASRD框架：基于时间一致性识别可信的Anchor Tokens，并构建动态Anchor Tokens Cache；设计Anchor-Guided Generation（注入熵加权锚点信号以校正注意力）和Anchor-Perturbed Verification（对候选词元施加正交扰动以破坏错误共识）两种机制。
AI.result: 在数学和编程基准测试中，ASRD显著优于近期重掩码基线方法，准确率最高提升6.4%，推理吞吐量最高加速7.2倍。
AI.conclusion: ASRD通过嵌入空间中的锚点监督机制，有效提升了dLLMs的生成质量与效率，为可撤销解码提供了新范式。

title: From Tokens to Regions: CUDA-Sensitive Instruction Tuning for GPU Kernel Generation
summary: High-performance CUDA kernels are essential for scalable AI systems, while Large Language Models (LLMs) still struggle to generate correct kernels due to strict and implicit execution constraints. Existing LLM-based approaches either rely on costly agentic or reinforcement-learning (RL) pipelines, or adopt supervised fine-tuning (SFT) objectives that fail to explicitly model CUDA sensitivity, namely code tokens or regions tightly coupled with execution constraints. In this work, we investigate CUDA sensitivity from the perspective of token confidence patterns, showing that CUDA sensitivity appears at both token and region levels, where most CUDA-sensitive tokens are predicted with high confidence, while a smaller low-confidence subset forms regions corresponding to execution-critical structures. These findings suggest that effective CUDA kernel generation should both leverage high-confidence CUDA-sensitive tokens and preserve low-confidence CUDA-sensitive regions. Building on these insights, we propose \textbf{\underline{CU}DA-\underline{Se}nsitive Instruction \underline{T}uning (CuSeT)}, a low-cost post-training method within a simple SFT framework. CuSeT follows the principle of ``from tokens to regions'' by combining \emph{adaptive token-level masking} with \emph{region-aware sample reweighting}. Experiments show that CuSeT consistently improves functional correctness across multiple model families and scales, outperforming standard SFT and advanced SFT variants, while achieving competitive performance against frontier CUDA kernel generation models with substantially lower inference cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CuSeT方法，通过自适应token掩码和区域感知样本重加权，在低成本SFT框架下提升LLM生成正确CUDA核的能力，显著提高功能正确性且推理开销更低。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型难以生成正确的CUDA核，因其对隐式执行约束敏感；而当前基于LLM的方法或成本高（如强化学习/智能体），或监督微调未能显式建模CUDA敏感性。
AI.method: 从token置信度模式出发分析CUDA敏感性，发现其同时存在于token级（高置信预测）和region级（低置信但关键结构）；据此提出CuSeT方法，结合自适应token级掩码与region-aware样本重加权。
AI.result: CuSeT在多个模型家族和规模上一致提升功能正确性，优于标准及改进型SFT，并以远低于前沿模型的推理成本达到相近性能。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模CUDA敏感性的token到region双层级机制（CuSeT）是高效提升LLM CUDA核生成能力的有效低开销方案。

title: OmniTraffic: A Controllable Generation Pipeline and Benchmark for Spatio-Temporal Traffic Reasoning
summary: Traffic scene understanding requires models to reason beyond object recognition, including lane topology, multi-view geometry, temporal evolution, and signal-phase semantics. However, existing traffic-oriented multimodal benchmarks largely emphasize passive visual recognition or isolated video understanding, offering limited support for evaluating structure-aware traffic reasoning under controlled conditions. We introduce OmniTraffic, a controllable generation pipeline and benchmark for spatio-temporal traffic reasoning. Built around 12 real-world intersections reconstructed into editable 3D traffic environments and complemented by surveillance footage from two countries, OmniTraffic supports both controlled and natural-condition evaluation. It defines a three-level task hierarchy spanning scene perception, multi-view and temporal reasoning, and decision support. Using structured traffic metadata, OmniTraffic generates synchronized multi-view VQA samples covering vehicle states, lane functions, view--BEV correspondence, temporal dynamics, and signal-phase analysis, resulting in 8M VQA samples and a 3K human-verified test set. Evaluation of eleven frontier MLLMs reveals a large human--model gap, with the most pronounced failures in topology-grounded and spatio-temporal reasoning tasks. Fine-tuning a lightweight MLLM on simulated OmniTraffic data further improves performance on real-world traffic scenes, demonstrating the value of simulation-generated supervision for traffic-specific multimodal reasoning. Beyond a fixed dataset, OmniTraffic provides an extensible pipeline with configurable intersections, camera views, traffic demands, signal phases, visual conditions, and rare events.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了OmniTraffic，一个用于时空交通推理的可控生成管道和基准，涵盖场景感知、多视角与时间推理及决策支持三个层次的任务，并通过结构化交通元数据生成大量VQA样本，验证了现有MLLM在拓扑和时空推理上的不足，并展示了仿真数据微调对真实场景性能提升的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有交通导向的多模态基准主要强调被动视觉识别或孤立视频理解，缺乏对结构感知型交通推理的可控评估支持。
AI.method: 构建基于12个真实路口重建的可编辑3D交通环境，并结合两国监控视频，设计三层任务体系；利用结构化交通元数据生成同步多视角VQA样本（共8M），并建立3K人工验证测试集；评估11个前沿MLLM，并对轻量级MLLM进行仿真数据微调。
AI.result: 评估显示当前MLLM在拓扑感知和时空推理任务上存在显著人机差距；经仿真数据微调后，模型在真实交通场景中性能明显提升。
AI.conclusion: OmniTraffic不仅提供了一个新型交通多模态基准，更构建了一个可扩展、可配置的生成管道，为交通特定的多模态推理研究提供了新范式。

title: Revisiting the Systematicity in Negation in the Era of In-Context Learning
comment: Accepted to the 6th Workshop Natural Language Meets Logic and Machine Learning (NALOMA2026) at ESSLLI2026
summary: Understanding the meaning of negated sentences remains one of the challenges for language models, even in the era of large language models (LLMs). We analyze systematicity regarding LLM understanding of negation from two perspectives: behavioral systematicity and representational systematicity. For behavioral systematicity, we confirm that through demonstrations and in-context learning, LLMs can recognize negation expressions and scope within sentences to some extent, but they fail to achieve perfect performance. In particular, the difficulty of the negation scope recognition for models varies depending on the output format. For representational systematicity, we analyze the extent to which function vectors can be robustly constructed from in-context examples for tasks that are essential to understanding negation. The experiments suggest that while function vectors can be composed for negation cue extraction tasks, extracting function vectors for recognizing scope is more challenging.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大型语言模型（LLM）对否定句的理解能力，从行为系统性和表征系统性两方面分析其系统性表现；发现LLMs可通过上下文学习识别否定表达与范围，但性能不完美，且受输出格式影响；功能向量可较易构建用于否定线索提取，但难以用于否定范围识别。
AI.motivation: 理解否定句含义仍是语言模型（尤其是大模型）面临的挑战之一，需系统评估其在否定理解上的系统性能力。
AI.method: 从行为系统性（通过提示和上下文学习测试否定识别与范围判断）和表征系统性（分析基于上下文样例构建功能向量的鲁棒性）两个角度进行实证分析。
AI.result: LLMs在否定识别上具有一定能力但未达完美，否定范围识别难度受输出格式影响；功能向量可有效支持否定线索提取，但在否定范围识别任务中难以稳健构建。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLMs对否定的理解存在系统性局限，尤其在否定范围识别和相应表征构建方面仍有明显不足，需进一步改进模型的逻辑与结构化推理能力。

title: Evolutionary Bilevel Reward Shaping for Generalization in Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) often suffers from performance degradation when deployed in environments that differ from those encountered during training. Existing techniques such as domain randomization (DR) mitigate this, but require access to diverse training environments and full trajectory observability, assumptions that fail in privacy-preserving or restricted scenarios where only scalar performance metrics are available. We propose Generalization via Evolutionary Reward Shaping (GERS), a bilevel optimization approach to improve generalization on unseen test environments using only scalar feedback from validation environments. At the lower level, an RL agent guided via a reward function shaped by the upper level learns a policy on a limited set of training environments with accessible trajectory data; at the upper level, CMA-ES optimizes the reward shaping parameters to maximize the cumulative unshaped reward on separate validation environments for which trajectory access is unavailable. Results on continuous control tasks indicate that GERS outperforms the standard RL baseline on unseen test environments. GERS performance is comparable to DR, despite DR treating the combined set of training and validation environments of GERS as a single training set that requires trajectory access, whereas GERS cannot access validation trajectories. These results confirm that GERS effectively enhances generalization under restricted data access constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'通过进化式奖励塑形实现泛化（GERS）'的新方法，旨在解决强化学习在未知测试环境中性能下降的问题，仅依赖验证环境中的标量反馈，无需轨迹数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如领域随机化（DR）需要多样化的训练环境和完整的轨迹可观测性，但在隐私保护或数据受限场景中（仅有标量性能指标可用）难以适用。
AI.method: GERS是一种双层优化方法：下层使用由上层塑造的奖励函数训练RL策略（在有轨迹数据的有限训练环境上）；上层采用CMA-ES算法，基于无轨迹访问权限的验证环境上的未塑形累积奖励，优化奖励塑形参数。
AI.result: 在连续控制任务上，GERS在未见测试环境上的表现优于标准RL基线，并与需更多数据的DR方法性能相当。
AI.conclusion: GERS能在轨迹数据不可用的受限条件下，有效提升强化学习策略在新环境中的泛化能力。

title: The Circumplex Degeneracy Behind the Rare-Class Limit in Affect Recognition
summary: In-the-wild expression recognition persistently fails on a few rare emotions, and the standard explanation is class imbalance. Through a controlled multi-task study on two benchmarks, we show the failure is instead a property of affect geometry: the rare classes are degenerate on Russell's circumplex, and that degeneracy bounds what any loss or cost can achieve. Our instrument is a circumplex-cost optimal-transport term that prices expression confusions by their valence-arousal distance. The term improves the official score and expression macro-F1, but a control most studies omit shows the gain is not geometric: a uniform cost, equivalent to a generic confidence penalty, matches it on Aff-Wild2 (p=0.625) and significantly exceeds it on AffectNet (+0.057 over base, larger than the circumplex). What the geometry reshapes is the structure of the errors, making them affectively nearer the truth on Aff-Wild2 (p=0.031 against the uniform control), an effect that does not survive on AffectNet, where a visual confound at the far corner of the circumplex overwhelms it. The rare-class failure, by contrast, is stable across both datasets we examine: the degenerate pairs (anger-fear on Aff-Wild2, anger-contempt on AffectNet) resist frequency-based interventions, the transport term, and an action-unit-augmented cost built specifically to separate them. We conclude that progress on rare expressions requires representations that distinguish the classes, not supervision that reprices their confusions, and we provide the controls and metrics needed to tell the two apart.

AI.tldr: 本文通过多任务研究发现，野外表情识别中罕见情绪识别失败的根本原因并非类别不平衡，而是情感几何结构（Russell环形模型）中的退化现象；作者提出了一种基于环形距离的最优传输代价项，虽能改善错误分布的感知邻近性，但并未显著提升整体性能，表明问题核心在于表征能力而非监督信号设计。
AI.motivation: 解决野外表情识别中罕见情绪识别持续失败的问题，质疑主流归因于类别不平衡的解释，探究其是否源于情感空间的几何特性。
AI.method: 在两个基准数据集上开展受控多任务实验；引入基于Russell环形模型中效价-唤醒距离的最优传输代价项（circumplex-cost optimal-transport term）；设置均匀代价控制组以分离几何效应与通用置信惩罚效应；分析错误结构、宏观F1及官方评分变化。
AI.result: 罕见情绪对（如Aff-Wild2中的愤怒-恐惧、AffectNet中的愤怒-轻蔑）在频率重加权、环形代价及动作单元增强代价下均表现顽固退化；环形代价改善了Aff-Wild2上错误的情感邻近性（p=0.031），但在AffectNet中被视觉混淆淹没；均匀代价在AffectNet上显著优于环形代价（+0.057 macro-F1）。
AI.conclusion: 罕见情绪识别失败源于类间表征退化，而非监督不足；提升关键在于学习可区分的特征表示，而非调整损失函数中的混淆代价；论文提供了区分表征缺陷与监督缺陷所需的控制实验与评估指标。

title: Understanding Scam Trends and Rail Paths from Reddit Self-Disclosure Narratives
comment: 6 pages, International Conference on AI and the Digital Economy (CADE) 2026
summary: Online scam behavior is inherently multi-stage, and the lifecycle includes temporally ordered rails and events rather than isolated signals. Existing works analyze characteristics of scam types and rails, but they do not track scam trends across years. Moreover, the work on the relations between rails is hampered due to the lack of open-source datasets with annotations and coverage of different scam types. To address these gaps, we build a dataset to analyze the yearly trend of scam characteristics and rail paths using Reddit self-disclosure narratives from 2023 to 2025. We collect 21,304 posts from scam-related subreddits with at least one rail among identity, communication, platform, and payment for trend analysis by heuristic annotation. Then, we label 1,800 posts containing explicit or recoverable scam chains by an LLM-assisted method for scam path analysis. The method is evaluated with human annotation. Lastly, we run a topic model on the comments of the posts to analyze the community support behavior. The results reveal that scam processes are predominantly multi-rail. Across years, different scam types and rail components dominate. Different scam types vary systematically in path complexity. Reddit support behaviors have become more detailed over time. This work supports synthetic scam chain data simulation and AI-related scam risk assessment, though findings may not generalise to other platforms.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个基于Reddit自述数据的多阶段网络诈骗分析数据集，用于研究诈骗行为的年度趋势、跨轨道路径及社区支持模式。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未能追踪诈骗行为的年度演变趋势，且缺乏覆盖多种诈骗类型的开源标注数据集来分析轨道间关系。
AI.method: 收集2023–2025年Reddit上21,304条诈骗相关帖子（含身份、通信、平台、支付等至少一类轨道），通过启发式标注进行趋势分析；对其中1,800条含明确或可恢复诈骗链的帖子采用LLM辅助标注，并经人工验证；最后对评论进行主题建模以分析社区支持行为。
AI.result: 发现诈骗过程多为多轨道交织；不同诈骗类型及轨道组件在年度间主导地位变化明显；各类诈骗在路径复杂度上呈现系统性差异；Reddit社区支持行为逐年更趋细致。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为合成诈骗链数据模拟与AI驱动的诈骗风险评估提供了基础支撑，但结论可能不适用于其他平台。

title: Rapid Poison: Practical Poisoning Attacks Against the Rapid Response Framework
summary: The Rapid Response (RR) framework, deployed in production systems, including Anthropic's ASL-3 safeguards, continuously improves jailbreak-detection classifiers. When new jailbreaks emerge that bypass these classifiers, Rapid Response generates synthetic variants for training, helping the model generalize from the new attacks and quickly adapt. We reveal that prompt injection can infiltrate this pipeline to deliver poisoned samples into the classifier's training set, enabling two attack objectives: (I) targeted poisoning attacks that create false positives on harmless samples by categorizing them as a jailbreak, with a specific desired feature (e.g., certain formatting, subject, or keyword), (II) concept-based backdoor attacks that induce false negatives on jailbreak inputs, generalizing even to jailbreaks from attack strategies the defender explicitly trained against, when the backdoor trigger is present. Importantly, our threat model restricts adversaries to modifying only jailbreak samples (not benign data or labels), a constraint unexplored by prior work that makes the second objective particularly challenging. We address this with Omission Attack, which exploits a new phenomenon: when training on concept-absent unsafe samples, the classifier misassociates that concept's presence with the safe label. Both attacks cause substantial and in some cases near-complete label flipping at only a 1% poisoning rate, achieving up to 100% false positive rates and up to 96% false negative rates.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了Rapid Response（RR）框架在持续改进越狱检测分类器时，可能因提示注入攻击而遭受训练数据污染，导致分类器出现高误报率和漏报率。
AI.motivation: 现有RR框架虽能通过合成新越狱样本提升检测能力，但其训练流程存在被提示注入攻击利用的漏洞，且先前工作未考虑仅修改越狱样本这一受限威胁模型。
AI.method: 提出两种攻击：（I）目标性投毒攻击，制造特定特征的误报；（II）基于概念的后门攻击，利用'Omission Attack'现象——即在缺失某概念的不安全样本上训练，导致模型错误地将该概念的存在关联为安全标签。
AI.result: 在仅1%投毒率下，攻击可造成显著甚至接近完全的标签翻转，误报率达100%，漏报率达96%。
AI.conclusion: RR框架在动态更新中面临严重数据投毒风险，尤其在受限攻击者能力下仍可高效实施，需重新审视其训练管道的安全设计。

title: Task-Instructed Causal Routing of Vision Foundation Models for Multi-Task Learning
summary: Vision foundation models (VFMs) have demonstrated strong robustness and transferability across a wide range of visual tasks. However, each model typically encodes strong inductive biases shaped by its pre-training objective and data domain, resulting in fragmented yet complementary visual knowledge. As a result, a single model often struggles to capture the diverse visual representations required across multiple dense prediction tasks. To address this limitation, we propose TIGER (Task-Instruction-Guided Expert Routing), a framework that coordinates multiple heterogeneous VFMs for multi-task dense prediction. Instead of naively aggregating expert features, TIGER leverages natural-language task instructions to guide a routing network that assigns token-level expert weights conditioned on task semantics, enabling adaptive integration of complementary expert features. TIGER further introduces a counterfactual loss that aligns routing decisions with each expert's causal contribution by measuring prediction changes when experts are excluded, encouraging more reliable and interpretable routing. We evaluate TIGER on two multi-task dense prediction benchmarks, NYUD-v2 and Pascal Context, where it consistently outperforms recent multi-task learning baselines while keeping all VFMs frozen. These results demonstrate that combining instruction-guided expert routing with counterfactual causal alignment enables effective coordination of heterogeneous vision foundation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TIGER框架，通过自然语言任务指令引导路由网络，自适应融合多个异构视觉基础模型（VFMs）的特征，用于多任务密集预测，并引入反事实损失提升路由可靠性与可解释性，在NYUD-v2和Pascal Context上取得优于现有方法的效果，且无需微调VFMs。
AI.motivation: 单一视觉基础模型因预训练目标和数据域导致归纳偏置强、知识碎片化，难以满足多任务密集预测所需的多样化视觉表征需求。
AI.method: 提出TIGER框架：1）利用自然语言任务指令指导token级专家路由网络，实现语义感知的特征加权融合；2）引入反事实损失，通过衡量剔除各专家后的预测变化来对齐路由决策与其因果贡献。
AI.result: 在NYUD-v2和Pascal Context两个多任务密集预测基准上，TIGER显著优于近期多任务学习基线，且所有VFMs保持冻结状态。
AI.conclusion: 指令引导的专家路由结合反事实因果对齐，能有效协调异构视觉基础模型，提升多任务密集预测性能与可解释性。

title: Compositional Reasoning Depth Predicts Clinical AI Failure: Empirical Evidence Consistent with Transformer Compositionality Limits in Electronic Health Record Question Answering
summary: Aggregate accuracy benchmarks conceal a systematic structure in how large language models fail at electronic health record (EHR) question answering: questions requiring more inferential steps produce disproportionately more errors. Motivated by theoretical results on transformer compositionality limits, we introduce a pre-specified hop-count taxonomy -- the number of distinct reasoning steps required to answer a clinical question from an EHR -- as a principled predictor of model failure. We annotate 313 clinician-generated MedAlign EHR question-answer pairs across four hop levels and evaluate 301 questions in a within-model ablation (claude-sonnet-4-6, zero-shot vs. extended thinking) and cross-architecture replications (gpt-4o and gpt-5.4-2026-03-05, zero-shot). All three models, spanning two providers and two OpenAI generations (GPT-4 and GPT-5), show monotone accuracy decline with hop count: Claude Sonnet zero-shot falls from 30.6% (hop=1) to 17.6% (hop=4) (Cochran-Armitage z=-2.30, p=0.011; OR per hop 0.72, 95% CI [0.56,0.92], p=0.008); GPT-4o replicates this (37.8% to 14.7%; OR 0.58 [0.45,0.75], p<0.001); and gpt-5.4-2026-03-05 confirms it (37.8% to 23.5%; OR 0.80 [0.66,0.98], p=0.027). A pre-specified context-sufficiency audit shows higher-hop questions are not differentially disadvantaged by EHR truncation (answerability 93-95% at hops 2-4 vs. 79% at hop=1), so the decline reflects compositional reasoning difficulty. Extended thinking did not significantly flatten the accuracy-depth curve across three reasoning conditions, and thinking-token usage scaled with hop count (r=0.31, p<0.0001), consistent with the predicted O(k) computational requirement. Hop count is thus a theory-motivated, cross-architecture predictor of large-language-model error on EHR question answering, with direct implications for deployment risk stratification of clinical AI.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于推理步数（hop count）的临床问题分类方法，发现大语言模型在电子健康记录问答中，随着推理步骤增加，准确率系统性下降，且该现象跨模型架构一致；这一规律源于Transformer的组合性限制，而非数据截断问题，为临床AI部署风险分层提供了理论依据。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在电子健康记录（EHR）问答任务中表现的聚合准确率掩盖了其失败模式的系统性结构——多步推理问题错误率更高；受Transformer组合性理论限制启发，作者试图建立一种原理驱动的失败预测指标。
AI.method: 提出预定义的‘hop-count’分类法（即回答临床问题所需独立推理步骤数），人工标注313个医生生成的MedAlign EHR问答对（覆盖4个hop层级），并在Claude Sonnet、GPT-4o和GPT-5.4三个模型上开展零样本评测及消融实验（扩展思考 vs. 标准推理），辅以上下文充分性审计和思考token使用分析。
AI.result: 所有三模型均呈现随hop数增加而单调下降的准确率趋势（p<0.03），且高hop问题并非因EHR截断导致不可答（answerability 93–95% vs. 79% at hop=1）；扩展思考未缓解该下降趋势，思考token消耗与hop数正相关（r=0.31, p<0.0001）。
AI.conclusion: Hop count是一个理论驱动、跨架构稳健的LLM在EHR问答中失败的预测因子，反映了模型固有的组合推理瓶颈，可直接用于临床AI部署的风险分层与可信评估。

title: LiFT: Local Search via Linear Programming for Overfitting-Controlled Transformers
comment: 22 pages, 6 figures, published in The 20th Learning and Intelligent Optimization Conference (LION 2026)
summary: This paper proposes a Linear Programming (LP)-based local search framework for fine-tuning pretrained transformer models with explicit control against overfitting. The approach formulates transformer fine-tuning as a bilevel optimization-based regularization problem, in which model parameters and regularization hyperparameters are jointly updated. Information collected during initial warm-up iterations, including validation gradients and training Hessian information, is used to construct a local descent direction by solving an LP that minimizes a scaled directional derivative while preserving training optimality. This validation-aware descent direction enables focused local updates of both parameters and regularization hyperparameters, reducing overfitting without requiring repeated full retraining cycles. The resulting method, termed Linear Programming-based Fine-Tuning (LiFT) for transformers, differs from conventional fine-tuning by systematically identifying task-specific updates rather than relying on heuristic or grid-based hyperparameter selection. Experiments on GPT-2 Small fine-tuned on WikiText-2 demonstrate that LiFT enables effective adaptation through selective tuning of transformer blocks and regularization parameters, yielding consistent improvements in test perplexity across multiple layer configurations and regularization settings, with particularly pronounced gains in overfitting-prone scenarios. Beyond empirical performance, LiFT establishes a principled connection between transformer fine-tuning, bilevel optimization, local search, and regularization theory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于线性规划（LP）的局部搜索框架LiFT，用于预训练Transformer模型的微调，通过双层优化显式控制过拟合，利用验证梯度和Hessian信息构造验证感知的下降方向，避免重复全量重训练，提升泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 解决Transformer微调中过拟合问题，避免依赖启发式或网格搜索的超参数选择，建立微调与正则化、双层优化及局部搜索之间的理论联系。
AI.method: 将微调建模为双层优化正则化问题，联合更新模型参数和正则化超参数；利用warm-up阶段获取的验证梯度与训练Hessian信息，构建线性规划问题求解验证感知的局部下降方向。
AI.result: 在GPT-2 Small + WikiText-2任务上，LiFT在多种层配置和正则设置下均显著降低测试困惑度，尤其在易过拟合场景中增益更明显。
AI.conclusion: LiFT提供了一种原理清晰、可解释性强的微调范式，兼顾有效性与理论严谨性，为Transformer微调提供了新思路。

title: Ellipse Meets Bit-Planes: A Novel Approach to RNFL based Glaucoma Detection Using Advanced Image Processing and Deep Learning
summary: This work proposes an integrated pipeline for automatic glaucoma detection method from easily available colour fundas images based on an adaptive algorithm for ellipse-based polar transformation, to enhance the analysis of the Retinal Nerve Fiber Layer (RNFL) as the primary biomarker for observing glaucomatous changes, regardless of optic disc and macula position. Utilizing this transformation, we introduce two distinct frameworks tailored to different operational needs. The first framework, a deep learning-inspired feature fusion approach, achieves a 99.3% detection rate, ideal for settings where high precision is essential, despite higher computational demands. The second framework employs a novel image-processing algorithm based on bit-plane slicing, offering 92.31% accuracy and optimized for environments requiring rapid inference with minimal resource consumption. Both frameworks provide scalable and cost-effective solutions for early glaucoma detection. This study highlights the potential of RNFL-based diagnostic tools in addressing the global challenge of glaucoma, particularly in underserved regions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自适应椭圆极坐标变换的全自动青光眼检测方法，利用彩色眼底图像增强视网膜神经纤维层（RNFL）分析，并构建了两种框架：高精度深度学习融合模型（99.3%准确率）与轻量级位平面切片图像处理模型（92.31%准确率），适用于不同资源条件下的早期青光眼筛查。
AI.motivation: 针对青光眼早期诊断需求，尤其是资源匮乏地区，亟需一种基于易获取彩色眼底图像、不依赖视盘和黄斑精确定位的低成本、可扩展自动检测方法。
AI.method: 提出自适应椭圆极坐标变换以增强RNFL区域分析；构建两个框架：1）深度学习启发的特征融合模型；2）基于位平面切片的新型图像处理算法。
AI.result: 第一框架达99.3%检测率，第二框架达92.31%准确率且计算开销低，二者均验证了RNFL作为生物标志物的有效性及临床适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该集成管线为青光眼大规模早期筛查提供了高精度与高效率兼顾的可行方案，尤其有利于提升基层和欠发达地区的诊疗能力。

title: Contrastive-Difference CKA Reveals Concept-Specific Structural Alignment Across Language Model Architectures
summary: Do different LLM architectures encode high-level concepts in structurally compatible ways? We systematically characterize a geometric-functional universality dissociation: across multiple concept domains and architectural families, moderate geometric convergence coexists with near-perfect functional transfer. Using contrastive-difference CKA (CKA_Delta), a training-free diagnostic that computes kernel alignment on per-sample contrastive differences, we isolate concept-specific convergence from generic similarity -- achieving significant discrimination where standard CKA cannot. The dissociation replicates across all six concept domains we test (five with p <= 0.017 geometric discrimination and safety as a converging-functional trend, p = 0.08), including two non-instruction concepts (code-vs-NL, reasoning-vs-recall) validated without system prompts; a single 70B--70B pair provides an observational note that universality may strengthen with scale, requiring replication with additional >=70B models. We position CKA_Delta as a practical regime classifier and architectural outlier detector (Gemma: d = 1.08, AUC = 0.79) rather than an absolute transfer-accuracy predictor, providing a training-free diagnostic for cross-architecture concept monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出contrastive-difference CKA（CKA_Delta）方法，用于无训练地评估不同大语言模型架构在高维表征空间中对高层概念的几何收敛性与功能可迁移性；发现二者存在'几何-功能分离'现象：几何相似性中等，但功能迁移近乎完美；该方法能有效区分概念特异性收敛，在多个概念域（含非指令类任务）上验证稳健，并可用于架构异常检测。
AI.motivation: 探究不同LLM架构是否以结构兼容的方式编码高层概念，即是否存在跨架构的概念表征普遍性。
AI.method: 提出contrastive-difference CKA（CKA_Delta），一种无需训练的诊断工具，通过计算样本级对比差异上的核对齐度，分离概念特异性收敛与通用相似性；在六类概念域上系统评估几何收敛性（CKA）与功能迁移性（zero-shot transfer）。
AI.result: 观察到显著的几何-功能分离：所有六类概念域中几何收敛性仅中等（五类p≤0.017），但功能迁移近乎完美；CKA_Delta在区分能力上显著优于标准CKA；Gemma被识别为架构异常（d=1.08, AUC=0.79）；初步证据表明模型规模增大可能增强普遍性。
AI.conclusion: LLM架构间存在概念表征的‘功能普遍性’强于‘几何普遍性’的现象；CKA_Delta是一种实用、免训练的跨架构概念监控工具，适用于概念一致性评估与架构异常检测，而非绝对迁移精度预测。

title: Data Augmentations for Data-Constrained Language Model Pretraining
summary: As AI labs approach a data ceiling where compute capacity outpaces the rate of new high-quality text generation, language model pretraining is shifting toward a data-constrained, compute-abundant regime that demands productive multi-epoch training on fixed corpora. Standard autoregressive (AR) pretraining overfits severely in this setting, reaching its optimum early and then continuously deteriorating. We investigate data augmentation as a regularizer to mitigate this overfitting and enable productive training for hundreds of epochs on the same data. We introduce three orthogonal categories of augmentation for AR pretraining: token-level noise (masking, random replacement), sequence permutations (right-to-left prediction, Fill-in-the-Middle), and target offset prediction ($x_{t+i}$ for $i > 1$). Through systematic ablations, we find that individual augmentations delay overfitting and lower validation loss relative to the baseline, with random token replacement achieving the best minimum loss among individual methods. Combining augmentation categories further lowers the minimum validation loss. Our experiments demonstrate that data augmentations mitigate AR pretraining's data inefficiency and offer a promising solution to the data-constrained regime. All code and data are available at https://github.com/michaelchen-lab/data-augmentations-for-pretraining

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在数据受限、计算资源丰富的背景下，如何通过数据增强技术缓解自回归语言模型预训练中的过拟合问题，提升多轮训练效率。
AI.motivation: 随着AI实验室面临高质量文本数据增长放缓而算力持续提升的矛盾，预训练正进入数据受限、算力充裕的新范式，但标准自回归预训练在此场景下严重过拟合，难以有效进行多轮训练。
AI.method: 提出三类正交的数据增强策略：词元级噪声（掩码、随机替换）、序列重排（逆序预测、填空中间）和目标偏移预测（预测未来位置token），并通过系统消融实验评估其效果。
AI.result: 单个增强方法均能延缓过拟合并降低验证损失，其中随机词元替换效果最佳；组合多种增强类别可进一步降低最小验证损失。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强显著缓解了自回归预训练的数据低效性，为数据受限下的高效预训练提供了可行路径。

title: Faithful Action-unit Causal Reasoning for Counterfactually Faithful Emotion Explanations
summary: Multimodal models can name the action units (AUs) behind a facial emotion, but their AU->emotion rationales are typically plausible rather than faithful: nothing forces the AUs a model invokes to be the AUs that actually drive its prediction. We cast AU->emotion reasoning as a counterfactual-consistency problem between the rationale, the label, and a structural AU->emotion causal graph G, and propose FACR, which grounds the reasoner in an independently induced, polarity-aware G and trains a counterfactual-faithfulness objective: a do-intervention on an AU that G marks causal for a class must move the prediction, while one it marks irrelevant must leave it unchanged. Faithfulness is thereby both trainable and measurable through a matching interventional metric, which we evaluate against a known causal structure, the PSPI pain-AU composition, as no existing affective-reasoning benchmark allows. We are explicit that this metric tests fidelity to the supplied structure rather than its rediscovery: it asks whether the trained reasoner invokes the AUs the structure marks causal, on held-out subjects and a second dataset. Under subject-independent evaluation on UNBC-PAIN, the objective raises the agreement between the invoked AUs and the PSPI composition from a no-objective baseline of 0.08 to 0.57, at a small detection cost; an unfaithfulness control attributes the gain to the objective. On a cross-dataset emotion transfer, the objective likewise raises fidelity to G on a seven-class task (0.50 to 0.84). Finally, we attach a language verbalizer and extend the audit to the generated text: biasing each action unit's emission by its latent activation makes the rationale faithful by construction, so that ablating an AU removes it from the explanation, a property that transfers to a second language-model backbone, whereas a freely generated rationale is unfaithful.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FACR方法，通过引入因果图G和反事实一致性目标，提升多模态模型在面部情绪识别中动作单元（AU）到情绪推理的忠实性，并在疼痛与情绪数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态模型虽能识别面部动作单元（AU）并推断情绪，但其AU→情绪推理常仅具合理性而非忠实性——即模型所调用的AU未必真正驱动其预测结果。
AI.method: 将AU→情绪推理建模为反事实一致性问题，构建一个独立学习、极性感知的动作单元到情绪因果图G，并设计反事实忠实性训练目标：对G中标记为某情绪类别因果的AU进行do干预应改变预测；对标记为无关的AU干预则不应改变预测。同时定义可测量的干预匹配度指标评估忠实性。
AI.result: 在UNBC-PAIN数据集上，FACR使模型 invoked AU 与PSPI疼痛-AU结构的一致性从基线0.08显著提升至0.57；跨数据集七类情绪迁移任务中，忠实性从0.50提升至0.84；语言解释模块经潜变量调控后亦实现构造性忠实，且该性质可迁移到不同语言模型主干。
AI.conclusion: FACR首次将反事实干预明确引入AU→情绪推理，使忠实性可训练、可度量，并在多个基准上验证了其有效性与泛化能力，为可解释情感计算提供了新范式。

title: Speaking the Language of Science: Toward a General-Purpose Generative Foundation Model for the Natural Sciences
summary: In this report, we present LOGOS (Language Of Generative Objects in Science), a scientific generative language model that unifies heterogeneous tasks across the natural sciences within a single autoregressive framework based on a shared scientific grammar. It encodes diverse scientific objects and their spatial interactions as token sequences over a common vocabulary. By representing spatial contact and constraint patterns as discrete tokens, the model captures complex structural interactions in a purely sequential manner, without relying on explicit coordinates or geometric neural networks. This unified representation enables a wide range of downstream tasks to be formulated consistently as next-token prediction in the same grammar space, creating strong alignment between continued multi-domain pre-training and downstream objectives. Across diverse tasks, LOGOS consistently matches or outperforms domain-specific baselines, providing preliminary evidence for the feasibility of "one model fits all" in the natural sciences. We train LOGOS models at different scales (1B, 3B, and 8B parameters) and find a consistent positive correlation between model size and performance. This suggests that the future of AI for Science (AI4S) may not lie in building an independent technical stack that is separated from large language models (LLMs). Instead, it may depend on deeply aligning scientific foundation models with LLMs through shared architectures, shared training paradigms, and shared inference infrastructure, so that LLMs can truly become a new entry point for AI4S. We release the model weights and associated resources to facilitate further research.

AI.tldr: LOGOS是一种统一自然科学研究中异构任务的科学生成语言模型，通过共享的科学语法将多种科学对象及其空间相互作用编码为离散token序列，无需显式坐标或几何神经网络，实现了‘一个模型适配所有任务’的初步验证，并表明AI for Science的未来在于与大语言模型深度对齐。
AI.motivation: 解决自然科学研究中任务异构性问题，避免为每个领域单独构建技术栈，探索‘一个模型适配所有科学任务’的可行性，并推动AI for Science与大语言模型生态深度融合。
AI.method: 提出LOGOS模型，基于自回归框架和共享科学语法，将科学对象及空间相互作用（如接触、约束）编码为离散token序列；采用纯序列建模方式，不依赖坐标或几何网络；在多领域数据上进行持续预训练，并在不同参数规模（1B/3B/8B）下评估性能。
AI.result: LOGOS在多个科学下游任务上持续持平或超越领域专用基线模型；模型性能随参数量增加而稳定提升；验证了统一语法框架下多任务一致建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LOGOS初步证明了‘一个模型适配所有自然科学研究任务’的可行性；AI for Science的发展路径应是与大语言模型在架构、训练范式和推理基础设施上深度对齐，而非另起炉灶构建独立技术栈。

title: Variance Reduction for Non-Log-Concave Sampling with Applications to Inverse Problems
comment: Accepted to Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI) 2026
summary: Sampling from high-dimensional, non-log-concave distributions with unnormalized densities is a fundamental challenge in machine learning, particularly when the exact gradient of the potential is unavailable and must be approximated via stochastic gradients that exhibit high variance under a fixed budget of gradient computations per iteration. Although variance reduction techniques such as SGD with momentum, STORM, and PAGE have demonstrated improved convergence properties in non-convex optimization, their implications for sampling from non-log-concave distributions remain largely unexplored. In this work, we develop the first unified analysis of these estimators for sampling from non-log-concave distributions. We establish improved non-asymptotic convergence rates in $\varepsilon$-relative Fisher information and, under a Poincaré inequality assumption, in squared total variation distance, and further prove weak convergence to the target distribution. We extend our analysis to solving inverse problems with score-based generative priors. We empirically validate our theory and demonstrate that, under a fixed gradient computations per iteration, variance-reduction techniques consistently improve sample quality in two standard imaging applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对高维、非对数凹分布采样的统一分析框架，利用方差缩减的随机梯度估计器（如SGD with momentum、STORM、PAGE），在无精确梯度信息下实现了更优的非渐近收敛率，并在成像任务中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 高维非对数凹分布采样面临梯度不可得且随机梯度方差高的挑战，现有方差缩减技术在优化中有效，但在采样中的理论分析尚属空白。
AI.method: 构建基于方差缩减随机梯度估计器（如STORM、PAGE）的采样算法，进行统一非渐近分析，结合ε-相对Fisher信息、Poincaré不等式和弱收敛理论。
AI.result: 获得了改进的非渐近收敛率（在ε-相对Fisher信息及平方全变分距离下），证明了弱收敛性，并成功拓展至带score-based先验的反问题求解。
AI.conclusion: 方差缩减技术不仅适用于优化，也可系统性提升非对数凹分布采样性能，为实际应用（如成像）提供了理论支撑与实用算法。

title: Domain-Guided Prompting of the Segment Anything Model for Seismic Interpretation: The Role of Attributes, Visualization, and Hybrid Prompts
summary: The advent of large pretrained foundation models for computer vision has significantly improved the efficiency of visual data interpretation. The Segment Anything Model (SAM), in particular, offers powerful zero shot segmentation capabilities through prompt based interaction, thus making it a promising tool for seismic interpretation. However, most existing applications of SAM rely on fine tuning for specific geological targets, which requires extensive labeled data, incurs high computational cost, and often compromises the model's generalization capability. In this study, we introduce a principled framework for zero shot adaptation of foundation models to seismic data. The framework is built on two key components: (1) aligning seismic attributes and visualization choices (e.g., colormaps) with the geological target of interest, and (2) employing a hybrid prompting strategy that combines sparse user defined point prompts with dense mask prompts derived from SAM's internal feature activations. We systematically evaluate this framework across multiple geological targets, datasets, prompt configurations, and seismic attribute representations. Our results demonstrate that geologic target aware selection of seismic attributes and colormaps, combined with hybrid prompting, enhances the separability of geological features and improves boundary delineation and segmentation accuracy relative to point based prompting alone. Our findings show that, when these components are jointly applied, SAM can achieve competitive segmentation performance in a fully zero shot setting, thereby eliminating the need to retrain SAM for each geologic feature. This work establishes a practical and scalable pathway to leverage foundation models in seismic interpretation, reducing reliance on labeled data while preserving model generality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需微调的零样本适配框架，使Segment Anything Model（SAM）能直接用于地震数据解释，通过地质目标感知的属性/ colormap 选择与混合提示策略提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SAM在地震解释中的应用多依赖于针对特定地质目标的微调，需大量标注数据、计算成本高且损害泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出零样本适配框架，包含两部分：(1) 根据地质目标对齐地震属性与可视化方式（如colormap）；(2) 结合稀疏人工点提示与SAM内部特征激活生成的稠密掩码提示的混合提示策略。
AI.result: 在多个地质目标、数据集、提示配置和地震属性表示上的系统评估表明，该方法显著提升地质特征可分性、边界划分精度和分割准确率，优于仅用点提示的方法；SAM可在完全零样本设置下达到有竞争力的分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为利用基础模型进行地震解释提供了实用、可扩展的路径，降低了对标注数据的依赖，同时保持模型通用性。

title: LESS Is More: Mutual-Stability Sampling for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer a promising alternative to autoregressive decoding by iteratively refining masked sequences, enabling parallel token updates and bidirectional conditioning. Their practical efficiency, however, is limited by sampling procedures that execute a fixed number of reverse denoising steps selected before decoding, spending computation on already-stable positions and sometimes committing unstable ones too early. We present \textsc{LESS}, a training-free, model-agnostic adaptive sampler that treats token commitment as an online stopping problem. \textsc{LESS} implements mutual-stability sampling through a joint stability rule that makes a masked position eligible for unmasking only when its top-1 prediction has high confidence, its top-1 token persists across recent reverse steps, and its predictive distribution is stable under top-$K$ inter-step Jensen--Shannon divergence. We evaluate \textsc{LESS} on Dream-7B, LLaDA-8B, and LLaDA-1.5-8B, covering full-sequence diffusion and semi-autoregressive blockwise sampling regimes, across seven benchmarks spanning general knowledge, math, and code. \textsc{LESS} improves average accuracy over strong training-free adaptive samplers while using $72.1\%$ fewer reverse steps than fixed-budget decoding. Since each reverse step requires a Transformer forward pass, these step-count reductions translate into fewer forward evaluations, lower measured wall-clock latency, and lower estimated inference compute.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练、模型无关的自适应采样器LESS，通过联合稳定性规则动态决定token解码时机，显著减少反向去噪步数并提升准确性。
AI.motivation: 扩散大语言模型（dLLMs）受限于固定步数的采样策略，导致计算浪费和不稳定token过早提交。
AI.method: LESS将token提交建模为在线停止问题，采用互稳定性采样：仅当某位置top-1预测高置信、top-1 token在近期反向步中持续一致、且预测分布在top-K层面JS散度稳定时，才允许解码该位置。
AI.result: 在多个模型（Dream-7B、LLaDA-8B等）和七项基准测试上，LESS在提升平均准确率的同时，比固定步数解码减少72.1%的反向步数，降低延迟与推理计算开销。
AI.conclusion: LESS是一种高效、通用的训练-free自适应采样方法，可显著提升dLLMs的实际推理效率与性能。

title: DifFRACT: Diffusion Feature Reconstruction and Attribution for Circuit Tracing
summary: Mechanistic interpretability seeks to explain neural network behavior by decomposing model computations into interpretable features and circuits. While transcoder-based circuit tracing has recently enabled detailed causal analyses of large language models, multimodal diffusion transformers for image generation remain comparatively opaque. We still lack tools for understanding how semantic information propagates across denoising steps and how text and image representations interact within double-stream MM-DiT architectures. Existing methods provide only partial insight: attention maps expose a limited view of token interactions, while sparse autoencoders can discover interpretable features but do not directly reveal how these features are transformed and composed through nonlinear MLP layers. In this work, we extend transcoder-based circuit tracing to multimodal diffusion transformers. We train timestep-conditioned transcoders that faithfully approximate the input-output behavior of MLP sublayers in FLUX.1[schnell]. By replacing MLPs with transcoders and linearizing the remaining computation, we obtain exact feature-to-feature attribution and recover compact, interpretable circuits. Empirically, our transcoders match or slightly outperform sparse autoencoders on the sparsity-faithfulness tradeoff. The resulting circuits reveal mechanisms underlying attribute binding and cross-stream semantic propagation, and provide causal explanations for systematic generation errors. Moreover, circuit-guided interventions are substantially more precise and effective than standard SAE-based steering. Our results demonstrate that transcoder-based circuit analysis is feasible for state-of-the-art diffusion transformers and provides a powerful framework for understanding and controlling multimodal generative models. The code is available at https://github.com/Artalmaz31/DifFRACT

AI.tldr: 本文将基于转码器的电路追踪方法扩展到多模态扩散Transformer（MM-DiT），通过训练时间步条件转码器精确近似FLUX.1[schnell]中MLP子层的输入输出行为，实现特征到特征的精确归因，揭示属性绑定与跨流语义传播机制，并支持比稀疏自编码器更精准的干预。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如注意力图、稀疏自编码器）难以全面揭示多模态扩散Transformer中语义信息在去噪步间传播及图文表征交互的机制，缺乏对非线性MLP层中特征变换与组合的直接解释。
AI.method: 训练时间步条件转码器以忠实逼近FLUX.1[schnell]中MLP子层行为；用转码器替换MLP并线性化其余计算，从而实现精确的特征到特征归因与紧凑可解释电路提取。
AI.result: 转码器在稀疏性-保真度权衡上匹配或略优于稀疏自编码器；所提取电路揭示了属性绑定与跨流语义传播机制，并为系统性生成错误提供因果解释；电路引导干预比SAE引导干预更精确有效。
AI.conclusion: 基于转码器的电路分析在先进多模态扩散Transformer上可行且有效，为理解与控制多模态生成模型提供了强大新框架。

title: IMPACTeen: Intentions, Manipulation, Persuasion, Annotations, and Consequences in Teen Communication Dataset
summary: IMPACTeen is a dataset of textual social influence scenarios spanning interpersonal, media-based, and digital settings in an adolescent context. It contains 1,021 texts, 5,100 individual annotation records, and gold labels for social influence techniques, with each text annotated from five distinct perspectives: teenagers, parents, psychologists, communication experts, and teachers. The resource was constructed through constrained LLM generation, followed by a two-step human editing and validation phase aimed at ensuring youth-context realism. A multi-dimensional annotation covered influence presence, techniques, intentions, consequences, resistance, reactions, and annotation confidence. The dataset supports research on social influence detection, annotator disagreement, cross-lingual modeling, and the training and evaluation of language models. The dataset was created in Polish and is accompanied by a corresponding English version.

AI.tldr: IMPACTeen is a Polish-English bilingual dataset of 1,021 adolescent-focused social influence scenarios, annotated from five expert and stakeholder perspectives, designed for studying influence detection, annotator disagreement, and cross-lingual modeling.
AI.motivation: To provide a realistic, multi-perspective, youth-contextualized resource for studying social influence—especially in interpersonal, media, and digital settings relevant to adolescents—addressing the lack of such datasets in computational social science and NLP.
AI.method: Constrained LLM generation followed by two-step human editing and validation to ensure youth-context realism; multi-dimensional annotation (influence presence, techniques, intentions, consequences, resistance, reactions, confidence) by five distinct annotator groups.
AI.result: A publicly available bilingual (Polish/English) dataset containing 1,021 texts and 5,100 annotation records with gold-standard labels for social influence techniques and related dimensions.
AI.conclusion: IMPACTeen enables robust research on social influence detection, annotator perspective analysis, cross-lingual modeling, and responsible development of language models for adolescent well-being.

title: An affordable hardware-aware neural architecture search for deploying convolutional neural networks on ultra-low-power computing platforms
summary: Hardware-aware neural architecture search (HW-NAS) allows the integration of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in microcontrollers devices by automatically designing neural architectures that can fit prearranged hardware constraints. However, state-of-the-art HW-NAS target high-performance microcontrollers, whose power consumption does not meet sensing nodes requirements. This work presents a HW-NAS generating tiny CNNs that can run on ultra-low-power microcontrollers, featuring a lightweight search procedure enabling its execution even on embedded devices. Empirical results on three well-known benchmarks for tiny computer vision proved that the proposed HW-NAS was able to generate tiny CNNs while preserving state-of-the-art classification accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向超低功耗微控制器的硬件感知神经架构搜索（HW-NAS）方法，可自动生成轻量级CNN，并在嵌入式设备上完成搜索过程，同时保持SOTA分类精度。
AI.motivation: 现有HW-NAS方法主要面向高性能微控制器，功耗过高，不适用于对功耗极为敏感的传感节点。
AI.method: 设计了一种轻量级HW-NAS搜索流程，支持在超低功耗微控制器上直接执行，生成满足严格硬件约束的极小CNN模型。
AI.result: 在三个经典微型计算机视觉基准上验证，所生成的Tiny CNN在保持SOTA分类精度的同时显著降低资源与功耗需求。
AI.conclusion: 该HW-NAS方法成功 bridged the gap between NAS和超低功耗边缘设备部署，为传感节点等资源极度受限场景提供了可行的自动化模型设计方案。

title: CPS4: Class Prompt driven Semi-Supervised Spine Segmentation with Class-specific Consistency Constraint
summary: Vision Language Model (VLM) has great potential to enhance the quality of pseudo labels in semi-supervised spine segmentation by leveraging textual class prompts to generate segmentation map, but no one has studied it yet. Although promising, it lacks explicit constraints to ensure consistency between spine class prompts and spine unit region, resulting in unsatisfactory performance in multi-class segmentation map generation. In this paper, we propose CPS4, the first text-guided semi-supervised spine segmentation network using class prompts to enhance the quality of spine pseudo labels. Specifically, CPS4 is implemented through two training stages. (i) Class-specific consistency constrained VLM pretraining stage: we propose token- and pixel-level attention loss to optimize the consistency between class prompts and spine units, forcing the textual class prompt to be closely coupled with the target spine unit in the semantic space. (ii) Class Prompt driven semi-supervised spine segmentation stage: using the pretrained vision-text encoder, we derive each class-specific binary segmentation map for the unlabeled spine image and integrate them into an unified multi-class segmentation map, improving the quality of the spine pseudo label generated by the semi-supervised spine segmentation network. Experimental results show that our CPS4 achieves superior spine segmentation performance with Dice of 80.44%, only using 5% labeled data on the public spine segmentation dataset, surpassing popular semi-supervised learning and VLM methods. Our code will be available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CPS4，首个利用文本引导的半监督脊柱分割网络，通过两阶段训练提升伪标签质量：第一阶段在VLM预训练中引入词元级和像素级注意力损失以增强类别提示与脊柱单元的一致性；第二阶段利用预训练的视觉-文本编码器生成各类别二值分割图并融合为多类分割图。实验表明，仅用5%标注数据即达80.44% Dice分数，性能优于主流半监督与VLM方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型（VLM）虽有潜力提升半监督脊柱分割中的伪标签质量，但缺乏显式约束确保脊柱类别文本提示与脊柱解剖单元区域的一致性，导致多类别分割效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架CPS4：（i）类别特异性一致性约束的VLM预训练阶段，设计词元级和像素级注意力损失以对齐文本提示与脊柱单元语义；（ii）类别提示驱动的半监督脊柱分割阶段，利用预训练视觉-文本编码器生成各脊柱类别二值分割图，并融合为统一多类分割图以优化伪标签。
AI.result: 在公开脊柱分割数据集上，仅使用5%标注数据即取得80.44%的Dice分数，显著优于当前主流半监督学习与VLM方法。
AI.conclusion: CPS4首次将文本引导机制有效融入半监督脊柱分割，通过显式一致性约束提升了伪标签质量，验证了VLM在医学图像细粒度解剖结构分割中的潜力。

title: Exploring Extrinsic and Intrinsic Properties for Effective Reasoning with Code Interpreter
summary: Reasoning with a Code Interpreter (CI) has emerged as an effective paradigm for enhancing the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) through executable computation and iterative verification. Despite its growing adoption, the behavioral properties underlying effective code reasoning remain largely underexplored. In this work, we investigate code reasoning from two distinct perspectives inspired by prior studies of natural language reasoning: extrinsic properties, represented by crucial tokens, and intrinsic properties, represented by code-specific cognitive behaviors. Across multiple LLMs, we find that stronger CI reasoning models consistently exhibit a higher prevalence of crucial tokens and cognitive behaviors, particularly verification, backtracking, and backward chaining. Building on these observations, we examine how these properties can be leveraged during both inference and training. At inference time, appending code-specific crucial tokens improves performance on several reasoning capabilities, including mathematical, ordering, and optimization, while yielding limited benefits elsewhere. At training time, augmenting a state-of-the-art framework with code-specific cognitive behaviors improves supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning performance in two of three evaluated models. Further analysis shows that these behaviors reduce overthinking in incorrect responses and improve token efficiency, while also revealing factors that limit gains in a certain model. Our findings provide the first systematic characterization of effective reasoning with CI and demonstrate both the potential and limitations of leveraging key properties to improve CI-based reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了代码解释器（CI）增强大语言模型（LLM）推理能力的行为特性，发现强CI推理模型普遍表现出更多关键token及验证、回溯、逆向链式等认知行为；基于此，在推理时添加关键token、训练时注入认知行为均能提升部分模型性能，并揭示其减少过度思考、提高token效率的机制与适用边界。
AI.motivation: 尽管代码解释器（CI）已被广泛用于增强大语言模型的推理能力，但支撑其有效推理的行为特性（如关键token分布和代码特有认知行为）尚未被系统探究。
AI.method: 从外在（关键token）和内在（代码特有认知行为，如验证、回溯、逆向链式）两个维度分析多款LLM在CI推理中的行为模式；并在推理阶段注入关键token、训练阶段引入认知行为进行干预实验，结合性能与token效率等指标评估效果。
AI.result: 强CI模型更频繁使用关键token与验证/回溯/逆向链式等认知行为；推理时添加关键token可提升数学、排序、优化类任务性能；训练中融入认知行为在2/3模型上提升了SFT和RL效果，并降低错误响应中的“过度思考”，提高token效率；但某模型因固有局限未获显著增益。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次系统刻画了CI有效推理的行为特征，证实利用关键token与认知行为可改进CI推理，但也存在模型依赖性等实际限制，为未来CI推理优化提供了实证基础与方向指引。

title: One-Step Generalization Ratio Guided Optimization for Domain Generalization
comment: 29 pages, accepted at the 42nd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2025)
