summary: Domain Generalization (DG) aims to train models that generalize to unseen target domains but often overfit to domain-specific features, known as undesired correlations. Gradient-based DG methods typically guide gradients in a dominant direction but often inadvertently reinforce spurious correlations. Recent work has employed dropout to regularize overconfident parameters, but has not explicitly adjusted gradient alignment or ensured balanced parameter updates. We propose GENIE (Generalization-ENhancing Iterative Equalizer), a novel optimizer that leverages the One-Step Generalization Ratio (OSGR) to quantify each parameter's contribution to loss reduction and assess gradient alignment. By dynamically equalizing OSGR via a preconditioning factor, GENIE prevents a small subset of parameters from dominating optimization, thereby promoting domain-invariant feature learning. Theoretically, GENIE balances convergence contribution and gradient alignment among parameters, achieving higher OSGR while retaining SGD's convergence rate. Empirically, it outperforms existing optimizers and enhances performance when integrated with various DG and single-DG methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GENIE优化器，通过OSGR量化参数对损失减少的贡献并调整梯度对齐，防止部分参数主导优化，从而提升域泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有域泛化方法易过拟合域特异性特征，梯度法常强化虚假相关性，dropout等正则化未显式调控梯度对齐与参数更新平衡。
AI.method: 提出GENIE优化器，引入One-Step Generalization Ratio（OSGR）评估各参数对泛化的贡献，并通过预调节因子动态均衡OSGR，实现梯度对齐与参数更新的平衡。
AI.result: 理论证明GENIE在保持SGD收敛速率的同时提升OSGR；实验表明其优于现有优化器，并能提升多种DG及单DG方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: GENIE通过动态均衡参数泛化贡献，有效促进域不变特征学习，为域泛化提供了一种新型优化视角。

title: SACE: Concept Erasure at the Semantic Singularity in Visual Autoregressive Models
summary: The rapid progress of visual autoregressive (VAR) models has unlocked a transformative frontier for high-fidelity text-to-image synthesis, while heightening concerns over the safety alignment of generated content. Naive application of existing erasure techniques to VAR models causes catastrophic semantic collapse and visual artifacts, since they are predominantly designed for the homogeneous denoising steps of diffusion models. To address this foundational challenge, we first propose the Semantic Singularity Axiom, which posits that any target semantic concept embedded within a prompt is definitively locked at Scale-0. Then rigorously validate this axiom through our proposed Incremental Semantic Saliency Analysis (ISSA),which also enable the community to transparently inspect the coarse-to-fine semantic injection process. Guided by this insight, we introduce the first scale-aware concept erasure framework (SACE) for VAR models. By strictly confining interventions to the first scale, our approach couples an Entropy-Regularized Erasure Objective to prevent high-entropy sampling degeneration, alongside a restorative preservation loss to safely anchor the integrity of entangled benign priors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves surgical concept erasure performance across various domains with minimal training overhead, timely and elegently resolute the critical safety vulnerabilities inherent in emerging VAR architectures. Code is available at: https://github.com/limerenceysy/SACE}{https://github.com/limerenceysy/SACE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个面向视觉自回归（VAR）模型的尺度感知概念擦除框架SACE，通过语义奇点公理和增量语义显著性分析（ISSA），在Scale-0精准定位并擦除目标语义概念，兼顾安全性与生成保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散模型设计的概念擦除方法直接应用于VAR模型会导致语义崩溃和视觉伪影，亟需适配VAR粗到细生成特性的安全对齐方案。
AI.method: 提出语义奇点公理（Scale-0锁定目标概念），构建增量语义显著性分析（ISSA）验证该公理；据此设计尺度感知概念擦除框架（SACE），在第一尺度施加熵正则化擦除目标与恢复性保留损失以保护良性先验。
AI.result: 在多领域实现高精度、低开销的概念擦除，显著缓解VAR模型的安全风险，且无需大量训练。
AI.conclusion: SACE为VAR模型提供了首个原理清晰、可解释、高效安全的概念级内容控制范式，推动生成式AI的安全对齐研究。

title: pFedUL: Layer-Aware Federated Unlearning for Personalized Federated Learning
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in CMC-Computers, Materials & Continua
summary: Federated unlearning (FU) enables the removal of specific data contributions from federated learning (FL) models to comply with regulations such as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). However, most existing FU methods are designed for the FedAvg paradigm, where all clients share a single global model. In practice, personalized federated learning (pFL) methods such as FedPer, FedRep, Ditto, and FedBN have become widely adopted due to their superior handling of non-IID data. These methods decompose the model into shared global layers and client-specific personalized layers, fundamentally altering the semantics of unlearning, yet this setting has received little attention. We formalize FU under the pFL paradigm, identifying a tension between unlearning completeness on shared layers and personalization preservation for remaining clients. We then propose pFedUL, a layer-aware selective unlearning framework comprising three components: (1) gradient-based layer-wise contribution attribution that separately quantifies the target client's influence on shared and personalized parameters, (2) adaptive selective unlearning that applies differentiated forgetting strategies across layer types, and (3) a lightweight recalibration protocol enabling remaining clients to restore personalization with minimal overhead. We further introduce two new metrics, Personalization Preservation Score (PPS) and Cross-client Fairness Index (CFI), to evaluate pFL-specific unlearning quality. Experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and FEMNIST under varying non-IID settings indicate that pFedUL achieves unlearning effectiveness comparable to full retraining while maintaining an average of 97.3\% personalized accuracy for remaining clients. Compared with six state-of-the-art FU methods adapted to the pFL setting, pFedUL consistently achieves superior personalization preservation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出pFedUL框架，解决个性化联邦学习（pFL）中的联邦遗忘问题，在保证遗忘完整性的同时保留剩余客户端的个性化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦遗忘方法主要面向FedAvg范式，而实际中广泛使用的个性化联邦学习（pFL）具有共享层与个性化层分离的结构，导致传统遗忘语义不适用，该方向缺乏研究。
AI.method: 提出pFedUL：（1）基于梯度的分层贡献归因；（2）针对不同层类型自适应选择遗忘策略；（3）轻量级再校准协议以恢复个性化。并引入PPS和CFI两个新评估指标。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100/FEMNIST非IID设置下，遗忘效果媲美全量重训练，剩余客户端平均个性化准确率达97.3%，且在六种SOTA方法对比中始终更优。
AI.conclusion: pFedUL首次系统性地将联邦遗忘扩展至个性化联邦学习范式，兼顾遗忘完整性与个性化保留，为合规性与实用性提供新路径。

title: Learning a Sampling-Free Variational DNN Plugin from Tiny Training Sets to Refine OOD Segmentation With Uncertainty Estimation
comment: Accepted at the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) frequently fail to generalize to out-of-distribution (OOD) medical images because of variations in scanners and acquisition protocols. Retraining DNN models to address these distribution shifts is often impractical due to the high cost of acquiring and annotating new medical datasets. To address this, we introduce VarDeepPCA, a novel lightweight variational DNN framework designed to restore/refine degraded segmentation maps by leveraging intrinsic geometric priors. Unlike existing approaches that require target-domain data or extensive pre-training, our VarDeepPCA explicitly learns a distribution of valid anatomical geometries using only small in-distribution (ID) datasets. Theoretically, our novel variational learning framework leverages a reinterpretation of the softmax mapping to implicitly perform exact distribution modeling, thereby enabling computationally efficient, sampling-free learning and inference. This also enables VarDeepPCA to provide uncertainty estimates associated with its restored segmentation maps. We empirically validate our framework across 4 distinct clinical applications, using 14 publicly available datasets, involving segmentation of the myocardium, neuroretinal rim, prostate, and fetal head. Comparisons against 15 existing methods demonstrate that VarDeepPCA consistently restores segmentation maps produced by the existing methods on OOD data to (i) significantly improve anatomical plausibility of geometries and clinical utility of the segmentations, and (ii) significantly reduce errors, without needing any more training data than that used by existing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VarDeepPCA，一种轻量级变分深度神经网络框架，仅用小规模同分布数据学习解剖几何先验，无需目标域数据或大量预训练，即可修复OOD医学图像的分割图，并提供不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在医学图像上常因扫描设备和采集协议差异导致分布外（OOD）泛化失败，而重新训练模型因标注成本高而不现实。
AI.method: 提出VarDeepPCA框架，通过变分学习重新解释softmax映射，隐式实现精确分布建模，仅依赖小规模同分布数据学习有效解剖几何分布，支持采样-free学习与推理，并输出不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在4个临床任务、14个公开数据集上验证，相比15种现有方法，VarDeepPCA显著提升OOD分割图的解剖合理性与临床实用性，并显著降低误差，且不增加训练数据需求。
AI.conclusion: VarDeepPCA是一种高效、轻量、无需额外标注数据的OOD医学图像分割修复方法，兼具几何先验建模与不确定性量化能力。

title: DEEPRUBRIC: Evidence-Tree Rubric Supervision for Efficient Reinforcement Learning of Deep Research Agents
summary: Deep research agents synthesize long-form reports by searching and reasoning over retrieved evidence. Reinforcement learning with rubric-based rewards improves these agents by optimizing them against checkable criteria that translate report quality into reward signals, but its efficiency depends on whether those criteria reliably capture the task scope and evidence needs. Most existing studies ask an LLM to generate rubrics for a given query, but when the model fails to infer the underlying information needs, the generated rubrics may be incomplete and reduce RL efficiency. To obtain more reliable query--rubric supervision, we introduce DeepRubric, a data construction framework that reverses this process: instead of inferring evaluation criteria for a given query, it first determines what an evidence-backed report should be evaluated on and then synthesizes aligned query--rubric pairs from those evaluation targets. Starting from a sampled seed topic, DeepRubric builds an evidence tree by recursively expanding evidence-backed sub-questions, whose leaves serve as atomic and verifiable evaluation targets. It then uses the evidence tree to synthesize the training query and rubrics, ensuring that the reward evaluates exactly the information requested by the query. Using DeepRubric, we construct 9K query--rubric supervision examples and train DeepRubric-8B with rubric-based GRPO, achieving comparable performance to prior open state-of-the-art deep research models across three benchmarks with roughly 13x fewer RL GPU-hours.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepRubric框架，通过构建证据树生成更可靠的查询-评分标准对，提升基于评分标准的强化学习在深度研究代理训练中的效率与效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM生成评分标准的方法常因无法准确推断信息需求而导致评分标准不完整，降低强化学习效率。
AI.method: DeepRubric框架从种子主题出发构建证据树，递归扩展证据支持的子问题，以叶节点作为原子可验证评估目标，并据此合成对齐的查询-评分标准对；基于该框架构建9K样本，采用rubric-based GRPO训练DeepRubric-8B模型。
AI.result: 在三个基准测试中，DeepRubric-8B达到与先前开源SOTA模型相当的性能，且仅需约13倍更少的RL GPU小时。
AI.conclusion: DeepRubric通过逆向构建查询-评分标准对，显著提升了rubric-based RL在深度研究代理训练中的数据质量和训练效率。

title: QK-Normed MLA: QK normalization without full key caching
summary: Query-key (QK) normalization stabilizes attention by controlling the scale of queries and keys before the dot product, but is not immediately compatible with Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA). MLA achieves efficient decoding by caching low-dimensional latent states instead of full keys, whereas post-projection QK RMSNorm appears to require the fully projected key for every cached token. We show this apparent incompatibility is an implementation artifact, not an architectural constraint. RMSNorm decomposes into a static affine weight and a dynamic scalar RMS statistic. The static key-side weight can be absorbed into the MLA query-side projection; the dynamic key statistic reduces to one inverse-RMS scalar per token and KV group. The resulting formulation is exactly equivalent to explicit post-projection QK RMSNorm in exact arithmetic and preserves MLA's latent decode path. In our 400M runs trained for up to 100B tokens, QK-Normed MLA achieves lower training loss and better downstream accuracy than QK clipping, while H800 decode benchmarks show less than 2% latency overhead up to 256k context. These results make QK normalization a practical stabilization option for MLA models without requiring full-key caching.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将QK归一化（RMSNorm）与多头潜在注意力（MLA）兼容的新方法，通过分解RMSNorm为静态权重和动态标量统计，并将其融入MLA架构中，在不牺牲MLA高效解码优势的前提下，实现了训练稳定性和下游性能的提升。
AI.motivation: QK归一化能稳定注意力机制，但传统实现与MLA不兼容，因MLA依赖缓存低维潜在状态而非全量key；作者旨在消除这一‘伪不兼容’，使QK归一化可实际应用于MLA模型。
AI.method: 将post-projection QK RMSNorm分解为静态仿射权重和动态RMS标量；将静态key侧权重吸收进query侧投影；将动态key统计简化为每token每KV组一个逆RMS标量；从而在保持MLA潜在解码路径的同时实现等价归一化。
AI.result: 在400M参数模型、训练至100B token的实验中，QK-Normed MLA相比QK clipping显著降低训练损失并提升下游准确率；H800上256k上下文解码延迟增加<2%。
AI.conclusion: QK归一化可通过该重构方式无缝集成到MLA中，无需全key缓存，是一种实用、高效且稳定的注意力稳定方案。

title: EmoZone-Talker: Regional Semantic Control of Audio-Driven 3DGS Talking Heads via Facial Action Units
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has shown strong potential for high-fidelity talking head synthesis. However, enabling fine-grained, interpretable, and editable facial expression control remains fundamentally challenging due to intrinsic conflicts between speech-driven facial dynamics and explicit expression signals. Existing methods rely on implicit multimodal fusion, leading to spatial entanglement and temporal instability. We present EmoZone-Talker, a novel framework that reformulates audio-driven facial animation as a structured spatial-temporal coordination problem under cross-modal conflicts. Our approach introduces an explicit spatial disentanglement and temporal dynamics modeling of facial motion. Specifically, we propose Synergy Zones with Prioritized Attention Bias (SZ-PAB) to explicitly decouple modality contributions via region-wise constraints guided by anatomical priors, and a Channel-Independent Temporal AU Encoder (CIT-AE) to model temporally coherent AU dynamics. By integrating these representations into 3D Gaussian deformation, EmoZone-Talker enables precise and interpretable control over facial expressions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method improves expression controllability and realism, with notable gains in upper-face accuracy and temporal coherence, while preserving high rendering quality and accurate lip synchronization. Code will be publicly released to facilitate reproducibility and further research.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EmoZone-Talker框架，通过显式空间解耦与时间动态建模，解决语音驱动面部动画中表情控制的可解释性与精细编辑难题，显著提升上脸准确性与时序一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS方法在语音驱动说话头合成中难以实现细粒度、可解释、可编辑的面部表情控制，主因是语音驱动动态与显式表情信号存在内在冲突，且隐式多模态融合导致空间纠缠与时序不稳定。
AI.method: 提出EmoZone-Talker框架：1）Synergy Zones with Prioritized Attention Bias（SZ-PAB），基于解剖先验进行区域约束，实现模态贡献的显式空间解耦；2）Channel-Independent Temporal AU Encoder（CIT-AE），建模时序一致的动作单元（AU）动态；二者集成至3D高斯变形中。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著提升表情可控性与真实感，尤其在上脸区域准确性和时间连贯性方面表现突出，同时保持高质量渲染与精准唇动同步。
AI.conclusion: EmoZone-Talker为音频驱动面部动画提供了结构化时空协同新范式，实现了高保真、可编辑、可解释的3D talking head生成。

title: KVEraser: Learning to Steer KV Cache for Efficient Localized Context Erasing
comment: Oral at the ICML 2026 Workshop on the Impact of Memorization on Trustworthy Foundation Models
summary: Post-hoc context erasing over the KV cache is challenging because a local edit has a global consequence: once a span has been processed, its influence propagates into the cached states of all subsequent tokens. This issue arises naturally in long-context LLM applications, where stale retrieved facts, incorrect tool observations, retracted user preferences, or harmful prompt injections may be identified only after prefill. Exact erasing must then recompute all tokens after the deleted span, making its computational cost depend on suffix length rather than erased-span length. We introduce KVEraser, a learned KV-cache editing method for efficient localized context erasing. Given a processed context and a span to remove, KVEraser replaces only the KV states of the erased interval with learned steering states while reusing the remaining cache unchanged. To learn a transferable erasing mechanism, we build a two-stage training pipeline: generic span-neighbor pre-training teaches the eraser to suppress the influence of the erased span, while task-specific fine-tuning adapts this capability to downstream scenarios. Experiments show that KVEraser nearly matches full recomputation in post-erasure performance on in-domain tasks across 1K--32K context lengths, while its latency increases by only 24% compared with a 17.6x increase for full recomputation. KVEraser also generalizes to unseen long-document QA tasks with harmful factual distractors, achieving the best performance among approximate baselines with a 3--4x speedup over full recomputation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KVEraser，一种针对KV缓存的可学习后处理上下文擦除方法，通过替换被删片段对应的KV状态为学习得到的引导状态，实现高效局部上下文擦除，显著降低计算开销。
AI.motivation: 在长上下文大模型应用中，常需在prefill后识别并删除过时、错误或有害的上下文片段，但传统精确擦除需对所有后续token重计算，成本与后缀长度相关，效率低下。
AI.method: 提出KVEraser方法：仅替换被删span对应位置的KV状态为学习得到的‘steering states’，其余缓存复用；采用两阶段训练：先进行通用span-neighbor预训练以抑制被删span影响，再进行任务特定微调。
AI.result: KVEraser在1K–32K上下文长度内，后擦除性能接近全量重计算；延迟仅增加24%，远低于全重计算的17.6倍增长；在未见长文档QA任务中亦具泛化能力，优于其他近似基线，且速度提升3–4倍。
AI.conclusion: KVEraser提供了一种高效、可迁移、低开销的KV缓存局部擦除机制，为长上下文LLM中的动态上下文管理提供了实用新范式。

title: Diffusion Offline Reinforcement Learning for Fair and Energy-Efficient UAV-Assisted Wireless Networks
summary: The integration of generative artificial intelligence with wireless communication and signal processing systems has opened new avenues for intelligent, data-driven decision-making in future 6G networks. This work proposes a diffusion soft actor-critic (Diffusion-SAC) approach that leverages offline reinforcement learning (RL) enhanced by denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) to optimize trajectory and scheduling control in unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) networks. While offline RL methods, such as conservative Q-learning (CQL), can learn from static datasets, they often struggle to generalize in low-data or dynamic conditions. To address this, we combine the robustness of CQL with the generative power of diffusion models, enabling expressive and signal-aware policy learning that generalizes beyond behavior policies. Applied to a UAV-assisted wireless network, the proposed framework minimizes transmission energy and improves fairness among devices. Simulations show that Diffusion-SAC outperforms standard offline RL baselines, achieving more stable convergence and higher rewards even with limited datasets. The method enhances data efficiency, reduces energy consumption, and increases throughput by more than 35 % compared to existing algorithms, demonstrating its potential for robust policy learning in next-generation wireless control systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合离线强化学习与去噪扩散概率模型的Diffusion-SAC方法，用于UAV网络中的轨迹与调度控制，显著提升能效、公平性与数据效率。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习（如CQL）在低数据或动态环境下泛化能力不足，需引入生成式建模增强策略学习的表达力和信号感知能力。
AI.method: 提出Diffusion-SAC框架，将保守Q学习（CQL）与去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）融合，实现基于静态数据集的信号感知、高泛化性策略学习。
AI.result: 在UAV辅助无线网络中，该方法较现有离线RL基线更稳定收敛、奖励更高；能耗降低，吞吐量提升超35%。
AI.conclusion: Diffusion-SAC提升了离线RL在6G智能无线控制中的数据效率与鲁棒性，为未来无人机网络提供可行的生成式AI驱动决策方案。

title: A Dual-Branch Collaborative Framework for Joint Optimization of Underwater Image Enhancement and Object Detection
summary: Due to wavelength dependent light absorption and scattering, underwater images usually suffer from color distortion and blurred details, which limits underwater object detection performance. Existing underwater image enhancement methods mainly focus on visual quality improvement, while it is still difficult to balance enhancement quality, processing efficiency, and downstream detection performance. Therefore, this paper proposes an efficient dual-branch underwater image enhancement framework for object detection. The detail enhancement branch improves brightness and local contrast to recover texture details in dark regions. The color restoration branch uses adaptive compensation to reduce color distortion and improve color gradation. By combining the complementary outputs of the two branches, the proposed framework provides clearer and more informative images for object detection. On the UIEB and EUVP datasets, the proposed method achieves UIQM scores of 2.249 and 2.576. When applied to the YOLOv8 detection task on the URPC dataset, the proposed method improves mAP50 by 2.1\% compared with the baseline. Extensive experiments show that our method improves object detection in complex underwater scenes, while balancing enhancement quality and processing efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的双分支水下图像增强框架，用于提升水下目标检测性能，通过细节增强和颜色恢复两个互补分支，在保持处理效率的同时改善图像质量，并在多个数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 水下图像存在波长依赖的光吸收和散射问题，导致颜色失真和细节模糊，影响目标检测性能；现有增强方法难以兼顾视觉质量、处理效率和下游检测性能。
AI.method: 提出双分支框架：细节增强分支提升亮度和局部对比度以恢复暗区纹理；颜色恢复分支采用自适应补偿减少颜色失真并改善色彩渐变；两分支输出融合生成更清晰、信息更丰富的图像。
AI.result: 在UIEB和EUVP数据集上UIQM得分分别为2.249和2.576；在URPC数据集上结合YOLOv8检测任务，mAP50较基线提升2.1%；实验表明该方法在复杂水下场景中有效提升目标检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提双分支增强框架在增强质量与处理效率之间取得良好平衡，显著提升了水下目标检测性能。

title: Filtered ANN as a Phase Transition: When Selectivity-Estimation Error Causes Plan Regret
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Code, benchmarks, and full pre-registration:https://github.com/samyama-ai/filtered-ann-regret
summary: A filtered approximate-nearest-neighbor (ANN) query returns the k nearest vectors among those satisfying an attribute predicate P of selectivity s. The best execution strategy -- pre-filter, post-filter, or in-filter -- changes with s, so a system must estimate s and choose. We model this as an argmax over a landscape with phases (regions where each strategy wins) separated by boundaries, and show that selectivity-estimation error produces plan regret -- recall lost versus the oracle strategy -- only in the critical regions around those boundaries. The regret is a wedge of log-width equal to the multiplicative estimation error epsilon and height equal to the local cliff |V'(s*)| epsilon; the flip-margin 1/|V'(s*)| is the condition number of a sibling cardinality-estimation study reappearing as the local boundary theory. The two phase boundaries follow from independent mathematics: order statistics place the post-filter cliff at s ~ k/K, and site percolation places the in-filter cliff at s_c ~ 0.83/M for graph degree M (corpus-size independent). Criticality exists only under a constrained budget B < sqrt(k n). Under pre-registered decision rules we confirm, on synthetic sweeps and real SIFT1M, that regret concentrates ~290x at the boundary and that the regret curves obey a finite-size scaling collapse onto one universal wedge across two decades of corpus size. A real approximate index does not mis-locate the boundary, but a biased cost model opens a persistent miscalibration band that estimation-error robustness cannot fix. The contribution is a characterization, not a new index. Code and the full pre-registration are public.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在近似最近邻（ANN）查询中，如何根据属性谓词的选择性s选择最优执行策略（预过滤、后过滤或内过滤），并分析了选择性估计误差对计划后悔的影响。
AI.motivation: 在过滤近似最近邻查询中，不同执行策略的优劣随选择性s变化，因此需要准确估计s以选择最优策略；然而估计误差会导致计划后悔，尤其是在策略边界附近。
AI.method: 通过建模策略性能随选择性s变化的相图（phase landscape），分析边界处的临界行为；结合顺序统计和位点渗流理论确定两个相变边界，并引入局部悬崖导数|V'(s*)|刻画后悔的楔形结构；通过合成数据与真实SIFT1M数据验证理论预测。
AI.result: 发现后悔仅在策略边界附近显著出现，呈对数宽度为ε、高度为|V'(s*)|ε的楔形；两个边界分别由顺序统计（s ~ k/K）和位点渗流（s_c ~ 0.83/M）决定；实验证实后悔在边界处集中放大~290倍，且满足有限尺寸标度律；偏差成本模型导致不可修复的校准偏差。
AI.conclusion: 本文并非提出新索引，而是首次系统刻画了过滤ANN查询中策略选择的相变结构与估计误差影响机制，揭示了选择性估计的条件数本质及临界区域的鲁棒性局限。

title: Object Tokens as a Bridge Between Segmentation and Visual Question Answering in Robotic Surgery
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) in robotic surgery, referred to as surgical VQA, requires high-level understanding of complex surgical scenes and the integration of visual perception with language reasoning, with the potential to support surgical training and intraoperative decision-making. Recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown promising performance through parameter-efficient fine-tuning; however, most existing approaches rely on coarse visual grounding, typically limited to bounding boxes, which fails to capture the fine-grained spatial structure of surgical objects. In this work, we propose a unified framework that jointly performs pixel-level segmentation and visual question answering within a single framework. Our approach integrates a VLM with a Segment Anything Model (SAM)-based decoder and represents scene elements as object tokens generated by the VLM. These object tokens guide answer prediction and are further projected to the SAM-based decoder to produce segmentation masks. By optimizing the object token embeddings through both segmentation and question answering objectives, the model learns spatially grounded representations that enhance visual reasoning while providing explicit pixel-level grounding. We evaluate the proposed method on the private RAMIE (Robot-Assisted Minimally Invasive Esophagectomy) dataset and the public EndoVis18 dataset, where it consistently outperforms baseline methods for surgical VQA. These results demonstrate that incorporating context-aware object tokens into vision-language models improves fine-grained surgical scene understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合像素级分割与视觉问答的统一框架，通过将视觉语言模型（VLM）与基于SAM的解码器结合，并利用VLM生成的对象令牌实现空间感知的细粒度手术场景理解，在RAMIE和EndoVis18数据集上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有外科VQA方法依赖粗粒度视觉定位（如边界框），难以捕捉手术对象的精细空间结构，限制了高阶场景理解能力。
AI.method: 提出统一框架，将VLM与基于Segment Anything Model（SAM）的解码器集成；VLM生成对象令牌，既用于答案预测，又投影至SAM解码器生成像素级分割掩码；联合优化分割与问答目标以学习空间接地表征。
AI.result: 在私有RAMIE和公开EndoVis18数据集上，该方法在外科VQA任务中持续超越基线方法，验证了上下文感知对象令牌对细粒度手术理解的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 将上下文感知的对象令牌融入视觉语言模型，可有效提升外科VQA中细粒度、空间接地的视觉推理能力，为手术训练与术中决策提供更可靠支持。

title: Context-Aware RL for Agentic and Multimodal LLMs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often fail when answering requires identifying a small but decisive piece of evidence within a long or complex context, such as a single line in a tool trace or a subtle detail in an image. We propose ContextRL, a context-aware reinforcement learning (RL) method that improves long-horizon reasoning and multimodal performance through an \emph{indirect} auxiliary objective. Instead of supervising only the final answer, ContextRL presents the model with a query, an answer, and two highly similar contexts, and rewards it for selecting the context that supports the query--answer pair, thereby encouraging fine-grained grounding. We construct contrastive context data in two domains: for coding agents, trajectories serve as contexts, yielding 1k pairs built via condition filtering; for multimodal reasoning, images serve as contexts, yielding 7K pairs built via generative editing and similarity search. ContextRL achieves average gains of +2.2% over standard GRPO on 5 long-horizon benchmarks, and +1.8% across 12 diverse visual question answering benchmarks. To disentangle the effect of the proposed objective from that of additional data, we compare against data-augmentation baselines that repurpose the same contrastive contexts as standard query--context--answer examples. These baselines provide little to no improvement, showing that the gains arise from the proposed context-selection objective rather than from the contrastive data alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ContextRL，一种上下文感知的强化学习方法，通过间接辅助目标提升大语言模型在长程推理和多模态任务中的表现，核心是让模型在高度相似的上下文中选择支持给定问答对的上下文，从而增强细粒度事实依据能力。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在需要从长或复杂上下文中识别微小但关键证据的任务中表现不佳，例如代码执行轨迹中的单行或图像中的细微细节。
AI.method: ContextRL采用对比式上下文选择作为间接强化学习目标：给定查询、答案及两个高度相似上下文（如代码轨迹或图像），奖励模型选择支持该问答对的上下文；对比数据分别通过条件过滤（编程领域）和生成编辑+相似搜索（多模态领域）构建。
AI.result: ContextRL在5个长程推理基准上平均超越标准GRPO 2.2%，在12个视觉问答基准上平均提升1.8%；控制实验表明提升源自上下文选择目标本身，而非对比数据的简单增广。
AI.conclusion: 上下文选择这一间接监督信号能有效提升模型对关键证据的敏感性和细粒度 grounding 能力，且不依赖额外标注数据，为提升复杂推理与多模态理解提供了新范式。

title: Communication-Efficient Verifiable Attention for LLM Inference
summary: Computation integrity of remote large language model (LLM) serving can be questionable. For conventional deep neural networks (DNNs), the existing TEE-shielded DNN partitioning (TSDP) approach uses Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) to compute non-linear components and verify the integrity of linear components offloaded to an untrusted GPU. However, directly applying TSDP to Transformer-based LLMs incurs significant TEE computation and TEE-GPU communication overhead. This paper presents Communication-efficient TEE-GPU Attention (\textsc{VeriAttn}) for accelerating verifiable LLM inference. \textsc{VeriAttn} offloads both linear and non-linear computations of attention to the GPU, while TEE performs verification. Moreover, for prefill, \textsc{VeriAttn} uses a two-level pipeline to overlap data movement, TEE pre-/post-processing, and GPU computation. For decoding, when the key-value cache exceeds available GPU memory, \textsc{VeriAttn} partitions attention across TEE and GPU to reduce repeated key-value transfers. Evaluation on an Intel TDX platform shows that \textsc{VeriAttn} achieves 2.60-3.38$\times$ and 3.86-5.42$\times$ acceleration over TSDP for 6k-token prompts and 10k-token outputs during prefill and decoding, respectively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VeriAttn，一种通信高效的TEE-GPU注意力机制，用于加速可验证的大语言模型推理。它将注意力计算的线性和非线性部分全部卸载至GPU，TEE仅负责验证，并通过两级流水线和缓存分区策略显著降低开销，在Intel TDX平台上相较TSDP实现2.6–5.4倍加速。
AI.motivation: 远程大语言模型（LLM）服务的计算完整性难以保障；现有TEE-shielded DNN partitioning（TSDP）方法直接应用于Transformer架构LLM时，会导致过高的TEE计算与TEE-GPU通信开销。
AI.method: 提出VeriAttn：1）将注意力机制的全部线性和非线性计算卸载到GPU，TEE仅执行轻量验证；2）预填充阶段采用两级流水线重叠数据搬运、TEE预/后处理与GPU计算；3）解码阶段在KV缓存超出GPU内存时，对注意力进行TEE-GPU协同分区以减少重复KV传输。
AI.result: 在Intel TDX平台上，VeriAttn相比TSDP在6k-token提示的预填充阶段加速2.60–3.38×，在10k-token输出的解码阶段加速3.86–5.42×。
AI.conclusion: VeriAttn通过重构注意力计算与验证分工、优化流水与内存管理，在保证计算完整性的同时大幅提升了TEE-GPU协同下的LLM推理效率，为可信远程LLM服务提供了实用可行的加速方案。

title: CogCanvas: A Benchmark for Evaluating Multi-Subject Reference-Based Image Generation
summary: Multi-subject reference-based image generation requires jointly preserving multiple human identities, binding per-person objects and fashion items, and respecting a specified background scene, a regime where current diffusion models remain brittle. Existing benchmarks evaluate only one axis at a time and none jointly captures multi-identity composition with human-object interaction, background grounding, and spatial plausibility. We introduce CogCanvas, a benchmark of 1,952 curated reference images spanning 100 celebrity identities, 115 distinctive objects and fashion items, and 29 real-world background scenes including landmarks, from which we construct 1,361 compositional prompts covering 2-5 person group sizes. The curation pipeline combines DINOv2-based deduplication, two-stage aesthetic filtering, and automated derivation of structured interaction and position graphs that serve as ground-truth supervision. CogCanvas supports three tasks, reference-based multi-human-object generation (primary), text-to-image compositional generation, and reference retrieval, under a unified six-axis evaluation protocol. We introduce two metrics tailored to the multi-reference setting: BG-Sim, which scores background fidelity on SAM 3-masked regions via DINOv3 feature similarity, and Attr-VQA, which uses a multimodal LLM to verify per-subject attribute binding and inter-person interactions against the structured graphs. Benchmarking five SOTA methods reveals that every model degrades substantially as group size grows from 2 to 5, with near-complete failure on object/fashion binding beyond three subjects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CogCanvas基准测试，用于评估多主体参考图像生成任务，涵盖多身份组合、人-物交互、背景融合和空间合理性等多个维度，并设计了BG-Sim和Attr-VQA两个新指标来衡量背景保真度与属性绑定准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在多主体参考图像生成中表现脆弱，且缺乏能同时评估多身份组合、人-物交互、背景接地和空间合理性的综合基准。
AI.method: 构建包含1952张参考图像的CogCanvas基准，涵盖100个名人身份、115个物品/时尚单品及29个真实背景；采用DINOv2去重、两阶段美学筛选及自动生成结构化交互与位置图；提出BG-Sim（基于SAM掩码与DINOv3特征相似性）和Attr-VQA（基于多模态大模型验证属性绑定）两个新指标。
AI.result: 在CogCanvas上评测5种SOTA方法发现：所有模型随人数从2增至5时性能显著下降，超过3人时物品/时尚绑定几乎完全失效。
AI.conclusion: CogCanvas填补了多主体图像生成综合评估的空白，揭示当前方法在复杂组合场景下的根本局限，并为后续研究提供了可复现的基准与评估范式。

title: The Value Axis: Language Models Encode Whether They're on the Right Track
summary: We investigate whether language models internally track the value of their current trajectory, defined as the likelihood that their ongoing strategy will achieve their goals. Using synthetic, in-context reinforcement learning data, we construct a "value" axis for Qwen3-8B. We find that activations along this axis distinguish between high vs. low verbalized confidence, rollouts without and with backtracking, and correct vs. corrupted code. Steering towards high value causally suppresses self-correction and reduces explanatory verbosity, while steering towards low value induces backtracking and exploration. We demonstrate that direct preference optimization (DPO) can increase the internal value of rewarded behaviors (e.g. use a certain word), causing the model to act more confidently after exhibiting them. Finally, we apply the value axis to study in-the-wild settings. For example, we find that Qwen assigns low value to politically sensitive chat queries after post-training and that supervised fine-tuning increases internal confidence within the training domain. Our results suggest that language models linearly encode an estimate of expected goal success that modulates their confidence in pursuing a direction.

AI.tldr: 本文研究语言模型是否在内部追踪其当前策略达成目标的可能性（即‘价值’），通过合成数据构建Qwen3-8B的‘价值轴’，发现该轴能区分信心高低、是否回溯及代码正确性；干预该轴可因果影响模型行为（如抑制自我修正或诱发探索）；DPO可提升被奖励行为的内部价值；并在真实场景中验证其应用（如政治敏感查询下价值下降、SFT提升领域内信心）。
AI.motivation: 探究语言模型是否具备内在的‘价值’表征——即对当前推理路径成功达成目标概率的估计，并验证该表征是否可被识别、操控并泛化到真实场景。
AI.method: 利用合成的上下文强化学习数据，为Qwen3-8B构建可解释的‘价值轴’；通过激活投影、因果干预（steering）、直接偏好优化（DPO）及跨场景分析（如政治敏感查询、监督微调前后对比）进行实证检验。
AI.result: 1) 激活空间中存在可线性分离的‘价值轴’，能区分信心、回溯与代码质量；2) 沿该轴 steering 可因果调控模型行为（如高价值抑制自我修正，低价值触发回溯）；3) DPO 能提升特定行为（如用某词）后的内部价值与后续信心；4) 在真实场景中，政治敏感查询导致价值下降，SFT 提升训练域内价值/信心。
AI.conclusion: 语言模型在线性激活空间中编码了对当前策略预期成功概率的估计（即‘价值’），该表征动态调节其行为信心与探索倾向，具有可解释性、可干预性与现实相关性。

title: Simulation-Augmented Multi-Step Split Conformal Prediction for Aggregated Forecasts
comment: Accepted at ICML 2026 workshop: Forecasting as a New Frontier of Intelligence
summary: We study uncertainty quantification for aggregated forecasting tasks such as annual totals and year-over-year growth rates. We propose SA-MSCP, a simulation-augmented multi-step split conformal method that generates future paths from cross-validated residuals using a block bootstrap and constructs prediction intervals from empirical quantiles. Experiments show that SA-MSCP improves empirical coverage over a simulated-path baseline for aggregated and growth-rate targets. Our results demonstrate that simulation-enhanced conformal calibration is an effective and general framework for uncertainty quantification in aggregated time-series forecasting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SA-MSCP的模拟增强型多步分裂共形方法，用于聚合预测任务（如年度总量和同比增速）的不确定性量化，通过块引导法从交叉验证残差生成未来路径，并基于经验分位数构建预测区间，实验证明其在聚合与增长率目标上优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 针对年度总量、同比增速等聚合预测任务的不确定性量化问题，现有方法在覆盖概率上存在不足。
AI.method: 提出SA-MSCP方法：利用块引导法对交叉验证残差进行重采样以生成未来路径，再基于经验分位数构造预测区间。
AI.result: SA-MSCP在聚合预测和增长率预测目标上均显著提升了实证覆盖率，优于模拟路径基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 模拟增强的共形校准是一种有效且通用的框架，适用于聚合时间序列预测中的不确定性量化。

title: Metis: A Generalizable and Efficient World-Action Model for Autonomous Driving and Urban Navigation
summary: World action models~(WAMs) have shown great promise for autonomous driving and urban navigation. Built upon Vision-Language-Action models or video generation models, existing approaches suffer key limitations: (1) High inference latency due to future observation prediction at test time, and (2) tightly coupled video and action modeling leading to representational mismatch and degraded generalization. To address both issues, we propose Metis, an end-to-end WAM framework that decouples video generation and action prediction. Specifically, Metis employs a Mixture-of-Transformers architecture with dedicated experts for video generation and action prediction, preserving the intrinsic distributional properties of each task. To enhance efficiency, we introduce an asymmetric attention mask that enables joint training of both experts while allowing the action model to bypass explicit video generation during inference. This design ensures training-inference consistency and significantly reduces computational costs without compromising planning performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on the NAVSIM navhard and navtest benchmarks and the CityWalker navigation benchmark, validating both the generalizability and efficiency across diverse tasks. Real-robot deployments further confirm the practical feasibility of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Metis框架，通过解耦视频生成与动作预测，采用混合Transformer架构和非对称注意力掩码，在保证性能的同时显著降低推理延迟与计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有世界动作模型（WAMs）存在高推理延迟和视频与动作建模强耦合导致表征不匹配、泛化能力差两大问题。
AI.method: 提出Metis端到端WAM框架：采用Mixture-of-Transformers架构，设置视频生成与动作预测两个专用专家模块，并引入不对称注意力掩码，使动作模型在推理时跳过显式视频生成。
AI.result: 在NAVSIM（navhard/navtest）和CityWalker导航基准上达到SOTA性能；实机部署验证了方法的实用性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: Metis通过任务解耦与高效注意力设计，在保持规划性能的同时大幅提升推理效率与跨任务泛化能力，为WAM实际部署提供了可行路径。

title: CacheMuon: Using Temporal Preconditioning To Approximate Polar Factor
summary: Muon is an optimizer that computes updates using the polar factor of the momentum matrix and has shown strong empirical performance across a range of training settings. A key component of Muon is the Newton-Schulz iteration used to compute this polar factor. Although this avoids the cost of an exact singular value decomposition, it remains expensive in practice because it is applied at every optimization step. At the same time, the momentum matrix changes smoothly over training, suggesting strong temporal correlation in the corresponding polar factors. In this paper, we exploit this structure and propose CacheMuon, a temporal preconditioning method that reuses information from previous optimization steps to approximate the polar factor at the current step. This reduces redundant orthogonalization computation across iterations. We analyze CacheMuon as an inexact Muon update, with error controlled by fresh-solver error and cache staleness. Empirically, CacheMuon provides a controllable quality-efficiency frontier: conservative thresholds closely match fresh Muon on language-model and vision training while reducing orthogonalization FLOPs, whereas more aggressive thresholds yield larger arithmetic savings at the cost of modest validation-quality degradation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CacheMuon，一种利用时间相关性缓存并重用先前优化步骤中极分解信息的高效优化器，以减少每次迭代中的正交化计算开销。
AI.motivation: Muon优化器虽性能优异，但其依赖的Newton-Schulz迭代在每步都计算极分解，开销大；而动量矩阵随训练平滑变化，暗示极因子具有时间相关性，可被复用。
AI.method: 提出CacheMuon方法，通过缓存历史极因子并评估其时效性，在满足误差控制条件下复用，实现近似但高效的极分解更新；将其建模为带误差控制（新鲜求解器误差与缓存陈旧度）的不精确Muon更新。
AI.result: CacheMuon在语言模型和视觉任务上可显著降低正交化FLOPs：保守阈值下精度几乎无损，激进阈值下带来更大计算节省但验证精度仅有小幅下降。
AI.conclusion: CacheMuon提供了一条可控的质量-效率权衡曲线，验证了利用优化过程中动量矩阵的时间相关性来加速极分解是有效且实用的策略。

title: Deep Residual Injection for Full-Spectrum Forensic Signal Perception in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have been increasingly adopted in forensics for their robust semantic understanding. As AI-generated images become realistic, semantic-level inconsistencies alone are often insufficient for reliable detection. This motivates a critical question: whether MLLMs can achieve full-spectrum forensic signal perception, i.e., capturing low-level generator artifacts without sacrificing pre-trained semantic knowledge. We further perform a layer-wise analysis of forensic signal perception in MLLMs, showing that semantic information is primarily formed in the early-to-middle layers, whereas direct fine-tuning for artifact learning disrupts these semantic representations. Based on this insight, we propose Deep Visual Residual MLLM (Deep-VRM) to preserve early semantic processing while injecting artifact-specific visual signals as a residual path into an intermediate layer, where they are fused with semantic token representations and propagated through subsequent trainable layers. This enables later layers to jointly model semantic reasoning and signal-level forensic cues, and surprisingly, the model learns to adaptively leverage different levels of forensic signals depending on the input, achieving robust and generalizable detection performance. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art across most benchmarks. The code and data are available at https://github.com/KQL11/Deep-VRM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Deep-VRM模型，通过残差路径注入低层生成伪影信号，在不破坏预训练语义能力的前提下实现全谱系数字取证感知，显著提升AI图像检测鲁棒性与泛化性。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在AI图像检测中仅依赖语义层面不一致性，难以捕捉低层生成伪影；需解决如何让MLLM同时保留语义理解能力并感知底层伪造信号的问题。
AI.method: 开展层间分析，发现语义信息集中在前中期层；提出Deep-VRM：在中间层引入视觉残差路径注入伪影特征，并与语义token融合，由后续可训练层联合建模语义与信号级线索。
AI.result: 在多数基准测试上达到SOTA性能，模型能自适应选择不同层级的取证信号，具备强鲁棒性与泛化性。
AI.conclusion: MLLM可通过结构化设计（如残差注入）实现语义与低层信号的协同建模，无需牺牲原有语义能力即可增强全谱系取证感知能力。

title: Scalable and Interpretable Representation Alignment with Ordinal Similarity
summary: Evaluating representation similarity is fundamental to representation learning. However, existing metrics suffer from significant limitations: they lack interpretability due to shifting baselines, lack robustness to outliers, and are computationally intractable for large datasets, forcing reliance on heuristic approximations. To address this, we develop an ordinal-similarity framework, instantiated by the Triplet (TSI) and Quadruplet (QSI) Similarity Indices, which measure alignment by quantifying the consistency of ordinal relationships. We theoretically demonstrate this formulation is inherently interpretable, robust to outliers, and computationally efficient. Finally, we establish a formal equivalence between TSI and local neighborhood alignment, measured by Mutual Nearest Neighbors. Empirically, we validate these properties and show that ordinal similarity offers a scalable approach to measuring alignment, enabling practitioners to better understand and design representations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于序数相似性的新框架（TSI/QSI），用于评估表征相似性，具备可解释性、鲁棒性和高效性，并证明了TSI与局部邻域对齐（互近邻）的等价性。
AI.motivation: 现有表征相似性度量存在可解释性差（基线漂移）、对异常值敏感、大规模数据下计算不可行等问题。
AI.method: 构建基于序数关系一致性的相似性框架，提出三元组（TSI）和四元组（QSI）相似性指数，并从理论上证明其可解释性、鲁棒性和高效性；同时建立TSI与互近邻局部对齐的数学等价性。
AI.result: TSI/QSI具有理论保证的可解释性、异常值鲁棒性与计算高效性；实证验证了其在大规模场景下的有效性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 序数相似性为表征学习提供了更可靠、可解释且可扩展的对齐度量新范式。

title: Text region detection in historical astronomical diagrams
summary: Text detection is a crucial task in the analysis of historical documents. While datasets and benchmarks exist for text detection in manuscripts and maps, the study of text in mathematical diagrams has received little attention. To address this, we introduce a large-scale, diverse, open-access dataset of 948 historical astronomical diagrams containing 10,940 oriented polygonal text regions. Our dataset spans ten centuries (8th to 18th) and seven main linguistic traditions: Arabic and Persian (115), Chinese (332), Byzantine (233), Latin (185), Hebrew (48), and Sanskrit (35). It captures a wide range of diagram styles and textual content, from symbols to multi-line paragraphs. Each text instance is annotated with ordered polygons that precisely delineate text regions and encode the reading direction. In addition, we annotated the 2,293 regions in Latin diagrams with 20 class labels. We evaluated several strong baselines on our dataset, including TESTR, DeepSolo++, and Poly-DETR, a simple extension of DINO-DETR that we design to predict ordered polygon vertices. Poly-DETR achieves state-of-the-art performance on the MTHv2 and cBAD2019 benchmarks and provides a solid, simple baseline on our dataset. Code and dataset available online.

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个大规模、多世纪、多语言的历史天文图表文本检测数据集，包含948张图表与10940个带方向的多边形文本区域，并设计Poly-DETR模型实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 历史数学图表中的文本检测长期被忽视，现有数据集缺乏对天文图表、多语言、长时间跨度和定向文本的支持。
AI.method: 构建跨10世纪、7种语言的948张天文图表数据集，标注10940个有序多边形文本区域及拉丁图表的20类细粒度标签；提出Poly-DETR——基于DINO-DETR改进的端到端模型，用于预测有序多边形顶点。
AI.result: Poly-DETR在MTHv2和cBAD2019基准上达到SOTA；在新数据集上提供稳健基线；所有代码与数据开源。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了历史天文图表文本检测的数据与方法空白，为古籍OCR与人文计算提供了重要资源与技术支撑。

title: Mixtures of Subspaces for Bandwidth Efficient Context Parallel Training
summary: Pretraining language models with extended context windows enhances their ability to leverage rich information during generation. Existing methods split input sequences into chunks, broadcast them across multiple devices, and compute attention block by block which incurs significant communication overhead. While feasible in high-speed clusters, these methods are impractical for decentralized training over low-bandwidth connections. We propose a compression method for communication-efficient context parallelism in decentralized settings, achieving a remarkable compression rate of over 95\% with negligible overhead and no loss in convergence. Our key insight is to exploit the intrinsic low-rank structure of activation outputs by dynamically constraining them to learned mixtures of subspaces via efficient reparameterizations. We demonstrate scaling billion-parameter decentralized models to context lengths exceeding 100K tokens on networks as slow as 300Mbps, matching the wall-clock convergence speed of centralized models on 100Gbps interconnects.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向去中心化训练的通信高效上下文并行压缩方法，利用激活输出的内在低秩结构，实现95%以上的通信压缩率，且无收敛损失。
AI.motivation: 现有扩展上下文窗口的预训练方法在去中心化、低带宽环境下因高通信开销而难以实用。
AI.method: 通过动态约束激活输出到学习到的子空间混合，并采用高效的重参数化方式，利用其内在低秩结构进行通信压缩。
AI.result: 在300Mbps网络上成功扩展十亿参数模型至超100K tokens上下文长度，收敛速度媲美100Gbps集中式训练。
AI.conclusion: 该压缩方法显著降低去中心化训练的通信成本，兼顾效率与精度，为低带宽场景下的大模型长上下文训练提供了可行方案。

title: SiGnature: Explicit Motion Diffusion for Stylized Semantic Gesture
summary: While recent advances in co-speech gesture generation have achieved impressive rhythmic synchronization, synthesizing gestures that are both semantically meaningful and faithful to a speaker's unique non-verbal style remains an open challenge. Semantic gestures, such as iconic shapes or deictic pointing, are statistically sparse, making them difficult to learn effectively within standard generative models. We present SiGnature, a framework for Stylized and Semantic Gesture generation that reconciles precise semantic control with high-fidelity style preservation. Unlike prevalent methods that rely on entangled latent representations, SiGnature operates in an explicit joint-rotation space. This design enables our core contribution, Joint Motion Integration (JMI), a training-free inference mechanism capable of injecting any external motion sequence, particularly in-the-wild semantic gestures, directly into the diffusion process. JMI automatically identifies the specific ``active joints'' conveying a semantic action and injects them into the generation, while relying on the diffusion backbone to synthesize the remaining body dynamics, including posture and flow, in accordance with the pre-learned style of the target speaker. This allows for the plug-and-play integration of arbitrary motions, including complex semantic gestures, without retraining or introducing the ``Frankenstein'' artifacts typical of cut-and-paste methods. Extensive experiments and perceptual studies demonstrate that SiGnature offers superior semantic motion control while maintaining smooth and natural co-speech gesture generation and preserving the distinct characteristics of the speaker, thereby outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SiGnature框架，通过Joint Motion Integration（JMI）机制在扩散模型中实现语义手势的即插即用式注入，兼顾语义准确性与说话人风格保真度。
AI.motivation: 现有共语手势生成方法难以同时保证语义有意义性和说话人非语言风格的忠实性，尤其对稀疏的语义手势（如象征性动作、指示性指向）建模效果不佳。
AI.method: SiGnature框架工作于显式的关节旋转空间，提出无需训练的推理机制JMI：自动识别并注入外部语义动作中的‘活跃关节’，其余身体动态由预训练扩散模型根据目标说话人风格生成。
AI.result: 实验与感知研究显示，SiGnature在语义控制精度、生成流畅自然度及说话人风格保持方面均优于当前最优方法，且避免了拼接式方法产生的不协调伪影。
AI.conclusion: SiGnature成功解耦语义控制与风格建模，在无需重训练的前提下实现高保真、可编辑的共语手势生成，为语义驱动的手势合成提供了新范式。

title: Robust Neural Tucker Factorization with Bias Correction and Adaptive Initialization
summary: High-dimensional incomplete (HDI) tensors are widely used in traffic and climate applications, but sparse observations make accurate completion difficult. The intrinsic non-linear dynamics and non-stationary variations across distinct multi-modal fields severely hinder the efficacy of conventional linear reconstruction frameworks. Neural Tucker factorization provides an effective framework for modeling high-order interactions among tensor modes. By parameterizing underlying structural characteristics into continuous latent spaces, neural representations circumvent the rigid low-rank constraints of classical algebra. However, its performance can still be affected by implementation-level choices, especially parameter initialization and the bias configuration of the final output mapping. Suboptimal initializations frequently lead to variance explosion across the cubically expanded interaction spaces, driving the subsequent non-linear activation boundaries into severe gradient saturation zones, while the omission of a dedicated translation parameter forces interaction weights to implicitly absorb global statistical deviations. This paper proposes a simple yet effective neural Tucker factorization model with Kaiming initialization and bias correction (KaBiN) for HDI tensor completion. The proposed model utilizes Kaiming uniform initialization for the embedding and Tucker linear parameters, and adopts a simple bias correction in output mapping. By elegantly decoupling global mean shifts from local structural representations, the framework provides a highly stable and well-conditioned optimization landscape. Experiments on three real-world HDI tensor datasets show that KaBiN achieves better performance than the original NeuTucF, while introducing minimal computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的神经Tucker分解模型KaBiN，通过Kaiming初始化和输出映射中的偏置校正，提升高维不完整张量补全的稳定性和性能。
AI.motivation: 高维不完整张量在交通与气候等应用中普遍存在，但稀疏观测、非线性动力学及多模态非平稳变化严重限制了传统线性重建方法的效果；现有神经Tucker分解虽具优势，却易受参数初始化与偏置配置不当影响，导致梯度饱和与优化不稳定。
AI.method: 提出KaBiN模型：采用Kaiming均匀初始化嵌入与Tucker线性参数，并在输出映射中引入简单偏置校正，以解耦全局均值偏移与局部结构表征。
AI.result: 在三个真实高维不完整张量数据集上，KaBiN相比原始NeuTucF取得更优补全性能，且计算开销极小。
AI.conclusion: Kaiming初始化与偏置校正能显著提升神经Tucker分解的优化稳定性与泛化能力，为HDI张量补全提供一种简单高效的新范式。

title: High-Fidelity 4D Hand-Object Capture via Multi-View Spatiotemporal Tracking and Physics-Aware Gaussians
summary: The growing demand for high-fidelity 4D hand-object interaction (HOI) data in embodied AI and spatial computing is currently bottlenecked by the reliance on pre-scanned object templates and physical markers. While recent methods have demonstrated promising results in reconstructing 4D hand-object interaction from videos, they are highly sensitive to initial estimates of hand and object poses. Yet, estimating these poses from images is challenging, in particular under severe occlusion which is inherent in hand-object interaction scenarios. We propose a novel system for the robust and accurate reconstruction of hands and objects from synchronized and calibrated multi-view videos without requiring any templates or markers. Our system consists of two main components with key innovations: (1) a multi-view feed-forward transformer model that aggregates cross-view geometry and temporal cues to provide a reliable, metric-consistent initialization for both poses and dense object geometry, and (2) a hand-object physics-aware Gaussian-based optimization framework to refine the initial estimates, integrating tetrahedral constraints, collision refinement, and appearance decomposition to produce physically plausible and visually accurate reconstruction. Validated on public benchmarks and an extensive internal dataset, our pipeline achieves highly robust, artifact-free reconstruction, providing an efficient foundation for automated 4D asset generation. Our project page are available at https://zyshen021.github.io/HOSTPG/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需模板和标记、基于多视角视频的鲁棒4D手-物交互重建系统，结合多视图Transformer初始化与物理感知高斯优化，显著提升在严重遮挡下的重建精度与物理合理性。
AI.motivation: 当前高保真4D手-物交互数据需求旺盛，但受限于依赖预扫描物体模板和物理标记；现有视频重建方法对初始姿态估计敏感，而图像中（尤其严重遮挡下）的手与物姿态估计本身困难。
AI.method: 提出两阶段系统：(1) 多视角前馈Transformer模型，融合跨视角几何与时间线索，提供度量一致的初始姿态与稠密物体几何；(2) 物理感知的高斯优化框架，引入四面体约束、碰撞细化和外观分解，实现精细化重建。
AI.result: 在公开基准和内部大规模数据集上验证，该方法实现了鲁棒、无伪影的4D重建，支持高效自动化4D资产生成。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法摆脱了对模板和标记的依赖，在遮挡严重场景下仍保持高鲁棒性与物理合理性，为具身AI与空间计算提供了高质量4D HOI数据生成新范式。

title: MUNI: Multimodal Unified Latent Diffusion for Coherent Any-to-Any Generation
summary: We introduce MUNI, an end-to-end multimodal latent diffusion framework for any-to-any generation that unifies subset-conditioned cross-modal generation and unconditional joint sampling through a shared stochastic latent. Existing multimodal generative models are largely LLM-based, which limits leveraging modality-specific generators and requires text-paired data for training. Recent diffusion- and flow-based any-to-any extensions take a different direction but still rely on text-aligned embeddings, fully-paired training, or matched-dimensionality deterministic mappings. MUNI rests on two complementary contributions, one architectural and one in the training objective. First, we extend latent diffusion to multimodal any-to-any generation end-to-end: instead of the standard two-stage recipe that precomputes a frozen latent space and then fits a prior over it, MUNI jointly trains modality-specific encoders, expressive decoders, and a single shared flow-based prior under one objective. Second, we identify that the standard aggregation rules of multimodal variational inference are insufficient once coupled with a learned prior and expressive decoders. A suitable shared latent must simultaneously satisfy coherence across generated modalities, predictive sufficiency of subset latents, and minimality of the latent content. We propose a routed training objective whose structural choices align the latent with these criteria and admit a minimal-sufficiency characterization in the realizable setting. Experiments on PolyMNIST-Quadrant-Labels and a large-scale image-text-audio benchmark show MUNI matching or exceeding the strongest baselines on conditional generation while opening its largest margins on unconditional coherence. Project page: https://muni-proj.github.io/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MUNI，一种端到端的多模态潜在扩散框架，用于任意模态间的生成，统一了子集条件跨模态生成与无条件联合采样，通过共享随机潜在空间实现。它摒弃了传统LLM或文本对齐依赖，联合训练模态特定编解码器与单一流形先验，并提出路由式训练目标以确保潜在表示的一致性、充分性与最小性。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态生成模型受限于LLM架构（难以利用模态专用生成器）、依赖文本配对数据，或需完全对齐训练/固定维度映射；亟需一种不依赖文本锚点、支持任意模态组合且潜在空间语义一致的新范式。
AI.method: 1）端到端联合训练：整合模态特异性编码器、强表达力解码器与单一基于流的共享先验；2）提出路由式训练目标，替代标准多模态变分推断聚合规则，显式优化潜在空间的跨模态一致性、子集预测充分性与内容最小性。
AI.result: 在PolyMNIST-Quadrant-Labels和大规模图像-文本-音频基准上，MUNI在条件生成任务上达到或超越最强基线，在无条件联合生成（即跨模态一致性）上优势最为显著。
AI.conclusion: MUNI证明了端到端联合学习共享潜在空间与路由式目标设计的有效性，为真正灵活、鲁棒、无需文本对齐的任意模态生成提供了新路径。

title: OmniOPSD: Rationale-Privileged On-Policy Self-Distillation for Affective Computing
summary: Reinforcement learning for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) is often hindered by severe reward sparsity in complex reasoning tasks. This challenge is particularly pronounced in human-centered scenarios involving states, emotions, intentions, and behaviors, where heterogeneous multimodal signals and subjective human factors make high-quality chain-of-thought (CoT) annotations expensive and difficult to obtain. Although many multimodal datasets provide expert-annotated ground-truth labels, directly using these labels for supervised fine-tuning may encourage shortcut learning in multimodal perception and provides limited transparency for safety-critical human--AI interaction. To address these limitations, we propose OmniOPSD, a Rationale-Privileged On-Policy Self-Distillation framework that uses frontier-generated rationales as teacher-side privileged evidence rather than student imitation targets. OmniOPSD uses frontier-generated evidence-aware rationales only as training-time privileged evidence context for a local teacher. The student samples its own rollout from the original multimodal input, while the rationale-privileged teacher scores the same tokens and provides dense token-level supervision. Thus, the student learns on its own trajectory distribution without directly imitating frontier-model completions, and inference requires no labels, rationales, CoT annotations, or closed-source model access. Experiments on MER-UniBench show that OmniOPSD achieves state-of-the-art performance with an average score of $84.19$, and ablations further support the value of rationale-privileged teacher guidance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniOPSD框架，通过利用前沿模型生成的推理链作为教师端特权证据，而非学生模仿目标，在多模态大语言模型强化学习中缓解奖励稀疏问题，提升人类中心场景下的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在复杂推理任务中面临严重奖励稀疏问题，尤其在涉及人类状态、情绪、意图和行为的场景中，高质量思维链标注成本高且主观性强；直接使用专家标注易导致捷径学习，且缺乏对安全关键人机交互的可解释性。
AI.method: 提出Rationale-Privileged On-Policy Self-Distillation（OmniOPSD）框架：以前沿模型生成的证据感知推理链为教师端训练时特权上下文；学生基于原始多模态输入自主采样轨迹，教师对相同token提供密集token级监督，不强制模仿教师输出。
AI.result: 在MER-UniBench上达到84.19平均分，为当前最优；消融实验证明推理链作为特权证据的有效性。
AI.conclusion: OmniOPSD有效缓解奖励稀疏与标注依赖问题，提升多模态推理鲁棒性与可解释性，推理阶段无需标签、推理链、CoT标注或闭源模型访问。

title: Not all Jensen-Shannon Divergence Estimators are Equal
summary: The Jensen-Shannon divergence is widely reported as a scalar measure of fidelity for synthetic tabular data. Yet, in practice, it is estimated from finite samples using protocols that are often underspecified. This creates a measurement problem. Although the population divergence is well defined, the empirical value depends on the estimator family, sampling protocol, calibration, dimensionality, and class balance. We show that different protocols can yield non-comparable values: marginal-based estimators ignore dependencies in the joint distribution and can severely underestimate divergence, while classifier-based estimators capture joint structure but exhibit strong estimator dependence. We systematically study this behavior across controlled settings with reference divergences and real-world synthetic tabular benchmarks. Our analysis reveals dependence blindness in marginal estimators, prior-shift bias under class imbalance, and estimator sensitivity in high dimensions. To address prior shift, we derive a closed-form posterior correction for classifier-based Jensen-Shannon estimation. Our results show that empirical Jensen-Shannon divergence values are inherently protocol-dependent, making explicit specification of the estimation procedure necessary for meaningful comparison. We provide practical guidelines and an open-source tool for estimator-aware Jensen-Shannon evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了Jensen-Shannon散度（JS散度）在合成表格数据保真度评估中的实际应用问题，指出其经验估计值高度依赖于估计方法、采样协议、校准方式、维度和类别平衡等因素，导致不同协议下结果不可比；作者系统分析了边际估计器与分类器估计器的缺陷，并提出针对类别不平衡的后验校正方法，强调JS散度评估必须明确指定估计协议，并提供了开源工具和实践指南。
AI.motivation: Jensen-Shannon散度虽被广泛用作合成表格数据保真度的标量指标，但其经验估计常因协议未明确而产生不可比结果，造成测量难题。
AI.method: 通过控制实验与真实世界合成表格基准，系统比较边际型与分类器型JS散度估计器的行为；分析依赖盲区、先验偏移偏差与高维敏感性；推导分类器型JS估计中应对类别不平衡的闭式后验校正。
AI.result: 发现边际估计器忽略联合依赖结构、严重低估散度；分类器估计器虽捕获联合结构但对估计器选择高度敏感；存在先验偏移偏差与高维敏感性；所提后验校正可缓解类别不平衡影响。
AI.conclusion: 经验JS散度值本质上是协议依赖的，因此在评估和比较合成数据时，必须明确定义并报告估计协议；作者提供实践指南与开源工具以支持估计器感知的JS评估。

title: Taylor-Calibrate: Principled Initialization for Hybrid Linear Attention Distillation
summary: Hybrid linear attention models offer an appealing path to faster long-context inference: they reduce the quadratic cost and KV-cache burden of full softmax attention while retaining much of the quality of Transformer models. A practical way to obtain such models is to convert a pretrained Transformer instead of pretraining a new architecture from scratch, but this conversion is still brittle. Simply copying the teacher attention projections into a Gated DeltaNet (GDN) student does not specify the new recurrent decay, write, and output-gating dynamics. As a result, the converted model often starts in a poor dynamical regime and must spend many distillation tokens repairing initialization rather than learning the remaining teacher behavior. We propose Taylor-Calibrate, a lightweight initialization method for hybrid GDN students. The method uses Taylor-guided teacher attention statistics to set the value projection, memory timescale, write gates, and output gate, then applies a short per-layer alignment step to match each converted layer to the teacher output. Across four teacher settings and three retained-layer policies, Taylor-Calibrate gives substantially stronger zero-shot students, with up to an 88x improvement in a representative ablation, and reaches matched recovery targets with 4.9x--9.2x fewer training tokens than naive conversion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Taylor-Calibrate方法，通过泰勒展开引导的教师注意力统计信息，对混合门控DeltaNet（GDN）学生模型进行轻量级初始化，显著提升零样本转换效果并大幅减少蒸馏所需token数。
AI.motivation: 将预训练Transformer转换为混合线性注意力模型（如GDN）时，直接复制参数无法正确初始化新的递归衰减、写入和输出门控动态，导致学生模型起始动力学状态差、蒸馏效率低。
AI.method: 利用教师模型注意力机制的泰勒展开近似统计，初始化学生模型的价值投影、记忆时间尺度、写门和输出门；再通过每层短时对齐步骤使学生层输出匹配教师层输出。
AI.result: 在四种教师设置和三种保留层数策略下，Taylor-Calibrate显著提升零样本性能，在典型消融中最高达88倍改进，并以4.9–9.2倍更少训练token达到与基线相当的恢复目标。
AI.conclusion: Taylor-Calibrate是一种高效、即插即用的初始化方法，能大幅提升Transformer到混合线性注意力模型的转换质量与效率，为长上下文建模提供实用路径。

title: GOOSE-M2F: Adapting Mask2Former for High-Fidelity, Long-Tailed Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation in Unstructured Outdoor Terrain
comment: This solution has got 3rd position at GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation (FGSS) Challenge at ICRA~2026
summary: We present GOOSE-M2F, a task-specific adaptation of Mask2Former for the GOOSE 2D Fine-Grained Semantic Segmentation (FGSS) Challenge at ICRA~2026. The GOOSE benchmark spans 64 fine-grained classes across unstructured outdoor terrain with a severely long-tailed distribution, where rare classes occupy fewer than 50 pixels per image. We extend the Swin-Large Mask2Former baseline with three targeted contributions: (1)200 Object Queries to eliminate representational saturation; (2)a Feature Refinement Module (FRM) combining ASPP-lite and CBAM dual-attention; and (3)an Auxiliary Supervision Head that delivers direct per-pixel gradients for rare classes. A multi-stage training strategy pairs Distribution-Balanced loss, Rare-Class Copy-Paste augmentation, dynamic IoU-aware re-weighting, and EMA. At inference, a dense sliding-window engine with 2D Gaussian kernel blending and 4-scale TTA adds +10.57\%. GOOSE-M2F achieves 70.08\% Official Composite mIoU (63.55\% fine, 76.61\% coarse), placing 3rd on the GOOSE 2D FGSS leaderboard. Code and trained models are publicly available at: \href{https://github.com/Aditya-Lingam-9000/GOOSE-M2F}{Github GOOSE-M2F Code} and \href{https://huggingface.co/XYZ9843/GOOSE-M2F}{Hugging Face GOOSE-M2F}.

AI.tldr: GOOSE-M2F 是 Mask2Former 针对 GOOSE 2D 细粒度语义分割挑战的改进模型，通过增加对象查询、引入特征精炼模块与辅助监督头，并结合多阶段训练与密集滑窗推理策略，在严重长尾分布数据上显著提升罕见类分割性能，最终在官方榜单上取得第三名。
AI.motivation: 解决 GOOSE 基准中 64 类细粒度户外地形分割任务的严重长尾问题（部分罕见类每图仅占少于 50 像素），提升罕见类识别精度。
AI.method: 基于 Swin-Large Mask2Former，提出三项改进：(1) 增加至 200 个对象查询以缓解表征饱和；(2) 设计融合 ASPP-lite 和 CBAM 的特征精炼模块（FRM）；(3) 添加面向罕见类的辅助像素级监督头；训练采用分布均衡损失、罕见类复制粘贴增强、动态 IoU 感知重加权及 EMA；推理使用带高斯融合与四尺度 TTA 的密集滑窗引擎。
AI.result: 在 GOOSE 2D FGSS 挑战中取得官方综合 mIoU 70.08%（细粒度 63.55%，粗粒度 76.61%），排名第三；推理优化带来 +10.57% 提升。
AI.conclusion: GOOSE-M2F 有效缓解了细粒度语义分割中长尾分布带来的罕见类学习难题，验证了对象查询扩展、注意力增强特征精炼与针对性监督机制的协同有效性。

title: Autonomous End-to-End SOH Prediction Services for Battery Systems via Temporal-Contrastive Representation Learning
summary: Accurate state of health (SOH) estimation is a critical diagnostic service for lithium-ion battery management. However, reliance on labor-intensive manual feature engineering and opaque black-box models hinders scalable industrial deployment. To address this, we introduce TC-SOH: a modular, plug-and-play service architecture for autonomous, end-to-end SOH prediction. TC-SOH employs a temporal-contrastive mechanism and a cross-window prediction pretext task to extract degradation-relevant representations directly from raw operational data. To improve transparency, we connect model efficacy with representation diagnostics: visualization, sensitivity analysis, redundancy analysis, bidirectional probing, future-SOH probing, and temporal shuffling show that learned features overlap with selected expert descriptors while retaining additional SOH-relevant variation, and that ordered temporal context improves subsequent-SOH prediction. Across four public datasets, TC-SOH outperforms the considered physics-informed and data-driven baselines, reducing MAPE by 1.91 times and RMSE by 2.13 times.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TC-SOH框架，通过时序对比学习与跨窗口预测任务，实现锂离子电池健康状态（SOH）的端到端自主估计，兼具高精度与可解释性，在多个公开数据集上显著优于现有物理模型与数据驱动方法。
AI.motivation: 现有SOH估计方法依赖人工特征工程和黑箱模型，难以在工业中规模化部署。
AI.method: 提出TC-SOH架构，采用时序对比机制和跨窗口预测预训练任务，从原始运行数据中自主提取退化相关表征；结合多种表征诊断手段（可视化、敏感性分析、冗余分析、双向探针、未来SOH探针、时间打乱）提升模型透明度。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上，TC-SOH相较物理信息与纯数据驱动基线方法，MAPE降低1.91倍，RMSE降低2.13倍；表征诊断证实其学习特征既覆盖专家选定指标，又捕获额外SOH相关信息，且时序顺序对后续SOH预测至关重要。
AI.conclusion: TC-SOH实现了高精度、可解释、免人工特征的SOH端到端估计，为电池管理系统的工业落地提供了可行架构。

title: Learning Directional Semantic Transitions for Longitudinal Chest X-ray Analysis
summary: Chest X-ray (CXR) interpretation often requires longitudinal comparison to assess disease progression. Existing approaches typically rely on temporal feature fusion or inter-study discrepancy modeling, yet remain limited in capturing subtle progression semantics and overlook the inherently directional nature of disease trajectories. In this paper, we propose ProTrans, a novel vision-language pretraining framework that formulates disease progression as a directional semantic transition between paired CXR studies. ProTrans leverages radiology reports to anchor individual CXR representations within interpretable disease states, and introduces a learnable progression feature map to explicitly encode semantic shifts between states, aligned with report-derived progression descriptions. To enforce direction-aware perception, ProTrans incorporates a reversed temporal modeling process and imposes bidirectional reconstruction consistency across states and transitions, thereby disentangling directional semantics and promoting coherent trajectory modeling. Extensive experiments on longitudinal downstream tasks, including disease progression classification and progression captioning, demonstrate that ProTrans consistently outperforms existing methods, establishing a unified pretraining framework for longitudinal CXR understanding. https://github.com/RPIDIAL/ProTrans

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProTrans框架，通过视觉-语言预训练将疾病进展建模为配对胸部X光片之间的有向语义转移，利用放射报告锚定疾病状态，并引入可学习的进展特征图和反向时间建模，以提升纵向CXR理解性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以捕捉细微的疾病进展语义，且忽略了疾病轨迹固有的方向性。
AI.method: 提出ProTrans框架：利用放射报告锚定X光片的疾病状态；设计可学习的进展特征图显式编码状态间语义变化；引入反向时间建模与双向重建一致性约束，解耦方向语义并建模连贯轨迹。
AI.result: 在疾病进展分类与进展描述生成等纵向下游任务上，ProTrans持续优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ProTrans构建了一个统一的纵向胸部X光理解预训练框架，有效建模疾病进展的方向性语义。

title: SDS-LoRA: Overcoming Anisotropic Gradient Scaling in Low-Rank Adaptation
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enables efficient adaptation of large pre-trained models to downstream tasks by parameterizing weight updates with low-rank matrices. In this paper, we investigate the limitations of the LoRA parameterization from a geometric perspective. Specifically, we show that when a full fine-tuning gradient is backpropagated to the low-rank matrices, it undergoes anisotropic scaling driven by their singular values. We argue that this phenomenon is undesirable because it distorts the full fine-tuning gradient by skewing it toward dominant singular directions while suppressing others. Our analyses demonstrate that anisotropic gradient scaling reduces the effective rank of the low-rank matrices' gradients and results in suboptimal alignment between the full fine-tuning gradient and its low-rank approximation in LoRA, thereby exacerbating the gap to full fine-tuning. To address these limitations, we propose a new low-rank parameterization, SDS-LoRA, which structurally decouples singular values from the backward pass. Our method ensures that the full fine-tuning gradient backpropagates only through the orthonormal bases of the low-rank matrices' subspaces, independent of their scales. Convergence analysis demonstrates that while LoRA's convergence rate degrades with the condition number of the low-rank matrices, SDS-LoRA remains independent of it. Experimental results across natural language and vision benchmarks show that SDS-LoRA improves loss convergence and reduces the gap to full fine-tuning, significantly enhancing adaptation performance.

AI.tldr: 本文从几何角度分析了LoRA参数化方法的局限性，指出其在反向传播过程中因奇异值导致的各向异性梯度缩放会扭曲全量微调梯度；为此提出SDS-LoRA，解耦奇异值与反向传播路径，使梯度仅经正交基传递，从而提升收敛性与性能。
AI.motivation: LoRA在反向传播中因低秩矩阵奇异值导致各向异性梯度缩放，扭曲全量微调梯度，降低有效秩并恶化梯度对齐，增大与全量微调的差距。
AI.method: 提出SDS-LoRA，通过结构化设计将低秩矩阵的奇异值从反向传播路径中解耦，确保梯度仅沿其子空间的正交基回传，不受奇异值尺度影响，并进行收敛性分析。
AI.result: SDS-LoRA在NLP和视觉基准上显著改善损失收敛速度，缩小与全量微调的性能差距，且收敛速率不依赖于低秩矩阵条件数。
AI.conclusion: SDS-LoRA通过解耦奇异值与梯度传播路径，缓解LoRA的几何失真问题，在理论收敛性和实际性能上均优于原始LoRA。

title: You Don't Need Strong Assumptions: Visual Representation Learning via Temporal Differences
summary: Progress in AI has largely been driven by methods that assume less. As compute and data increase, approaches with weaker inductive biases generally outperform those with stronger assumptions. This is particularly characteristic of the field of Visual Representation Learning, where approaches have gone from being dominated by Supervised Learning, to Weakly Supervised Learning, to the now widespread success of Self-Supervised Learning without human labels. Yet, even modern Self-Supervised Learning approaches still depend on strong inductive biases such as augmentations, masking, or cropping. If this trend holds, even these remaining biases should become bottlenecks at scale -- and our experiments confirm this: the optimal strength of inductive biases decreases as data grows. This motivates the search for approaches that rely on fewer assumptions. To this end, we introduce Temporal Difference in Vision (TDV), a new paradigm for self-supervised learning from video that avoids existing inductive biases, relying instead on a causal assumption that the past causes the future. TDV functions by jointly training an image encoder and a motion encoder so that the current frame's representation plus the encoded motion equals the next frame's representation. Despite not leveraging any strong inductive biases, TDV matches state-of-the-art recipes on dense spatial tasks, laying the foundation for representation learning without strong assumptions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的自监督视觉表征学习范式TDV（Temporal Difference in Vision），摒弃了传统方法中依赖的数据增强、掩码等强归纳偏置，仅基于‘过去导致未来’这一因果假设，通过联合训练图像编码器和运动编码器，使当前帧表征加运动表征等于下一帧表征。实验表明其在密集空间任务上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 随着计算和数据规模增长，弱归纳偏置的方法更优；但当前自监督学习仍依赖强归纳偏置（如增强、掩码），而这些偏置在大数据下会成为瓶颈，因此需探索更少假设的学习范式。
AI.method: 提出TDV方法：基于时间因果假设（过去决定未来），联合训练图像编码器与运动编码器，使得当前帧表征 + 运动编码 = 下一帧表征，无需数据增强、掩码或裁剪等常见归纳偏置。
AI.result: TDV在密集空间任务（如语义分割）上达到当前最优性能，验证了不依赖强归纳偏置的可行性。
AI.conclusion: TDV为摆脱强归纳偏置的视觉表征学习提供了新路径，支持‘越少假设越强’的发展趋势，并为大规模无偏学习奠定基础。

title: SPRI: SVD-Partitioned Residual Initialization for Data-Constrained MoE Upcycling
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models enable efficient scaling, but training them from scratch remains prohibitively expensive. MoE upcycling mitigates this cost by converting pretrained dense models into sparse MoE models. However, existing upcycling methods typically rely on large-scale continued training and often perform poorly under data-constrained supervised adaptation, due to either homogeneous experts or overly disruptive perturbations to pretrained parameters. In this setting, effective upcycling must leverage pretrained weight structure while introducing sufficient diversity among routed experts. To this end, we propose SVD-Partitioned Residual Initialization (SPRI), which distributes SVD-partitioned residuals derived from pretrained feed-forward network (FFN) weights across routed experts, introducing controlled expert diversity grounded in pretrained spectral structure. We further introduce a two-stage training strategy to improve adaptation stability. We evaluate SPRI on multilingual speech-to-text translation, where limited supervised data challenges MoE upcycling and multiple target languages provide natural routing heterogeneity. On CoVoST2 across 15 En-to-XX directions, SPRI improves average BLEU and COMET over fully fine-tuned dense models by 2.58 and 3.32 points, respectively, and outperforms the prior best MoE upcycling baseline by 3.39 BLEU and 4.34 COMET points.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SVD-Partitioned Residual Initialization（SPRI）方法，通过将预训练FFN权重的SVD分解残差分配给路由专家，实现高效、低数据依赖的MoE模型上转化，在多语言语音翻译任务中显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE上转化方法在数据受限的监督微调场景下表现不佳，主要因专家同质化或对预训练参数扰动过大；需在保留预训练权重结构的同时引入足够专家多样性。
AI.method: 提出SVD-Partitioned Residual Initialization（SPRI），将预训练FFN权重经SVD分解后的残差按谱结构分配至各路由专家，并设计两阶段训练策略提升适配稳定性。
AI.result: 在CoVoST2数据集15个英到其他语言方向上，SPRI相比全量微调稠密模型提升平均BLEU 2.58分、COMET 3.32分；相比先前最优MoE上转化基线提升BLEU 3.39分、COMET 4.34分。
AI.conclusion: SPRI通过谱感知的残差初始化与稳定训练策略，实现了数据高效、性能优越的MoE上转化，尤其适用于多语言、低资源场景。

title: Privacy from Symmetry: Orthogonally Equivariant Transformers for LLM Inference
summary: Running large language models locally is often impractical, pushing inference on sensitive text to third-party providers. Split inference partially mitigates this by keeping tokens on the client and sending only hidden representations, but these representations can still be recovered via nearest-neighbor search against the public embedding table. We propose an orthogonal obfuscation procedure in which the client multiplies embeddings by a secret orthogonal matrix before transmission. To enable correct inference under arbitrary rotations, we introduce ConjFormer, a transformer variant that is exactly $\mathrm{O}(d)$-equivariant via a lightweight normalization change (scalar RMSNorm) together with blockwise orthogonal conjugation of all linear weights. As a result, the server performs the full forward pass entirely in the rotated basis and never observes unrotated hidden states. Experiments on GPT-2 and Llama 3.2 1B models fine-tuned on PubMed show that orthogonal obfuscation eliminates direct cosine nearest-neighbor inversion and reduces token recovery from over 35% top-10 to at most 1.3%, while increasing perplexity by only 0.4% after fine-tuning. These results indicate that enforcing symmetry at the architectural level can provide a practical defense for privacy-preserving LLM inference without noise injection or heavy cryptographic machinery.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ConjFormer的新型Transformer架构，通过引入O(d)-等变性设计（结合标量RMSNorm与分块正交共轭权重），配合客户端使用秘密正交矩阵对嵌入进行旋转，实现隐私保护的分割推理；实验表明该方法几乎消除基于余弦相似度的token恢复攻击，将top-10 token恢复率从35%以上降至≤1.3%，仅带来0.4%困惑度上升。
AI.motivation: 本地运行大语言模型不现实，而将敏感文本送至第三方服务又引发隐私风险；现有分割推理虽保留token在客户端，但隐藏表示仍可通过公开嵌入表的最近邻搜索被还原。
AI.method: 客户端用秘密正交矩阵旋转词嵌入；服务器端采用ConjFormer——一种O(d)-等变的Transformer变体，其通过标量RMSNorm和线性层权重的分块正交共轭，确保整个前向传播在旋转基下完成，从而避免暴露原始隐藏状态。
AI.result: 在GPT-2和Llama 3.2 1B（PubMed微调）上验证：正交混淆完全阻断直接余弦最近邻逆向攻击，top-10 token恢复率由>35%降至≤1.3%，困惑度仅增加0.4%（微调后）。
AI.conclusion: 在模型架构层面强制对称性（O(d)-等变性）可提供实用、轻量且无需加噪或复杂密码学的LLM隐私推理防御方案。

title: CRIS: Cross-Plane Self-Supervised Isotropic Restoration for Anisotropic Volumetric Imaging Across Modalities
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures, supplementary material included. Submitted to Medical Image Analysis
summary: Anisotropic volumetric acquisitions are common in clinical MRI and volume electron microscopy (vEM), where sparse through-plane sampling creates thick slices or sections that degrade orthogonal reformats and downstream analysis. We present CRIS, a cross-plane self-supervised framework for isotropic restoration without paired isotropic ground truth. CRIS casts 3D restoration as 2D stripe completion on orthogonal reformats of an isotropic grid: high-resolution in-plane slices are synthetically degraded and periodically masked for training, while at inference blank slices define the isotropic grid, two orthogonal reformats are restored, and predictions are fused by multi-view averaging. We evaluate CRIS on two MRI cohorts and two microscopy benchmarks up to 8x anisotropy. On brain MRI, CRIS achieves 32.921 +/- 0.436 dB PSNR and 0.9631 +/- 0.0027 SSIM, outperforming interpolation, SMORE4, SIMPLE, SA-INR, and ATME, and gives the best segmentation consistency (Dice 0.940 +/- 0.004, ASSD 0.245 +/- 0.014 mm, HD99 1.275 +/- 0.061 mm). On reference-free abdominal MRI, CRIS reduces FID/KID to 48.714/0.023. On vEM, CRIS outperforms interpolation, NIIV, and vEMINR, reaching 29.133 dB/0.834 3D PSNR/SSIM at 4x, 27.123 dB/0.734 on EPFL at 8x, and 21.915 dB/0.699 on noisy hemibrain data. In a robustness experiment, one variable-gap CRIS model evaluated across gap factors 3--7 and coronal, axial, and sagittal degradations maintained higher PSNR/SSIM than interpolation (36.36--31.14 dB and 0.977--0.932 vs. 33.07--27.85 dB and 0.951--0.853). These results support CRIS as a modality-flexible route to isotropic restoration without paired isotropic targets or configuration-specific retraining. Code is available at https://github.com/adi-hatav/CRIS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CRIS，一种无需配对各向同性真值的跨平面自监督框架，用于各向异性MRI和电子显微镜（vEM）数据的各向同性重建。通过在正交重采图像上进行2D条纹补全，并结合多视角平均融合，CRIS在多个数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 临床MRI和体积电子显微镜（vEM）中常存在各向异性体数据，稀疏的层间采样导致切片过厚，影响正交重采与下游分析。现有方法多依赖配对各向同性真值或需针对不同配置重新训练，缺乏通用性和实用性。
AI.method: CRIS将3D各向同性重建建模为正交重采图像上的2D条纹补全任务：训练时对高分辨率平面切片进行合成退化与周期性掩码；推理时以空白切片构建各向同性网格，恢复两个正交重采视图，并通过多视角平均融合预测结果。
AI.result: 在脑部MRI上，CRIS达到PSNR 32.921±0.436 dB、SSIM 0.9631±0.0027，分割一致性最佳（Dice 0.940±0.004）；在腹部MRI中FID/KID显著降低；在vEM数据上也全面优于插值及NIIV、vEMINR等方法；鲁棒性实验显示其在不同间隙因子和扫描方向下均稳定优于插值。
AI.conclusion: CRIS是一种模态通用、无需配对真值、无需配置重训练的各向同性重建新范式，在MRI与vEM中均展现出优越性能与强鲁棒性。

title: Learning aligned EEG representations with subject-specific encoders
summary: Cross-subject EEG decoding promises more training data, but it also exposes neural networks to strong inter-subject distribution shifts. We study whether task supervision and architecture alone can learn subject-aligned representations. We replace a shared EEG encoder with subject-specific encoders followed by a common classifier, and compare this hybrid model with standard EEGNet, AttentionBaseNet, and CTNet baselines with Euclidean Alignment (EA) on four motor-imagery datasets. EA improves shared encoders by recentering subject covariances, but the hybrid encoder largely internalises this role: validation-loss curves and latent-distance analyses change little when EA is removed. Subject-specific heads increase class distinctiveness and place each subject close to its own latent manifold, improving most subjects while leaving a method-sensitive subset. These results support subject-specific encoders as a learned alignment mechanism for EEG decoding and identify head selection for unseen subjects as the remaining bottleneck.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了跨被试EEG解码中如何应对被试间分布偏移问题，提出使用被试特异性编码器替代共享编码器的混合模型，并发现该模型能内在地实现对齐，无需额外的欧氏对齐（EA）方法。
AI.motivation: 跨被试EEG解码面临强烈的被试间分布偏移问题，现有方法依赖外部对齐技术（如欧氏对齐），本文探究仅靠任务监督与网络结构是否可学习到被试对齐的表征。
AI.method: 提出一种混合模型：为每个被试配备独立的EEG编码器，后接共享分类器；在四个运动想象数据集上与EEGNet、AttentionBaseNet、CTNet（配合欧氏对齐）进行对比；通过验证损失曲线和潜在空间距离分析评估对齐效果。
AI.result: 混合模型在去除欧氏对齐后性能几乎不变，表明其自身具备对齐能力；被试特异性编码器提升了类别判别性，并使各被试在潜在空间中靠近自身流形，整体性能优于基线，但对部分被试效果敏感；头选择（head selection）成为泛化至未见被试的主要瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 被试特异性编码器可作为可学习的对齐机制，有效缓解跨被试EEG解码中的分布偏移问题，未来需重点解决新被试的编码器选择问题。

title: HadBalance: A Plug-and-Play Unified Global Geometric Prior Framework for Generalizable Biomedical Segmentation
comment: Provisionally accepted by the 29th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2026). 11 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables
summary: Precise biomedical image segmentation is crucial for clinical diagnosis. Geometric cues (e.g., boundary, shape, and topology) can improve structural consistency, yet most are task-specific and lack a unified geometric foundation that generalizes across organs and modalities. We are motivated by the observation that several medical segmentation targets can be approximated as globally near-convex shapes. A convex region is one in which any two interior points can be connected by a line segment entirely contained within the region. In practice, medical targets may exhibit small local concavities or boundary irregularities; we refer to such globally convex-like shapes as near-convex. Motivated by this, we derive Hadwiger Shape Priors from Hadwiger's theorem as an interpretable global regularizer using three 2D measures: area A, perimeter P, and Euler characteristic chi, enabling transfer across organs and modalities. However, because medical datasets are shape-heterogeneous, enforcing near-convex priors uniformly can over-regularize non-convex anatomy with significant concavities, washing out concavities and fine details and degrading segmentation accuracy. To address this challenge, we propose Conflict-Aware Objective Balancing (CAOB), which integrates shape priors with segmentation in a gradient-aware manner.
